Unsure whether it was the material of the chain or the flame enhancement effect, the chain could actually extend indefinitely. The wounds on Chen Rui’s body gradually increased, but thanks to the powerful abilities of <Astral Form> and <Damage Absoprtion>, his combat power wasn’t much affected.

Mikas constantly attacked heavily, but he still couldn’t kill Aguile. He secretly frowned: Initially I wanted to drag for awhile and let the deadly poison of the burning chain take effect. Yet, after such a long time, Aguile is still energetic; he is completely unaffected by the toxins. It seems that I have to use my ultimate move.

Mikas had rich combat experience, and he had gradually figure out Chen Rui’s rhythm. He moved his mind, and once again he teleported and appeared in front of Chen Rui. The demonic fire that he had been deliberately condensed erupted. His power instantly rose to the extreme. He shouted, “<Burning Snake Attack>!”

The advantage of the chain should be its long range. Now that Mikas abandoned the advantage and shortened the distance, he must have a powerful move. While Chen Rui was being carefully watching out, a strong sense of crisis flooded his mid. The scene before his eyes changed and the chain turned into a lot of huge, poisonous flame snakes opening their mouth biting toward him. Is that an illusion? Or magic?

The chain wasn’t a living thing, so he couldn’t find out anything with analysis.

Countless “poisonous snake” instantly swallowed Chen Rui in the middle. The cloaked figure was burned by the flame’s power and turned into ash.

The energy consumed on this attack for Mikas was also quite huge. However, the Great Demon who eliminated his enemy wasn’t happy and frowned. He looked up and saw a naked man leaping high. That was Chen Rui who escaped from the fire snakes. The only thing that was burnt just now was only the cloak.

A few shocking wounds were added to Chen Rui’s body. Fortunately, he escaped through the disappearing gap above him at the last moment. Although he was out of danger, he was so shocked that he broke out in cold sweat. Mikas’ attack was definitely not an illusion as the chain suddenly multiplied into hundreds. <Astral Form> and <Damage Absorption> might be powerful, but it didn’t mean that he was immortal. If he was actually hit directly, he would definitely die. No wonder Mikas once said “sliced you into hundreds of pieces”. It turned out that he truly had such an ultimate move.

Mikas reacted extremely fast. His demonic fire blazed; he quickly gathered his remaining power. He snorted and launched <Burning Snake Attack> at full force toward the falling figure in the sky.

Chen Rui didn’t have any skill to teleport or fly and there wasn’t any place to support mid-air. so he could no longer escape. Facing hundreds of deadly snakes at his feet, his brain instantly became extremely calm. The power of his hands became strange, glowing faintly as if it was metallic.

Soon, Chen Rui’s falling figure had collided with hundreds of burning snakes. “ Boom! ” A huge force gushed out from the center of the burning snakes and spread out to more than 10 meters away. Wherever it passed, stones and dust were flying.

Within the smoke, it could be faintly seen that hundreds of burning snake suddenly paused and sliced through at waist level. When the dust settled, the burning snakes had completely disappeared. Under the purple moonlight, two shadows were crossing on each other; one was kneeling with one leg on the ground and another was standing.

The one kneeling with one leg was Chen Rui. His back was pierced through by the sharp scythe to his right chest. The tip of the blade was constantly dripping with blood and his naked body was covered with multiple horrifying wounds of various sizes as if he was cut by thousands of knives. The other side of the scythe was held in Mikas’ hand, who was standing.

The Great Demon glanced at the chain in his hand and he looked incredulous. He seemed to want to say something, but his opened mouth could no longer make a sound. Soon, the dark chain broke into two from the center; it was as smooth as it was sliced by a sharp blade. At the same time, with the Mikas’ brows as the axis, from his head to his groin, a straight line of wound appeared and huge amount of blood gushing out. His body was divided into two and fell to the ground.

Chen Rui reached out his left hand and grabbed the short handle of the scythe at his back. The moment that he grabbed it tightly, his body trembled painfully and he clenched his teeth to endure it. His left hand forcefully pulled out the sharp edge penetrated into his body. His blood splashed around as he was gasping for air.

This battle with Mikas was the most dangerous battle in Chen Rui’s life. When he rushed into the attack range of the <Burning Snake Attack> just now, although he relied on his keen sense to dodge, he still received countless cuts. If it wasn’t for his instinctive reaction that he avoided Mikas’ fatal blow, he would be the one fallen to the ground now.

<Aura Blade>, Mikas was killed with that new skill. The damage of <Aura Blade> was way more powerful than expected, slicing Mikas and the chain in two. Although <Aura Blade> only cost 20 auras per usage, that was just additional consumption. It actually consumed Star Power. He felt that <Aurora Shot> consumed lesser Star Power than it, at least he didn’t have the feeling of being instantly emptied out.

Chen Rui’s injuries were extremely serious this time, especially his right chest. His lung was penetrated and the blood was flowing out endlessly. Fortunately, he had the two major passive abilities, <Astral Form> and <Damage Absorption>. Otherwise, he would have been sliced into pieces when he was going head-on against the <Burning Snake Attack>. He exchanged a Healing Potion and drank it to clot the blood, then took out a new cloak and put it on.

There was also a space bracelet on the wrist of Mikas’ corpse; there should be something good within. Just when Chen Rui was trying to pick up his spoil, his eyes suddenly brightened and a mask appeared in his hand. He quickly covered his face and said calmly, “Come out. Does all Great Demons like to hide?”

“ Oh? You actually noticed me?” A few applause sounded from the back of a big tree. “I have to praise that the battle just now was really exciting; you even forcibly break through Mikas’s <Burning Snake Attack>. For you to be able to kill Mikas, you can truly be considered as reputable in the Dark Moon now…”

After Chen Rui entered Mizar state, he kept having the faint feeling of being watched. The reason that he found this person was because the person entered the range of <Analytical Eyes> as he approached.

The effective range of <Analytical Eyes> in Mizar state was doubled. It could show the opponent’s race. Great Demon was shown just now and the Comprehensive Strength Assessment was D whereas the rest were still unknown.

The man slowly came out, and it really was a male Great Demon. When Chen Rui saw the other person’s appearance clearly, he was petrified. It was actually Royce, one of the 3 Higher Demons under Joseph!

The mantis stalks the cicada, unaware of the oriole behind. I never expect there’s an oriole hiding at the side!

“Sir Royce can really stay calm. You actually watch in silent for so long.” Chen Rui thought quickly. For Royce to appear here, it is likely that he started following since I left the arena. I was putting my life at stake to fight with Mikas just now and didn’t bother about other things. Did Royce see my true appearance?

According to the information, Royce belonged to those that possessed both bravery and intelligence; he was quite wise. However, his strength as a middle-stage Higher Demon was absolutely not a fluke. He might probably be one of the strongest in this stage. Currently, Chen Rui was physically exhausted and his injuries were very serious, so he couldn’t fight at all.

Royce’s next sentence almost gave him goosebumps, “Actually, you are the one that can really stay calm. I admire this very much. Should I call you little apprentice? Or Sir Secretary?”

The most concerning thing finally happened. This Royce really found out Chen Rui’s greatest secret!

“I don’t understand what you just said?” Chen Rui’s heart was pumping hard. He thought of his newly-acquired skills. Suddenly, he had an idea.

“I don’t know what method you used to change your scent. Not only your strength increased tremendously, but your original human scent has also disappeared.” Royce looked at Chen Rui with an interested look. “If it wasn’t for me to witness you killing Mikas, I would never believe the human who looks powerless and timid actually hides such considerable strength.”

As he said, the Great Demon looked like he was pondering, “Based on this, in the previous Sky Battle, Alan’s loss was not surprising as you also likely to have the beast taming ability…”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. Royce’s intelligence was really extraordinary. A bellicose man like Arux was absolutely incomparable. Chen Rui immediately said, “I don’t need to explain. It’s okay if you want to see my face. However, you have to accept my challenge just like Arux did.”

“Really? Then please satisfy my curiosity.” Royce stared at the eyes behind the mask and said with a smile, “Besides, you don’t seem to have any other choice now.”

Chen Rui used his newly acquired skill, <Camouflage>, then he took off his mask and lifted the cloak of his head. Royce looked at it carefully and frowned. He wasn’t familiar with this face, and it looked ordinary. It was just the eyes that were bright.

Royce said with a deep voice, “Are you… part of the royal family? The ultimate move that killed Mikas just now was some kind of extraordinary talent?”

Chen Rui wanted Royce to think in that direction badly, so he nodded. Suddenly, he heard Royce laughing, “You thought I’ll be deceived so easily? You wear a mask every time you appear, so you must be wanting to hide your true identity. For you to remove it so easily, I’m almost certain that this is not your true face. Not to mention that I just saw your true face during the battle just now! I am different from Arux; I have no interest in the so-called challenge.”

Chen Rui’s heart sunk. It seemed that Royce was definitely not someone easy to deal with.

Sure enough, the Great Demon’s laughter became creepy, “Also, you actually drank black potions at the beginning. I am not an idiot like Mikas who doesn’t use the brain. Does that mean that Master Aldas truly advances to the grand master level? The secrets that you’re hiding are really not little. Actually, it is very simple to solve these mysteries… Can’t I just capture you and slowly interrogate?”

As the laughter stopped, that man had already appeared before Chen Rui. That wasn’t teleportation, but his own speed. That speed was at least 3 times faster than Mikas after using demonic fire!

chapters.title: Chapter 69 - Blue Lake! Royce’S Misstep
chapters.body:
Chapter 69 - Blue Lake! Royce’S Misstep

Chen Rui initially had the intention of dragging the time and recover his injury. Seeing Royce falling out now, he had long prepared for this in his mind. He shouted, “<Aura Blade>!”

Royce had just witnessed Chen Rui sliced Mikas into half with his secret move, so he didn’t dare to underestimate. He quickly focused and waited for it. He didn’t expect it to be a fake move; Chen Rui’s figure had quickly run in the opposite direction.

Royce smiled with despise. His body swayed slightly and he quickly followed up. Royce gradually began to understand Mikas’ feelings previously. This Aguile, or the guy who should be called Chen Rui was quite hard to deal with. Before advancing to Higher Demon, his speed barely reached the early stage of Higher Demon, so Royce couldn’t bother. Now, although the speed after advancing was still slightly inferior from his, Chen Rui was really cunning. He actually couldn’t intercept Chen Rui at once.

However, Royce wasn’t worried as Chen Rui wasn’t escaping toward the city. If he truly escaped to the palace in the city, and he was protected by Princess Royal, Shea, then even Royce wouldn’t dare to act recklessly.

Now that his opponent was seriously injured and flustered. With such a full-speed escape without considering stamina, he should be exhausted soon. Royce had rich experience; he was confident that his strength could defeat Chen Rui easily, so he wasn’t rushing. He followed calmly and patiently waited for the moment his opponent exhaust to launch an attack to capture him.

Chen Rui was lack of aura; he couldn’t exchange any more black potions. Besides, he just took the Healing Potion not long ago, so drinking another potion would be ineffective. He could only run desperately. Finally, the familiar blue lake appeared in front of him. As he ran forward at full speed without considering his stamina, his injuries were bleeding severely, especially the most serious wound on his right chest. Even with the passive ability of <Astral Form>, it couldn’t heal in time.

“Royce!” Chen Rui suddenly stopped, turned around and shouted, “Stop chasing me!”

“ Oh? Finally, you can’t run anymore? Now, you don’t even have the energy to use your secret technique right?” Royce who was behind Chen Rui stopped and looked at Chen Rui who was panting. Knowing his opponent was a spent force, Royce didn’t rush, “Did you finally think it through? You don’t want to suffer anymore? Or are you ready to fight for the last time? From your performance when you face Mikas, you’re a very tenacious guy. The latter option might be most probable. I want to remind you that I am not Mikas; you have no chance.”

“But… I can give you a chance,” Royce shrugged. “To be honest, I admire your strength and wisdom, no matter what your identity is and what’s your purpose, as long as you sign the master-servant contract and surrender to me, I can spare your life. Perhaps… I can even help you achieve some objectives. This is your last chance. I’ll give you a minute to consider. If you refuse, I will not hold back and I will attack at full force.”

“I will also give you a minute to consider, surrender or die,” Chen Rui was panting; he actually laughed too. He pointed at the lake, “Do you know why I escape to the blue lake?”

Royce shook his head and sighed, “Don’t insult my wisdom. Deliberately mystifying thing doesn’t make any sense. Are you telling me that you can summon the blue lake sealed dragon to kill me? Actually with your current strength, even if you angered me, you couldn’t catch any opening. Now, you have 40 seconds left to consider.”

“Paglio!” Chen Rui suddenly screamed, “Dumb*ss, if you still don’t show yourself, then I’ll suicide!”

“Paglio?” Royce frowned, “Is that the name you gave to the dragon sleeping in the blue lake? Don’t waste…”

Royce’s intelligence was extraordinary. According to common sense, there was really no chance for Chen Rui in his current situation. The problem was that this human being couldn’t be judged by using common sense at all. Thus, smart people could also be fooled by their own intelligence.

Before the words were finished, a loud voice sounded at the back of Great Demon, “Such an awful human, you actually used such a way to threaten a dragon. You’re like the first one in history.”

Royce’s facial expression changed drastically. With his ability, he actually didn’t realize when did the man come to his back. Then he thought of the blue lake dragon, the demonic fire on his body blazed and he activated his teleportation talent without hesitation. Royce’s first reaction was not to fight but to escape. If that dragon truly woke up, then not to mention the Higher Demon, even the higher level Demon King would be no match.

Royce teleported at full force and appeared more than 10 meters away. However, the voice still came behind his back, “Poor grim reaper, why don’t you teleport again for Master Paglio to see?”

Royce’s heart gradually sank; he slowly turned around. He saw a man with short, dark hair and brown skin grinning. Royce snorted and his demonic fire shone. Two red longswords appeared in his hands which instantly turned into an overlapping, huge red flower-shaped like the famous red demon-eating flower in the Demon Realm, covering Paglio. He went all out at his first strike.

However, this huge flower shattered instantly, and the poison dragon’s voice sounded.

“Using your ultimate move at the beginning, your judgment was pretty accurate. Unfortunately, you’re too weak!”

Subsequently, smashing sound was heard while Royce’s figure had already flown up and fallen hard on the ground right in front of Chen Rui. Royce was covering his mouth while he panted. He clenched his teeth to stand up; the fire on his body had become dimmer.

Royce reacted very quickly. He wanted to hold Chen Rui as a hostage, but Paglio’s figure appeared again in front of him, kicking him into the air, then he heavily smashed the Great Demon to the ground in mid-air. That seemingly casual attacks had already heavily damaged Royce. He could no longer stand.

Chen Rui finally understood how powerful Paglio was. Due to the seal, he was only at the power of a Great Demon King. If his seal was dispelled, he could…

In the Demon Realm, Paglio wasn’t the only 1 that possess Demon Overlord strength. The Raizen the Great of Bloody Empire was the strongest Demon Overlord in the Demon Realm while Catherine the Great of Dark Shadow Empire was also of the same strength, not to mention the scary man who sealed Paglio. Now, Chen Rui’s enemies were just the Higher Demons. After this, he would definitely face Demon King, Great Demon King, Demon Emperor…

Chen Rui wasn’t afraid of this, but he was full of fighting spirit. As long as he persisted and worked hard, becoming a legendary strongman wasn’t a dream. Currently, he had successfully reached Mizar state, and he had killed the Great Demon, Mikas; whereas just a few months ago, he was only a powerless weak man.

“ Hey! Stop daydreaming.” The poison dragon’s voice interrupted Chen Rui’s thoughts, “Is this the Great Demon that you mentioned? He’s so vulnerable. If we kill him, then we don’t have to worry about the war contract right?”

“Not him; it’s another Great Demon,” Chen Rui shook his head and reached his hand out shamelessly. “Give me a Jade Pearl. Can’t you see I’m dying?”

Not only Jade Pearl could detoxify, but it also cured the wounds. It was much more effective than Healing Potions. Besides, Healing Potions were low-level potions with relatively long “cooling” time. It was still on cooldown, so drinking it would be ineffective.

“Why are you still so energetic when you’re dying? Didn’t you say you want to suicide? Why don’t you die in front of me now?”

Although Paglio said that, he still threw a Jade Pearl over and looked at Chen Rui for a while. His voice suddenly became surprised,”Your current strength… is Higher Demon?”

“Yeah, I just have advanced not long ago, and I even killed a Higher Demon. However, this guy was very cunning; he only came out at the last moment. I was almost caught by him.” Chen Rui swallowed the Jade Pearl and frowned, “You’re so stingy, only gave me one! Also, this thing tastes really bad. Can’t you improve it?”

“Do you think this is a sugar pill? Such an insatiable guy!” Paglio looked annoyed, “Within 2 months, you actually advanced from Intermediate to Higher Demon! Why do you always have such good luck? You can even acquire something so rare like the grand master’s inheritance! Oh right, like what you said, the good things are wasted on you!”

Royce who had fallen to the ground didn’t faint. He wanted to risk using teleportation to escape again, but he was in an enfeeble state; he couldn’t use his strength. It should be some kind of deadly poison by the poison dragon. Besides, none of Paglio’s words didn’t shock him when he heard that.

The blue lake’s poison dragon actually broke the seal already and awakened!

Aguile really is the human, Chen Rui!

The relationship between the poison dragon and Chen Rui is absolutely not simple!

It takes only two months for Chen Rui to advance from Intermediate Demon to Higher Demon!

What is the grand master’s inheritance? Could it be, the actual grand master isn’t Aldas but…

How many shocking secrets is this powerless-looking human hiding…

However, Royce also knew that for the poison dragon to said so many secrets in front of him, the poison dragon undoubtedly not going to let him live.

If I had known earlier, I should have killed Chen Rui at full force on the way. It was useless to regret now, but he didn’t want to accept it.

“Master Poison Dragon.” Royce thought for a while and finally spoke, “I’m not a guy who isn’t afraid of death, but I’m not willing to die like this. If I’m willing to surrender, will you let me live?”

In the Demon Realm, surrendering to the strong wasn’t a shameful thing, especially a powerful dragon like Paglio.

Paglio looked at Royce curiously, then he nodded and said, “Your strength is slightly bad, but your reaction and brain aren’t bad; I can accept your surrender.”

As Royce just took a sigh of relief, he heard the poison dragon changed his tone, pointing at Chen Rui and saying, “However, the master that you’re signing the contract with isn’t me but this guy.”

Royce’s eyes were filled with anger; he lowered his head in silence. Paglio noticed Royce’s contradiction, and he said, “Do you think that this human is weaker than you, and it is a humiliation to surrender to him? I can assure you that he can easily trample on you after a month.”

Royce thought “Aguile’s” rapid progress and the challenge with Arux after a month, his mind finally began to change. At this time, the poison dragon exposed something surprise again, “I tell you that even the contract signed between me and this guy isn’t an equal contract but a symbiotic contract! An average person can carry only one contract, but this guy is an absolute freak as he has already carried two contracts with him.”

Royce was shocked, looking at Paglio’s serious face in surprise. His eyes then fell on Chen Rui: What power does this human have that he can make the poison dragon, a dragon-race strongman sign the symbiotic contract! Doesn’t that mean his life is a few millions of years long?

The poison dragon even told such a secret. It seems that if I don’t surrender, I will really die.

“I have my own glory and persistence.” Royce took a deep breath and supported his body to stand up. He looked directly at Chen Rui, “If you can promise me one thing, I am willing to be your servant. If not, I would rather die to maintain my glory.”

chapters.title: Chapter 70 - Surrender! Royce’S Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 70 - Surrender! Royce’S Conditions

Chapter 70: Surrender! Royce’s Conditions

Royce’s words made Chen Rui a little surprised and he asked, “Tell me what is it first?”

“Vasasha!” Royce’s eyes showed a strange brilliance, “You have to help me get her!”

Chen Rui knew that Vasasha, Arux, and Royce were called the 3 scythes in Joseph’s hands; they were also the 3 most powerful fighters. He never expected Royce to have such feelings for Vasasha.

“For this condition, I’ll promise on behalf of Chen Rui!” Paglio at the side didn’t think much as he thought: Isn’t it easy to get a woman?

“I want not only her body but also her heart! She should have been my wife, but she and her heart… was taken away by someone else! This person is Joseph!” Royce clenched his fists; his breathing became fast, and his eyes were full of undisguised anger.

It turned out that it wasn’t a matter of having improper thoughts, but the hatred of wife being taken away? Chen Rui was surprised and asked, “What is going on? You should make it clear first.”

Royce’s emotions gradually calmed down and told the truth of the matter.

Royce and Arux were originally members of the Kunda Family under the Red Spirit Lord; they had been friends since young. More than a hundred years ago, the patriarch of the Kunda Family, Royce’s father, Kahn was killed for offending Josh. The Kunda Family was deprived of their family name, and most members were reduced to being slaves. Arux was half way into the Greater Demon level, so he protected Royce to escape from the Red Spirit Estate when the guards weren’t paying attention. A few years later, Royce knew that his beloved fiancee, Vasasha had become Josh’s eldest son, Joseph’s maid.

When Arux and Royce tried everything they could to rescue Vasasha, Vasasha actually unwilling to leave. Joseph who came after defeated the two. Even Arux, who advanced to Greater Demon at the last second couldn’t rival Joseph. At that time, Joseph was fighting vigorously with his brother, Kanita, and he needed talent. So, he didn’t kill the two, but he asked them to surrender.

Arux was dissatisfied, and he requested to challenge again while Royce’s condition was Vasasha. Joseph was cunning and immediately promised Aurx that he could challenge once a year. Before he won, he must stay and serve under Joseph. The condition for Royce was simpler. As long as Vasasha was willing to follow Royce, Joseph would never stop. On the other hand, Royce had to be Joseph’s subordinate like Arux. In addition, Joseph also promised to restore Kunda Family’s honor as long as he took the position of the lord. However, Royce and Arux knew that Joseph was too far away from the lord’s position, so it could only be considered as an empty promise.

Because of that, Royce and Arux became Joseph’s subordinates. Both of them were capable and outstanding, so they were quickly valued. Arux challenged Joseph year after year, but he never succeeded; while Vasasha had already become Joseph’s woman. No matter what method Royce used, he couldn’t change her mind, and he had to continue to work under Joseph.

100 years have passed, although Royce had always been attached to Vasasha while Arux had never given up on challenging Joseph, time could always make people forget. Except for their persistence obsessions, both of them had gradually become accustomed to this life.

The female Great Demons were synonymous with loyalty. As long as one could truly get their heart and body, they would never betray. Yet, most of the male Great Demons were fickle. A man like Royce who was persistent for a woman that had lost virginity was truly an odd case.

Originally, Chen Rui only knew a little information from Shea; it was mainly about Arux’s part, so he previously provoked Arux to accept his challenge, and it was indeed successful. It was just that the signing of War Contract was unexpected. He finally understood the origin of the entire matter now. It seemed that not only Royce, but even Arux also wasn’t truly loyal to Joseph. As long as he could hit the critical point, it could make unpredictable changes.

However, making Vasasha changing her mind was indeed difficult.

Paglio frowned and said, “The loyalty of a female Great Demon is definitely a headache. Unless the man completely makes her lose hope or erase all the memories associated with that man with special magic. Otherwise, she will not change her mind even if we kill Joseph. It’s just that no one but the mad woman can use the magic that erases memory freely. If it’s someone else, even with the strength of Demon Overlord, the possibility that Vasasha becomes an idiot is quite huge.”

“Which mad woman?” Royce suddenly looked hopeful.

“Don’t have to think about that woman for the time being; the odd is actually one out ten thousand.” Chen Rui certainly knew who Paglio was talking about. With the grievances between the fairy dragon, Laura and Paglio, it would be good enough for her to help to dispel the seal for the treasure’s sake. Why would she help in such a matter? Not to mention he didn’t know where Laura was.

The only way was to let Joseph took the initiative to give up on Vasasha. However, what kind of person was Joseph? Even if he regarded Vasasha merely as a toy, he knew that controlling her was equivalent to controlling Royce, so he would never be stupid enough to harm himself.

“My idea is that since Vasasha will not give up on Joseph, then we can only make Joseph give up on her. With Joseph’s personality, as long as there is greater interest in front of him, there is nothing that he won’t give up except himself. You have already known my human identity. Actually, I am also the most trusted advisor of Princess Royal; I already have a plan to deal with Joseph. Rescuing Vasasha can be part of the plan. However, the current plan is just a prototype; it’s not the right time to execute it yet. So, you need to continue enduring. If you think this plan is feasible, we can sign the contract; if not, then I can only let you die with dignity.”

Royce’s eyes were full of brilliance. He looked into Chen Rui’s eyes for a moment, and he finally fell on one knee with a translucent, weird, red scroll appeared in his hand. The text seemed to be written by blood. That was the master-servant contract. Chen Rui didn’t use the blood of his wounds, but bit his fingers in a serious manner to sign his name.

Paglio accounted for a large part of the reason why Royce surrendered. Someone that made a powerful dragon to be willing to sign a symbiotic contract was definitely not simple, even if his current power was only at Greater Demon.

“Master.” Royce stood up and bowed at Chen Rui. The signing of the master-servant contract meant that the fate of Royce and Chen Rui would be connected. If the master died unexpectedly, the servant would also die; whereas the death of the servant had no effect on the master. So, Paglio also detoxified the poison on Royce.

If Chen Rui could truly fulfill Royce’s wish, it was very likely that he could win over all 3 scythes from Joseph. Moreover, Royce was responsible for the magic store. Chen Rui had long been eyeing on the materials within, so there were a lot of things that could be done.

“I have already learned master’s intelligence. Since you said that, you aren’t brushing me off.” The passion in Royce’s eyes was blazing. “I have already waited for more than 100 years. What else couldn’t I endure? Since we have signed the contract, I still have a secret to tell master.”

The reason that Royce’s father, Kahn was killed by the Red Spirit Lord, Josh was because of a rare treasure. This treasure was obtained after Kahn’s hard work, but unfortunately, someone blew the whistle, and he was eventually killed by Josh. Yet, the whereabouts of the treasure disappeared; it hadn’t been found.

In fact, the clues of the treasure were sealed by Kahn in the body of his son’s fiancee, Vasasha. Royce and Vasasha must be bonded to reveal the clues. Other than Royce, other men wouldn’t find out even if they acquired Vasasha. This secret was only known by Royce, even Vasasha herself didn’t know.

“Even if there isn’t any treasure, I will take back Vasasha! She is not only my fiancee, but also a woman I have secretly loved since childhood. In any case, I won’t allow any man to possess her!” Royce’s expression didn’t seem fake. Also, he had already signed the master-servant contract with Chen Rui; he would be a servant for the rest of his life. Therefore, lying wouldn’t make any sense. It seemed that Vasasha’s position in his heart was very important, “I can offer the treasure to master. However, there is one person whom I am willing to pay any cost to end his life with my hands. I beg for master’s help.”

As he said, Royce fell to his knees. As a Great Demon who regarded dignity and glory as important as his life, and who was the heir of a family once, he actually kneeled down again. It wasn’t for Chen Rui’s identity as a master, but it was a determined request.

Chen Rui and the poison dragon looked at each other and said, “I promise you!”

What surprised the two was that Royce wasn’t talking about Joseph, but another name: Ledo.

This enemy should have a family name that was the same as Royce, Kunda!

This plot of the story was very common. A child born out of wedlock was jealous of the heir and hated the family. He didn’t hesitate to blow the whistle to destroy his father and the entire family. He even offered his “brother’s” fiancee to his new master.

Ledo had always been in the dark, but he was Joseph’s most trusted person. Joseph understood the grudges between Royce and Ledo, so he didn’t let them meet each other. However, Royce still managed to find some clues. He was extremely abhorred against the culprit responsible for the destruction of the whole family; he had sworn to kill Ledo personally.

Royce was overjoyed by Chen Rui’s promise and reported another important thing: Joseph had already left Red Spirit Estate two days ago. He would arrive at Dark Moon Estate latest by the next morning.

“Joseph is back?” Chen Rui frowned. “He has already gotten rid of Kanita?”

“No.” Royce took a bottle of Healing Potion from his space equipment and drank it. He explained, “Joseph come back this time has two excuses. The first is to use the transportation of superior vined stones as an excuse, which is the bet lost to the little princess during the Air Battle; the second is to participate in the Dark Moon Estate’s quarterly meeting that is held once every three months. However, his true purpose isn’t on these matters, but it’s Master Aldas. When master came to the magic store last time, I reported to Joseph about Aldas attempting grand-master level potions, and Joseph is coming from that. I heard that he already has the clue of Aldas’ lost sister. He wanted to recruit or threaten Aldas to make Aldas his strongest pawn to fight against Kanita.”

“Grand master-level potions?” Chen Rui thought of the lies to get magic materials the other time, and he suddenly realized. He didn’t expect his lies would be treated seriously. Yet, being able to obtain clues on Aldas’ sister was important information. Chen Rui remained silent at once.

After a long time, Chen Rui finally said, “We would observe this matter for the time being. It is best to obtain the actual clues of Aldas’ sister. My injury isn’t minor, and I need to recuperate urgently. Yet, there is one more important thing now, which is Mikas. Mikas was sent by Alan to kill me. Although he was killed by me, a dead person didn’t mean there wasn’t any value. His body should be able to make good use for…”

“Does master want to use Mikas to provoke the contradiction between Joseph and the Karon Family?” Royce was also a smart man. Now that he had recovered his calm, he immediately guessed Chen Rui’s intentions.

Chen Rui nodded with admiration and he said his thoughts. Royce’s eyes were bright. He gave some ideas while listening; the lazy poison dragon also added into the conversation from time to time. A plan gradually formed from the discussion between 3 cunning men.

chapters.title: Chapter 71 - Big Incident
chapters.body:
Chapter 71 - Big Incident

Chapter 71: Big Incident

Late at night, the loud noises from a magic store in the Dark Moon City awoke the nearby demons. The shouts followed could be heard by almost the entire street, “Royce! You dare to destroy Young Master Alan’s plan! Today, I’ll ruin this magic store!”

In a distance, Royce’s angry voice was sounded, “Mikas!”

Mikas who destroyed the magic store heard the voice, and he didn’t dare to fight and disappeared in the blink of an eye. When Royce rushed to the magic store, the surviving lich, Grougis pointed in fear at the direction where Mikas escaped to.

……

After some time.

At the city gate, Mikas’ high-speed running figure stopped. Ganke was Alan’s subordinate, so he naturally recognized the Karon Family’s Higher Demon. Right after Ganke shouted “Sir Mikas”, he saw Mikas threw over a space bracelet in front of other soldiers, and he quickly caught it.

“I was blocked by Royce on my way back. Immediately pass that to Young Master Alan! Within it are the items I stole from the magic store…”

Before Mikas could finish his words, Royce’s voice sounded from behind, “Mikas, you dumbass; I’m going to kill you!”

Mikas had no time to say more; his figure moved and ran forward like wind, disappearing beyond the city gate. Ganke just kept the bracelet, then he saw Royce’s figure appeared instantly before him and he was shocked. Fortunately, Royce was eager to catch Mikas, so he didn’t “pay attention” to such minor character. Royce as well, moved his body slightly and disappeared on the spot.

……

Some time passed again.

Royce appeared at the city gate with a dispirited look, and there were also a few wounds on his body, then he disappeared instantly again.

Ganke had rushed to Alan’s mansion and gave the space bracelet to Alan. Alan opened it and saw a lot of magic equipment. After listening to Ganke’s story, he was wondering: Wasn’t Mikas going after Aguile? How did he have a dispute with Royce? Are these things robbed from the magic store? Yet, Mikas did a good job. There are two expensive magic equipments of superior quality that are not for sale. I have been eyeing on them for a long time; he actually got it for me this time. It seems that he is really tactful. It’s just that Joseph isn’t around in the Dark Moon, what should I do to settle this mess?

Right at that moment, a strange metallic voice sounded from the entrance, “The guy from the Karon Family! Get out now!”

A succubus came to report in a rush, “This is bad! Young Master Alan, Arux and Royce are fighting their way here with Sir Mikas’ corpse.”

Mikas is dead! The news shocked Alan shocked. He felt that things were getting increasingly strange, but he couldn’t figure it out at once. He hit the table furiously, “Damn, can someone tell me what’s happening?”

Tonight was destined to be a lively, sleepless night.

Early the next morning, the entire Dark Moon City was enthusiastically discussing the series of big events that happened last night.

Yesterday evening, a shocking event happened at the arena. No. 64, Aguile defeated Reka and publicly exposed the ugly act of cheating between Sheriff Alan and Balrog, Reka. As a result, Reka was killed by Arux who was the arena’s owner. Arux then announced an astonishing news that after a month, Aguile would directly challenge Arux him.

However, these were only the beginning of the shock. When Aguile left the arena, he was retaliated by Alan; he was chased by the Karon Family’s Higher Demon, Mikas. At that time, the financial officer, Joseph Alvin’s subordinate, Royce bumped into them. As his good friend, Arux publicly announced the challenge after a month, Royce prevented Mikas from killing Aguile.

No one expected Mikas would use his flame to poison Royce when he wasn’t paying attention. At that time, Aguile had taken the opportunity to escape. Mikas failed to catch up Aguile, so he took his anger out on Royce’s magic store. He destroyed the magic store and stole everything. Royce, who was furious couldn’t bother about the poison, chased Mikas all the way to the outside of the city and killed Mikas. Also, previously when Mikas was passing the city gate, he passed the space bracelet with all the treasures robbed from the magic store to Alan through Ganke. This could be proven by all the guarding soldiers.

Royce who was poisoned went to Arux. They carried Mikas’ corpse and fought their way to Alan’s mansion, hurting many people. Even the most powerful Higher Demon, Sarado of the Karon Family was alarmed. Sarado and Arux battled fiercely and both were heavily damaged eventually. Royce and Arux returned to the arena to recover while Sarado retrieved Mikas’ body. Now, their relationship was extremely tensed.

When Mikas was destroying the magic store last night, if it wasn’t for Royce’s timely arrival, the lich, Grougis in the store would almost be killed. Many residents in the vicinity also heard the noise of destruction and Royce’s furious roar. Many people could vividly describe the situation at that time. Some even described as if they witnessed the battle between Mikas and Royce. As for the subsequent battle of Sarado and Arux, there were even more witnesses. Now, shocking traces of battle could still be seen around the area around Sheriff Alan’s mansion.

The two biggest forces in the city were at daggers drawn, and it might even escalate to war at any time. As the lord of Dark Moon, Princess Royal, Shea naturally couldn’t sit and not do anything. She specifically made Gauss mediate, and she warned them not to fight on a large-scale in the city.

In fact, the happiest party was the one that tried to mediate. When the despicable Old Gauss tried to “mediate”, he also appropriately used certain wordings that, on the surface, was to limit the two parties, but in reality, it was to instigate quietly.

Chen Rui who had been busy the entire night didn’t return to the lab to rest, but he appeared in the council hall of the palace.

“Chen Rui?” Shea hadn’t seen him for a month. There was a hint of joy in her eyes. She nodded and said, “You came. Did you hear about the big incident last night? That is truly a godsend opportunity!”

“Why does Princess Royal also believe in godsend opportunity? I would rather believe that it’s someone’s effort. Even the legendary goddess of luck will always care for those who are prepared.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I’m here today to report two important things to Princess Royal.”

Shea was really clever; she faintly understood the meaning behind Chen Rui’s words. The sudden conflict between Alan and Joseph actually had an inside story. Her eyes had a weird brilliance when she thought of Chen Rui’s plan of “letting them fighting against each other”, then she remained calm later, “Do speak.”

Chen Rui looked serious, “Princess Royal, please forgive me for asking a rude question. Would you trust me entirely?”

“You have already gotten my trust.” Shea frowned slightly, “Is there something that you want to say.”

“That’s good,” Chen Rui nodded. “I want to introduce someone to you. He may not meet you, but please trust him as much as you trust me.”

“Who?”

“The actual protagonist of last night’s incident, Aguile!”

The actual protagonist! Shea was extremely shocked. The cause of yesterday’s incident was because No. 64, Aguile publicly exposed Alan’s dirty plan at the arena. Yet, it later developed into the fight between the 2 huge forces. Without these follow-up events, Aguile who challenged Arux one month later would become the new focus of Dark Moon City. However, Aguile was only a small character in this huge incident now.

From Chen Rui’s tone, Aguile was the actual key person in last night’s “incident”! Almost everyone overlooked that!

“As long as Princess Royal can understand it, then it’s fine. The second thing is also discovered by Aguile. Princess Royal may already know that Cloak Gang has replaced Silva. He has discovered another important thing about the Blue Lava Estate. I hope Princess Royal can stay calm after listening.”

Blue Lava Estate? Shea was a bit curious. When she heard Chen Rui saying that Silva was smuggling demons to the Blue Lava Estate and she saw the badge that could safely pass the bandits, she suddenly stood up; there was an uncontrollable wrath flashed through her eyes, “Blue Lava Lord, Teton once angered the Lord of Midnight Sun, and he was almost deprived of his estate and family name. Fortunately, my father, Grimm pleaded and reassured, so he was excused from his punishment. After my father died, he even expressed his support for me more than once. I never thought he actually does such a shady business at the back!”

“Princess Royal, please calm down!” Chen Rui stood up and said respectfully, “The Dark Moon is in a bad situation now; you can’t make a move recklessly; we must be patient! On the surface, we have to maintain our “relationship” with the Blue Lava and solve the most important food problem as soon as possible. As for the bandits at the south, they can be annihilated at an appropriate time…”

Chen Rui glanced at Shea who had gradually calmed down and threw the badge in his hand, “This thing should be useful when the time comes.”

Shea nodded slightly and asked, “How’s your grand master test?”

“It’s half done. Although there is still danger ahead, the progress is still generally smooth. The actual test is at the end. I can properly rest in these 2 days.” The injury on Chen Rui’s right chest was quite serious. Although he took the Jade Pear and Healing Potion, he only slept for a few hours last night, so it hadn’t fully recovered. Yet, with the passive ability <Astral Form>, it should be completely cured in two days.

“By the way, the magic powder is very amazing. The young dwarf’s ability is also not bad. After improving the poor-quality soil with the magic powder, crops can actually be planted successfully. Not only it shortens the maturity period by several folds, but the production has also increased greatly. I’ve made Gauss select a remote wasteland at the edge of the estate and begin to grow crops on a large scale. Once it’s successful, the Dark Moon can solve the biggest problem that lasts for thousands of years. We might even turn from a barren estate to the empire’s biggest breadbasket. It’s just that we’re lack of that magic dust. Can you continue to make more?”

“Is it? I just made a lot of magic dust as spare. I’ll arrange them and send them to the palace later.” That sentence obviously had the suspicion of showing off his accomplishments.

Seeing Chen Rui going through the dangerous inheritance trial, but he still didn’t forget to “produce” the magic powder, Shea’s eyes were filled with admiration. She then said, “Also, your plan is quite excellent. Alice’s Princess Retail Store’s business is amazing. The burr puzzle alone was sold for 50,000 black crystal coins. If you need money, you can tell me as half of this money is yours.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s fine. I still have enough. The Dark Moon is in urgent need of funding for development. Princess Royal can rest assured to use the money how ever you want to.”

That was an actual truth as the huge amount of money he got from Silva was barely touched!

Shea looked at Chen Rui, didn’t say much and nodded lightly.

“Aguile has offended Alan this time. I’m thinking if Princess Royal can provide appropriate shelter for the Cloak Gang. For future planning, Cloak Gang is likely to become an important chess piece.”

Shea pondered for a while and shook her head resolutely, “Unfortunately, I can’t trust this person.”

chapters.title: Chapter 72 - The Wonders Of Mizar State
chapters.body:
Chapter 72 - The Wonders Of Mizar State

Chapter 72 : The Wonders of Mizar State

Notice: The chapter posting will be done manually around GMT +8 12:00 pm due to the technical issues in scheduling novelupdates post. Sorry for any inconvenience caused 😓! Also we added toggle night mode which is at the right side if you are reading using pc/ at the bottom if you are reading using mobile device.

Shea looked really serious, “Chen Rui, how long have you stayed in the Demon Realm? Why do you trust this Aguile so much? How much do you know about him? As far as I know, this person’s origin is a mystery, and his strength is quite strange. At the arena, he participated in 3 battles within a month. Each time, his opponent is 1 level higher than him, but he always wins. In the next battle, Aguile’s opponent is actually Joseph’s subordinate, Arux! You are a cautious wise man. You should know that for such a person, unless you know his weakness, you can’t control him at all – I’m just telling the truth. It’s because I really trust you, so I cannot trust him sincerely.

It seemed that Shea still had a relatively accurate grasp of the information in the city. Chen Rui initially wanted to say, “I know Aguile as much as I know myself.” However, Shea’s analysis was very reasonable. So, if he said so, he might give it away. Suddenly, he thought of the symbiotic contract with the poison dragon, and a plan emerged in his mind.

“Rest assured, Princess Royal. I’ve once saved him and forced him to sign a symbiotic contract. His ability is very strange; he actually allows me to sign a second contract.” Chen Rui looked really confident. “Actually, this is really simple. As long as Princess Royal controls my life, it also meant that you control his weakness.”

“You…” Shea’s body stunned and she stared at Chen Rui deeply. There were a few indescribable brilliances flowing in her purple eyes. Her lips moved slightly; it seemed that she couldn’t help but to say something, but she gradually calmed down eventually.

What about me? Chen Rui was a bit puzzled.

Shea suddenly said coldly, “Well, I will consider your opinion seriously. If there is nothing else, you should go back and have a rest.”

I don’t think I’ve said anything wrong. Why did she suddenly change her face? Women are truly unpredictable…

Chen Rui was really confused, but since his boss had asked him to leave, he couldn’t say no. So, he said, “Then I’ll leave now.”

“Remember… don’t overly force yourself.”

Chen Rui stunned. Did I mishear? Is that… caring? It seems to be the first time listening to such words from Shea.

It’s blunt and cold.

At that moment, Chen Rui’s heart had a sudden indescribable feeling. As he spent more time with Shea, the feeling had become clearer. Strictly speaking, it might not be the feeling he wanted the most. Instead, it was something like a close friend or confidant.

Perhaps, Chen Rui didn’t know what he really wanted, but he was certain for one thing was that this feeling was faint, nice and realistic.

Shea saw Chen Rui’s slightly surprised look, and she suddenly realized that her tone was a bit inappropriate. As she was about to shift the topic and say something, she heard Chen Rui replied, “Okay, you too.”

Shea suddenly felt a faint warmth in her heart. Before she could say the latter sentence, she already saw the human secretary walked out the door.

Somehow, her mood had also gotten better.

Actually, making a mess at the magic store last night and giving the space bracelet to Ganke wasn’t because Mikas revived, but it was Chen Rui who used his <Camouflage> skill to disguise. The magic equipment was truly given to Alan, but the magic material that someone needed the most had already taken by “Mikas”. Royce’s timing was also excellent. Royce’s strength was above Mikas, but the flame poison became a good excuse to make their strength comparable. After “killing” Mikas, Royce came to the arena with the body, and Arux was naturally shocked.

Royce told Arux that Alan sent Mikas to kill Aguile for revenge, but it was prevented by him, so Mikas robbed the magic store out of anger. Arux was furious and fought his way to Alan’s mansion with Royce. Later, Sarado from the Karon Family appeared. Arux had always wanted to compete with Sarado. They immediately started a big fight; both of them were eventually heavily wounded. Their initial “friendly” relationship suddenly deteriorated to the extreme.

As for the actual culprit, he had already gone back to his room in the lab after leaving the palace.

After Chen Rui advanced to the Mizar state last night, he first fought with Mikas, and then he was chased by Royce. Lastly, after he played the whole act, he eventually couldn’t stand it anymore. He slept immediately. Now, he could finally have a peace of mind, starting looking into his new power seriously.

Within that space, the cloud-like gas had changed; its volume had increased a lot. The middle part was red in color as if it contained a strong heat; the heat could even be felt from a distance. Within the initial scattered and floating dust, a lot of large blocks were added, and they were still moving slowly.

This “boot screen” is well made. Everything including the temperature, texture and time is quite realistic. I just don’t understand what the cloud represents.

Chen Rui curiously drifted his consciousness toward it, and the feeling was getting more realistic. The heat from the cloud seemed to be able to burn anything, but it was just warm to his consciousness. Suddenly, he had a strange feeling that he seemed to be the master and creator of this space as none of the things in this space could hurt him no matter how strong it was.

Chen Rui was drifting in space for a while. Then, he changed his thought and returned to the throne in Galaxy Divinity Temple instantly.

In the “Status” light screen, the white light ball “Alkaid” at a certain part still existed. The part above Alkaid which was around the belly button was the new yellow light ball, “Mizar”. According to the new information in his brain, the next realm would be “Alioth”. Yet, every time he evolved, the difficulty would multiply. The gravity training ground was certainly a very effective place to train, but based on the situation of Alkaid state, the most important thing to break through the Star Level was the inspiration in actual battle. Thus, to achieve the next “Alioth state”, he couldn’t rely solely on increasing gravity training.

At that time, the “skeleton” and “muscles” in the 3-D human body had all become stardust just like when he broke through the realms. The stardust replaced the original filament and flowed slowly in the body. The energy produced from the flow was much stronger than the original Alkaid state, and that was exactly the new strength of Mizar.

The main training of Alkaid state practice was to refine the “body” while Mizar state was to refine “power”.

At that time, the status bar showed that the Aura Value was at 7501. Chen Rui remembered that when he was chased by Mikas yesterday, he downed a total of 4 potions that cost 40,000 auras. Later, when he advanced his state, he used another 10,000 auras, so there was only more than 3000 left. He never expected it to increase to 7500 in a night.

After entering Mizar state, the <Automatic Aura Absorption>’s rate was higher than Alkaid state but it was impossible to increase 4,000 by one night. That should be the effect of “Damage Absorption” that absorbed 30% of the damage and turned it into the aura.

This passive ability was pretty good. It could automatically increase aura not only during the battle, but also during the special training with the poison dragon. However, the injuries last night were quite serious, so it was impossible to continue to have such a growth rate.

In terms of skill, the power of <Damage Absorption> and <Aura Blade> had already shown. Even the skill <Camouflage> proved its usefulness during last night’s big incident. Chen Rui tried it, and he actually turned into a tiny dwarf, even his clothing could be disguised together. However, this skill wasn’t without limits. Under the premise that the total mass of the body was constant, it was equivalent to compressing or stretching the body in a specific way. Yet, it couldn’t change the structure of matter, so Chen Rui couldn’t become a flower or a gust of wind. However, for Chen Rui, who sometimes needed to hide his human appearance, it was very practical.

After all, it was <Camouflage> but not <Transform>.

The only skill left was that <Deep Analysis>. It actually cost 10,000 auras per usage, and it only lasted for half an hour. He didn’t know what the word “deep” meant. The <Analytical Eyes> in the Mizar state could show the race of the opponent, so it should have nothing to with race. He could only study it in the future.

The advancement to Mizar state gave Chen Rui a clearer understanding of the Super System. The Super System should be called the “Super Evolution System”. It was a system that used aura as “fuel”, and training his body could activate higher evolution. As for the Experience Value, it was only digitalizing the comprehensive situation of the body. Experience Value at 100% meant that the body and strength of the current evolution level had fully mature, and it had achieved the basic conditions to enter the next level of evolution.

However, just as the breakthrough from the Alkaid state to the Mizar state, to successfully evolve, an Experience Value of 100% wasn’t enough. A certain activation condition must be met. The next realm was Alioth. Now, considering how to break through was too soon as he must fully grasp Mizar’s power first.

When he was fighting Mikas, he drank 4 bottles of black potions that spent 40,000 auras. However, if the magic material that was “taken” from the magic store was converted into aura, it would multiply the aura gained. Now that Mikas had died, there would be no evidence. Also, the bracelet containing magic equipment was given to Alan by Ganke with many soldiers as ‘witnesses’. So, the sheriff had to be the scapegoat.

Chen Rui wasn’t eager to convert these materials; he went into the exchange center instead. With 2 Stars, there were indeed newly exchangeable items. Within the potion category, in addition to the original ones, 4 new black potions were added. They were actually superior grand master-level’s “Eternal” potions!

Eternal Power, Eternal Speed, Eternal Body, Eternal Mind.

The Eternal Potions could separate the wheat from the chaff and transform the body, permanently increasing certain attribute. It was similar to the “Body Cleansing” at the initial evolution, but it only focused on a single attribute. Besides, an Eternal Potion could only be used once in a lifetime, any further usage would be ineffective. In other words, after drinking a bottle of Eternal Power, there would be no effect even if he drank 10 more potions.

Even so, the Eternal Potions were quite powerful. Chen Rui remembered before he advanced last night, he couldn’t rival Mikas at all. However, after he drank the True Potions, he could actually reach the extent of Greater Demon to barely fight with Mikas. So, the effects of potions were pretty obvious.

The price was equivalent to the worth. The eternal potions cost up to 100,000 auras a bottle, making Chen Rui dumbfounded. In addition to the potions, a plant category had been added to the exchangeable items. There were only two items under the plant category: pivotal seed and aura fruit tree.

Pivotal seed – the core of the galaxy garden; automatically controls and regulates the growth of all plants in the garden; can be upgraded using magic dust; the growth rate of the plants increases with level; 5000 auras each.

Aura fruit tree – Bear fruits after maturing; direct increase of aura after consumption; aura amount increases with level; 500 auras each.

Chen Rui’s eyes were bright. Aura was the basic fuel of the Super System, and also the most needed resource. If he could only increase aura by consuming substances, the source would be depleted one day. The emergence of the aura fruit tree had brought new hopes. It seemed that the issue of energy regeneration was expected to be solved fundamentally.

By the way, what’s the galaxy garden? Chen Rui moved his mind, and he immediately opened the building’s light screen. There was indeed another building.

chapters.title: Chapter 73 - Galaxy Garden And Black Potion
chapters.body:
Chapter 73 - Galaxy Garden And Black Potion

Chapter 73: Galaxy Garden and Black Potion

Galaxy Garden.

Activating Condition: 2000 Aura Value.

Function: Grows varieties of plants; able to enable auto-care mode; must purchase pivotal seed.

Chen Rui chose to build the galaxy garden without hesitation. At the back of Galaxy Divinity Temple, a garden-like blank space appeared. A light screen at the garden’s entrance showed a circular 2-D plan that was digitalized and divided into several grids. However, upon walking into the galaxy garden, he found out that the space inside was much larger than its appearance. There was a circular-shaped soil at the center, which should be the place where the pivotal seed should be planted.

Chen Rui had 7500 auras now. The construction of the galaxy garden used 2000, so he had just enough to buy the pivotal seed. After purchasing it, the soil glowed faintly and a seed could be faintly seen. His mind focused on the time and it showed that 20 units of first-grade energy dust were needed, and the maturity time was 3 days.

Level 1 energy dust? Chen Rui thought of the “magic dust” that changed the soil quality, and he immediately realized it. He had already given all the dust he got from conversion to Shea at the palace just now. Yet, there were still a lot of magic materials in the storage warehouse that he could convert at any time.

Chen Rui entered the storage warehouse and started the long process of <Aura Conversion>. After converting all the materials that could be converted, the total amount reached 320,000 auras. That was also due to the limited varieties of convertible materials. If the magic material that he got could all be converted, then the Aura Value would multiply several times.

20 units of dust were about the amount of magic powder obtained after converting 2000 auras. When Chen Rui sprinkled the powder on the soil with the pivotal seed, the faintly glowing seed in the soil shone with colorful lights, and it slowly emerged from the ground, becoming a tender, green seedling. Chen Rui knew that it needed 3 days to mature, so he wasn’t anxious. He immediately quit the Super System.

This time, the magic material that was taken from Joseph’s magic store only provided more than 300,000 auras. The strength of the Star Leader and Mizar State also gave him the strength to rival with Higher Demon. The Eternal Potions from the exchange center and galaxy garden also played an important role. These made him a bit more confident to battle against Arux a month later.

Royce was Arux’s best friend. According to Royce, it might be possible to persuade Arux to destroy the War Contract with his secret technique. However, he must win the battle to truly subdue Arux and get the arena in his hands. As for Joseph, Chen Rui had another plan, perhaps, he could play a great act of Internal Affairs [1].

Sarado of the Karon Family was a veteran Higher Demon who had been at the peak of the Higher Demon for many years. For Arux to be evenly-matched with Sarado this time, Arux’s combat power had definitely reached the later-stage of Higher Demon. This was also supported by Royce.

Although Chen Rui became a Star Leader and gained the power of Mizar state, he was still unfamiliar with the use of Mizar state’s power and skills. Strictly speaking, killing Mikas this time was largely due to luck; he relied on the miscalculation of Mikas and the surprise of <Aura Blade>. Based merely on the true strength and combat power, Chen Rui was still slightly inferior to Mikas in reality. Thus, the test he was facing was still difficult.

After proper consideration, Chen Rui spent 100,000 auras to exchange a bottle of black potion, Eternal Power. Eternal Power could permanently increase his damage; Eternal Body increases the defense and endurance; Eternal Speed increases the speed and reaction ability; Eternal Mind increases the spirit and sensation.

Actually, Chen Rui also wanted to exchange for the other 3 potions, but he still needed to save auras needed for the training ground.

In the long run, although the galaxy garden could become the main source of aura, as well as the “Damage Absorption” passive ability, the future was the future after all. At present, there was an immediate need for a large number of available aura.

Joseph’s return this time with the excuse of delivering the 100 highest quality vine stones that were lost to Alice. Shea had promised him 60 pieces, along with the 6 pieces that little loli promised, there should be a few more tens of thousands of auras.

Chen Rui held the potion in his hand, took a deep breath, pulled out the cork and drank it in one breath. It wasn’t his first time drinking black potions. If the enthusiast, Master Aldas knew that this so-called “apprentice” drunk 5 bottles of black potions, he would probably act like he didn’t know this human and tie him on the operating table for “dissection and research”.

If the “True” potions tasted like an instant stimulant, then the “Eternal” potions were wines with lasting aftertaste. After Chen Rui drank the Eternal Power, he felt waves of heat surging in his body; each wave was stronger than the other. Gradually, these heat waves overlapped, creating a strange rhythm that seemed to be alive. To be more precise, this was the principle. Chen Rui could clearly felt that it was the principle of “power”!

After a long time, the rhythm gradually dissipated into the body while the power in Chen Rui’s body had improved a lot after the stimulation of such a principle. This improvement was different from the short-term “enhancement” of Strength Potion. It was like the body realized some kind of principle and improved under self-actualization. Thus, its effect was eternal!

Chen Rui had a feeling that if he fought with Mikas again, his odds of winning were at least 60%.

That is the miracle of the eternal black potions! Unfortunately, it will only be effective for the first ingestion. Chen Rui had a sudden realization. Since the Eternal potions can only be brewed by potion grand master, does it mean that one has to understand certain principles to brew such potions with “principle”? In other words, one has to realize certain principles within the potions?

Actually, when I took the “True” potions last night, there was a faint special feeling. However, the situation was too critical, so I couldn’t savor the feeling. Now, it seems that this feeling is not a coincidence. The True potions should be another principle, but both black potions certainly have “principles”.

Why can’t the potion masters brew grand master-level potions and cross the gap all these while? Is it the recipe or method? Perhaps, it is the key “principle”?

So, in other words, the fundamental difference between grand master and the master lies in the “principles”? Or is this a basic condition that must be understood to become a grand master? If this is the case, then aren’t those masters who were struggling to find breakthroughs in formulating were going astray?

The black potions were mostly buff potion, but that was grand-master level. Within master-level, those who studied poison were far more than buff potion. It was because in the Demon Realm, the practicality of brewing poisons were much higher and it was easier to get support from those in power. There were also many people who had been studying buff potions or started to delve into the buffing recipe after becoming a master, but no one had ever succeeded in entering the grand -master level.

The discovery of “principles” was very important, especially for Aldas who had already reached the master level. Aldas was a research-oriented professional, and he was enthralled with pharmaceutics. He could talk non-stop when it came to his profession, but he didn’t speak much other than that.

The dark elf was definitely not an upright and tolerant race. Aldas was a potion master and a standard dark elf at the same time. However, dark elf always remembered other’s kindness which was why Aldas chose to accept Sandro’s dangerous challenge rather than betraying Shea. In the Master Challenge last time, Chen Rui initially wanted to activate the Super System, so he helped in plotting. Eventually, Chen Rui defeated and killed Sandro so that Aldas was saved from being expelled from the Dark Moon, and he also greatly improved his reputation. For this, the dark elf didn’t say much, but it was engraved in his heart.

In terms of pharmaceutics knowledge, the dark elf wasn’t stingy like the other masters. He would tell everything he knew, at least it was the case for Chen Rui. Besides, as long as Chen Rui mentioned, he could take any potions directly; Aldas wouldn’t say a word.

True friends don’t need to be someone who has similar topics. Practical actions are often more convincing than pretty words..

This was Aldas.

After Chen Rui drank the Eternal Power, he couldn’t stand the temptation and exchanged a bottle of Eternal Speed to drink in the research spirit of “for Aldas”. After the pleasure, only 120,000 auras were left. Although he really wanted to continue to feel the wonderful taste for his comrade, Aldas, he finally held his temptation and paused his path of “scientific exploration”.

The 2 remaining black potions must be exchanged. These 120,000 auras are for training; I cannot use it anymore. I’ll wait until I earn more auras.

Chen Rui thought of Royce’s information and decided to give Aldas a mental preparation in advance. He immediately walked out of the room and came to the lab. Aldas was sitting on the stool and holding a bottle of potion for an experiment. Slee who already had a basic level of pharmaceutics knowledge was watching carefully at the side.

Chen Rui suddenly felt a little embarrassed. In comparison, being an “apprentice” of the potion master, he wasn’t as competent as the imp in learning.

“Slee, I have some important things to discuss with the master. Go guard the gate now. If you find someone coming, immediately remind me.”

“Yes, master.” Slee really focused initially, but when he heard his master’s instructions, he went out immediately without saying a word. In fact, in the imp’s heart, this human had become the best master in the entire Demon Realm. For him to truly learn pharmaceutics knowledge like an apprentice beside a potion master for free was entirely due to his master’s kindness.

Aldas also stopped his experiment and looked at Chen Rui strangely, “What is it? Did something happen in your inheritance test?”

Chen Rui didn’t beat around the bush and directly told Aldas about Joseph coming back to the Dark Moon, and he might threaten or recruit Aldas by using the information about Aldas’ long-lost sister. Aldas immediately stood up, “Did Joseph really find my sister?”

“What would you do if Joseph threatens you to defect with this?”

This question made Aldas hesitate. He didn’t say anything for a while; his heart was obviously struggling. After a long time, his gaze finally became very determined, “I will never betray Princess Royal. However, I will try my best to save my sister even if it costs my life.”

Aldas was not only a potion master, but he also had great magical talent. Especially in wind magic, he could activate lightning without chanting. If it wasn’t his enthusiasm for pharmaceutics, he might have become a wizard that surpassed the lich. However, the dark elf master wasn’t a professional in combats after all. If he truly got into a fight, he probably couldn’t compete against an ordinary Intermediate Demon.

Chen Rui looked serious, “Master, if you trust me, when Joseph comes to you, you just delay him by your hesitation as you did just now; I’ll try to save your sister.”

“You?” Aldas looked suspicious, but he remembered he just said that he would trust Chen Rui, so he couldn’t suspect at once.

Chen Rui understood the dark elf master’s emotions and nodded decisively, “Master, don’t bother about what method I use or who’s going to rescue, you just need to believe me. Not to mention, as far as I know, Joseph hasn’t found your sister, but he only has the clues. So, don’t be fooled by him. If you really can’t delay, just ask to see your sister personally.”

Aldas stared at Chen Rui deeply. Aldas didn’t ask Chen Rui what method was he going to use or how did he get the information, but he nodded slightly, “No wonder you can get the trust and value of Princess Royal. It seems that your talents have always been ignored. I believe in you. However, Joseph clearly knows my loyalty toward Princess Royal that I even declined the recruitment from the Regent at the capital. Why does he still persist to make me serve him? Is it because of my performance during the Master Challenge previously? Actually, if he truly wants to recruit a potion master, there should be someone who is easier to convince than me.”

Speaking of that, Chen Ruil looked guilty and said, “This… maybe it was because something I accidentally… that made Joseph have some misunderstanding.”

Aldas asked curiously, “What is it?”

When Chen Rui said the excuse to scam the material from the magic store last time, Aldas was stunned for a moment. Subsequently, he grabbed Chen Rui’s collar fiercely and yelled, “Dumbass, you can deceive with other things, but you shouldn’t lie anything about the academic! Although poisoning Sandro at the arena last time made me famous, I always felt embarrassed about it. It wasn’t because of your stupid fart king idea, but because it wasn’t my true strength! Now, you actually created some stupid trouble on grand master-level potion. You’re forcing me to fool the entire pharmaceutics field to gain unrightful reputation!”

Sure enough, as soon as it was related to pharmaceutics, the dark elf became fanatic. He was indeed an enthusiast, but the abominable human was studying the vocabulary with interest: Fooling the entire pharmaceutics field to gain unrightful reputation? Did brother Xunzi cross-over and become a Demon King in the Demon Realm? Or is it from some Demon Realm saga?”

If it was before the construction of the exchange center, Chen Rui might feel helpless facing Aldas’s scolding, but now…

Aldas was filled with anger and intended to continue scolding. Suddenly, he trembled, and his actions instantly petrified. His gaze as well was petrified. The source of all these was a bottle of potion that the human was holding.

It was a very ordinary glass. What was different was that the potion in the glass was black.

chapters.title: Chapter 74 - Joseph’S Return
chapters.body:
Chapter 74 - Joseph’S Return

Aldas stared at the bottle; he had forgotten all the anger and outrage. His voice trembled, “This… is this black potion?”

“Black potions – True. Spirit Potion.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Master, do you want it?”

That question was simply nonsense. From Aldas’s frenzy eyes, it clearly stated: “I’ll fight you if you don’t give it to me”.

“Master, I can give it to you, but please promise me one thing.” Chen Rui slowly handed the bottle over.

“Needless to say, I promise you no matter what!” Aldas received the bottle of black potion in a tremble. He couldn’t believe it was the legendary highest-level potion contained in the bottle.

The dark elf moved cautiously lest his shaking hand would break the glass. He immediately placed it nicely on the table. Then, he was afraid of accidentally knocking it down, so he made a safety rack and piled up a lot of things around.

Looked at Aldas’s abnormality, Chen Rui secretly snickered. If the master knew that as long as there was enough aura, not only the “True series”, but also the “Eternal series” could be easily obtained. He would probably hit himself with lightning in excitement and faint happily.

After Aldas placed the black potions, he didn’t open the cork. Instead, he looked at it for a while as if that dark potion was some extraordinary beauty. Only after half an hour, he recovered slightly and asked, “This potion… where did you get it?”

Aldas still had a clear mind after all. Aldas didn’t ask if Chen Rui made it himself as he knew that this apprentice was not “competent”. After learning the basic knowledge of pharmaceutics, Aldas had basically never seen Chen Rui anymore. Instead, the learning progress of the imp was surprising.

“Do you remember my grand master’s inheritance test? Half of it has already passed. As a reward, the grand master’s will instructed me to brew this True. Spirit Potion. When I’m awake, the potion has successfully appeared in front of me. However, the recipe and method can’t be clearly recalled.” Chen Rui felt that the excuses of this grand master were becoming nearly perfect as he couldn’t find any flaws himself.

“So that’s why. Praise the Demon God that the grand master’s inheritance finally shed light on pharmaceutics!” Aldas was moved again, “So, if you can complete this test, can you get the ability to brew black potions?”

“Probably not. Besides, the next half of the inheritance is even more dangerous. One misstep may cost my life.” Chen Rui certainly wouldn’t admit as the cheapest black potions were at least 10,000 auras. Besides, he didn’t want to focus on thinking such matter at the moment, “Master, I want you to promise that if someone knows about the black potion in the future, you will say that you developed them yourself; you must not mention my name!”

“No!” Aldas beat the table furiously; he almost jumped madly. His threatening demeanor was shocking. Chen Rui pointed at the shaking black potions on the table and the dark elf’s anger was instantly gone. He quickly held his precious bottle tight, making a funny pose. However, his resolute attitude was unquestionable.

“This is your glory! I must not do such a shameless thing!”

“Master, you have to think clearly. I’m not giving you this potion for fame, but for you to study it so that you can truly achieve the level of grand master.” Chen Rui said seriously, “Do you want my secret of grand master’s inheritance to be leaked? I am just a human; an outsider; what’s more a powerless outsider. If this biggest secret is leaked, how much trouble would it cost? Can I still stay in the Dark Moon?”

Aldas was really touched for a moment: In terms of value, this bottle of black potion is far more precious than all the potions that Chen Rui had squandered previously. As a potion master, I am absolutely willing to pay any price to exchange for this. Yet, this human only made some jokes, but he didn’t ask for anything and gave it to me.

After the dark elf master calmed down, he began to analyze seriously: Chen Rui was right. If this information is leaked, not only the Fallen Angel Empire, the attention of the other two empires will also focus on the Dark Moon Estate. Every party will fight for Chen Rui at all cost. With Dark Moon’s current strength, Princess Shea can’t hold him. By then, not only will Dark Moon lose Chen Rui, but the balance between the three states will also be broken.

Therefore, even if I study this bottle, I must do it in an extremely secret situation. Before getting any result, I must not let anyone know of it.

Aldas’s analysis made Chen Rui secretly ashamed as he didn’t think of a lot of things. It seemed that he still underestimated the shock that a grand master could bring to the Demon Realm.

“By the way, there is one more thing.” Chen Rui recalled when he “tasted” the black potions and told Aldas the strange feelings including the “principle”. However, the excuses were replaced by the faint feeling acquired when the grand master was inheriting thoughts.

Unlike Chen Rui, a dabbling apprentice, Aldas eyes became serious and he started muttering, “Rhythm… principle…”

The dark elf knew that it was a precious experience left by the grand master. It was like gaining a precious treasure, but he never imagined that someone only mentioned the taste of the potion. Seeing that Aldas was being obsessed, Chen Rui knew that he shouldn’t interrupt. So, he instructed the imp at the entrance and returned to his room.

At that moment, after getting the news of Arux and Royce were at daggers drawn with the Karon Family, Joseph rushed all the way and finally returned to the Dark Moon City before the night falls.

Joseph didn’t go back to his Dark Moon’s mansion, but went straight to the arena to visit the injured Arux. Then, he came to the ransacked magic store under Royce’s accompany. His face became gloomier.

“Sir, this is the case.” Although Royce’s tone wasn’t agitated, he couldn’t conceal the anger in his eyes when he talked about the Karon Family. “The incident at the magic store, I am willing to take full responsibility. Do punish me, sir. ”
