“Hmph! You ran pretty fast! You actually said I’m naggy!” Paglio watched Chen Rui disappeared into the sky. He then laid down, imitated the human to hold the grass in his mouth and closed his eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 81 - Set Off! Having You Throughout The Journey
chapters.body:
Chapter 81 - Set Off! Having You Throughout The Journey

Chapter 81: Set Off! Having You throughout the Journey

The next morning, Chen Rui, who was deeply asleep woken up by Slee’s door-knocks.

“Master, little princess and Athena are here!”

Chen Rui quickly got dressed. He was taken aback when he saw Athena and Alice outside of his room.

Athena was in full-body leather armor; wearing a space bracelet; carrying the usual greatsword; looking as if she’s going somewhere far away, whereas Alice’s big eyes looked red and swollen; she clearly cried before.

“Come in. What’s wrong with both of you?” Chen Rui asked with surprise.

Athena stepped forward and handed him a leather paper and said, “This is your appointment letter as the mine officer. Princess Royal has already agreed to my request, so I’m going to Mountain Xilang with you.”

“Sister is so annoying!” Alice said depressedly, “I had a big fight with her, but she still doesn’t allow me to go with both of you!”

“Both of you know about the mine officer incident?” Chen Rui scratched his head. His main purpose was aura, so having Athena around would definitely be inconvenient. As for the Cloak Gang, he already made arrangements. The members only knew that the leader was going out for secret training to face Arux. Any affairs would be handled by Jesse and Didi.

“It was spread throughout the city yesterday’s afternoon.” Alice nodded, “I got to know about it from my sister. This is clearly the doing of Joseph. He must be wanting to avenge the event at the Sky Battle.”

Chen Rui shook his head: The revenge that Joseph wants isn’t just the Sky Battle. However, even Royce isn’t very clear about the mine’s situation. Royce only tentatively figured out that the bandits and Red Spirit Estate must be related.

“That asshole Joseph!” Athena clenched her fist furiously, “Alan too. They want to kill Chen Rui!”

Chen Rui comforted, “Don’t worry, I’ll be fine. A friend will secretly protect me. Athena, you don’t have to come with me. Stay in the Dark Moon City to accompany Alice.”

“No, it’s too dangerous there. I have to accompany you!” Athena was very determined. “I’ve decided. Whoever tries to stop me have to step over my dead body! This is exactly what I said to Princess Royal.”

Chen Rui’s heart was shocked. Looking at the determination in the ruby-like eyes, he felt that a certain string in his heart was moved.

Alice also said, “Mountain Xilang is unlike other places. It has been plagued by underground demonic beasts for hundreds of years and mining cannot be done smoothly. There are even bandits rampaging around, so it’s one of the most dangerous areas in the Dark Moon. A few years ago, the previous mine officer, Tim personally led a team to explore the mines. In the end, more than a dozen people went missing. Even their bodies haven’t been found till now! So, you must let Athena be with you, otherwise, I’ll be more worried.”

Alice’s red eyes and serious expression made Chen Rui’s heart warm. He gently patted her head. That move was completely natural. Alice was stunned, and her face blushed. However, she didn’t struggle and she seemed to like it. After Chen Rui made that action, he was also stunned. Slee who was at the side had his heart filled with shocks, then a series of strong admiration came after that.

Athena didn’t have any special reaction. She just had a serious look, staring into his eyes and making Chen Rui felt a strong pressure unrelated to strength.

What is this? Burden? Worry?

Perhaps, the word “fate” is more accurate.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of the name of an old song, “Having You throughout the Journey” and took a deep breath.

“Athena, when can you leave?”

That sentence made Athena’s serious eyes melted into joyful enthusiasm, “Anytime!”

Chen Rui nodded, “That’s good. We’ll leave in a while. I’ll get you some antidote as we’ll ride wyverns there.”

Alice requested to ride wyverns the previously, so her eyes lit up when she heard that, “Antidote is successfully researched?”

Chen Rui was afraid to cause additional trouble, so he quickly explained, “The antidote is just a temporary mean; it must be used by Higher Demon. After the new antidote is developed, I will bring you to ride the wyverns. If not you can work harder and become a Higher Demon soon. ”

“Forget about it. I’ll wait for your new antidote.” Alice said with disappointment. In terms of training, little loli had always been proud of being lazy. The awakened of <Dark Flame> was solely by talent, and it had nothing to do with hard work.

Soon, Athena and Chen Rui came to the wyvern nest that was temporarily built at the outside of the lab. Mengda and Kegu were already equipped with a simple flying saddle. Slee tearfully brought the wyverns to his master and one of his future master’s wife (at least that was what the imp thought).

Aldas, who had been staying in the hidden room to study black potion suddenly rushed out and gave a bunch of potions to Chen Rui without saying a word.

When Chen Rui looked at the labels, he knew that they were the strongest buff potions and poison potions in the lab.

The dark elf looked at Chen Rui sentimentally, “Don’t forget that you haven’t fulfilled your promise.”

Chen Rui knew that Aldas was talking about his sister. However, the dark elf said that now wasn’t because of his sister, but it was a promise for him to come back alive.

Chen Rui nodded. Aldas only said that sentence, then he hurried back to the lab without looking back.

Even Alice could tell, “Smelly ass master, why did you run away so quickly? Are you afraid to let others see your tears, sentimental man?”

“Both of you must be safe!” The little loli waved at Chen Rui and Athena with her eyes red, “Chen Rui, if you can come back alive, I can consider eloping with you and Athena…”

Chen Rui was petrified: That’s clearly a curse for me to not return!

The wyverns flapped their wings and rose higher.

Looking down at Alice’s and Slee’s figures that were getting smaller and smaller, Chen Rui waved his hand gently. His eyes stared at the council hall of the palace for a moment. Then, he urged Mengda to fly forward. Finally, they disappeared from Alice’s sight.

Athena always had the wish to become a dragon knight. Now that she could even go with Chen Rui, her wish was fulfilled, and she was in a good mood. As Chen Rui had completely recovered from the loss of spirit from <Deep Analysis>, he communicated with the wyverns via <Analytical Eyes>. Along with Athena’s rich beast taming experience, the first test drive was very successful.

The northeast of the Dark Moon estate was the Red Spirit Estate; southeast was Blue Lava estate; the west’s terrain was the most dangerous. It was filled with towering mountains and precipitous ridges. Passing the Xilang mountain range, the further west would be the Town Leia which was at the border with Dark Shadow Empire.

The Town Leia was originally two fortresses facing each other with a long history. They belonged to the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire respectively. About 2000 years ago, the Emperor of Fallen Angel, Sakya. Lucifer was reigning, and he had a mutual beneficial relationship with the Dark Shadow Empire. The two empires then signed a friendly agreement to live in harmony for 10,000 years. As a symbol of friendship, the fortresses of the two empires were thus demolished and merged into the Town Leia, which was shared by the two countries.

Shea once sent caravans to the west and wanted to go through the Town Leia to enter the Dark Shadow Empire. However, bandits also appeared in the west. She lost everything for several times. Together with Alan’s “unsuccessful elimination”, Dark Moon could only trade with Red Spirit or trade with the outer world via Red Spirit as the only channel. Thus, the economy lifeline had always been controlled by the Red Spirit estate.

“At this speed, we can reach Mountain Xilang in about 2 ½ days.” The wind was strong in the air, so Athena said loudly.

“Where do we camp at night?” There was clearly no inns in such wild march, so they could only camp out.

Athena had rich experience in beast taming and camping out, “The distance ahead is still a long way. We’ll try not to exhaust the wyverns. We’ll take a break on the way to feed the wyverns. Then, we’ll rush to the black rainforest before dark.”

“Alright!” Chen Rui was self-aware. Having Athena along indeed saved a lot of trouble. If he was alone, he’d probably waste a lot of time even if he had the magic map.

At sunset, the two arrived at the black rainforest as scheduled. Chen Rui remembered that when he first met Alice, the poisonous grass and flowers that he was fed with were from this place.

The black rainforest was a standard Demon Realm forest area that was large in size and rich in herbs. The quality of the herbs was much higher than in other places, but it was also full of dangerous floras and faunas.

Athena took Chen Rui to a leeward hillside familiarly. The two wyverns were resting at the side of a tree above the hillside. It also played a certain warning role. There was a stream not far below from the hillside, so it was convenient to get water.

“Let’s rest at this hillside tonight. Alice and I rested here the last time too because it’s safer.” Athena removed the greatsword at her back and sat down on a stone.

“Athena.”

“What?”

“Thank you.” Chen Rui said sincerely. Mountain Xilang was equally dangerous for Athena, but she didn’t hesitate and took the initiative to accompany him.

“We’re friends, so you don’t have to say these.” Athena shook her head and turned her face to the other side.

It’s not the first time for them to go out together, but Athena suddenly felt an inexplicable nervousness. When she thought that she might be spending a long time with Chen Rui alone, her heartbeat somewhat accelerated. This situation was unprecedented.

“I know.” Chen Rui scratched his head, “Yet, I still want to thank you.”

As he just finished the sentence, and “Whoosh“, the greatsword was unsheathed without notice. It was right in front of Chen Rui. He was startled – I’m just trying to say thank you. When did I trigger you to unsheath your sword?

Athena stood up suddenly, carried her greatsword and walked to the stream without looking back. She said before she left, “It’s fine! You’re such a big man. Why are you so garrulous! I’m going to hunt some prey!”

Someone didn’t know that, actually, she just didn’t want him to see her blushed.

Athena returned to normal. After she returned to the hillside with two preys, she saw the tent set by Chen Rui and she looked surprised.

“What is this tent? It’s my first time seeing this.”

Chen Rui smiled and said, “This is called an alpine tent. It was done with Slee’s help a few days ago. I was just making it for fun initially, but I never thought it could be of use so soon.”

Actually, these were some of the equipment that Chen Rui prepared for Silent Night Wetland in advance. It just happened to come in handy coincidentally.

“This tent is not bad, and it’s quite convenient to keep.” Athena had a rich experience in surviving in the wild, so she immediately noticed the benefits of the tent in a glance. She placed the cleaned preys beside the campfire, “Is this a grand master’s work in your memory too?”

“It’s just a counterfeit. It’s a lot worse than the actual thing.” Chen Rui said vaguely. He took the prey and took out some barbecue tools, “By the way, where’s your tent?”

“I don’t need that. I’m used to it.” Athena shook her head, “It’s already dark. I’ll guard the night later. You should rest early after finishing the barbecue. We will leave early tomorrow.”

Chen Rui was stunned. What is this? Letting a woman to guard the night while the man hides in the tent to rest?

“This tent is very big; it can fit two people.” Chen Rui realized there was something wrong after he said that and quickly changed, “I meant, we can take turns to guard. Half a night each, so both of us get to rest.”

Athena’s face was slightly red. Fortunately, it wasn’t obvious under the campfire. She shook her head and said, “It’s okay. I did the same when I came with Alice previously. I am now a Higher Demon. It’s not safe here; there might be a danger at any time. You’re lack of strength, so just let me do it.”

“Does a Higher Demon not need to rest?”

Chen Rui would never let Athena suffer alone. Besides, his current strength wasn’t inferior to her, it was just that he was lack of experience. However, he was more than capable of alerting and protecting himself. Chen Rui shook his head hard, “I am not Alice. Did you forget I have the beast taming ability? I can make Mengda and Kegu take turns and aid me in guarding. They’re more acute than I am. If you insist on guarding all night alone, then I wouldn’t sleep too; I’ll accompany you like this.”

Seeing his determined attitude, Athena had an indescribable comfort filled in her heart. She stopped insisting, considering that the jungle was more dangerous in the latter half of the night, she chose to rest in the first half of the night.

chapters.title: Chapter 82 - Beast Swarm! The Discovery Of Dragon Inscriptions
chapters.body:
Chapter 82 - Beast Swarm! The Discovery Of Dragon Inscriptions

Athena looked at the long bag that Chen Rui took out and curiously asked, “What is that?”

“This is called a sleeping bag. Its interior is covered with sable’s fur and it’s very warm. You’ll know when you try it.”

“Okay…” Athena suddenly thought of something and her face was slightly red, “Is there one only?”

“I only have time to make one. This is for you, I have a blanket.” Chen Rui smiled and handed a roast meat to her.

Athena took the roast meat, calmed down, talked for a while and entered the tent to rest. The warm sleeping bag and her good habits in the wild made her fall asleep quickly, but her greatsword still remained with her in the sleeping bag.

Despite riding the wyvern for a day, Chen Rui was no longer an ordinary human, so he wasn’t really sleepy. He activated <Analytical Eyes> and extended his perception area to keep an eye on the situation nearby.

Suddenly, his perception detected a strange movement in the jungle. The two sensitive wyverns also discovered something. They raised their heads and looked down while growling in uneasiness.

Athena who was originally in an alerted, semi-dormant state suddenly wake up from the wyvern’s groans. She immediately jumped up and opened the tent, “Chen Rui, there’s a situation!”

Chen Rui was going to find out what happened. Unexpectedly, Athena reacted so quickly, so he had to give up.

The two wyverns were both expressing the same thing, “Dangers, a lot! A lot!”

Chen Rui keenly heard that the rustling sound in the jungle from a distant place was getting closer and closer. For the sake of safety, she kept the tent. Just as Athena extinguished the fire, she heard Chen Rui’s translation of wyvern’s growl, she suddenly recalled a rumor and said anxiously, “Quick, ride on the wyverns and rise to the sky!”

Chen Rui didn’t dare to be sloppy, so he quickly rode on the wyvern and ascended into the sky with Athena.

At that time, the rustling sound had become as heavy as the drums. He saw the groups of black things moving toward them quickly like tides with a mixture of various low growls.

“Rise higher!” Athena yelled and they controlled the wyverns to rise higher.

Chen Rui’s eyesight at this time was quite amazing. He could clearly see that the large, tide-like thing below was actually millions of demonic beasts. There were all kinds of demonic beasts, including both upper and lower layers of the food chain. However, their current movement were strikingly uniform; they were all running outward desperately!

Other than the demonic beasts on the ground, there were also a large group of bats and birds flying outward quickly in the sky. Fortunately, under Athena’s reminder, the wyvern’s height was enough to avoid conflicting with these flying demonic beasts. However, these demonic beasts were too busy running that they didn’t dare to stop even if they noticed the wyverns. Soon, the demonic beasts crossed the hillside and continued to run outward.

If it weren’t for Athena’s early notice, their current situation would’ve been dangerous. Although the strength of these demonic beasts wasn’t particularly strong, their numbers were too horrifying. Besides, it was endless. If they truly fought head-on, they would most likely die.

Chen Rui asked with surprise, “Why is that?”

“This is the beast swarm of the black rainforest. All the demonic beasts in the forest will escape outward. After a while, they will slowly return.” Athena looked feared. “Rumors say that the beast swarm will appear once every few hundred years in the black rainforest, but the reason is still unknown. Even the best demonic beasts hunters, wouldn’t dare to approach the jungle during beast swarm. I can’t believe we actually encounter it.”

Chen Rui smiled and nodded. We actually encounter the “grand prize” that only appears every few hundred years. It seems that this outing’s luck is really good.

After a swarm past, another swarm followed, as if all the demonic beasts in the jungle ran out. Chen Rui felt the horror and anxiety of these creatures from his analysis, but due to the large amount of data and fast speed, he couldn’t discern clearly. He thought of something and asked Athena, “Can you catch a demonic beast? I want to try my beast taming skill to understand why they are like this.”

He could’ve done it himself, but he couldn’t expose himself before Athena, so he made such a request.

Athena didn’t think much and drove Kegu to descend. After circling several times in a small area, there was already a respectively big demonic beast in her hand. It looked like a mole, but it actually had a pair of wings and sharp claws.

Similarly, the emotion of this “mole” was quite frightening. After Chen Rui calmed it for a while and he also let Athena fed it something, it finally calmed slightly. However, the intelligence of this demonic beast wasn’t too high. There were only a few words from its growls, “Devil Fruit! Run!”

Devil fruit [1]? Chen Rui felt a little familiar as if he heard it in an anime before. He was interested suddenly, but unfortunately, the information that the “mole” could provide was too little.

To his surprise, when Athena heard the word “devil fruit”, she suddenly looked extremely shocked.

“Chen Rui! Can you ask for more information? Otherwise, I can catch another one!” It seemed that Athena was very sensitive to this devil fruit. She threw the “mole” and drove the wyvern down to pluck again. The “mole” flapped its wings and followed the escaping crowd in horror.

Athena caught several demonic beasts in succession, but these demonic beasts knew even less. They only knew that a powerful ghost dragon was driving them away. If they don’t escape, they would become the food for ghost dragon. Combining these fragments, Chen Rui analyzed that the devil fruit in the depths of the jungle was ripening and a ghost dragon wanted to eat the fruit, so he drove all these demonic beasts out.

That was probably the reason why the beast swarm appeared in the black rainforest every few hundred years, but Chen Rui was somewhat puzzled. Since the ghost dragon has such a powerful strength, why does it drive away other demonic beast? Is it worried about the fruit being eaten by other demonic beasts? Or is it to block outsiders from taking the fruit?

After listening to Chen Rui’s analysis, Athena thought for a moment and said, “Chen Rui, the devil fruit is very important to me. I must get it! I am going to explore the jungle now. /you can stay here. Don’t land before the beast swarm completely disappear. Escape with the wyvern if there’s really any danger.”

“Wait!” Chen Rui also wanted to take a look. Perhaps it could be a fruit that could provide massive aura. Seeing her wanted to take the risk alone, he quickly said, “Let’s go together!”

“No!” Athena shook her head, “Although I don’t know which type of dragon is the ghost dragon, based on the fact that it could create this beast swarm, its power is definitely quite strong. I just want to try my luck; it’s too dangerous for you.”

“Athena, Mountain Xilang is also dangerous. Why did you accompany me? Don’t worry, I won’t burden you. I have beast taming skill. If it’s really dangerous, I will wait for you at a safe place, okay?”

Seeing that Athena was still hesitating, Chen Rui simply asked, “Aren’t we partners?”

Athena was shocked. Coincidentally, her eyes met Chen Rui’s eyes. Under the cold moonlight, his eyes were particularly fascinating.

Suddenly, Athena lost her shyness and gained warmth and confidence. She took a deep breath and nodded, “Let’s go.”

They controlled the wyverns, lowered their altitude and carefully proceeded in the opposite direction of the beast swarm.

Chen Rui learned from Athena that the devil fruit was a very rare fruit that matured once in a few hundred years; it was highly toxic. However, it had an extraordinary significance for the demons. As everyone knew, although demons were powerful, they had far less potential than humans. Other than the best of the royal family, the remaining demons’ room of improvement was greatly limited. For example, most of the centaurs remained at the level of Intermediate Demon and couldn’t go further. If a Great Demon didn’t have a mutated bloodline, there were basically no hope to break through the limit of Higher Demon. Even Athena, a Great Demon with mutated bloodline, it only increased the probability of breaking the limits to a certain extent. So, the difficulty was still insane.

The devil fruit not only could increase strength, but most importantly, it also had a special effect. That was to greatly enhance the potential of demons and multiply the probability of breaking through the bottleneck by several times. There was even a tiny chance to obtain additional special ability. The premise was that one must endure the deadly poison of the fruit. The stronger someone was, the stronger the poison and effect manifested by the fruit.

For demons, the devil fruit was equivalent to a priceless treasure to break through their limits. No wonder Athena was so moved.

Even for the royal family, other than potential, the grow in strength and the additional special ability were also quite tempting.

The forest was getting thicker; it was no longer suitable for wyvern’s flight. Fortunately, the beast swarm was coming to an end now, so Chen Rui and Athena landed and moved forward carefully while holding the two wyverns.

At that time, there was a low growl in a distance. There was endless ruthlessness and fierceness in the voice. Mengda and Kegu were petrified at the same time; their eyes were filled with horror. In any case, they dared not go any further.

Chen Rui thought for a moment, and he didn’t force the two wyverns to proceed. He left them in place and comforted for a while. Then, he continued to move toward the sound with Athena. Athena intended to let Chen Rui stay, but she couldn’t fight the human’s persistence; they could only move forward together.

Since most of the nearby demonic beasts fled to the outskirts of the jungle, there was no danger along the way. The two gradually approached the source of the sound. Surprisingly, after a while of exploration, Chen Rui and Athena went back to their original place.

“I remember the sound should be in front. Why is like this?” Athena looked suspicious. Chen Rui and Athena had the same impression, but he had one more additional feeling than Athena; a familiar strange feeling.

Wait! This seems to be…

“Chen Rui!” Athena saw that Chen Rui walked straight into a big tree behind the shrub and disappeared. She was shocked inexplicably.

She then saw half of Chen Rui’s body came out of the tree, “Athena, this way!”

Athena went forward with surprise. When she touched the tree, it was truly fake. However, the shrub in front was real. There’s a mixture of real and fake. No wonder we couldn’t find the right path for so long. However, how did Chen Rui find it? It seems that letting him come along is really the right choice.

After Athena walked into the big tree, she felt that the scene in front of her hadn’t changed. However, when Chen Rui came in, she couldn’t see him from the outside. Athena pulled out her greatsword. As she wanted to walk in front to continue exploring the road, she suddenly heard Chen Rui muttered, “Don’t move!”

Chen Rui’s face was very serious, but his eyes had a faint excitement. That was because a new knowledge gained in his brain let him unravel the mystery of this area.

Dragon Inscription! This is the role of Dragon Inscription!

chapters.title: Chapter 83 - Mirror Inscription! The Mystery Of Ghost Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 83 - Mirror Inscription! The Mystery Of Ghost Dragon

If it weren’t the newly-acquired <Deep Analysis> skill, even with Paglio spoon-feeding the relevant knowledge, Chen Rui couldn’t solve these mysteries. The huge loss of spirit exhaustion the past few days was not wasted ultimately.

These inscriptions should be engraved deep in the ground. As many years had passed, plants had been growing on the inscriptions. However, their power and effect weren’t weakened at all. Instead, they made use of these plants to produce more peculiar effects. These were the dragon’s most mysterious ancient inscriptions.

There was a lack of light in the jungle at night; there were places where even the moonlight couldn’t penetrate. Chen Rui carefully followed the detection method taught by Paglio, then he successfully found the safe spot within the inscriptions and passed through another “big tree”.

However, that was just the beginning. Chen Rui could feel that there were a lot of hidden inscriptions in front. Together with the scary ghost dragon with unpredictable strength, it could be considered as a crisis.

Since Chen Rui discovered the mystery of the big tree, Athena didn’t dare to move abruptly after Chen Rui shouted at her. Chen Rui carefully walked to her front, bent down and looked carefully, “This is likely to have the power of <Expulsion>. If you take a few more steps, I don’t know which part of the jungle will you be teleported to. However, we have to pass it. Give me your hand, I’ll lead the way.”

Athena didn’t hesitate to hold Chen Rui’s extended hand. When their hands were held together, both of their hearts had a strange feeling simultaneously. Athena felt a temporary blank in her mind. After the blank, it was an unprecedented feeling with a little nervous and a little sweet. Although her face started to heat up again, she hoped that she could always hold his hand.

When Chen Rui first met Alice, they once also held hands “intimately” before, but they were being fooled by little loli as the result. Athena’s hand wasn’t as smooth as Alice’s, but her fingers and palms were more slender and warm. Despite holding hand in such a special situation, it was inevitable for his heartbeat to accelerate, but his attention quickly shifted onto the Dragon Inscription.

After passing through the <Expulsion> inscription, both Chen Rui and Athena felt a strong repulsive force flowing past their entire body. It was kind of like passing the river by stepping on the rock mounds. One misstep would result in being carried far away by the “river”. After successfully passing the inscription, Athena was fully convinced with Chen Rui’s capability. In her opinion, it was definitely another grand master’s thought that came handy in time. If it weren’t for him, she couldn’t come to such a place at all by herself.

I truly don’t know how much more miracles can this human man create.

The dangers ahead were still there. They had a tacit understanding; Chen Rui didn’t let go while Athena had no intention of withdrawing too. The two continued to proceed while holding hands.

Chen Rui passed the effective area of several inscriptions in a row and felt a little more confident. If it weren’t the threat of Ghost Dragon, it could easily be taken as a Dragon Inscription exam before going to the Silent Night Wetland.

At that moment, there was a faint red light appeared at a place not far in front. The two approached carefully. It was a plant that was about one meter high; with barbs on the branches; the leaves were purple; there were a few round red fruits on it which were emitting a faint glow.

Athena’s red eyes lit up. She concentrated her mind and carefully recalled the description of the devil fruit in writings. Finally, she confirmed that it was the treasure that the demons dreamed of.

There were 5 or 6 fruits that looked like they were just ripened. For the demons other than the royal family, the values of these fruits almost couldn’t be measured with magic crystal coins. In the history of demons, there was once a battle between lords for the devil fruit.

Once I eat one, there will be a good chance for me to break through the limits of Higher Demon in the future, reaching Demon King, Great Demon King or even higher levels!

Athena suppressed the excitement in her heart and didn’t act rashly. Instead, she was carefully wary of her surroundings. Surprisingly, the “rumored” ghost dragon that wanted to devour the devil fruit was nowhere to be found. As she was about to approach, her hand was held back tightly by Chen Rui, “I sense something wrong. Don’t rush!”

“Do you know? For the demons other than the royal family, no one can resist the temptations of the devil fruit. I must get it.” Athena said while extending her hand, “If I don’t take this chance, I’m afraid we’ll all be in danger when the ghost dragon arrives.”

After that, Athena carefully approached a few steps. After making sure there was no danger, she leaped toward the devil fruits.

“Wait!” When Athena first went forward, Chen Rui suddenly remembered something. At that moment, Athena was already in the air, trying to grab the devil fruit; it was already too late.

“Throw your sword toward it! Athena! Quick!”

Chen Rui’s screams made Athena startled. Due to her trust on Chen Rui, she entered her Great Demon’s battle form in the air, clenched her teeth and threw her greatsword at the devil fruit.

Poom! Poom! Poom! Exploding sounds could be heard one after another. The greatsword was blown away and torn apart. Athena’s figure was blown back by the aftermath of the explosion, but she was caught by Chen Rui before she fell to the ground.

That force made Chen Rui moved backward a few steps; he almost lost his balance. He saw Athena in his arms returned to her usual form with her body covered in blood. There was even a shattered blade on her shoulder. Luckily, the greatsword detonated the inscription’s power ahead, otherwise, Athena would probably end up like that shattered sword.

Fortunately, the broken blade’s force was reduced by the shoulder plate. If not, her entire arm could’ve cut off. It was a blessing in the unfortunate.

Athena’s body was trembling involuntarily. Her face was particularly bleak under the moonlight. She was clearly seriously injured.

“Athena!” Chen Rui had remorse in his heart. Why didn’t I realize there’s something wrong with the devil fruit earlier? There must be an inscription there; the meaning it represents is <Mirror and Explosion>!

The devil fruit was just a mirror image as a bait. Its actual intention was an explosion trap!

Athena felt tearing pain all over her body. She even lost the strength to talk. She knew that if it weren’t for Chen Rui’s reminder, she would’ve already died. Looking at the human’s worrying face, her heart was filled with regrets. “I’m sorry that I was too stubborn and I didn’t listen to your advice.”

If it weren’t for her eagerness, not only she wouldn’t be injured now, but her hand should still be in the warmth of this man. Why didn’t I trust him?

“What’s the point of saying that now. Let me patch you up first.” Chen Rui gently squatted down. He took out a blanket from the space bracelet and padded it on the ground. Then, he carefully placed Athena on top. He clenched his teeth, pulled out the broken sword, removed the shoulder plate, sprinkled some healing powder on the wound and bandaged it. After that, he exchanged a bottle of healing potion and poured it into her mouth.

“Athena, I know that the devil fruit is very important to you. I blame myself for responding too slow just now; I didn’t notice the trap earlier. Don’t worry. I will definitely help you get the fruit. Wait for me here and don’t move.”

“Don’t go…” Athena trembled and she looked frightened. “It’s too dangerous here. I don’t want the devil fruit anymore. Let’s leave…”

“Trust me! Remember not to walk away. There are dangerous traps everywhere. When I come back, I want to see you here!” Chen Rui held her hand hard. He then stood up and looked carefully at the ground. He quickly headed to the other side and disappeared from Athena’s sight in the blink of an eye.

Athena’s eyes were already red. She began to pray to the demon god for a man other than her father for the first time in her life.

Chen Rui had already guessed the approximate location of the actual fruit from the mirror image. Perhaps it noticed that the explosion trap was triggered, the scary roar began to sound again, seemingly to warn the approacher to stop getting closer.

Chen Rui felt that the sound was getting closer and closer; he knew that he was in the right direction. He was just worried that he would be noticed by this powerful ghost dragon, so he had been careful; he didn’t dare to make too much noise.

Passing a series of traps, then bypassing an inscription of <Hidden and Teleportation>, finally, a relatively open stone pile appeared in front of his eyes. Underneath a pile of stones, there was a plant identical to the mirror image. It was the devil fruit. However, the most eye-catching thing wasn’t the devil fruit with a faint red light, but the huge figure that was entrenched next to the fruit.

It was indeed a dragon. More accurately, it was the skeleton of a dragon. However, this supposedly skeleton of a deceased was actually alive. Under the purple moonlight, the huge, white skeleton was wrapped in a strange hue. The pair of eyes that should be empty were glowing in green light, making Chen Rui felt a chill down his spine.

Chen Rui finally understood why this thing was called a ghost dragon.

Although the ghost dragon looked extremely powerful, it didn’t detect the existence of Chen Rui. Chen Rui saw it yelled at the sky again. Chen Rui’s distance was already close. He felt a horrifying pressure in the sound, anyone that heard that would be scared out of their wits.

This kind of pressure, Chen Rui had only felt from Paglio. It was just that the pressure from this ghost dragon was much inferior than the poison dragon. However, it was definitely Dragon’s Demeanor!

Although the location of the ghost dragon had yet to reach the effective range of <Analytical Eyes>, Chen Rui didn’t dare to move recklessly. The poison dragon once said that even the newly born baby dragon had the strength of a Demon King. From the power of inscriptions previously, it was probably at the strength of Demon Emperor. It was far from what he could handle with his current strength.

In this case, how can I get the devil fruit?

Chen Rui thought and his gaze focused on the inscription behind him. Dragon Inscription wasn’t an intelligent “program”. Unless it was a special inscription like an individual bloodline, as long as someone triggered, it would produce the corresponding effect even if it was its creator.

Although Chen Rui’s strength couldn’t set up a powerful inscription alone, with the Super System’s current “understanding” of the Dragon Inscription, creating something that could trigger and connect available inscriptions was achievable.

The best solution was to use a series of <Teleportation> inscription to instantly transfer the ghost dragon to another place, then he could quickly evacuate with Athena.

The ghost dragon had been roaring for awhile. After it didn’t sense the presence of other intruders, it immediately lowered its head and the huge skull stopped above the devil’s fruit. The faint green light in the eyes of the ghost dragon began to move into the mouth, slowly extending toward the devil fruit like a tongue. It looked particularly strange.

At that moment, there was a noise from the right suddenly. The green light trembled and retracted. At that time, the dragon’s head turned to the other side, giving others a feeling that its reaction was sluggish.

The ghost dragon walked slowly toward the direction of the sound and growled several times. It was a mix with a powerful Dragon’s Demeanor that was filled with warnings and intimidation.

At that time, a figure had appeared in front of the demon fruits like lightning. All 6 fruits had disappeared by just waving his hand.

chapters.title: Chapter 84 - The True Face Of The Ghost Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 84 - The True Face Of The Ghost Dragon

Chapter 84: The True Face of the Ghost Dragon

The ghost dragon’s reaction seemed to be rather slow. It turned its head and saw the fruits disappeared. It roared furiously as it marched toward the figure who took the fruits. The figure seemed to be intimidated by the Dragon’s Demeanor as the figure suddenly stunned. The figure slowed down and stepped backward with fear.

The one who took the devil fruit was clearly Chen Rui. He knew that their difference in strength was too huge; his speed must be incomparable to the ghost dragon. So, he didn’t run at full force, but he acted as if he was intimidated and led the ghost dragon to trigger the <Teleportation> inscription trap.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, the ghost dragon seemed to see through his plan. It actually didn’t chase hurriedly, but it approached calmly. Only the pair of skeletal wings were flapping slowly, giving a huge psychological pressure.

The Demon Realm’s common language came from the ghost dragon, “Intruder! Return the fruits and I’ll spare your little life! Otherwise, your flesh will become a gourmet in my mouth!”

Chen Rui was cold sweating. It seemed that he had to trigger the <Teleportation> inscription himself to escape before the ghost dragon attacked. If he really couldn’t do it, then he still had the <Teleportation> skill of the “Dark Will” ring.

The problem was that Athena was still in the vicinity, and she’d likely be discovered by the ghost dragon. With Athena’s current situation, it was absolutely impossible to escape.

Leave Athena and run away by myself? I’ve gotten the devil fruit anyway!

Giving up the… partner, who is willing to take the risk to accompany me to Mountain Xilang?

In the face the approaching ghost dragon, Chen Rui made a decision instantly. He extended his hand and opened his palm, preparing to use <Aurora Shot> to anger the ghost dragon.

The powerful Dragon’s Demeanor was approaching, “Asshole, I, Master Ghost Dragon will give you a final chance!”

Chen Rui didn’t believe in such formless threat at all. If he truly returned the fruits, he’d probably be dead immediately. However, the strange thing was that this ghost dragon had been intimidating, it didn’t actually make any actions. Right when Chen Rui planned to desperately distract the ghost dragon, the data displayed by <Analytical Eyes> changed his mind.

Slime; Comprehensive Assessment: D; Physique: Unknown, Strength: Unknown; Spirit: Unknown; Agility: Unknown.

Slime? Not a ghost dragon?

And… D level? It’s just a Higher Demon? What is with the Dragon’s Demeanor then?

Chen Rui took a risk and instantly concentrated his Star Power, “<Aurora Shot>!”

The huge white ball hit the ghost dragon. The gigantic body of the ghost dragon was actually pushed back by the force of <Aurora Shot>. Some pieces of the bones were also falling. It could barely stabilize its body. Even one of its wings was gone.

It was Chen Rui first time using <Aurora Shot> after promoting to Star Leader. He felt that the Star Power used was much lesser than that of Star Collector. He didn’t have the feeling of being instantly emptied.

<Aurora Shot> verified that the beast before his eyes was really just a paper tiger [1], and Chen Rui’s heart was a lot calmer. He leaped, caught up with the “ghost dragon” and manifested his combat power as he liked – After being tortured by Paglio so many times, I can finally collect some interest from this dragon this time! However, it feels like I’m whipping a corpse…

The “ghost dragon”’s movement was slow. It couldn’t do anything under Chen Rui’s attack. Yet, it seemed to perceive no pain. It still roared, “Asshole! My strength is already recovering! If you don’t escape now, be prepared for your bones to be crushed!”

Chen Rui wasn’t holding back at all; his attack became fiercer. He was already clear: this so-called ghost dragon is merely a “slime” intimidating with the dragon’s might. It actually deceives all the demonic beasts in the jungle!

No wonder the ghost dragon is just intimidating as it didn’t initiate any actual, horrifying attack. However, what is puzzling is that the Dragon Inscriptions and the Dragon’s Demeanor are actually genuine.

At this time, the green light in the eyes of “ghost dragon” gradually faded. Chen Rui noticed that the green light was actually secretly moving whereas the body of the “ghost dragon” gradually became dull and stiff as the green light faded. Eventually, it didn’t move at all like a pile of actual lifeless bones.

The display of <Analytical Eyes> still existed. Chen Rui thought of something and immediately noticed a pile of faintly creeping thing on the ground. He stomped heavily on it. This thing was slippery, and it squeezed out of his foot. It jumped high suddenly and grew several times instantly. It was like a huge pocket covering from the sky, wanting to swallow him.

Chen Rui’s hand instantly emitted a metallic glow. As a line of light sliced of past, the “pocket” was split into two. Subsequently, <Aura Blade> sliced the strange “slime” into pieces.

Strangely, these fragments weren’t dead. They squirmed toward Chen Rui at high speed, wanting to engulf him again. Chen Rui thought of something and shouted, “<Destructive Aura Blow>!”

At that moment, a brilliance flashing in high speed appeared on all the fragments like living runes. Looking at it in detail, there were actually countless sharp forces slicing at high speed. In the blink of an eye, the fragments were cut into countless particles and fell to the ground. It was Chen Rui’s first time using this “<Destructive Aura Blow>” with an aoe attack. Its effect was very dazzling, and its power was also very impressive. However, the lethality felt inferior compared to the single-unit attacking <Aura Blade>. Besides, it used up a lot of strength. It consumed a few times more strength than <Aura Blade>, but it was suitable to deal with multiple enemies.

“Hey!” The subtle voices came together as if thousands of people sounded at the same time. After suffering the ultimate move of <Destructive Aura Blow>, this strange slime was actually not destroyed.

Immortal? Chen Rui frowned. Sure enough, countless particles gathered together into one and became the original “thing”.

“Your attacks are so painful! I will let you pay the price!” After the thing restored, it came with his mouth opened again. Chen Rui opened his hand and the second shot of <Aurora Shot> gushed out, shooting right into the thing’s mouth. The huge light ball drove it straight into the sky, and it only fell after a long time.

Under the white light of <Aurora Shot>, Chen Rui found that this thing was transparent like some kind of rubber. After <Aurora Shot> hit it, it actually didn’t explode, but it scattered into countless white light which filled up the entire body of this thing, showing a vein-like texture.

Chen Rui was panting a little. After using the last <Aurora Shot>, his Star Power was running low. That was all he got. If he still couldn’t eliminate the opponent, he could only escape with the devil fruit.

<Aurora Shot> still couldn’t kill this thing, but it caused significant damage. The destructive aura didn’t disappear for a while, but it scattered in various parts of its body, making it paralyzed on the floor and losing its ability to move at once.

Chen Rui thought quickly and he didn’t escape. Instead, he quickly stepped forward and stepped on it once again.

“Such bravery. You actually dare to defy me!” That thing still didn’t want to admit defeat.

“I’m an actual partner of a dragon.” Chen Rui refuted rightfully, “A mere slime who dare to pretend to be a dragon. I will destroy you now!”

“You… How do you know that Dodo is a slime? Don’t kill Dodo!” This guy didn’t expect the opponent to be the genuine dragon partner, and he easily exposed its identity. It finally began to panic.

In fact, Chen Rui’s two <Aurora Shot> per day were used up. Now, he was just scaring “Dodo”. He asked, “Why did you pretend to be ghost dragon! Why did you create beast swarm! Answer!”

“Hmph! I won’t tell you!” After Dodo said those words, it saw Chen Rui’s fingers that were rested suddenly opened. It looked like the pose that made that terrible attack, so it suddenly changed its words, “Forgive me. I’ll tell you everything. Sir, please loosen your leg first!”

Chen Rui let go of his leg. While the <Aurora Shot>’s residual force gradually disappeared in its body, it immediately bounced high and ran to the side. It was still yelling, “You dare to anger me, Sir Dodo. You’ll see how I…”

Before it could finish its cruel words, it felt sparks everywhere before its eyes. After a series of exploding sound, Dodo was scattered into pieces and fell to the ground. It turned out that it coincidentally triggered the inscription that Chen Rui set up previously., Fortunately, it was just the <Explosion> inscription. If it was the <Teleportation> inscription in the other direction, Dodo would likely to have successfully escaped now.

However, Dodo’s physique was very strange. The <Explosion> inscription couldn’t kill it. Its reconstruction speed was also really fast. Relatively speaking, <Aurora Shot> caused more damage to it, no wonder it was so afraid.

“Then… I have to kill you right away!” Chen Rui appeared in front of Dodo. His demeanor was overflowing as if he was going all out.

“Even if I die…” Dodo said forcefully. When it saw Chen Rui’s opened fingers, his voice instantly became extremely charming, “Sir, your humblest servant, Dodo is willing to solve all your doubts.”

Sir Dodo changed its face so fast that it should be the epitome of “able to be both mighty and submissive”.

“I won’t believe you anymore!” Chen Rui said deliberately.

Dodo knew something wasn’t right, so it opened its mouth and a scroll that was concentrated with strange power appeared, “Master, Dodo is willing to sign the master-servant contract. Please don’t kill me!”

It wasn’t Chen Rui’s first time signing the master-servant contract. It was obvious that this contract wasn’t fake, so he immediately signed it. An average person could only carry one contract. Now, Chen Rui actually had four contracts, which were 3 master-servant contracts and 1 symbiotic contract. Perhaps he could sign more.

After signing the master-servant contract, Chen Rui naturally stopped torturing Dodo and loosened his foot. It’s fine if this guy has D-level strength, but the key is it’s immortality, and it can drive the dragon bones to use Dragon’s Demeanor. It’s really not simple.

Dodo’s body that was flattened gradually swelled and returned to the size of a basin, showing its true face. Its appearance was weird; it had no limbs; the entire body was the face with big eyes, tiny spotted nose and teethless mouth. It looked a bit like a translucent big onion. It moved around by bouncing its body on the ground like a spring.

“My noble master.” Although Dodo had no limbs, its facial expressions were quite rich. It looked flattery, “My body can absorb a considerable amount of magic and physical damage. Even if I’m sliced into countless pieces by blades, I can still regenerate. However, master’s attack just now almost collapsed my body completely. Your strength is too powerful and too evil…”

Within the endless flatteries, Chen Rui seemed to see an onion version of Slee or Didi. However, Dodo’s ability also made him secretly shocked: This fellow isn’t afraid of physical and magic attacks, and it can also regenerate. What monster is this?

chapters.title: Chapter 85: - Star Garden And Devil Fruit
chapters.body:
Chapter 85: - Star Garden And Devil Fruit

Chapter 85: Star Garden and Devil Fruit

Since the master-servant contract had been signed, Dodo confessed everything.

As shown in <Analytical Eyes>, Dodo was a slime.

Chen Rui heard that Demon Realm had powerful races like the fallen dragon, evil eye tyrant, and elemental lords. He also heard of famous demonic beasts such as wyvern and nightmare. However, no one ever mentioned the word “slime” in front of him. The reason was simple. They were too weak; they were weak enough to be ignored.

The slime was the lowest level of the low-level creatures in the demonic beasts food chain. Its only ability was transforming into various intimidating shapes to scare away powerful enemies. The slime had no attacking power. It usually survived by swallowing the plant’s nutrients. However, as everything has its weakness, even those strong carnivorous plants were afraid of its <Swallow> ability.

Dodo was originally an ordinary slime with a simple mind. Many years ago (Dodo couldn’t remember specifically), it swallowed a few devil fruits by chance and its intelligence was greatly improved. At that moment then, a powerful dragon came to the black rainforest. The dragon was seriously injured. It seemed to be escaping from enemies. He desperately set a series of Dragon Inscription to hide. Finally, when he came to the stone pile that Dodo hid, he was already unable to move. Facing the top-level demonic beast at the peak of the pyramid, Dodo was scared the shit out of him. He had been cowering between rocks and dared not move recklessly. He had to rely on the dragon’s blood that flowed into the cracks to barely survive.

Unsure how many days had passed, the dragon finally died due to its heavy injury. Dodo finally dared to get out. Dodo wasn’t sure if it was the devil fruit or the dragon’s blood, he actually had an extra interest on meat other than plants. After he bravely ate a piece of dragon meat, he couldn’t stop himself anymore. Under Dodo’s delicate work, only the skeleton was left from the whole dragon. As he consuming the dragon, he almost exploded by the power. It was just like the first time he swallowed the dragon’s blood. In the end, the slime still survived with its strong will to live.

No one would ever think that the most insignificant slime actually swallowed the flesh of an entire dragon!

After eating the dragon’s blood and flesh, Dodo’s strength increased tremendously and further mutated, greatly improving its transformation ability. After a series of killings and adventures, the slime, which possessed considerable intelligence and strength, finally chose to fake as a dragon. It stretched its body to engulf the entire dragon bones and controlled the bones to move. It looked like the dragon was resurrected, thus he had the title of “ghost dragon”. However, in order to prevent being exposed, the “ghost dragon” never left this perfect place that grew the devil fruit.

In such a way, Dodo relied on the identity of the ghost dragon to scare off those opponents who came to snatch the fruit and enjoyed a lot of devil fruits alone. Its body further mutated and it became the first slime that reached the level of Higher Demon in history, and he also became the “overlord” of the black rainforest.

When Dodo swallowed the devil fruits, he needed to leave the dragon’s body. Also, it needed to digest for a long time and it was impossible to maintain the appearance of the ghost dragon. Therefore, it emitted the Dragon’s Demeanor to create the beast swarm to avoid being exposed.

Chen Rui finally understood about the “ghost dragon” and Dragon Inscription. The reason that Dodo could use Dragon’s Demeanor was probably related to the swallowing of dragon’s blood and flesh, and the mutation after consuming the devil fruit. However, according to Dodo, Dragon’s Demeanor could only be used after accumulated for a long time. It was best to work with the skeleton of this dragon to exert greater power. The beast swarm this time used up its accumulated Dragon’s Demeanor. It needed at least 3 days to barely use it for around 10 minutes.

In order to please its new master, Dodo pleasingly offered three things that were left by the dragon which were a doll, a bead and a magic map. The doll was made of an unknown metal which was about the size of the palm, and it was very delicate; the bead was slightly smaller than the fist, emitting a faint blue glow. It was obviously not a common thing at a glance; as for the map, it had a broken corner, so the hint it provided was quite limited. He wasn’t sure what was the mystery behind it. Chen Rui didn’t study them carefully and simply put the three items into the storage.

He walked to the dragon bones and felt that the bones seemed to contain a strange energy. He tried using <Aura Conversion>, but no notification appeared. The skeleton was very huge. Unless it was cut into strips, otherwise the space bracelet wouldn’t be able to contain it. However, it was nothing for the storage warehouse, so the skeleton was kept easily.

As for the devil fruits, Chen Rui started calculating. There are 6 fruits in total. They are about the size of lychee with a hard shell, and its texture is delicate yet complicated. Although the fruit is precious, the most precious thing should be the fruit tree. If Dodo left, it might be destroyed by demonic beasts – Oh right! Galaxy garden! I don’t know if the plants outside the Super System can be planted?

Considering the time, the pivotal seed should be matured now. When he thought of that, Chen Rui immediately entered the galaxy garden in the Super System.

The galaxy garden had changed a lot compared to before. The entire galaxy garden was covered with a layer of faint haze. From a distance, it faintly shone in colorful brilliance. The tender seedling at the central circular soil had grown into a one-meter-high tree. It looked like it was made of gold rather than wood, and it was decorated with emerald green leaves. It was a natural beauty without a hint of artificial.

The source of the haze in the galaxy garden was the small tree. Strangely, there seemed to be a beautiful lady within the haze on top of the small tree. He could faintly see her beautiful facial features. Her ethereale figure was like a fairy from heaven. No wonder it was called the pivotal seed. The lady actually turned out to be a living thing that bowed slightly to Chen Rui when she saw him.

Chen Rui knew that it was the design of the Super System, but he was still amazed. Now that the pivotal seed is mature, how do I plant other things? Till the soil? Irrigate? Fertilize?

He moved his mind and the light screen at the entrance of the garden had appeared. An icon of female-bodied plant had appeared at the center of the garden’s plan: Pivotal Fairy (Level 1; Upgrading Condition 1: Evolution Level 3 Stars; Condition 2: 1000 units of Grade 2 refined magic dust.)

Refined magic dust? Is there some way to further refine the magic dust? However, I need to at least reach the next state to upgrade, so it’s pointless to think about it now.

Chen Rui moved his mind onto an empty space on the plan. Sure enough, the available plant list that appeared was only aura fruit tree.

“Aura fruit tree; 500 auras each; Do you want to exchange and plant?” There were also numbers notification at the side.

When Chen Rui chose up to 5, it prompted that it had reached the purchase limit of the current Evolution Level. After confirming the purchase, the 5 seeds automatically displayed on the plan.

A notification appeared again, “Activate Pivotal Fairy Caring Mode? Units of magic dust must be provided. Once the magic dust is exhausted, the caring mode will automatically stop. The plant will stop growing.”

It seems that the caring mode is a really good thing as only magic dusts are needed, and I don’t have to bother about anything else. Chen Rui recently converted the best vine stones and magic material that equaled to 50,000 magic dust, so he immediately confirmed. The magic dust automatically disappeared from the storage warehouse and the corresponding data appeared on the galaxy garden’s light screen.

Strangely, once he activated the caring mode, the pivotal fairy immediately flew to the corresponding position in the galaxy garden and began to dance in circles. The seeds that couldn’t be seen in the ground began to sprout at the speed visible by naked eyes. The pivotal fairy only stopped after young shoots grew, and it flew back to the center.

The seedling prompt was: Level 1 Aura Fruit Tree; Maturity: 7 days; Tree will automatically wither after fruits are picked; Need to buy additional seeds to continue planting; Consume 2 units of magic dust per day; Current Status: Immature.

I’m not sure how much aura can the fruit provide, but it consumes very little magic dust. I’ll just come back and take a look after 7 days. Now, I should think about how to move the devil fruit tree in.

Chen Rui thought of something. He squatted down and touched the fruit tree with his mind thinking about galaxy garden. Surely, a prompt appeared, “Unknown Plant; Transplant requires 10,000 auras; Do you want to transplant?

10,000 auras weren’t cheap, but the great value of the devil fruit could trigger wars between lords, so even 100,000 auras were worthy. Clouds of strange haze appeared on Chen Rui’s hands, like the ones from the galaxy garden, and shrouded the fruit trees. After a while, the fruit tree disappeared. Dodo who had been eyeing on the fruit tree saw that, and its eyes on the onion-head suddenly protruded.

In the galaxy garden, the devil fruit tree indeed appeared. Prompt: Unknown Plant; Maturity: 60 days; can be matured repeatedly; consumes 10 magic dust per day; current status: Mature.

60 days? Not 600 years? Chen Rui’s heart was filled with ecstasy. That’s so worthy!

Somewhere within the inscriptions array, Athena struggled to sit up on the blanket. Fortunately, the Healing Potion from the exchange center was very effective. Her Great Demon’s physique was also unusual, so her serious injuries had recovered a lot. However, she still had no combat power.

The roars and noises from a distance made Athena wanted to look for Chen Rui to face the danger together with him. She thought of his words before he went and knew that there were traps everywhere. She couldn’t find the correct path. She was extremely anxious.

“I’ll definitely get the fruits for you!” The human’s firm words still resounded in her ears.

He was willing to face a dragon just for her.

There seemed to be a similar scene when they first met. She didn’t know if he did that for her at that time too. It wasn’t important at the moment now. She just wished that he could be safe like that time at the blue lake. As for the stupid devil fruit, she didn’t want it anymore!

Athena clenched her fist with her remaining strength. She never felt so concerned for a man before – if he had any accidents, even if she died, she would perish together with the ghost dragon.

The sound in front was getting louder, and it seemed someone was talking, but she couldn’t hear clearly. Then, it went silent. There was no sound for a long time. Athena’s heart was suddenly scared. She couldn’t bother about the pain of her entire body. She clenched her teeth to support herself to stand up. As she was about to take a step, a voice sounded in front, “Athena, you didn’t keep your promise again. We promised to wait for me to come back!”

“Chen Rui!” Athena was shocked. Her worried heart was instantly filled with surprise. She staggered a few steps, then she lost the strength to support herself. Seeing that she almost fell to the ground, Chen Rui happened to walk out from a hidden tree. He quickly rushed forward and supported her when he saw that.

Without considering the previous heavy injuries, it was Athena’s first time to be so intimate with Chen Ru since the Sky Battle special training. She felt that there was a man’s warmth in the human body. His arms were warm and powerful. Her entire body went a little soft at once, and her heart was beating really fast. Chen Rui also felt this heartbeat from a close contact at a certain part. Seeing Athena’s weak appearance, he despised himself again for a while, then he carefully supported her to sit on the ground.

Athena carefully examined Chen Rui for a while. He was indeed safe and sound, so she finally relieved.

Chen Rui intended to surprised her, “Athena, extend your hand and close your eyes.”

Athena closed her eyes accordingly and felt like a pile of things were added on her palms. When she opened her eyes, she was stunned abruptly.

chapters.title: Chapter 86 - Promise! A One-Month Promise
chapters.body:
Chapter 86 - Promise! A One-Month Promise

“Devil fruits!” Athena could hardly believe her eyes. She kept blinking and looked carefully again. It is indeed the devil fruit.

This man created miracle once again. Not only he returned unharmed from the hands of the ghost dragon, but he also got the devil fruit!

“These are all for you!” Chen Rui had tried to convert the devil fruit into aura, but it was unsuccessful. Besides, he didn’t know if it served any function to the human body. So, he simply be generous this time. However, even if it could be converted, he had already made up his mind to leave half of them for Athena.

Athena was holding the 6 fruits that were invaluable in the eyes of Demons. She looked at Chen Rui with a smile and her eyes became a little red. At that moment, she was completely determined in her mind. The shadow equipped with both wisdom and bravery while facing the poison dragon; the shadow that was knowledgeable and humorous; the shadow with wisdom and plans; all of them combined into the smile just now. Compared to the smile, the devil fruits were truly nothing.

“Thank you.” Athena didn’t say anything else.

“I remember the last time I said thank you, you unsheathed your sword.” As Chen Rui said with a smile, he suddenly grabbed a shadow that was about to jump toward the fruits on Athena’s palm. “Dodo, these fruits are Athena’s. Don’t touch!”

Athena looked at the translucent onions in Chen Rui’s hand with surprise. She never thought that with her senses, she actually didn’t notice this thing. Besides, the onion was making a flattery voice, “My noble master, Dodo just want one, please? ”

Athena recovered from a certain mood and curiously asked, “What is this?”

“This is the true face of the ghost dragon…” Chen Rui told her everything about Dodo. Surely, he omitted the part where he fought the ghost dragon. He only said that he used the knowledge of the grand master to change those magic traps and subdued the fake ghost dragon.

These were the “confessions” agreed in advance between Chen Rui and Dodo. Dodo nodded cooperatively, but its two big eyes were staring at the devil fruits in Athena’s hand.

“The devil fruit is only effective for the first time. It’s useless to eat the second one!” Athena’s face turned from shocked into astonished, “Stupid slime, tell me now! How many devil fruits did you eat?”

“ Hmph! You dare to call Master Dodo a stupid slime! Even if I die…”

Before Dodo could finish his words, his head was knocked by Chen Rui, “Quickly say!”

“Respected master, please wait. Let Dodo count.” Since its master said so, Dodo had to recall unwillingly. He used <Transform> to become two hands and began to calculate.

Soon, it created two more. After a while, there were already 8 hands on Dodo, but he was still counting.

Chen Rui and Athena were sweating badly as they looked. Especially Athena, she almost went crazy. How much devil fruits did this slime eat? These are invaluable!

Dodo counted for a long time and had a sad look, “Master, Dodo can’t remember clearly, but it was probably 8 or 9 hands.”

Even with Athena’s strong will, she almost fainted at that time: 8 or 9 hands! That’s like more than 40 devil fruits! According to the fruit number of the fruit tree, it bears only 5 to 6 each time. If it’s more than 40… this isn’t Lala Potato! It’s a precious devil fruit that is enough to wage war!

Chen Rui was also shocked. In his opinion, it wasn’t devil fruit that Dodo ate, but massive magic crystal coins. In other words, it was a massive amount of auras! What’s squandering? This is the exact definition of squandering!

However, the devil fruit only matures once in a few hundred years. So, it seemed that those previous years had nothing to do with Chen Rui who had just crossed over this year. After calculating, Dodo at least lived a few thousand years.

“Chen Rui, I don’t want to eat the devil fruit anymore.” Athena regained her consciousness. She said while clenching her teeth.

The slime was overjoyed when he heard that. As he was about to ask his master for it, but Athena’s next sentence unexpectedly frightened him, “I want to eat this slime!”

Chen Rui went along with her words, “Dodo ate so many devil fruits. If you eat it, it might be more useful than eating devil fruit. It just happened that I brought along a lot of condiments for barbeque. I’ll make sure that you’ll be satisfied.”

Seeing even the master said so, the slime scared out of its soul, and he started pleading, “My beautiful and brave mistress, please don’t eat your most loyal slave! I’m hard and smelly; I don’t taste good at all!”

The word “mistress” made Athena blushed, then she quickly glanced at Chen Rui. However, the human didn’t realize at that time as he was looking at Dodo in amusement.

Except for Royce, how would it look like when my three servants, Dodo, Slee and the old dwarf, Didi meet each other?

After Chen Rui made fun of his new servant for a while, he stopped scaring it. He told Athena, “Your injuries are quite bad. Let’s go to the place where Dodo fake as a ghost dragon to rest for a few days. There are a lot of magic traps around, and the demonic beasts don’t dare to approach usually. It should be quite safe. I’ll bring the two wyverns there later.”

“Okay! The potion you gave is very effective. My injuries are recovering very quickly. You can take these 5 devil fruits. I’ll just keep one. Also, this is for you, make sure you keep it properly.” Athena took out a diamond-shaped crystal from her space bracelet and gave it to Chen Rui.

Chen Rui only felt that this crystal was cold. It was emitting a special kind of coldness. He asked curiously, “What is this?”

“After my injuries are recovered, I’ll eat the devil fruit.” Athena lowered her head; she didn’t look directly at Chen Rui, “This fruit has a special attribute where the stronger the user is, the greater the poison will be. Countless people have died in the history. Even an antidote can’t do anything.”

“If I can’t stand the fruit’s poison…” Athena paused and said firmly, “You must never go to Mountain Xilang to die and don’t go back to Dark Moon Estate. Take the wyvern all the way to the west and take this ice crystal to the Dark Shadow Empire’s capital city to look for a woman named Delia. She owed me a huge favor three years ago. With your ability and Delia’s help, you should be able to be accommodated in the Dark Shadow Empire. Do you understand?”

Chen Rui was shocked. He didn’t expect that Athena to arrange a backup plan for him. He felt that the cold crystal in his hand seemed to contain a burning feeling. He suddenly silenced.

“Athena, you’ll be fine.”

“Chen Rui, you don’t understand…”

“The one who don’t understand is you…” Chen Rui raised his head and stared into Athena’s ruby-like eyes. He took out a green pearl, “Hold this… do you remember this?”

“This is… the antidote given by the blue lake poison dragon previously?” Athena took it and looked at it for a while. “It seems to taste very spicy.”

Chen Rui nodded. “This is called Jade Pearl. A precious crystal of the poison dragon. It’s produced once every 200 years. It can quickly recover from injury and permanently enhance the body’s poison resistance after eating.”

“Permanently enhance physical ability?” Athena was taken aback. “Why did the poison dragon give such precious crystal as antidote?”

“That’s because you, little princess and Kia aren’t poisoned at all.” Chen Rui had kept this in his heart for a long time. He finally couldn’t help but revealed it, “I’m sorry. I never tell you the truth… ”

“You’re such an asshole! You’ve made me always worried!” Athena pounced toward Chen Rui in spite of her injury and pushed him to the ground. She kept beating him, “Damn it! Asshole! Asshole…”

Seeing its master being attacked, Dodo wanted to help initially, but he didn’t dare to intervene due to the trauma of her “mistress” saying that she was going to eat him. Besides, the situation between his master and mistress was a bit strange. It felt like when the season came, the female and male creatures liked to flirt before “attracting” each other. The behavior wasn’t much like it, but it seemed like it. If he disturbed them at this time, he might truly be grilled and eaten.

The slime who had gained considerable intelligence finally wisely chose to turn a blind eye. It was like a “you can’t see me” transparent background.

The judgment of the slime wasn’t unreasonable. Athena was very fierce, but the beating on Chen Rui’s body was powerless. Perhaps it could be understood as she wasn’t able to use her strength as a Higher Demon because of the injuries. However, her voice was truly worse than her bite. Even on a normal human body, it couldn’t make much damage.

Athena’s action finally stopped. She kept panting while laying on Chen Rui’d body. Suddenly, she felt that her action was too embarrassing. Her heart accelerated, then she supported her body up with her blush and gave him another punch before turning over to sit on the ground at the side.

This level of “attack” was only scratching for Chen Rui. However, he knew that this had always been burdening Athena mentally. She even thought of battling the poison dragon to death, so he indeed felt guilty. After being “punched”, he climbed up and explained to her.

When Athena heard that the contract that Chen Rui signed with the poison dragon was a symbiotic contract, she finally understood. At that time, the relationship between the two, along with the characteristic of symbiotic contract, even Athena herself wouldn’t leak such secret that was a matter of life and death.

“Asshole! Why didn’t you keep hiding?” Athena’s anger had almost disappeared. “How much more are you hiding from me?”

“There are actually still a lot…” Chen Rui saw Athena’s eyes dilated again, and he sighed, “Athena, if you believe me, give me a month time. Don’t ask anything now. After a month, I’ll tell you about a lot of things. However, you have to listen to me for this month. Okay?”

Athena frowned slightly and asked, “Do Princess Royal and Alice know about these?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Other than the guy who shares the symbiotic contract, you’re the only one that knows.”

Athena’s eyebrows raised and her eyes were shining, but her voice still seemed annoyed, “ Hmph! Remember what you said!”

“Alright, don’t be angry anymore. The Jade Pearl’s poison resistance isn’t a lie. For you to ride the wyvern safely isn’t because of the antidote I have you, but its your body’s poison resistance, thus it shouldn’t be a problem when it comes to devil fruit.” Chen Rui smiled and said, “Let’s find a place to rest now for you to recover from your wounds first. Regardless of whether the Jade Pearl is effective or not, eat one more before you eat the devil fruit. After you completely digest the fruit’s power, we’ll continue our journey to Mountain Xilang.”

Athena didn’t throw any more tantrum, gently touched the Jade Pearl in her hand and nodded.

Chen Rui wasn’t a fool. He could somehow felt Athena’s feelings; he did have feelings for Athena too. However, there wasn’t much time left before the battle with Arux. Thus, he should concentrate all his efforts on this matter; he couldn’t be distracted by the other aspects. After this, he would then seriously deal with the problem between them as two single man and woman.

chapters.title: Chapter 87 - Mountain Xilang
chapters.body:
Chapter 87 - Mountain Xilang

Chapter 87: Mountain Xilang

Two days later, two wyverns flew over the black rainforest. Athena who mounted on Kegu looked energetic as the devil fruit effect was completely absorbed by her.

This precious fruit that could wage war was indeed worthy of its reputation. Athena’s strength was originally at the early stage of Higher Demon, but she instantly promoted to the middle stage. That was merely a superficial effect. The invisible potential index was more important. In the future, the probability for her to break through the limit of Higher Demon to become Demon King was greatly increased. Even the further Great Demon King and Demon Emperor level were no longer an impossible fantasy.

With the example of Dodo and Chen Rui’s strong persistence, Athena ate another fruit. As a result, it only made her strength stabler. The tiny possibility of additional ability still didn’t appear. However, this special ability might not necessarily be immediate. It could very likely be obtained in the years of future practice.

As for Dodo’s changes, it might not only be the devil fruit’s effect, but it was most probably also related to the swallowing of dragon’s flesh.

Chen Rui secretly ate a demon fruit, but his power didn’t grow at all. He only increased some aura due to the toxicity, so it was really not worthy. However, with a magical thing like galaxy garden, he could harvest again in 2 months. In the future, it wasn’t impossible to eat them as snacks like Dodo did.

During these two days, Chen Rui didn’t waste his time. He spent all his time in the training ground. His 130,000 auras had only more than 90,000 left. Athena was informed by him to not interfere with his “sleep”. Together with Dodo’s protection, everything was smooth including when Athena consumed the devil fruit.

Like the straw that broke the camel’s back, 8-fold gravity was indeed incomparable to the limit represented by 4-fold gravity. Even after breaking through to Mizar state, it was still really difficult to move without the use of Star Power. The first 10 days, he didn’t know how much hardship did he suffer. When he finished training and saw Athena sleeping like a baby after eating the devil fruit, he felt that there was more energy in his body. After rushing to eat and rest, he once again immersed himself in the self-abusing training.

Chen Rui had taken two black potions, Eternal Power and Eternal Speed. At the time, the potion effect was actually not completely absorbed. Under the high-pressure training, the potion effect accumulated in the body finally came into play.

Dodo had always been obsessed with the devil fruit, but since he tasted the barbecue made by Chen Rui, he began to change his taste, and he was even more loyal to his master. Athena was initially worried about the evil fruit tree, but once Chen Rui told her that he managed to hide it, Athena was relieved.

Two wyverns left the black rainforest. They finally arrived at their destination, Xilang mountain range in 1 ½ day.

Among the rolling Xilang mountain range, there were many tall mountains and deep, dangerous valleys. The area was huge. It reached the Town Leia that bordered the Dark Shadow Empire all the way to the west. Mountain Xilang was the largest mountain in the Xilang mountain range. However, Mountain Xilang had been controlled by the bandits, so the current mining office was located under the remote Mountain Lugang.

When Chen Rui and Athena followed the mark on the magic map and landed with the two wyverns, the guards and miners at the entrance of mining office were all shocked.

As the original mining office was occupied by the bandits, the mining office now was actually a simple stone house that was temporary built. Being shocked by the wyverns, a centaur who looked like a leader came out of the stone house. There were several scars on his face. Hee was holding a walking stick. As soon as he saw Athena jumped off the wyvern’s back, his eyes gradually showed surprise. He approached and greeted, “You are… Ms. Athena!”

“Who are you?” Athena felt that this limping centaur was a bit familiar, but she couldn’t remember his name.

The centaur seemed to be moved, “I’m Gade. I once served General George at the Warlock Fortress. As I was injured in a conflict with the Bloody Empire, I was transferred here 4 years ago.”

Athena finally recalled and said with surprise, “I remembered! You’re Death Hammer, Gade! You even gifted me a sword!”

“Its a great pleasure that Miss still remembers me,” Gade waved his powerless arm and disabled left leg. He sighed, “Unfortunately, I’m no longer the Death Hammer. The general is compassionate toward his subordinates, so he let me come to the Dark Moon for an easy position to retire… Let’s not talk about that. I heard that Miss Athena came to the Dark Moon City 3 years ago. Unfortunately, I couldn’t excuse myself from here. What brings Miss to the mines today?”

“Didn’t you receive the magic communication from the Dark Moon City? Since the official appointment from Princess Royal, the magic communication should be issued already.” Athena looked suspicious.

Gade shook his head and replied, “The communication tower here has been destroyed by the bandits; it hasn’t been repaired.”

Magic communication was actually equivalent to a wireless communication using a communication symbol. In between, a special magic communication tower was needed to transmit messages which was equivalent to the “base station” in Chen Rui’s previous world. If the communication tower was destroyed, the magic communication symbol within the range would be unusable.

The magic communication tower of each line must be set up separately. There were private owned and public owned. For example, there was a dedicated magic communication tower from the capital city to every estate. The “base stations” along the way was also specifically protected.

“That’s why.” Athena pointed at Chen Rui, “This time I was ordered by Princess Shea to protect your new mining officer.”

That sentence made everyone’s sight fell on the human, who they thought it was Ms. Athena’s “servant”. Despite the lack of news, the news of Master Aldas defeating the genius from the capital in a challenge had spread throughout every corner of Dark Moon. Even the people in a secluded place like Mountain Xilang had heard of it. This should be the human apprentice of the master, but how did the apprentice become our boss suddenly?

Chen Rui was no longer the same as before. Under those eyes, he was calm and took out the magic letter of appointment signed by Shea personally.
