He clasped his hand and gathered the Star Power at his fingertips, and he held onto the reef in time and took a sigh of relief.

After resisting the waves, he stabilized his body. He slowly clasped on the reef, climbed up step by step and continued to sit on the reef, accepting the baptist of the gigantic waves.

The temperature difference between the day and night at Xilang mountain range was very huge. Athena, Gade and Connor were all sitting in front of the bonfire, but they could still feel the chill from the wind that blew past their bodies. This time, Athena hunted a lot of prey, along with the fruits she collected and the pancakes that were made. If yesterday’s meat soup was an appetizer, today’s meal was a long-awaited feast for the miners.

Although Athena gave the credits to Chen Rui, many people still respected and appreciated the empire’s first general’s daughter. Athena received the barbecued meat from Gade and took a bite. Suddenly, she recalled someone’s cooking and glanced at the tent that was still silent at the summit.

“We’ve received the latest news. After last night, the underground demoic beast didn’t seem to come out of the main pit again. However, the Red Devils still dare not enter. They just guard at the residential area at the foot.” Connor took a sip of soup and said, “I heard that the demonic beast is a monster-like dragon. It has no flesh but only the skeleton. Its eyes are even emitting green light. It is very frightening. The bandits call it the spirit dragon…”

Athena suddenly coughed violently; she seemed to be choked by the barbecued meat. Gade at the side quickly handed a bowl of water to her. Athena took a sip of it and looked strange. Gade and Connor knew she was uncomfortable from choking, so they didn’t pay much attention.

After listening to Connor’s description, Athena pondered for a while and asked. “Did this demonic beast appear in the past few hundred years?”

“Never.” Gade shook his head, “In the past few hundred years, the underground demonic beasts that have appeared in the mines were Medusa, Tauren, Elementals and so on. The most abundant was a fly-like creature that sucks blood. They are very difficult to deal with. However, we’ve never seen such a monster. Maybe it is a new type that just appears recently.”

Athena held a barbecued meat in her hand tight, and she didn’t say anything else, but her heart was filled with resentment. When she was resting in the black rainforest, she witnessed Dodo’s performance of posing as the ghost dragon which was exactly like what Connor described. “Spirit Dragon” had never appeared before, but it immediately appeared when Chen Rui and she came to the mines. Besides, it also “selectively” attacked the Red Devils and killed the 3 Higher Demons. She had every reason to believe that the spirit dragon and the ghost dragon were basically…the same “dragon”.

This annoying man, how much secret is he hiding…

chapters.title: Chapter 94 - Athena’S Questioning And Culia’S Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 94 - Athena’S Questioning And Culia’S Crisis

Chapter 94: Athena’s Questioning And Culia’s Crisis

In the surfy sea, Chen Rui was in a horse stance. His legs were firmly nailed to the reef in the sea. This posture was much more difficult than merely sitting 2 months ago. Even though the waves were huge, they still couldn’t move his figure.

During this 2-months training, the Eternal Body and Eternal Power that Chen Rui drank had already been fully absorbed. When the effectiveness of the two potions were fully exerted, there was a weird, resonance-like fluctuation in his body. Not just his spirit and stamina, but even his strength and speed were improved. His overall status had achieved another height, as if he consumed another black potion again.

That should be an extra bonus after drinking all the potions which was similar to the extra bonus after completing a “set equipment”.

Chen Rui finally faintly understood another wonder of Eternal Potions: If the True black potions are “principles”, then, the Eternal black potions have a “resonance” of the entire series other than the “principles” of each attribute. What would the essence of Resurrection Potion and Longevity Potion be?

The additional gains of black potions was only a subplot in the training. Although the potions increased a certain amount of strength, most importantly, the understanding and use of strength required him to obtain during training.

Chen Rui was not just standing on the reef but also punching. However, the frequency of his punching wasn’t fast because balancing his body in the huge waves had already consumed most of the Star Power. The hard work of 2 sleepless months wasn’t in vain as his gains were significant. His usage and control of Star Power were improving daily. Now, he gradually learned to use the smallest amount of Star Power to exert the strongest effect.

When he felt that he was at his limit that he could no longer withstand, Chen Rui slowly sat down again to wait for the recovery of Star Power and stamina. In the cycle of continuous exhaustion and recovery, the maximum limit of Star Power also slowly expanded.

If it could’ve accommodated a bucket of water originally, it could be a tank or even a pool now.

As time went by, the particles of countless stardusts appeared smaller and smaller inside of the human figure status bar. The light didn’t reduce, but it increased instead. The flow seemed more natural and smooth, as if it was constantly polished and refined.

……

After a long time.

Chen Rui opened his eyes and the training for 100 days was finally over. This kind of boring training without sleep was a huge challenge physically and mentally. Yet, as long as one could persist till the end of the challenge, the gains were also quite profound.

Chen Rui stretched his arms and felt a little drowsy, as if the 3 months of “overdued” sleep struck at the same time. However, he needed to fill up the stomach that “starved” for 100 days before that.

Surely, he only starved for a day in reality. After calculating the resting and training time, it should be dusk soon which was just nice for him to eat something and take a good sleep to replenish his stamina.

Right at that moment, Chen Rui felt something was wrong. He stood up vigilantly and carefully, then he opened the tent and saw a voluptuous figure standing outside. It was actually Athena. No wonder Dodo and the two wyverns didn’t send any warning.

“Athena, why are you…” To be honest, Chen Rui, who had been enduring the loneliness in the fierce sea for more than 3 months, was still very happy when he saw Athena.

“Why didn’t I get poisoned by the “deadly poison” around the tent?” Athena clearly looked very unhappy. As she just said a sentence, her eyes became sharp and a greatsword appeared in her hand out of thin air. She sliced toward Chen Rui at high speed with an overbearing demeanor.

Chen Rui had seen Athena’s sword easily split Ganke’s hammer into two while the sword still suspended at the top of Ganke’s head firmly. Although she was only an Intermediate Demon at that time, her skills and accurate control of power still awed him until now. However, he didn’t expect there would be a moment that he had to suffer from same strike. In an instant, a few ideas came into his mind, but he decided to stay still and not dodge eventually.

Surely, Athena’s greatsword suddenly stopped at the top of his head. It was only a few inches away from Chen Rui’s head; he could already feel the fierce vigour. However, obviously, there was only vigour, but not murderousness.

Although knowing that Athena wouldn’t truly hit, Chen Rui still took a sigh of relief in his heart: When did I annoy this swordswoman that she needs to use her sword again? One of her sword seems to have shattered in the black rainforest last time. Now she got another one. It seems that she has a lot of spares in her space bracelet…

Athena looked at ”Chen Rui, who was “astounded” and suddenly put down her sword angrily, “Be honest; Where did you go the night before?”

“The night before…” Chen Rui recalled that the night before, he seemed to have found a reef with a better position and immersed himself in the sea to practice punching. Now, he could punch more freely and he could faintly something mysterious while punching. Unfortunately, the time left wasn’t enough. Before he could entirely form and understand that feeling, he was “kicked” out of the training ground. “Don’t act dumb! Did you go to the main pit at Mountain Xilang the night before?”

Chen Rui just came out of the training ground, so he had yet gotten rid of the memory of that 100 days. Only then he understood that Athena was talking about the time in reality. The night before, wasn’t it just killing 2 Higher Demons and a Higher Demon-level cerberus? Yet, I can’t say that to Athena. “We just came here the night before. I think I was sleeping in the tent…”

“You still don’t want to tell the truth?” Athena snorted with dissatisfaction and looked at the slime that withdrew to the back of the tent, “Dodo told me everything just now.”

Chen Rui glared at Dodo and Dodo immediately made two arms that covered his face. His exaggerated expression looked extremely innocent. He cried pitifully, “I didn’t say anything just now! I didn’t tell mistress about us going to the mines the night before!”

You didn’t just now but now… didn’t you just say it?

Chen Rui was speechless for a while: If it were the little loli, it wasn’t surprising for her to use such deceiving act. However, this is unexpected for Athena using such deceiving act. Could it be peer influence?

“Nothing is too deceitful in war.” Athena saw his dumbfounded and helpless look, and she smiled ambiguously, “It’s what I learned from your story of the Three Kingdoms.”

Chen Rui was even more speechless as it turned out that the bad influence was surnamed Chen but not Lucifer.

“Actually, I’m really bad at these tricks that requires too much mental effort… Yet, that strike just now, even an ordinary people will dodge instinctively. Yet, you? I admit defeat to your calmness.” Athena looked sentimentally. “You really trust me so much that I won’t actually hit you?”

Chen Rui’s speechlessness had been replaced with a bitter smile: Who says women are stupid? Those who regard women as stupid are the most stupid person.

Athena suddenly sighed, “Aren’t you going to explain something?”

“1 month, that’s my promise last time.” Chen Rui sighed and said in a serious manner, “I must concentrate on one thing first. There are still more than twenty days. By then, you will get your answer. Besides… I want to get an answer from you at the time.”

It was unsure whether she suddenly understood something because of the happiness Athena got, she blushed suddenly and stopped asking him for the answers. She nodded in a fluster and hurried down the mountain.

Chen Rui’s sight fell on the parcel that Athena left on the ground. It was clean water and freshly cooked food. His heart was suddenly filled with warmth. He took a bite of the barbecue. Although the cooking was worse than his, there was a faint, strange taste that he never felt ever since he came to this world.

This night, Chen Rui slept very well.

In the evening of the next day, the Red Devils that had been anxious welcomed their backbone, Culia.

After listening to the report of a little dark elf leader, Culia frowned. He was in an extreme bad mood.

Everything’s so bad recently! After suffering for a few months in a bitter and cold place like Mountain Xilang, it was finally his turn to rest in Town Leia. In Town Leia, he found his old companion, Fei Lian, and they had fun for a few days. As they were getting more intimate in the bed, the Vice Captain Barnacle couldn’t stand still Mountain Xilang, and he even came to Town Leia in advance.

Then, Culia sadly ended his “holidays” earlier as he was chased back by Barnacle. He had always have a bad relationship with that so-called vice captain. The problem was that their leader, Snowden returned to the Red Spirit estate the day before. Since their leader wasn’t there, whoever stronger was reasonable. Unfortunately, his strength was inferior compared to Barnacles.

Culia was obviously reluctant to be rushed back like that. He kept on delaying to enjoy with Feilian 3 more days only then he reluctantly returned to Mountain Xilang. He never expected that when he came back, he would receive such a bad news!

“Spirit dragon? A dragon with only skeleton? Are you sure?”

The dark elf nodded quickly. When he thought of the terrifying demeanor of the “spirit dragon” that night, he shuddered again, “It’s absolutely true! Sir, that was what I witnessed with my own eyes. Also, many other people saw it too. That spirit dragon was really scary. Just its roar alone contained terrifying Dragon’s Demeanor. Many of our brothers fell to the ground on the spot.”

The centaur also added, “After the monster ate Barnacle’s cerberus, Nagurala, it also threw the skeleton out. A brother mustered up his courage and collected Nagurala’s bones. Please take a look, sir.”

As the centaur spoke, he put down the broken skeleton of the cerberus in his hand. There weren’t a trace of blood or flesh on the white bones. It was clearly being “eaten” very thoroughly – Dodo had nothing better to do so it devoured the initial cut head of the cerberus along the way.

As for the guards’ corpses that were left initially were also transferred by Chen Rui after he left the main pit.

“No news of Yagus and Sully? Have you entered the main pit to check?”

The two small leaders looked at each other and shook their heads.

“That spirit dragon is too scary, so no one dares to go in. As for Ms. Sully and Sir Yagus… I’m afraid they’ve been killed by that monster…”

“Really?” Culia looked at the bones on the ground with disdain. Regardless of how many heads it has it was just that dumbass’s dog, it doesn’t matter if it dies.

Actually, Sully and Yagus were Barnacle’s men. Although they were not as detestable as Barnacle and they had a relatively good relationship with him, after all, they weren’t in the same team so it didn’t matter if they die. The problem was that Barnacle would definitely take the advantage to put the blame on him.

Culia’s brow inexplicably frowned even tighter. Suddenly, he asked someone at the side, “What do you think about this spirit dragon?”

It turned out that Culia didn’t return alone.

chapters.title: Chapter 95 - “Sloth”! The Mysterious Royal Family
chapters.body:
Chapter 95 - “Sloth”! The Mysterious Royal Family

Chapter 95: “Sloth”! The Mysterious Royal Family

Culia was asking a man next to him. This man should be a Great Demon with mutated bloodline as he had a human appearance with light brown hair; relatively dark skin; handsome facial features; he looked like he had been through ups and downs, but his eyes looked lazy. He was just casually laying on the chair like his own place and leisurely poured a bottle of wine into his glass, as if he didn’t hear Culia’s question.

“Lennon!” Culia asked with dissatisfaction, “You are more informative. What do you think about this spirit dragon?”

Lennon reluctantly poured out the last bit of wine into his glass and took a sip, then he said, “Some necromancers or liches can use dark magic to drive the deceased into a controlled undead. However, this magic required a lot of spirit from the user. If the undead’s strength exceeds the limits of the user’s spirit limit, he or she will be backfired or even have their own spirit collapsed.

Culia nodded slightly. Seeing Lennon started drinking again by himself and stopped talking, Culia frowned, “I know all these general knowledge that you said. I’m asking for your opinion!”

“My Miao Fruit Wine has finished. This is the most attractive thing in Town Leia…” Lennon shook the empty wine bottle, “I know you still have some in stock. Give me a bottle.”

Culia almost acted on his anger. If it were Yagus, he would’ve thrown a bottle to him. However, Lennon wasn’t simple. Although his strength was ordinary, even their leader valued him a lot, and he constantly ordered not to neglect Lennon.

This time, Lennon took the initiative to follow Culia because he seduced the young wife of Kander, the mayor of Town Leia. In the end, their adultery was exposed, so he was wanted by the entire town. He was being pursued everyday. Therefore, he was forced to avoid troubles at Mountain Xiang. However, Culia was sure that this guy had a lot of alcohol still; he was just saving on his stock.

Lennon received the bottle of alcohol that Culia threw with a gloomy face. Lennon finally smiled, but it seemed like he was smiling at the bottle instead of Culia.

“That’s very simple. This spirit dragon is either an actual monster from a dragon’s mutation or an undead controlled by someone. Regardless of possibilities, you can’t provoke.”

Nonsense! Culia was speechless then he heard Lennon added, “Yet, based on the Dragon’s Demeanor from the spirit dragon at the main pit’s entrance, its strength should be weaker than expected. If it were a Dragon’s Demeanor from an actual dragon, your subordinates wouldn’t just fell to the ground, but they would even lose the strength to escape. If not, how could they survive until now? Of course, it can also be understood as the weakening of ability after the mutation or other reasons. In my opinion, the spirit dragon was giving more of a warning to prohibit others from approaching the main pit’s area. Those who were dead were close to or entered there, such as the cerberus and that 2 Higher Demons.

Actually, from the bandits’ stories, there were still a few suspicions, but he was too lazy to mention.

Culia thought it was reasonable. Anyway, the purpose of the Red Devils occupying the mining office wasn’t to excavate, so it didn’t matter if the main pit got even messier. However, Barnacle would definitely blame him on the death of Sully and Yagus. He should’ve stayed longer if he knew earlier. The leader and him, and the trio, Barnacle, Sully and Yagus were actually forces of two factions. If the Barnacle’s faction were to blame him, even their leader couldn’t save him.

Actually, even if he came back early, he couldn’t help if he encountered such trouble. He might be killed by the spirit dragon like Yagus and Sully. Now, he had to find a way to minimize his responsibility.

That’s right! The mining office! An idea appeared in Culia’s mind. Originally, Yagus’s task was to eliminate the new human mining officer. Now that Sully and Yagus were dead, this task would be completed by him. He could also use his good deeds to stop them from blaming him.

It’s quite late already. The journey rushing back is quite tiring. Let’s just take a good rest today and wait until I have a clear understanding of the specific situation of the mining office first. Those people can’t raise any commotions anyway. I’ll just let the human live for a day or two more.

Culia was pondering, then Lennon stood up and stretched out, “I’m exhausted. Please provide me a place for me to get a good sleep. Although there’s no annoying guy like that Kander, the conditions here are really bad.”

Culia thought that he was clever and his mood was a lot better, so he didn’t bother to mess with Lennon. He made someone to arrange a room at the mountain foot’s residential area for Lennon. Although the condition of the mining office on the mountainside was better, the aftermath of the “spirit dragon” was still there. With former examples, even Culia didn’t dare to stay there. The bonfire at the residential area was still the same, but the noises were much smaller and the security was doubled to guard against the danger at the main pit at any time.

The sky was getting darker, and it was getting quieter. The lights in the residential area were put off one after another. A cloaked figure descended silently from the sky and landed before the main pit. The “rope” that could move and extend freely turned into an onion-head and lept onto his shoulder. This person was obviously Chen Rui. The minerals in the storage were all converted by him. Those minerals that were recycled from waste were also hidden far away when he used the excuse of riding the wyvern to hunt. Now, the storage was basically empty. It must be “replenished” by another batch of stock.

Chen Rui also learned something about the Red Devils from Gabe. With the spirit dragon’s aftermath now, the bandits weren’t approaching the main pit for the time being. However, as it took longer, it would be easier for the truth of the spirit dragon to be exposed. Even if they only found out that there was something wrong with the waste ore pit, they would very likely suspect the mining office. So, it was necessary to transport the mines as soon as possible.

Based on the time, Culia should’ve returned by now. To be safe, Chen Rui used Dodo to land like last time instead of making the wyvern land directly at the main pit’s entrance to avoid being noticed.

After Chen Rui entered the main pit, he took out the prepared magic compass. The magic compass was different from the magic map. The magic map covered a wide range, and it could be magnified freely, but it must be an explored area. It could facilitate long-distance exploration or action; the magic compass was a great tool in exploring unknown areas, especially in a maze-like terrain. It could clearly display the terrain structure in a small area, and it could mark and note, so it was really convenient.

Chen Rui used the magic compass to mark the location of the waste ores room. Now, he was familiar with the path, so he soon found the waste ores room. He could faintly see some traces of the battle last time.

Chen Rui opened his storage, and once again scrapped the ground off for 3 meters. However, the huge pit in the waste ores room still hadn’t bottomed out. It seemed that the reserves were still above imagination. After all, it had accumulated for more than 400 years, even if it was just waste ores.

After the storage was full, he didn’t stay longer. He walked quickly all the way and came out of the main pit. When he saw no one was around and he was about to leave, a notification suddenly appeared from <Analytical Eyes>: Sloth Royal Family; Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C; Stamina: Unknown; Power; unknown, Spirit; Unknown; Agility: Unknown.

Sloth Royal Family! The name sounded funny, but it isn’t funny at all in reality!

Chen Rui knew that the Demon Realm originally had 7 monarchical kingdoms which had only 3 left now; they were also the rulers of the 3 empires.

“Pride” Royal Family surname: Lucifer.

“Greed” Royal Family surname: Mammon.

“Lust” Royal Family surname: Asmodeus.

However, there were other 4 royal families that either disappeared or seek refuge from the 3 empires:

“Sloth” Royal Family surname: Belphegor

“Envy” Royal Family surname: Leviathan.

“Wrath” Royal Family surname: Samuel.

“Gluttony” Royal Family surname: Beelzebub

The 7 royal families had great potential far beyond ordinary demons. Each of them had their own special bloodline power. Besides, they also had a war pressure against ordinary demons that could restrain the opponent’s strength.

The Sloth Royal Family that hid nearby was the descendent of Belphegor. Although the Belphegor family had fallen, and they were rarely seen in the Demon Realm, a royal family was indeed a royal family, not to mention his strength was Demon King!

To be safe, Chen Rui activated <Analytical Eyes> when he first entered the main pit. At that time, there was no one, so this person must’ve arrived later. From the position, he should be lurking in the shadow of the big rock in front. If it weren’t the hint from <Analytical Eyes>, he actually wasn’t aware of him with his own sensation ability.

Chen Rui was extremely shocked. In front of such a Demon King-level powerhouse, his strength was really not enough. Suddenly, he thought of the ring that Shea gave. As he focused his mind, “Dark Will” had automatically appeared on his left hand’s ring finger. This ring should be one of the secret treasures of the Lucifer Family. Wearing it daily on his hand would be easily recognized which might lead to unnecessary interest or trouble. Therefore, he had been keeping it in storage. The storage warehouse was safe and convenient anyway; he could quickly deposit and withdraw items with his thoughts.

With such an escaping treasure in hand, Chen Rui was slightly more confident. He tidied his cloak and the mask on his face, then he gradually condensed the Star Power of entire body quietly and said with a hoarse voice, “Show yourself.”

The shadow still didn’t respond. <Analytical Eyes> prompted that the person’s position had moved from the shadow of the stone to the tree in another direction. However, Chen Rui could be sure that this person wasn’t a Great Demon.

Speed! Horrifying speed; it is even comparable to the Great Demon’s talent!

If the opponent weren’t within the effective range of <Analytical Eyes>, Chen Rui wouldn’t be able to detect the person’s location.

Is this the strength of a Demon King? No, even when Paglio suppressed his strength to Demon King level, he absolutely doesn’t have such speed!

This person is definitely not Culia nor Barnacle. Can it be the leader of the Red Devils?

Chen Rui was secretly vigilant. After turning his head to look at the tree, he said faintly, “Is it necessary to hide anymore?”

While Chen Rui said that with his eyes focused at the back of the tree, he felt a slight illusionary blur in his sight and the <Analytical Eyes> showed that the opponent had already appeared before him.

Too fast!

“You actually found me with the strength of a Higher Demon.” The figure praised with interest, “It is truly an incredible ability.”

When Chen Rui wore his cloak and appeared as Aguile, he always subconsciously disabled his passive ability, <Hidden> and faintly revealing his Mizar’s strength. This habit was very good as it could avoid unnecessary suspicion. Therefore, this person could tell his level as a “Higher Demon” at a glance.

Chen Rui asked, “Who are you? Why are you here?”

“Interesting guy.” That guy smiled. The voice was a man, but his back was facing the moonlight, so Chen Rui couldn’t see clearly, “I should be the one asking. Who are you? How did you come out of the main pit?”

Chen Rui probed, “Are you part of the Red Devils?”

“I have nothing to do with those people, even though their leader keeps inviting me to join.” A wine bottle appeared in the man’s hand and he took a sip. “My hobbies are only 3, namely alcohol, gambling and beauty. The stronger the alcohol the better; the more exciting the gambling the better; as for beauty… those that are married are my priority; widows are the best.”

Chen Rui was cold sweating while listening: Addicted to alcohol, gambling and beauties! Besides, he’s even a wife-con and widow-con! What kind of royal family is this!

chapters.title: Chapter 96 - Horrifying! Aurora Shot Was Sliced Like A Watermelon
chapters.body:
Chapter 96 - Horrifying! Aurora Shot Was Sliced Like A Watermelon

“The spirit dragon must be your doing right!” The man was casually drinking while saying something shocking, “That 2 Higher Demons were also died in your hands right? Oh right, also the dog.”

Chen Rui was silent for a while. This guy wasn’t just shockingly agile, but his mind was also really nimble. The spirit dragon happened on the first day when Athena and him arrived. If the opponent was well-informed, they would soon suspect them.

The problem was that the strength of this person of the “Sloth” Royal Family was too overwhelming. So, being able to escape from him was good enough as Chen Rui definitely couldn’t rival.

“Since you’re not answering, then it must be true. Although you don’t seem to be a mutated necromancer, being able to control a dead dragon shows your considerable strength.” The man praised, but his tone suddenly changed, “However, the dragons are all self-righteous. Even those that have fallen to the Demon Realm would always mention their so-called dragon’s dignity. As long as it is publicized that a guy used necromancy to control a dragon’s bone to cause troubles, I’m afraid a lot of dragons would personally “visit” you here at Mountain Xilang.”

Chen Rui was cold sweating. It seemed that he underestimated the slyness of this guy which was absolutely proportional with his strength.

“Initially… I wouldn’t bother even if you killed all the bandits, but I don’t like secretive guy. Besides, you disturbed my rest, so I decide to give you an unforgettable lesson.”

Fuck your lessons! Chen Rui secretly cursed. This guy should be resting at the mountainside or the mountain foot. He is obviously here to look for trouble himself!

“Wait!” Chen Rui’s brain was in the air, and he thought of a temporary solution. “Don’t you like to gamble? Do you dare to gamble?”

“Want me to let you live? Don’t bother about your bad tricks.” Although that man said so, his eyes faintly glowed, “Tell me what’s the gamble first?”

“We’ll bet if I can escape from you today.” While Chen Rui spoke, he told Dodo to run away telepathically and meet him at the mining office.

That man initially thought that the opponent would gamble on an unpopular thing to escape and survive. However, it was such an unexpected gamble. He immediately became interested, “What is the bet?”

“Very simple.” Chen Rui said with a husky laugh, “Keep tonight’s incident as a secret.”

The man stunned and laughed, “Sure. The bandits have nothing to do with me anyway. However, if you lose, your life will be mine.”

“No problem. Yet, can I trust your gambling integrity?” Chen Rui said deliberately.

“I, Sir Lennon, is lacking of money and beauties but not gambling integrity!” The man said coldly, “Besides, you have no choice but to believe it!”

“Actually, you guessed it right. I am not a necromancer; I also have two abilities. If you are confidence, I’ll let you have a look first…” When Chen Rui finished his words, he was already in the air with his hand glowing faintly, chopping toward Lennon’s head.

Under <Aura Blade>, Lennon’s figure suddenly split into two. Chen Rui didn’t have the slightest joy, and he turned back immediately. Surely, the <Analytical Eyes> showed that the opponent’s figure was already behind him. It was just the <Afterimage> left from high speed just now.

Both were <Afterimage>, but comparing the dark elf, Jesse and Lennon, Jesse’s was just a child play.

“You can even slice the <Afterimage> into half…” Lennon’s tone contained a slight surprise. “Great attack skill, but the power is slightly weak. If your strength is increased to another level, I’ll actually be interested to battle with you.”

“I can guarantee that you’ll have this opportunity… Before that, have a taste of it with your body!” While Chen Rui spoke, his hands did not pause at all. The <Aura Blade> struck again. At that moment, Dodo had already transformed into something and left sneakily.

Lennon seemed to notice Dodo’s movement, but he didn’t care. His sight was focusing on Chen Rui’s <Aura Blade>. The wine bottle in his hand suddenly disappeared. His hands were held together in lightning speed, and he actually caught the <Aura Blade> directly with his bare hands, just like the move of holding the blade with bare hands in the martial arts novels in his past life!

However, the mystery of <Aura Blade> wasn’t so simple. After Chen Rui went through the training at the fierce sea, the control of Star Power was more proficient and the power of <Aura Blade> was more concentrated and more powerful. Lennon only defended the tangible blade, but the invisible sword qi [1] had penetrated through.

At this moment, before the invisible “sword qi”, a sword appeared out of nowhere.

An actual sword.

Under the moonlight, the sword seemed faintly blue.

He didn’t know how the blue sword appeared. In the blink of an eye, the sword qiof <Aura Blade> had already struck on the blue sword’s blade.

The blue sword seemed really thin. When the sword qi hit, the sword vibrated, but the hand holding the blue sword was as sword qi as a rock.

Lennon’s hand that was holding the <Aura Blade> was already holding the blue sword. His eyes sparkled with a strange brilliance, looking at Chen Rui’s palm that was glowing faintly. He praised, “Nice sword!”

At that moment, the opponent suddenly leaped and distant himself. His hand suddenly changed and his five fingers were opened with his palm facing right at Lennon.

“Look at this now!”

At the same time he said it, a dazzling, large spherical white light blasted out at high speed.

The white light was close to Lennon instantly, but he had no intention of dodging it. The dazzling white light actually couldn’t cover the bright flame in his eyes.

Chen Rui saw the huge light ball paused and vibrated a little. Suddenly, countless neat dark blue cracks appeared. It was as if a watermelon was cut into thousands of pieces by a sharp tool. For a moment, the shattered countless “blocks” of light maintained a sphere shape that was cut and disappeared suddenly. Even at a distance, Chen Rui could feel the sword qi. It was even above his <Aura Blade>, and there were thousands of strikes!

Chen Rui had seen Paglio breaking the <Aurora Shot> by pinching it single-handedly, and he had also seen Arux tearing <Aurora Shot> into two pieces, but he had never seen anyone solved <Aurora Shot> this way!

“A very unique destructive power. Very good.” Lennon closed his eyes, as if he was tasting some nice wine. The blue sword in his hand suddenly split into two. He opened his eyes and smiled, “Yet, I prefer the previous strike!”

When Lennon finished his words, he saw a faint glow on the object of the left-hand’s finger that was initially maintaining a knife-shape. The image of the entire person suddenly became blurred and distorted, and a hoarse voice came at the same time, “You lost.”

Lennon had already dashed to the front of Chen Rui, but he was still a step late. He missed his strike.

“Fuck, damn it! I shouldn’t have acted cool!” Lennon complained. “I actually lost!”

The mountain food seemed to notice the movement. Those alerted bandits began to approach the mountaintop cautiously.

“This guy is quite interesting. Although those two attacks weren’t enough, they were pretty good.” Lennon didn’t care about the bandits who were getting closer. A bottle appeared in his hand again. He took a huge sip and said to himself, “He didn’t seem to be affected by the royal family’s war pressure just now. Oh right, the magic item that can teleport… could it be an item of the Lucifer Family?”

When the scouting bandits mustered up their courage and arrived at the mountaintop, Lennon’s figure had already disappeared.

It was Chen Rui’s first time using “Dark Will’s” <Teleportation> function. He felt like his entire body was wrapped by a mysterious force and decomposed into countless “particles”. These “particles” seemed to be repelled by the current space, and it was transferred to another location. Subsequently, the “particles” reconstructed into the human form.

Actually, it happened in an instant. After a slight dizziness, he was already in another place.

Based on the magic map, he seemed to still be around the Mountain Xilang’s area. However, the map showed that he was about 10 km from the main pit. This kind of teleportation had a certain distance limit, so it was impossible to return to the Dark Moon City directly. Also, it was very random. Of course, he wouldn’t be directly transported to the enemy. Otherwise, he could really be awarded with the King of Tragedy of the year.

Lennon’s strength was quite scary. His two ultimate moves, <Aura Blade> and <Aurora Shot> were actually easily solved. Especially his terrifying speed left a strong impression on Chen Rui. Not only his body movement was rapid, but his sword speed was also quick. Surely, Lennon didn’t use his greatest strength. It seemed that the gap between ranks were indeed huge.

He certainly couldn’t rival a Demon King level powerhouse currently. However, after he surpassed Arux, Lennon would be his next target!

Chen Rui was very determined, but he could only do it step by step. The current imperative was to prepare in advance to avoid the crisis. Although he had won the gamble with Lennon, it was only the mean to escape and testing. It was impossible to rely on Lennon’s “gambling integrity”.

With the help of magic map and magic compass, Chen Rui finally found Mengda at the summit after much difficulty, then they flew back to the mining office at Mountain Lugang. At that time, Dodo hadn’t returned yet. However, with its immortality and <Transformation> ability, along with its super strong escape instinct, it shouldn’t be much of a problem.

Chen Rui didn’t rest at his tent, but he walked straight down the summit and came to Athena’s tent.

Despite being late at night, Athena’s alertness was still very high. She immediately opened her eyes. Of course, Chen Rui didn’t deliberately conceal his footsteps.

“Athena.”

Hearing that it was Chen Rui’s voice, the hand that was holding the sword suddenly loosened.

“What’s the matter?” Athena’s heart pounded. It’s so late already. What does he want to do for coming here so suddenly?

For no reason, she suddenly thought of a story that Alice once told. It was said to be a chapter from a famous novel. She couldn’t remember the specific plot, but she vaguely remembered that it was about a lonely man raid a lonely woman at night, then… after that… subsequently… finally, the two were together.

“Can I come in?”

Thinking of that, Athena’s face was already red 😳, and her heart was beating even harder – this guy, how can he make such request so suddenly! Even if… he can’t do this! What kind of woman does he think I, Athena. Wales is!

“Can you let me in to talk?”

Asshole! Does he really have that intention? Then… should I kick him down the mountain? Or should I stab him with my sword?

Athena held her sword tight again.

“Athena!”

Chen Rui’s voice sounded again. Athena was nervous. She raised her greatsword with its sheath, but she lifted the tent’s curtain instead, “Come in.”

Athena regretted after lifting the curtain. She was scolding herself for not standing by her values. Seeing him putting down the curtain and sat down, she felt a little helpless. She held her sword tight again inexplicably. She secretly made up her mind that if this guy truly dared to have any misconduct, she’d immediately slap him out with her sword!

Wait, why is it just “slap” but not “stab”?

It was very dark, so Chen Rui didn’t notice her nervous appearance, “Sorry for disturbing you so late at night. There’s a very urgent thing.”

Athena was secretly shocked hearing the seriousness in his tone. She asked, “What happened?”

chapters.title: Chapter 97 - Impending Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 97 - Impending Crisis

Chapter 97: Impending Crisis

Chen Rui said very seriously, “Tomorrow early morning, you ride the wyvern and go to the green leaves forest to stay for a while.”

The green leaves forest was a forest at the border of the Xilang mountain range. Even if the wyvern “sailed” straight, it would still take a few hours to reach. It was considered as a relatively safe area.

Athena frowned, “What happened?”

Lennon’s strength was too terrifying. Even if Chen Rui and Athena cooperated, they’d had no chance of winning. So, he wanted to transfer Athena to a safe place, he could try to deal with Lennon and Culia without any worries.

Before leaving, Paglio gave him a small bottle of venom, which was the deadly poison that killed Sandro. It was still inconvenient to use at the current situation. If there was no other way, he had to use this desperate means.

However, if he revealed the true reason, Athena would definitely be unwilling to leave. Chen Rui thought about it, “You know that I have the inheritance of the grand master. My irregular sleeping pattern is due to that. From tomorrow onward, the grand master’s inheritance will enter a critical period, and it cannot be disturbed by anyone. Thus, I hope that you can accompany me to the green leaves forest. This matter is related to my life, so it is necessary to keep it a secret. We’ll tell the others that I need to leave for a while. The mining office should be fine with Gade and others.

Surely, when Athena heard that it was related to his life and death, she nodded without thinking, “Okay! I will accompany you.”

Chen Rui made up an excuse spontaneously, “No! You should go there and prepare for me in advance. I have to go to several places according to the requirements of the grand master. Then, I’ll meet you up as soon as possible. If I didn’t come, you mustn’t leave the green leaves forest.”

Although Athena felt that the reason for “early preparation” was a little too much, it was related to Chen Rui’s life, so she immediately agreed without hesitation.

“However, if we leave, what about the miners’ food?” Athena suddenly thought of a problem.

Chen Rui secretly shook his head: Based on the bandits’ words, it’s necessary to keep the miners alive to restrain and paralyze the Dark Moon City. Thus, they are not in too much danger for the time being. Instead, I, as the mining officer, will attract the bandits’ attention and I might put the miners in danger.

At present, due to the “spirit dragon”, the attention of the bandits hadn’t shifted to the mining office yet. Once the incident at the main pit was solved or faded, the Red Devils would definitely do something to him as the mining officer. If he deliberately disappears or fakes his death, not only could the miners recover their temporary “safety”, but he might also win by a surprise move.

Athena saw Chen Rui kept quiet, and she thought that he was somewhat dissatisfied. She quickly said, “Why not, I’ll hunt prey for them tomorrow morning. Then, I’ll go to the green leaves forest to make the preparation for you, okay?”

Athena’s bright eyes glowed in the dark. Chen Rui couldn’t bear to refuse and nodded.

“Athena…”

“En……”

Chen Rui finally found out that Athena was uncomfortable. To be honest, as a man, going into a woman’s tent in the middle of the night, although the situation was urgent, it was indeed doubtful. Now that he said what he wanted to say, how could he still stay here shamelessly… saying what he shouldn’t?

Actually, even if he wanted to be shameless… it wasn’t impossible. However, the time was already tight. The War Contract with Arux was already imminent. Then, a more horrifying “Sloth” Royal Family, Lennon appeared. A slight mistake would end his life. For other things, he would just wait after a month.

If it was his, it would always be his. It wouldn’t run away.

Chen Rui exchanged a set of 4 black Eternal potions and gave it to Athena.

“Remember to drink these 4 potions. No matter what happens, you can’t tell anyone.”

Those were good potions, but his wordings seemed kind of weird: No matter what happens? Cannot tell anyone?

Yet, Athena still nodded cooperatively.

If it was little loli, she’d surely suspect that it was some “weird” potions. Perhaps this was… why Alice was Alice and Athena was Athena.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to stay any longer and hurried back to the tent at the summit.

Seeing Chen Rui hurriedly ran away, Athena finally determined to “slap” him out with her sword. Now, the nervousness and anxiety had changed into a strange slight dissatisfaction, Hmph, timid man!

Women were indeed the most contradictory being.

The contradictory woman gently touched her blushing cheeks and picked up a bottle of potion on the ground. She removed the cork and drank it. Early the next morning, Athena rushed to the tent at the summit and woke Chen Rui up in his sleeping bag.

“What potions did you give me last night?”

Looking at Athena’s surprised and excited appearance, Chen Rui smiled slightly. Happiness indeed multiplied as when two people were happy, it was better than being happy alone. Unfortunately, he couldn’t let any more people to know about this secret.

Chen Rui pointed to his head:, “My grand master here is a grand master in both mechanic and potion. What do you think the treasure that he inherited is?”

Despite mentally prepared, after Athena received Chen Rui’s affirmation, it was still difficult to suppress the shock in her heart, “Could it actually be the Eternal…”

“You have only absorbed a part of the potion effect. In the future, as your strength grows, the potion effect will gradually show. After complete absorption, it’ll produce a type of resonance that further increases your strength.” Chen Rui was clearly talking based on his experience. Yet, he then solemnly warned, “This matter is really important. Not only it’s related to my life and death, but it also relates to the survival of the Dark Moon. You mustn’t reveal this to anyone, including Princess Alice and Princess Shea.

Athena clearly knew how much commotion the black potions’ appearance would bring in the Demon Realm. She also knew how valuable black potions were. In a certain sense, they were even more valuable than devil fruit. Yet, this human didn’t hesitate to take everything out and give it to her to drink, and it was even 4 bottles!

Athena’s red eyes looked at Chen Rui emotionally. She pulled out her greatsword and said, “I, Athena. Wales swears in the name of my family that I’ll never tell anyone about these potions!”

Actually, there was still a part after that vow, but she kept it in her heart.

Although it was very difficult for a woman to keep a secret, Athena should be credible on this. It could be seen from the “poisoned” incident.

“I’ll go hunting first.” Although there were many questions that Athena wanted to ask, she kept in mind the 1-month promise. She didn’t say much, rode the wyvern and flew away.

Chen Rui asked for Gade and told him that his training of “poison skill” had some problems. So, he might need Athena to escort him back to the Dark Moon City or find a place to rest. The mining office would be entrusted to him.

Gade was dissatisfied with Chen Rui since the beginning. The new human mining officer only said something on the first day and added a meal of meat soup. After that, he kept hiding in the tent to train his “poison skills”. It was Ms. Athena that was busy working. Although she said that she was ordered by the mining officer, those who had a clear mind could tell that Ms. Athena was covering for the irresponsible mining officer.

Now that Chen Rui proposed to leave with Athena for a while, it was exactly what Gade wanted, so he obviously agreed with it.

Chen Rui waited for Athena’s return in the tent while converting the waste ores he got last night. The amount of aura obtained varied according to the quality of the crystals on these waste ores. The top layer provided the most aura. The ones obtained last night were obviously inferior. It seemed to be related to the year. The “fresher” it was, the more aura it produced. Perhaps as it went lower, the aura produced would be lower too.

Then, where did these crystals come from? 400 years ago, the existence of waste ores appeared along with the underground demonic beasts. Could it be related to some special demonic beast?

The 4 bottles of black potions last night spent 400,000 auras. However, it wasn’t wasteful to spend on Athena. Not to mention he still had 320,000 auras with the addition of the entire storage of waste ores.

Suddenly, there were loud noises from the mountain foot. Chen Rui immediately withdrew from the Super System. As long as he didn’t enter the training ground, he could still maintain a certain sensation of the outside world.

A miner reported in a fluster, “Bad news, sir. The Red Devils are here!”

Chen Rui was shocked. Did Lennon not keep the promise and aided the Red Devils to deduce the incident to the mining office? Yet, this is too fast right!?

Now that Athena hadn’t returned, it was impossible for him to escape alone. He had to see how it goes.

Chen didn’t hesitate and activated <Analytical Eyes>. He ordered Mengda to be ready for his signal for help. Also, he made Dodo, who returned in the early morning to hide in the tent before he went down the mountain.

Before the mining office, a lot of bandits blocked the entrance. The bandits were dressed in leather armor and armed with weapons. Based on the formation, they were not ordinary people. The miners were trembling in fear and concentrated in a group. The only thing they could hold on to was the crossbow in their hands. The mining officer’s guards also looked anxious.

A tall and strong Great Demon came out and looked at the miners with disdain, “I am Culia from the Red Devils. Who is the new mining officer? Show yourself!”

The miners didn’t dare to speak at once, then Culia sneered, “I will give him a minute. If he doesn’t come out, I will first kill 10 people, then I’ll kill 20 more until all these wastes are killed! You should know how many people I’ve killed, so don’t challenge my patience.”

This threat made the miners agitated. Everyone looked at Chen Rui, who was beside Gade.

Chen Rui whispered to Gade, “Tell miss to wait for me at the promised location…” He took a deep breath and slowly walked out.

“I am.”

“Are you a human?” Culia examined Chen Rui, who looked nervous, and he laughed aloud. “It seems that the Dark Moon Estate truly has no more talents. They actually sent such an incompetent waste as a mining officer!”

This made many miners lowered their heads in guilty; there were a few demons who were angry, but they didn’t dare to say anything. This mining officer was powerless, but he never mandated any tasks. He also got them food to fill their stomachs. He could be considered as a rather good boss already.

Chen Rui’s eyes were sharp. He saw that the front row of bandits had taken out their bows and aimed at him. It seemed that they were still afraid of his “poison skills” after all. As long as Culia ordered, they would definitely release their arrows to kill him on the stop.

Chen Rui wasn’t afraid of these bows and arrows. <Analytical Eyes> showed that Culia’s comprehensive strength was C, so his strength should at least be at the middle stage of Higher Demon. However, the one that Chen Rui was most afraid of wasn’t Culia but the mysterious Lennon. The most terrible thing was that after the “Dark Will” used <Transportation> once, it required 24 hours to recharge!

“We, the Red Devils want to invite mining officer to be our guest at the station. I don’t know if sir will do us the favor?” Although he was addressing Chen Rui as sir, his tone contained undisguised despise. He was just waiting for Chen Rui to say “No”, then he’d immediately order his subordinates to release the arrows to kill.

He saw the human mining officer hesitated for a while, but he actually nodded, “I’ll go with you, but you can’t hurt my subordinates.”

When that sentence was spoken, the miners were ashamed. Even Gade looked shocked.

“Oh!” Culia felt surprised. He was thinking that capturing Chen Rui alive should be a bigger deed. Anyway, as long as the man was in his hands, wouldn’t he control his life and death easily?

As Culia was about to order his subordinates to take Chen Rui away, he heard a lazy voice sounded, “Wait!”

chapters.title: Chapter 98 - A Favorable Turn And A Gift
chapters.body:
Chapter 98 - A Favorable Turn And A Gift

Chapter 98: A Favorable Turn and a Gift

This was Lennon’s voice. Chen Rui also saw the guy’s face clearly. He really had a languid look. If he didn’t meet him last night, he wouldn’t have thought that this royal family was known as “Sloth” had a terrifying speed that was opposite of his name. Besides, the horrifying things weren’t just the speed.

Seeing Lennon slowly moved forward, Chen Rui couldn’t help but feel nervous: The most troublesome is this guy. The “Dark Will”’s <Transportation> function still requires more than 10 hours to recover. Deliberately falling into the hands of the bandits was just to delay them. Did they figure it out already?

Lennon examined Chen Rui slowly and a faint, strange glow flashed past his left eye. He curiously asked, “This… “sir”, we seem to have met somewhere?”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked: Currently, my <Hidden> ability is already activated. Does this Lennon have an extraordinary skill that can see through <Hidden>?

“Oh! Aren’t you that… who… from the Dark Moon City?” We seem to have drank wine together.” Chen Rui deliberately pretended to know Lennon. He was apparently trying to cotton up with him.

Lennon was stunned, and he actually laughed too, “Is it? No wonder you look so familiar. Did you bring that kind of alcohol this time?”

Culia at the side was a bit anxious: This human called Chen Rui is the key to redemption. When I was about to capture him back to interrogate or torture, Lennon come out to cotton up with him at this time. Isn’t this clearly messing up my plan?

Chen Rui went along the line. He acted close and asked, “You, aren’t you at the Dark Moon City? Why are you here?”

“Oh, this Sir Culia said that he’s here to capture someone. I heard that there’s a beauty here, so I come along to see…”, Lennon seemed to be explaining that today’s incident had nothing to do with him. When he mentioned beauty, he looked interested, “Can you tell me where the beauty is?”

Chen Rui certainly wouldn’t tell the truth, “She had some urgent matter, so she went back to the Dark Moon City early this morning. If you want to meet her, you can go to the Dark Moon to find her. By the way, since we are acquaintances, can we sort this out so that they won’t capture me?”

“It’s truly unfortunate. I really wanted to have a deep conversation with her.” Lennon shook his head regretfully; he clearly filtered Chen Rui’s last sentence.

Culia over there said impatiently, “That woman’s background wasn’t simple. Don’t get into trouble! Let’s go!”

“Her background isn’t simple?” Lennon’s eyes lit up and he asked very ignorantly, “Those more reputable the family she comes from, the more interested I am. If she’s married or is widowed, that’s the best. Can you tell me her name?”

Culia couldn’t bear it. As he was about to vent his anger, Lennon suddenly noticed something and looked up to the sky. He saw a small black shadow approaching and enlarging quickly.

It’s Kegu! Chen Rui’s heart suddenly sank; he finally couldn’t keep his calm anymore. It’s too unfortunate! Athena actually returns at this time!

Comparing both parties’ strengths, Chen Rui’s side was at an absolute disadvantage. Lennon alone had the ability to kill all of them. It seemed he could only risk his life. The only possible hope was to abduct Culia to see if there was a chance of living. However, Culia’s personal strength wasn’t weak at all. Moreover, Lennon wasn’t a member of the Red Devils. Would he care about Culia?

Lennon saw Chen Rui’s serious look and he grinned, “My friend, you seem to have lied to me.”

Soon, Culia also noticed Athena in the air. The wyvern flapped its wings and landed. All of the bandits looked anxious. The bows that were initially aiming at Chen Rui were now aiming at Kegu. Athena saw the tense situation, and she jumped off the wyvern’s back in the air with a greatsword appeared in her hands.

Athena disappeared in midair. In the blink of an eye, she appeared beside Chen Rui. Her greatsword was blocking before him, “Chen Rui, are you okay!?”

Strangely, Lennon who had been insisting to have a deep conversation with the beauty suddenly looked stunned after seeing Athena.

Athena also saw Lennon and blurted out, “It’s you!”

“Not me!” Lennon who had always looked languid, seemed a little nervous at this time. He turned and wanted to slip away, “Beauty, you recognize the wrong person! I still have something to do today. You guys can chat slowly…”

“Stand still!” Athena pointed at Lennon with her sword and shouted, “Roman! Asshole! I haven’t seen you for a few years, but I never thought you’d fall to be a bandit! If you have the guts, you can try to slip away again today.”

Roman? Is it the guy’s true name? Chen Rui was prepared to risk it all. He was greatly surprised by such a twist suddenly. Yet, he still gathered all his strength, preparing to launch an attack anytime.

“Lennon” who was exposed by Athena, paused, then he finally turned around and said with a smile, “Oh, look at my memory! It turned out to be Athena! I haven’t seen you for a few years and you’ve become more beautiful. I almost can’t recognize you! However, I have nothing to do with these bandits. I am just… just…”

“Athena, he really isn’t part of the bandits. He just wants to find a beauty to have a deep communication.” Chen Rui was really good at adding oil to fire.

“Hmph, you surely is still the same asshole…” Athena said coldly. “I must tell Delia.”

When Chen Rui heard Delia’s name, he felt a little familiar. Suddenly, he thought of the “back up plan” that Athena arranged for him in the black rainforest. He immediately understood a little. This Lennon or Roman and “Delia” were Athena’s acquaintance before she came to the Dark Moon.

“Are your farce over?” Culia interrupted the two’s “reminiscence” and looked at Lennon coldly… “Are you actually Lennon or Roman?”

“Should be… all of them. Generally, every time I change a place, I will change my name accordingly.” Lennon shrugged his shoulders and turned a blind eye to Culia’s cold gaze. Culia didn’t know Lennon’s true strength, so he said coldly, “No matter who you are, retreat now. Due to my respect for our leader, I won’t bicker with you on the matter just now! Human, follow me now if you’re tactful. Otherwise, I’ll kill half of the miners here!”

Before Lennon opened his mouth, Athena’s whole body was covered in flames; she instantly shifted into the battle form. She leaped high and slashed downward toward his head while yelling, “Shameless guy! Before you take Chen Rui, you have to ask the sword in my hands first!”

Culia knew Athena’s story, and he also knew that she was just promoted to Higher Demon, so he didn’t bother much. At most, he would use a little of his strength to kill or abduct this human without hurting the life of the empire’s First General’s daughter.

However, when Athena’s greatsword struck with a strong whistling sound, Culia’s face suddenly changed. He instantly activated his skill, and he had already appeared several meters away. Athena’s greatsword that was missed struck on the ground and made the ground suddenly tremble, causing a crack that was several meters long. The gravels were splashed around by the horrifying wind pressure. The centaur that stood the closest was scratched by the gravels. His rough face immediately bled.

That strike petrified the bandits; no one dared to move anymore. Culia was secretly scolding in his heart for the inaccurate information from the Dark Moon – Which dumbass said that Athena has recently promoted into middle-stage Higher Demon? With such a level of power, even if she’s classified as middle-stage Higher Demon, she’s still a significant existence!

Actually, after eating the devil fruit, Athena had reached the middle stage of Higher Demon. Then, she drank a full set of Eternal black potions. Even if the potion effects weren’t fully manifested, based on her power alone, no regular middle-stage Higher Demon could rival her.

Culia didn’t dare to neglect. A long-poled scythe appeared in his hand and his demonic fire was ignited instantly; he was ready for a battle now.

Athena easily pulled out the greatsword that was penetrated into the ground with one hand and slashed toward Culia again. Culia didn’t block directly, but he dodged. Athena’s swordsmanship was extremely high; she rotated her wrist along and swept like a lightning.

Although it was just the back of the sword, the force was overwhelming. If he was directly hit, he would probably end up with fractures.

Culia’s scythe was put forward and blocked that heavy hit. A low-pitched sound rang as the two bodies vibrated. They were actually equally matched.

That sound made the nearby bandits and miners groaned. They quickly covered their ears and stepped back to avoid being involved by the shockwave. Chen Rui also cooperatively covered his ears and moved backward. Yet, Lennon seemed to be very interested in him; he kept entangling on him.

Athena and Culia started a fierce battle. Sands and stones were flying around, and the sound of swords clashing constantly sounded. The surrounding was filled with exaggerated traces of destruction.

Lennon looked admired, and he nodded, “Athena’s strength improved so quickly! 3 years ago, she was only an Intermediate Demon. Now, she’s already at the middle stage of Higher Demon. However, she seems to have just acquired this strength; she is still unfamiliar in the control. Culia is also a middle-stage Higher Demon, and he seems to be still holding back. In your opinion, who do you think will win?”

Chen Rui knew that this guy must have some special ability. Lennon suspected that he was related to the cloaked man last night. He immediately shook his head and said, “They’re moving too fast. I can’t see clearly… However, I believe Athena will definitely win!”

“Your relationship with Athena seems to be not bad…” Lennon looked at the human with great interest. “Athena has a high standard; it isn’t easy to be her friend. For example, I or… you too? ”

Chen Rui nodded perfunctorily while paying attention to the battle between Athena and Culia.

Lennon glanced at Chen Rui’s hand that was hidden in his sleeve. Lennon took out a ring and said, “This is a magical equipment that I occasionally got in Town Leia. I’ll give it to you as a gift. Remember to say some good words for me in front of Athena later.”

Chen Ruil looked surprised and took the ring. He saw a purple jewel was embedded in it; it also had some odd engraving. He could clearly feel a faint energy movement.

“It’s just a simple thing; I hope you’ll take it.” Lennon watched as Chen Rui took the magic ring with his right hand. Lennon smiled, “You’re not going to wear it? My friend.”

Chen Rui moved his thought and extended his left hand. When Lennon’s gaze instantly focused on his ring finger, his eyes were flashing. Yet, his brow frowned. There was indeed a ring on the ring finger, but it wasn’t the secret treasure of a certain royal family. Instead, it was the most common lighting ring.

Chen Rui was long prepared. Knowing that Lennon had always been doubting him, so Chen Rui deliberately used the lighting ring to test him. Actually, Dark Will was kept in the storage. Now, he put the magic ring on his middle finger and smiled, “I truly appreciate your kindness. What special function does this magic ring have?” Lennon was puzzled in his heart, but as he heard that question, he suddenly smiled mysteriously and lowered his voice to say, “This is a good item that I got after a lot of effort. It’s called the infatuation ring. Not only can it improve the pleasure of both men and women during intercourse, the most important thing is that it can also enhance endurance. It is definitely a compulsory treasure to seduce the beauties!”

Chen Rui was stunned when he heard that: Lennon’s “gift of friendship” is actually such… “equipment”!

chapters.title: Chapter 99 - Roman
chapters.body:
Chapter 99 - Roman

Chapter 99: Roman

Chen Rui quickly returned this problematic item back to Lennon and shook his head, “I acknowledge your kindness, but I really have no use of this thing.” Are you kidding me? Using such a thing isn’t just clearly showing that I’m bad at that thing?

As a pure virgin that lives two lives, how can I be questioned in such regard?

Lennon didn’t reach out to take it, but he sighed and said, “The things that I gifted are like women that I’ve hooked up with, I will never take them back. If you want to ignore my kindness, just throw it away. ”

Chen Rui’s hand was stagnant for a moment. It wasn’t clear whether this guy was a friend or a foe. Unfortunately, Lennon’s strength was terribly strong, so Chen Rui couldn’t afford to offend him for the time being. He had to wear the ring back on his finger, feeling extremely awkward.

Lennon grinned and patted Chen Rui’s shoulder as if they were close, “That’s right. We’re all men. Only those that are not lustful are abnormal. It’s boring to act modestly. You don’t have to thank me too much. Just remember to say a few good words in front of Athena later.”

Who wants to thank you? Chen Rui looked at Lennon’s expression of “everyone man will understand it”, and he was speechless.

At that time, the battle between Athena and Culia had reached the climax. Athena’s combat experience was extremely rich. Under the “assisted training” with someone of the same level, her strength of middle-stage Higher Demon became increasingly skillful. The effect of the Eternal black potions also manifested further; she felt like she had endless strength.

In contrast, Culia was more passive. Previously, his overall strength was slightly better than Athena’s and the situation was still under control. Unexpectedly, his opponent’s strength was getting greater as the battle went. Besides, he was holding back because of Athena’s identity and his superior’s order. He felt restraint; he was actually slowly being suppressed.

At that time, Athena shouted and a clear metal clashing sound rang. Culia’s figure staggered backward; the scythe in his hand was actually split into two.

Athena’s greatsword wasn’t some amazing legendary magical weapons, but it was at least better than Culia’s scythe. The root cause of this effect was her understanding of swordsmanship was advanced into the skill of <Metal Slash>!

However, Culia wasn’t astonished for his cut weapon. Instead, he threw away the doubts and threw his broken weapon away. He said coldly, “I admit that I’ve underestimated your strength. Now, I’ll let you see my true strength.”

While screaming, Culia’s muscles began to enlarge; his entire figure seemed to increase by one cloth size. Even his clothes and armor were burst. The body’s demonic fire didn’t increase but decreased; they gradually retracted into the body. His skin revealed a layer of red light that was shimmering as if the flame was burning inside the body.

Athena wasn’t afraid. Her body flashed, teleported to the back of Culia and attacked with her greatsword. Culia didn’t avoid, but he focused his power at his back. The greatsword was like clashing into metal as it was sparking when it hit Culia’s back.

Culia’s body shook a little. There was an obvious white mark on the damaged part. However, it gradually disappeared as if nothing happened.

Chen Rui was shocked as he knew Athena’s swordsmanship and strength. He never thought Culia would be invulnerable. Is this a demon-version of possession by god[1]? Or is it a <Golden Bell Cocoon> [2]?

Athena struck again with <Metal Slash> at max power, but it still couldn’t breakthrough Culia’s sturdy skin defense. Although <Metal Slash> was most effective against metal weapons, its damage was still considerable. Now, it actually couldn’t penetrate Culia’s sturdy body defense.

While she was still shocked, Culia had already counterattacked; his speed was even faster than before. In a hurry, she could only block with her sword.

“Poom!” Athena felt a strong force from the sword, and it directly hit the body through the greatsword. She couldn’t help but forced backward for a few meters; her feet dragged a few deep lines on the ground.

After Culia “transformed”, not only his defense was crazy, but his strength and speed also improved a lot.

“My sturdy demonic body is perfect; you have no chance of winning.” Culia’s voice sounded, “Athena, I can let you go, but I must take this human with me! If you dare to stop me, even if you’re first general’s daughter, you’ll become a dead corpse!”

“Then.” Athena’s eyes were resolute. The demonic fire on her body blazed greater. “Take him over my dead body!”

It was Chen Rui’s second time hearing that sentence, and his heart trembled. A strange light appeared in Lennon’s eyes; he looked at the human beside deeply. Then, an odd light appeared in his left eye again as he looked at Culia on the battlefield.

Just when Chen Rui couldn’t help but wanted to rush out, Lennon’s casual voice sounded, “Athena, stop playing with him. That so-called perfect demonic body is just a defense trick that uses special power to hide the demonic fire’s power within the muscles. It’s either you change your weapon into a legendary magical weapon or find out the weakest point of his demonic body to attack. It’s usually under the armpit or the crotch. Just concentrate your attacks on those parts.”

Athena’s eyes lit up, and her sword’s vigor changed. She began to focus her attacks on these two parts. Athena, who entered the battle form, didn’t hesitate or feel embarrassed. Regardless of what the critical part was, she would attack as long as she could defeat the enemy!

Culia didn’t think that Lennon could expose his weakness with a few sentences. At once, he was suppressed and suddenly fell into a passive state. He hated the busybody guy to the extreme; he yelled furiously.

“I dare to bet with you. No! I won’t bet you with you! What I meant was, I’m sure this guy will come to us later. Do you want me to fend him off?” Lennon was actually asking Chen Rui.

“Actually, I’m a timid person, and I’m afraid of seeing blood.” Chen Rui thought quickly and shook his head, “We humans have a saying. If revenge breeds revenge, will there ever be an end to it? Let’s just give him a chance to repent.” “In fact, I’m also a pure person. I’m only using my body to save some frustrated beauties due to kindness.” Lennon looked at him strangely, “Can your last sentence be interpreted as keeping him alive for now is better?”

Chen Rui shrugged and replied, “The same question will have a different conclusion based on the different perspectives or angles of different people. Thus, we humans have another saying that the benevolent people see benevolence and the wise see wisdom.”

“That’s a nice phrase.” Lennon laughed, “So, you’re afraid of seeing blood, and I’m also very pure; I can help you. Remember to help me later. ”

Surely, as Lennon said, Culia slowly moved the battle toward this side. After counting the distance and taking advantage of Athena’s <Teleportation> cooldown, he suddenly teleported away from Athena and appeared before Chen Rui and Lennon with his big hand grabbing toward Chen Rui.

Culia’s main objective today was the human mining officer.

Lennon was just yawning; lights were fleeting in his languid eyes. In the blink of an eye, Culia’s huge body flew out for no reason and fell into the group of bandits. The bandits were like dominos and fell one after another.

Culia’s enlarged body instantly returned to its original state. The “perfect” transformation disappeared without a trace. His whole body seemed to have broken apart, and he actually didn’t even have the strength to climb up. His eyes were full of shock.

Culia always thought that Lennon’s strength was below him. Now, he finally witnessed the true strength of his opponent; he finally understood why the leader had always been wooing this languid guy. With this level of strength, let alone him, even Barnacle had to respect him… – What about our leader? Can our leader defeat this guy?

In the eyes of others, Lennon’s body was only blurred for an instant at his original place and became clear again, as if he never moved at all. Athena who was far away only saw Lennon’s figure moved and he kicked Culia away.

Only Chen Rui saw it the clearest. His heart was even more shocked. At that moment, Culia was kicked at least 7 times. As Lennon was holding back, otherwise, with his fearful strength of the Demon King, he could take Culia’s live with one kick.

The war in this world was different from what Chen Rui knew before. It wasn’t that the more people one had, the stronger one was. Personal strength was sometimes enough to control the dynamic of the whole battle, especially in small-scale battles. Now that Culia was defeated, even if there were hundreds of bandits, they couldn’t resist Lennon or Athena. At that moment, they dared not to stay, so they carried Culia and escaped.

The miners cheered as they had been bullied by the Red Devils, but now they were finally proud of it. In the eyes of the miners, Athena was undoubtedly the biggest hero who defeated Culia. Lennon also contributed by reminding. As for the human mining officer, although he didn’t do much, his courage to stand up for the miners was admirable.

Soon, Gade organized the miners to resume their usual work. Although Athena knew that Lennon repelled Culia, she still looked at him with unfriendly eyes.

Lennon said with a bitter smile, “Athena, we haven’t seen each other for 3 years. We’re reuniting as old friends, you don’t have to show me that face right?”

Athena said coldly, “I have few friends, but none of them are called Lennon.”

Lennon scratched his head in embarrassment, “Why would I use my real name in front of these guys. I am Roman.”

“Roman? Don’t you change your name as you change a location?” Athena still wasn’t friendly. “Even if you’re Roman, I don’t remember having such a friend.”

Lennon, who was now officially renamed as Rowan, looked at Chen Rui for help. Unfortunately, Chen Rui seemed to not notice. He took a towel from his space bracelet and handed it to Athena to wipe her sweat. Roman was obviously Athena’s acquaintance, and he probably had some weakness in Athena’s hands, so Chen Rui decided to enjoy the drama first.

Roman had no choice but to smile awkwardly. “Athena, sorry.”

“You’re not sorry to me!” Athena was quite agitated, “Who left the Warlock Fortress without saying a word? When Delia was forced to go back to the Dark Shadow Empire, where were you asshole? Do you know how many days Delia cried?”

“Gulp. Gulp.” Roman didn’t answer; he was just downing the alcohol. In the blink of an eye, the full bottle of alcohol was bottomed. He threw the bottle away and suddenly smiled while saying, “Athena, you don’t understand the matter between a man and a woman, especially the matter between me and Delia.”

“What do I not understand?”

Athena was about to get angry, Chen Rui said, “Athena, are the prey that you hunted still here?”

“It’s all in the bracelet.” Athena nodded, “Do you want to distribute it now?”

“Take them to Gade first. Don’t forget that we still have important things to do.” Chen Rui saw Roman repeatedly gesturing Chen Rui with his eyes. Thinking that this guy did help him just now, so he finally helped Roman to get out of the situation.

Roman should be someone with stories. Besides, only the two involved were the clearest in a relationship between a man and a woman. Outsiders, even the best friends, couldn’t truly understand.

[1] A performance that a man uses Kung Fu to swindle by pretending to be possessed by the gods.

chapters.title: Chapter 100 - Past Events And Surprise Attacks
chapters.body:
Chapter 100 - Past Events And Surprise Attacks

Chapter 100: Past Events and Surprise Attacks

Athena knew the importance of the “grand master’s inheritance” so she no longer disputed with Roman and went to Gade.

“My friend, if I’m not mistaken, Athena and you… are “very good friends.” Roman grinned and gave Chen Rui a thumbs up. “I take back what I just said. The matter between men and women, perhaps Athena has some understanding already… Both of you still have “important things” to do later? Don’t forget the magical power of the infatuation ring. I believe you will thank me then.”

Looking at Roman’s flirtatious smile, Chen Rui was speechless. Yet, Chen Rui heard Roman’s intentions from his tone and said curiously, “You’re leaving?”

“Yes. Since my name, Roman is exposed, those who are looking for trouble will come here soon. If I don’t hurry, I won’t get away.”

Although he said so, Chen Rui could tell that Roman was afraid of involving Athena. This guy, although he is lustful and glib, he’s quite a nice person actually.

“Not telling her?” Chen Rui turned around and looked at the mining office’s stone house, “Aren’t you afraid that Athena blame you for not saying goodbye?”

“That’s why the task of bidding farewell for me will be handed over to you. You can’t just take advantage of me without doing anything right?” Roman shrugged and took another sip of alcohol, “If Athena asked where I’m going, tell her I’ll be wandering around for a while. About 3 months later, I’ll go to Silent Night Wetland.” Silent Night Wetland! Chen Rui’s heart was moved, but Roman had already left.

“By the way.” Roman’s footsteps suddenly paused, “If you can, help me pass a message to someone. Tell him that his blade is good but not enough.”

“I look forward to the day when the sharpness of the blade is qualified for me to face directly with my left eye.” Left eye? Why is it just the left eye? There must be something with the left eye! This might be the reason why Roman can detect my identity. Chen Rui frowned. The Demon Realm was big and wondrous. The Super System wasn’t omnipotent. However, for now, it wasn’t necessary to be hostile toward this guy like before. Perhaps he might be a good friend or a good rival.

After thinking, Chen Rui smiled and answered tactfully, “Of course… if I know this person. Roman smirked and smiled genuinely. He didn’t turn around, waved, wobbled forward while holding his alcohol. Not long after, he disappeared from Chen Rui’s sight soon.

“That guy is gone?” Soon, Athena appeared next to Chen Rui. She wasn’t stupid; she knew that Roman would definitely leave. She avoided him by making use of Chen Rui’s words lest this guy was embarrassed. After all, he was her true friend.

Chen Rui nodded and said, “Yes, he asked me to say goodbye to you. He said that after 3 months, he’ll go to the Silent Night Wetland. “Silent Night Wetland?” Athena’s eyes lit up, “Looks like this guy hasn’t forgotten about Delia. Every 5 years, Delia will go to the Silent Night Wetland. She seems to be looking for a very important treasure.” Silent Night Wetland? Treasure?

Chen Rui thought of something when he first heard Roman talking about Silent Night Wetland. Now, after listening to Athena, his heart was shocked: Could it be really related to Paglio’s treasure?

Athena told Chen Rui her meeting with Roman. It was before she came to Dark Moon. She was still in the Warlock Fortress that was guarded by her father, George. Warlock Fortress was a defensive stronghold at the border between the Fallen Angel Empire and the Bloody Empire. It had a long history. It was built with sturdy walls and siege towers; it was equivalent to a gigantic fort. It also had various defensive magic. Thus, it was known as the strongest defensive line in the Fallen Angel Empire.

Athena, who grew up in the fortress was like the Warlock’s little princess. She mixed around with the armies since young, so she developed a forthright personality. In a nearby town, Dark Cloud, Athena happened to rescue a pair of seriously injured man and woman, which were Delia and Roman. They claimed to be the explorers who came back from the Silent Night Wetlands. Delia was beautiful and generous while Roman witty and intelligent, also a little lustful. Athena was only 16 years old at that time; she got along with those two very well. During the period of recovery, they became good friends.
