According to the difference in strength between the two, even if Chen Rui’s curb his breath, it was still difficult to hide. However, for an unknown reason, Shea didn’t seem to notice his existence.

The reason was likely to be on the “God-Eating Mask” for exuding waves of rolling heat. Under these waves, Chen Rui seemed to be perfectly integrated with the entire environment. He looked just like a part of the tree shade; it was almost imperceptible to others. In such a way, it was even beneficial for someone’s eyes.

Regardless of appearance or figure, Shea and Christina were of the same level. Christina felt like the depth and tranquility of a lake while Shea was as cold as an iceberg. Regardless of temperament, in this situation, she was just a bathing naked beauty.

Although Chen Rui’s distance was a little far, with his Alkaid state’s eyesight, he could see everything clearly that he shouldn’t see.

The Princess Royal’s body was exquisite and perfect. The round hips and slender legs made his blood pressure high. Perhaps it was because of being tightly bound usually, the release of the free-standing towering breasts were more upright and plump than expected. The nipples at the top also erected due to the stimulation from the water.

Chen Rui never imagined that the iceberg-like Shea would have such a seductive moment. He inexplicably thought of the naked woman in the alley again, then he felt an unknown heat flowing in his heart that was like the burning of certain desire.

However, he might be lustful, but Shea wasn’t the woman in the alley. If his desires truly burnt, the fire might burn his body, turning him into a pile of ashes.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of Athena. His beloved woman who was still unconscious. He cursed himself for being a beast and immediately restrained all those desires.

At that point, Shea had finished bathing. Suddenly, she disappeared out of thin air, leaving only the sound of rushing water.

Chen Rui was already guilty for peeping, so he was afraid that Princess Royal would appear behind him with murderous intentions. His heart was dangling at his throat. Fortunately, his worry didn’t become a reality.

Not long after, Shea reappeared by the pool this time. She had put on a long white dress.

The strange resonance began to become stronger again. Chen Rui was afraid that the “God-Eating Mask” couldn’t resist the “impulse” and reveal him instantly. Thus, he tried his best to suppress the dizziness. Fortunately, Shea didn’t stay here and left straightaway.

After Shea left, Chen Rui’s figure immediately appeared beside the pool. Obviously, the fluctuation came from the pool. This somewhat innocent Pervert Mask didn’t come to the palace to peep at a bathing beauty. Instead, it “conveniently” gave him a beautiful show of beauty bathing.

This pool could actually summon the “God-Eating Mask”. Along with the awakening from Shea’s sudden disappearance, there must be something mysterious about it.

The “God-Eating Mask” heated up again as the dizzy feeling appeared once again. Chen Rui captured this feeling very clearly this time. It was a bit similar to the <Teleportation> of Dark Will, but not exactly the same. The process seemed to be like passing through the thread connecting two parts of a broken lotus root.

In an instant, <Teleportation> started again.

By the time Chen Rui’s regained his consciousness, he was already in another place. Based on his drenched body, he could tell that he had just passed through the bath.

Chen Rui mustered his strength and slowly evaporated the water from his body while examining the strange place.

Why did the God-Eating Mask bring him here?

chapters.title: Chapter 172 - Memory Wind Chimes! Shea’S Biggest Secret
chapters.body:
Chapter 172 - Memory Wind Chimes! Shea’S Biggest Secret

Chapter 172: Memory Wind Chimes! Shea’s Biggest Secret

It was a room of about 60m2 to 70m2. There was no door and there was no water above. He had no idea how he got into this place.

At the center of the room was a light beam with a peculiar shape that extended from the ground in various directions into 6 small lights that illuminated the entire room. There were some things placed in the room, including table, chair, mirror and so on. It was likely a hidden room below the bath pool that was cleverly designed as there was no feeling of dampness or lack of ventilation.

He didn’t know why, but the strong fluctuation that was close suddenly disappeared again. However, it should be in this hidden room. Chen Rui had the intention to solve the mystery of the “God-Eating Mask”, so he moved forward. No matter how hard, he had to remove this troublesome thing from his face. (Who am I kidding! Even if it’s not for other reasons, for Athena alone, I have to take it off… otherwise, how am I supposed to kiss her with this on my face?)

The things in the hidden room were a bit messy. When Chen Rui walked past the mirror, the mirror suddenly glowed and an image appeared in it. It turned out to be an unrivalled pretty young lady dancing.

Is this the secret of “God-Eating Mask”? This can’t be right! This unrivalled pretty girl has… blonde hair, purple eyes, slender figure, and that look… it’s actually Shea!

Precisely, it was Shea in her teenage years. She was wearing a white dancing dress. Her dance was elegant and moving, fascinating people’s hearts with her beauty. What surprised Chen Rui even more was that her expression wasn’t the iceberg-like indifference, but a smile that was filled with joy and tenderness.

For the first time, he saw her full smile.

Perhaps because of the strong contrast, when Chen Rui saw this gentle smile, he suddenly felt lost. It was unimaginable that Shea, who was generally regarded as the iceberg princess, actually had such a touching smile. Perhaps, this smile could be traced in a unintended smile.

“I don’t remember when was the last time I smiled… I’ll leave this type of happiness to Alice.”

Chen Rui suddenly thought of a sentence that Shea had said. He felt that his heart was a little heavy. Recalling what Athena had said and the sister in Alice’s memory, she was once a very gentle girl. What turned this gentle and beautiful girl into a cold and ruthless female lord?

How much tenderness of the past still remains under that cold, ruthless mask?

Chen Rui didn’t look into the mirror anymore. He looked across the room. Most of the things kept in the room were small objects. Although they were of little practical value, for Shea, each piece was likely to bring a precious memory that was sealed up.

Chen Rui walked to the table and gently brushed the hanging wind chimes. Suddenly, he felt guilty for peeping at the other’s privacy and sighed.

“Why!”

Shea’s voice! It contains both anger and sadness.

How did she show up! Even <Analytical Eyes> didn’t show anything!

Chen Rui, who was guilty for sneaking in, was shocked. His heart was tightened immediately. It’s over. This hidden room should be Shea’s biggest secret. Even without this stupid mask, she will definitely kill me.

Besides, in this airtight room, even Dark Will couldn’t teleport out.

“Why did you kill all of them?!”

The sound was actually coming from the wind chime. Chen Rui was relieved. This should be a memory magic item with something like a recording effect.

“They are just my friends…”

“I don’t want this kind of strength… I don’t want to be the lord… I don’t want to be the empress…”

In the end, it was already a crying voice. Chen Rui never thought that such a cold and strong woman would cry, and the cry was so soft and distressing.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of what Shea said when he mentioned the word “friend”, friend was a luxury for her and a nightmare for him. From the crying of the wind chimes, it should be happened before Shea succeeded as the lord when all her friends were killed. The person who made that order was likely to be her deceased father, Grimm, the Crown Prince, only for the so-called “strength.”

The cry faded away gradually. Chen Rui tried to touch the wind chimes again. Some of them were laughters, some were weeps and then a firm voice sounded.

“From today, I, Shea Lucifer’s life no longer belongs to myself, but it belongs to the entire Dark Moon Estate. I will defend this land with my life, protect my sister with my life, and recover the glory of Lord of Midnight Sun’s bloodline with my life.”

Can’t even control her own life? Chen Rui was silent for a while, then he gently touched the wind chime again.

This time it was laughter. It sounded like she couldn’t stop herself from holding her stomach and laugh.

“This guy actually makes Aldas far… in front of so many people… haha… that’s so funny!”

“The furthest distance in the world isn’t the distance between life and death. Instead, it’s that I’m standing in front of you yet you don’t know that I love you… No matter if it’s true or false, these boring feelings don’t belong to me…”

Chen Rui remembered that this should be Shea’s mood after the Master Challenge at the arena and the beautiful misunderstanding at the Royal Garden. In this sentence, Shea was laughing all the time. It was perhaps unresistable at the beginning, but what about the latter?

A crisp wind chime sound continued to ring.

This time it was a sad sigh.

“Why did I let him go to the mines like that? Why didn’t I make him stay forcibly? Why? Should I bury a man that I can never forget… Shea, you’re such a selfish and cold-blooded woman. I hate you…”

“If there’s one day that I can truly defeat Obsidian and regain the throne, I don’t know what else would be left in me…”

“Chen Rui, you must stay alive… Chen Rui…”

This was about him decided to go to Mountain Xilang at the regular meeting. I remember that she didn’t even ask me to be careful, but she was facing this wind chime…

The final whispered call made Chen Rui’s heart trembled a little. He never thought that the “admirer” that was made due to a misunderstanding would actually move the bit of tenderness in her heart after repeated “misunderstandings”. Even if was only a little, she was still moved.

It turned out that the unsmiling and ice-berg like woman had buried her fragile heart under the strong shell in this hidden room. The suppressed crying and scolding could only be released here. She could cry and laugh out loud, but once she was out of this room, she was still the expressionless, fearsome and cruel princess.

The bloodline of the emperor, the last wish of his father, the younger sister who needs to be protected, the terrifying enemies around her… the burdens that this woman carries are too heavy.

Without Athena, perhaps, he would be tempted to be truly moved. Chen Rui couldn’t deny that he was attracted by that beautiful appearance, but if he were to be truly moved, it was definitely not just because of the body but more of the soul.

It’s just that now… I’ll do my best to help her fulfill her wishes step by step. I’ll try to share those burdens not only for myself.

Chen Rui stopped touching the wind chimes. In other words, he stopped touching the soft heart again. He felt his heart sank.

At that moment, the heat of the “God-Eating Mask” reappeared. The sensation this time was unprecedentedly strong and the source was the strange light beam at the center.

Chen Rui tried to reach out to touch the light, but before he could touch, he was bounced back by a miraculous force. His fingers that touched were slightly burnt. It seemed to be a powerful defensive magic array.

The “God-Eating Mask” glowed automatically and began to emit plumes of white smoke. The white smoke contained bits of faint purple lights that wrapped around the light beam.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of something. After he devoured Glorfin’s consciousness, there were some faint memories in his brain. When Glorfin was in the battle with Lord of Midnight Sun, he was badly defeated. Eventually, he used a secret method to escape even when his artifact was damaged. That was why the mask had a broken piece on its forehead.

The injuries that Glorfin sustained from his defeat by the Lord of Midnight Sun was second to the heavy rebound he received when he used a secret method after the God-Eating Mask was broken. It made Glorfin’s body face the edge of collapse. He must absorb the power of Moonlight stone to resolve the rebound of the secret method.

Glorfin, who had once occupied Dark Moon for a while, knew that there were Moonlight stones under the Mountain Xilang’s mines. He immediately changed his escape route and came all the way to the Mountain Xilang’s mine. With the help of his territory’s power, Glorfin absorbed the Moonlight stone below the main pit and the crystals from his territory also polluted the entire mining area. That was the cause of waste ores for 400 years.

However, the number of Moonlight stones was too little. They still couldn’t make up for the “God-Eating Mask” rebound. Relying on his territory’s senses, Glorfin broke the seal of the entrance toward the underground world and searched deeper into the underground world.

The area with the most Moonlight stones was the Earth Elemental’s Earth Realm. To search for Moonlight stones, Glorfin broke into the earth elemental’s territory and killed several earth elementals who got into his way. As a result, he alarmed the Earth Elemental King.

Glorfin was conceited with his Demon Overlord’s strength and thought he could control the underground world. He didn’t expect that the underground world of the Dark Moon Estate actually had the one and only Earth Elemental King. Both of them were Demon Overlord, but the Earth Elemental King was born not long ago, so he couldn’t rival Glorfin at first. Yet, Glorfin was wounded. Along with the mask’s rebound, he finally lost to the Earth Elemental King and his body was destroyed.

However, the power of the artifact shouldn’t be underestimate. As the master of the “God-Eating Mask”, Glorfin’s willpower hadn’t disappeared. He began to further emit the power of territory to absorb the Moonlight stone. This power also caused serious interference to the elemental power in the Earth Realm. Although the Earth Elemental King destroyed Glorfin’s body, he couldn’t destroy the consciousness hidden in the artifact. He could only use his strength to suppress it, but he was controlled by the “God-Eating Mask” instead.

What happened later was Chen Rui’s personal experience.

In the war 400 years ago, the artifact fragment that was separated by a secret method couldn’t be taken away by Glorfin, and it fell into the hands of Midnight Sun Lucifer. According to these memories, the fragment was likely to be sealed in this hidden room of Dark Moon!

This is why the “God-Eating Mask” is summoned! It wants to absorb the fragment and restore into a complete artifact!

The white smoke from the “God-Eating Mask” wrapped the light beam. The light beam that was initially stable began to flicker with unstable light. The six corners shone a strong light, even the magic array on the ground lit up – it was a hexagram array!

A powerful force pushed against Chen Rui. The “God-Eating Mask” was releasing all its white smoke. When the power of the hexagram array met the white smoke, it was like a snow lion encountered fire and suddenly disappeared without a trace. However, the hexagram array started to tremble slightly.

Shea, who had closed her eyes in her chamber, suddenly opened her eyes and revealed a frosty coldness.

chapters.title: Chapter 173 - Unexplainable Misunderstanding
chapters.body:
Chapter 173 - Unexplainable Misunderstanding

Chapter 173: Unexplainable Misunderstandin g

If it was just an ordinary intruder, even if this hexagram array couldn’t destroy the intruders, it could still effectively play its defensive role. However, the defensive array encountered one of the 7 Demon Realm’s strongest artifacts. The white gas of the “God-Eating Mask” spread wide and the power of the hexagram array was all swallowed up. Not only that, the weakened light beam also began to respond by producing plumes of white smoke that mixed with the white smoke of the “God-Eating Mask” to produce a fusional resonance. This time, it was no longer an intermittent feeling, but a strong resonance like never before.

After a while, the white smoke of the “God-Eating Mask” had withdrawn. Not only the swallowing white smoke was withdrawn, but also the strange light that mixed in the smoke. After the strange light was kept into the mask, Chen Rui felt burning on his face. The entire light beam and the hexagram array began to flicker violently. Then, the entire place was shaking as if something was broken, and he had somehow gone outside the fountain already.

Suddenly, a strong sense of crisis emerged in his heart. He immediately looked up and saw a figure in a long dress floating in the air with a pair of black wings at her back. A pair of cold eyes were staring at him while the beautiful purple irises radiated a murderousness that could pierce into his bone.

It’s Shea!

“Princess Royal!” Chen Rui shivered and blurted out, only to find that his voice was suddenly lost, as if his voice was blocked by the increasingly hot mask. He tried to communicate with Shea through <Analytical Eyes>, but <Analytical Eyes> didn’t seem to work on demons. When Chen Rui touched the mask on his face, the forehead part was completely restored. In other words, the “God-Eating Mask” was now a complete artifact!

Although <Analytical Eyes> couldn’t communicate, its display was still effective: Race: Pride Royal Family; Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B+!

B+, the peak of Great Demon King!

Shea’s body instantly ignited a scary black flame. This wasn’t the enhancing flame of the Great Demon race but one of the 3 bloodline talents of the Lucifer Royal Family, <Dark Flame>.

“Beelzebub Royal Family!” The frosty voice contained boundless killing intentions. She waved her fingers and the black flame rolled toward Chen Rui like a huge net. Her first move was to kill. Although the color of the flame was similar to Nirvana’s Flame, their properties were completely opposite. The flame of <Nirvana> represented vitality; whereas <Dark Flame> represented destruction and death!

The thing on this man’s face should be the Gluttony Royal Family’s artifact, the “God-Eating Mask”. Shea was furious at this moment. The Beelzebub Royal Family was the strongest enemy of Lucifer Royal Family and Beelzebub’s God Eater Empire was destroyed by the Fallen Angel Empire. 400 years ago, the Beelzebub Royal Family caused trouble in the Dark Moon in an attempt to make a comeback. Yet, they were eliminated by the Lord of Midnight Sun fortunately. After disappearing for 400 years, they actually appeared again in the Dark Moon. What made Shea even angrier was that this person’s “God-Eating Mask” was already complete. In other words, he must have entered the room that sealed the fragment! There was not only the artifact fragment but also her biggest secret in the room! She could never forgive him! Regardless of the reasons, she had to crush this enemy into pieces!

Initially, at such timing, if Chen Rui immediately opened the mask and confessed everything, there might still be room to turn things around. Yet, the “God-Eating Mask” couldn’t be removed at all; he couldn’t even speak now.

It was unexplainable.

If Chen Rui was truly a Beelzebub Royal Family, he could still rely on the artifact to compete against the Great Demon King-level, Shea and then try to explain. However, he was just a fake one, so he couldn’t manifest the true strength of the artifact. Besides, the mask was getting hotter. He didn’t know what could go wrong. Therefore, there was no other choice but to escape.

As Shea’s <Dark Flame> was about to engulf the Beelzebub Royal Family that suddenly appeared, the enemy unexpectedly suddenly moved out of the flame range as if it was Great Demon’s <Teleportation>, causing the <Dark Flame> hit the ground. A large area of scorch immediately appeared. All the water in the bath was evaporated instantly.

Chen Rui dodged <Dark Flame> at last second. He felt that he couldn’t defend that horrific strength at all. “Dark Will” had already appeared on the finger in his sleeve. However, this Lucifer Royal Family’s secret treasure was given to him by Shea. If he used it rashly, the possibility of being exposed was quite high. There were Shea’s secrets in the hidden room. Now that she was in extreme anger, he’d definitely be in huge trouble if he was exposed.

Shea frowned slightly. Since when the Beelzebub Royal Family can use the <Teleportation> skill? Yet, the Great Demon’s <Teleportation> can’t play much of a role in an actual battle between powerhouses. On the surface, this guy only looked like an Intermediate Demon (effect of <Breath Holding>), but he is at least a Demon King. He must be using some secret method to conceal his strength, but his actual strength shouldn’t exceed Demon King. Otherwise, with the power of the artifact, he would’ve attacked me actively already.

<Dark Flame> is effective against the Beelzebub Royal Family’s <Devour>. Along with the enhancement and offensive power of <Holy Wings>, I must destroy this enemy. The moment Shea thought of that, the black wings on her body faintly emitted a sacred light. It mixed into the <Dark Flame>, forming the shape of a python that rushed toward Chen Rui with an astonishing momentum. Under normal circumstances, ordinary people could only use 1 type of talent at once, but Shea could combine two offensive talents and use them simultaneously, so she was quite talented.

The difference in their strength was a whole level. Chen Rui had a creepy sense of crisis, but it was too late to dodge. However, Shea’s attack was no faster than the speed of his consciousness. The python hit on a blue, translucent round dome while Chen Rui in the dome stood still. The python seemed to be alive and wrapped around the protective cover, wanting to tangle and smash the whole dome and the caster within into pieces. Even the palace had powerful defensive magic arrays, it began to tremble. The ground even cracked endlessly.

The protective cover couldn’t stand the pressure and shattered while the figure in the center was completely engulfed by the python.

Shea frowned and looked in the other direction. The moment the python broke the shield, the figure had once again teleported to a safe place.

Continuous dual <Teleportation>! Even Great Demon doesn’t have such talent. Also, the defense skill doesn’t seem like some kind of magic. The Beelzebub Royal Family reappearing on the stage after 400 years is definitely planned with careful preparation.

Although this enemy is of average strength, his talent is magical. He must be the heir of the Beelzebub Royal Family. The “God-Eating Mask” must have just recovered, so he cannot exert its power. If I don’t eliminate this guy now, I might never have a chance anymore!

When Shea was about to launch the python again, she felt a tremor on the ground. Then, several huge vines burst out of the ground and quickly extended like the tentacles of some soft-bodied demonic beasts to attack her at all directions. The momentum was shocking.

Shea frowned and her fists were thrown toward the air. The vines shattered as if they were withered. As soon as she was held back by the vines, the enemy fled quickly. The figure had already disappeared behind the palace. His speed was beyond her imagination.

Shea shouted and the <Dark Flame> on her body blazed higher. The vines were scorched. As her body flickered, she had already appeared above the palace. However, the guy had disappeared without a trace.

He disappeared instantly? Did he hide in the palace? Shea expanded her all her senses with disbelief yet she found nothing, as if the enemy evaporated out of thin air. Due to the restoration of artifact, this opponent couldn’t use the 3 talents of the Beelzebub Royal Family. However, the rest of his abilities emerged endlessly, so he must have activated some strange ability to escape just now.

For an opponent with such horrifying potential, once he grows, the consequences are unimaginable. For 400 years, the fragment of the “God-Eating Mask” is actually lost in my hands. Also, the biggest secret in my heart is likely to have been discerned by this archrival, as if he saw me naked. It’s unbearable. (Shea didn’t know that even her naked body was seen.)

“Beelzebub Royal Family!” Shea’s furious voice echoed across the entire palace. Due to their strength and the inner courtyard prohibition, the palace guards only arrived at that moment. Hearing Shea’s furious yell, they looked at each other with surprise as in their impression, it had been a long time since Princess Royal lost control.

Chen Rui didn’t expect this trip would cause such a huge misunderstanding with Shea. The short battle just now was actually just between a few breathes. Yet, he already went all out by using <Teleportation>, <Shield>, gluttonous vine and Stridebug; he almost used all of his skills. Finally, he used a building as a cover to barely escape with “Dark Will”. It seemed that the Great Demon King level was really not something he could handle now. He felt like he took several turns at the hell’s gate. After teleporting, as he had just stood firmly,, the temperature of the mask on his face had risen to a peak before he could clearly see the scene before him.

This <Teleportation> was like a fuse that ignited the expanding power on the mask. Chen Rui only felt a loud “Poom!” in his head, then numerous scary sounds roared at the same time as if there were thousands of wraith howling at his ears. Not only that, all of the terrifying power rushed toward his consciousness. If this continued, his entire mental state would collapse in a few seconds!

Facing more troubles when the situation is bad enough. This damn mask actually causes such trouble at such timing!

Chen Rui activated “Star Devouring” mode without hesitation. The Super System’s solar system instantly became a blackhole that devoured infinitely. This simulation that imitated the universe was indeed strong. Countless horrifying forces was sucked into the blackhole, and they were completely devoured finally. Chen Rui didn’t know what impact these forces, including Glorfin’s consciousness would bring after being devoured by “Star Devouring”, but it was the only way to save his life at the moment.

After devouring these forces, the heat on the “God-Eating Mask” gradually faded away. After the Star Devouring mode was restored to the original solar system, another notification sounded in the brain: Unknown metadata found. Activate <Deep Analysis>?

Unknown metadata? It must be related to the mystery of the mask. Chen Rui chose to activate without hesitation. <Deep Analysis> was different from studying by collecting information through vision and hearing. It was performed automatically in the brain. He didn’t need to keep his eye on the target.

Chen Rui didn’t waste any time. The battle in the palace would surely trigger Shea’s full-scale manhunt. At present, he must find a safe place to hide. He was now in a large courtyard with a palace-like structure, but it wasn’t the royal palace that Chen Rui was familiar with.

Regardless of the scale or details of the layout, this courtyard was considered to be a very high class in the Dark Moon City.

After fully expanding his senses, he noticed that there seemed to be a faint moan of a man and woman and some kind of colliding sound from a room in the courtyard.

It seemed that under the influence of the Pervert God Mask, even “Dark Will” had become a Pervert God Ring and picked such a good place to teleport. As someone with experience, Chen Rui was no stranger to this kind of sound. However, it was purely a coincidence that he peeped on Shea while she was showering. Now, he had no mood to peek into the privacy of others for doing their “business”.

At that moment, the man’s voice suddenly became louder. It sounded familiar. The content was nothing more but the rude language used to vent during “special moments”. Chen Rui remembered that this voice was actually Joseph! Is this Joseph’s base camp?

It can’t be so coincidental right!

chapters.title: Chapter 174 - Privacy
chapters.body:
Chapter 174 - Privacy

Chapter 174: Privacy

The woman’s moan was mixed with crying. She seemed to be very young. Then, he heard Joseph said, “What if you’re a princess? When you’re in my hands, you’re just a slutty bitch!”

Chen Rui was thinking of a way to escape when he heard that and his hair had suddenly erected. The woman who is being dishonored by Joseph… is a very young “princess”?

There were whipping sound coming from the room. He indeed heard “Alice’s” name from that pervert, Joseph’s voice.

Chen Rui was furious. There was a strong murderous intention in his heart. His figure flickered and he rushed toward that room without thinking.

When Joseph was “busy”, Chen Rui had just teleported here, so he didn’t notice it. Now that Chen Rui moved, there was immediately a response from the room, “Who is that?!”

Joseph appeared almost naked at the door of the room with only a pair of shorts at his lower body that looked like it was worn in a hurry. Chen Rui’s eyes flashed and his hands faintly glowed. <Aura Blade> had been activated. He immediately struck toward Joseph’s head.

Joseph’s was displayed as C in the <Analytical Eyes>, which was the middle stage of Demon King. He realized the attack from this intruder was strange, so his entire body disappeared out of thin air and appeared on the other side by teleporting. The missed <Aura Blade>’s momentum was still strong, and it sliced the door into two. There was a scream coming instantly from inside. Chen Rui stepped past the doorstep and saw that the woman inside was indeed petite. She had blonde hair who looked a little like Alice. When she saw a stranger, she immediately covered her naked body with the blanket.

When Chen Rui was angry, the data shown in <Analytical Eyes> stated: Race: Great Demon (Mutated); Comprehensive Strength Assessment: D.

That’s not right. Alice should be Pride Royal Family and her strength cannot be Higher Demon!

Looking closely, the woman wasn’t Alice. She just looked a little similar to Alice. Besides, the woman looked at him with precautions; she didn’t look like she was caught by Joseph. His mind immediately thought: Could it be…

The moment when he was stunned, he felt a powerful offensive force behind him. Chen Rui had used continuous <Teleportation> and <Shield> in the palace, but the Stridebug on his feet still existed. His figure flickered and dodged Joseph’s blow unexpectedly. He turned and struck with <Aura Blade> again. Just now, Joseph had seen the characteristics of this attack. He knew that not only the palm had a scary sharpness, but also the invisible qi was also extremely lethal. It was very difficult to deal with, so his figure flickered and avoided it.

Joseph had realized that although the person in front of him looked like an Intermediate Demon, his strength was not below him. However, since this man probably knew his secrets, this man must die. Joseph immediately gathered his strength, preparing to launch a killing blow.

Chen Rui didn’t continue to attack but laughed. Certainly, after “Star Eater” devoured the mask’s power, he could already make a sound. It was too bad that he could only be muted when he was facing Shea.

He currently only had <Aurora Shot>, the already used <Aura Blade> and the ultimate move, <Scorching Dragon Kill> that he had never tried. The reason why he gave Joseph the feeling that they were evenly matched was firstly because the <Aura Blade>’s sharpness; secondly, his speed was supported by Stridebug. As soon as Stridebug was released, it automatically wrapped at the sole, as if there was an extra layer on the heel which played a very prominent role.

Since it wasn’t Alice in the room, there was no need for risking his life since this was his opponent’s territory and Joseph’s strength was above him. Also, Dark Will could no longer be used. The winning odds of a fight were too small, so he could only use his wisdom to adapt to the situation.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of the phrase, “If you don’t enter the tiger’s den, you won’t get a tiger’s cub”. A temporary idea began to form quickly in his heart. Now that I’ve entered the tiger’s den, might as well…

“You’re indeed worthy of your name, Joseph. On the surface, you’re pursuing Princess Royal but your actual target is actually the little princess. You even hide at home and find a substitute to play such an act.”

Joseph heard that his secret was indeed seen through and his eyes were filled with killing intentions.

“Does Sir Joseph want to kill me? However, you are now in the middle stage of Demon King, so it’s not that easy to kill me.”

“I know this is your place yet I still dare to break in… Do you think I’m a dumbass that like to do something without confidence?” Chen Rui deliberately pointed out Joseph’s actual strength to look mysterious.

Joseph frowned and asked, “Who are you? From your tone, it seems like we know each other?”

“We’re more than just knowing each other. In fact, we scheduled a meeting more than half a month ago.” Chen Rui watched as Joseph gathered his strength, “The meeting should’ve been tomorrow, but something happened so I came earlier.”

Joseph froze and exclaimed, “You are Aguile!”

After realizing the identity of the opponent, Joseph quickly weighed the interests: For Aguile to come here overnight, he must have something planned, so I can’t let him go. However, Aguile’s strength turned out to be Demon King-level. It is far beyond expectations. It seems that either he intentionally acted weak when he fought Arux or he had broken through the new “seal”. As Aguile said, our strengths are similar, so it won’t be easy to kill him.

“Mr. Aguile, your abilities surprised me for you can actually come in directly without triggering the magic arrays outside.” Joseph smiled, “What makes me even more curious is why did you make our meeting earlier?”

“The weak have no diplomacy. To become a partner of Sir Joseph, I must prove my strength. Unfortunately, it isn’t the right time.” Chen Rui shrugged, “As for finding out sir’s secret, it’s purely accidental. However, don’t you feel strange? With my strength, why didn’t I sneak away? Wouldn’t it be wiser to threaten you after?”

Joseph’s eyes narrowed, “It’s indeed strange. Do you have the interest to explain?”

“I did it deliberately, and it was after thoughtful consideration.” Chen Rui’s hoarse laughter sounded again. “Two reasons. First, our fetishes have something in common; second, I have control over sir’s little secret. I want to take the initiative to let sir take control over my secret so that we can cooperate more confidently.”

Speaking of “fetish”, the killing intentions in Joseph’s eyes moved slightly, but it was withdrawn quietly. He revealed a truly interested look, “May I know the details.”

“Both of them are princesses. You like the weird younger sister whereas I like the iceberg-like older sister. The higher her status and the more arrogant she looks, the more accomplished I feel. Especially seeing her in the state of unwillingness yet being pushed to the climax involuntarily…” He wasn’t sure if he was affected by a certain emotion, Chen Rui’s laughter actually contained a little wickedness, “So, in a sense, we share the same fetish.”

“You sound reassuring, but too bad, I can hardly believe you.” Joseph took out his clothes from the space ring and wore them up. His movement was casual, but he was actually ready to attack at anytime, “You are now an important force under Princess Royal. We only had verbal agreements before, so there seems to be no guarantee. Perhaps this might be a trick of Princess Royal.”

Chen Rui’s tone seemed reassuring, “If sir doesn’t believe me, you can immediately send a few reliable people to the palace or the city to scout. Perhaps you can confirm what secret I’m giving to sir.”

Joseph frowned slightly, but he was still not relieved. He immediately summoned his subordinates. Initially, when they were battling, they had already alarmed the guards. However, Joseph had instructed that without his permission, no one should get close to the courtyard under any circumstances. Now that they heard the summon, only then someone came.

The fastest to appear was Vasasha followed by Royce who also rushed over. Royce was surprised when he saw Chen Rui’s look, so he wasn’t sure at the moment.

Joseph whispered to the two for a while and the two immediately left the courtyard. Chen Rui laughed, “Sir Joseph, aren’t you going to invite me to sit? Maybe we will soon be actual partners.”

“One message alone can confirm the possibility of our cooperation? Although I don’t know what special ability you have that you can leave here alive after being exposed, your strength and calmness are admirable.” Chen Rui’s casual tone surprised Joseph. He immediately ordered someone to arrange tables and stools in the courtyard.

“Don’t you want a drink? Mr. Aguile.” Joseph raised the red wine in his hand.

Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s a pity that I can’t remove my mask now because this mask… is more complicated than you think.”

“Really?” Joseph didn’t care. He raised his glass and took a sip of alcohol.

Soon, Royce and Vasasha returned and reported to Joseph what had happened.

Joseph was finally moved. The shock in his eyes couldn’t concealed as he looked at Chen Rui. That sentence just now was true. This mask was more “complicated” than expected!

Chen Rui’s hearing was extraordinary. As Royce also deliberately controlled his volume to a certain degree, Chen Rui immediately heard the keywords, “Beelzebub” and “capture”. Unsurprisingly, Shea didn’t conceal the identity of the enemy in the palace. Although it might raise trouble from the capital, the interests of Fallen Angel Empire always come first in the heart of Princess Royal.

However, for now, it saved him the trouble of proving his “identity.”

Chen Rui was even more confident and calmly said, “Before we have a more in-depth discussion, I want to make sure that the two Higher Demons around you are qualified to stand here?”

Joseph’s eyes glanced over Royce, “It doesn’t matter. They are all my confidants.”

“Then… this guy doesn’t count right?” Chen Rui pointed to a servant who was pouring wine, a Great Demon at Intermediate Demon stage.

Joseph’s eyes squinted slightly. He understood Aguile’s intention and shook his head, “Doesn’t count.”

As soon as those words were spoken, Vasasha and Royce felt that their vision was blurred. They couldn’t see the masked man’s moves clearly before the servant fell into the opponent’s hands. The Great Demon looked frightened. Then, a yellow light shone from the mask. In the blink of an eye, the mask man loosened his hand.

This servant was just an Intermediate Demon, as compared to Snowden, he was easily made into a puppet.

Chen Rui waved his hand, “Now, my servant, attack your former master with all your strength.”

The servant was covered in flames and pounced toward Joseph without hesitation. Joseph’s eyes flashed and the servant was suddenly beheaded. He then told Royce, “Take this guy’s corpse away and settle it.”

Royce knew that Joseph still had suspicions about him, so he bowed, took the servant’s corpse and left.

“Sir Joseph, can you believe now that I’m not delegated by Princess Royal… as a character of some tricks?”

“I didn’t expect to witness the power of puppetry by the legendary God-Eating Mask. Joseph’s eyes fell onto the “God-Eating Mask” as they flashed, “Even if I defect to Princess Royal, you’ll never defect to your archrival for thousands of years. Well, I never thought the leader of the imperial guards’ reserved forces would be you. Your wisdom is admirable.”

Vasasha was taken aback. This man turned out to be the Beelzebub Royal Family who was wanted by the entire city! Besides, that mask was the “God-Eating Mask”, one of the seven legendary artifacts in the Demon Realm!

chapters.title: Chapter 175 - Sincerity
chapters.body:
Chapter 175 - Sincerity

Chapter 175: Sincerity

Joseph was more vigilant. Although he retained his strength in the tentative confrontation just now, this “Aguile” also didn’t use his talents and the artifact of the Beelzebub Royal Family. Once they really fought, he might truly not able to keep his opponent from escaping.

Most of the royal families had a strange power of inheritance. For example, most of Shea’s power was inherited from his father, the crowned prince, Grimm. For this Aguile to have the “God-Eating Mask”, he must be the master or heir of the Beelzebub Royal Family. Shea was just a poor Princess Royal; whereas, although the Beelzebub Royal Family had disappeared, the accumulation of strength for thousands of years was much deeper. For “Aguile” to raise from Intermediate Demon at the beginning to the current Demon King, he was definitely not simple. The seal was likely to be the key to unlocking the power of inheritance step by step. Then, the actual strength of this person was likely to be Great Demon King or even Demon Emperor!

What’s more that Beelzebub Royal Family reappears after 400 years of silence, so they definitely have more than just these strength and manpower! Is the big change 400 years ago going to happen again? In this way, there are a lot more issues to consider.

Joseph kept a smile on his face, but his eyes were uncertain. There was no hint of smile in his eyes.

If Chen Rui knew Joseph’s thoughts, he would have laughed out loud: You truly guess it wrong. I’m just a human.

“God-Eating Mask really deserves its name. Although it was just a bit of the puppetry power, it’s enough to make me understand the power of artifact.”Joseph took a sip of wine elegantly, ” I’m curious. As one of the Demon Realm’s 7 royal families, why did the Gluttony Royal Family thought of cooperating with a tiny financial officer like me?”

“I did bring along my sincerity for coming here tonight (Coming here tonight is purely winning a lottery in <Teleportation>. Fuck sincerity). Those previous words were not perfunctory. I truly desire for Shea. However, women are just a tool for me to satisfy some kind of fun. What I really want for the Beelzebub Royal Family is the entire Dark Moon. This desire can be further extended to the entire Fallen Angel Empire.”

Chen Rui laughed creepily, “Dark Moon’s food sources and western passages are under you, the Red Spirit’s control. Compared to the Blue Lava Estate’s demon trafficking tricks, Red Spirit is the true controller of the Dark Moon. Thus, I decided to work with you.”

“It seems that you know quite well about Dark Moon. Perhaps Princess Royal Shea doesn’t know as much as you do.” Joseph looked curious, “Why did you choose me? Instead of my more capable brother, Kanita?”

“The hidden strength of the Beelzebub Royal Family is stronger than you think. The information that I have isn’t only about the Dark Moon, but even the Red Spirit, such as the recent failure of Town Leia Scarlet Guards and trivial matters like Snowden went to Mountain Xilang.” Chen Rui continued to bluff, “To be honest, I’m not optimistic that you can bring down Kanita. Even if you take down your brother or Kanita overturns you, it doesn’t mean you guys can overturn your father. Don’t Tell me that Lord Josh is already dying and it is time for him to hand over his power. Your father is doing nothing more than playing a balancing game. I believe you know this better than me. If you have the support of the Beelzebub Royal Family’s power, you can become the protagonist of this game instead of toy being played…” Joseph heard Chen Rui mentioned the latest information of Red Spirit and even Snowden’s movements. His suspicion finally began to loosen. The last sentence was particularly critical.

Joseph was wise. Although he was moved, he wouldn’t easily believe this kind of verbal promises, “Mr. Aguile, what you just said is really good, but from today’s experience, you seem to come here because you’re avoiding trouble instead of the so-called sincerity. As the sheriff of Dark Moon, I have the responsibility and obligation to report Princess Shea about you.”

“Yes. I did sneak into the palace to steal the artifact’s fragment. As a result, I am hunted by Shea. Her strength is higher than you and me. Unfortunately, she couldn’t kill me with all her strengths. She even let me restored the complete artifact. Besides, I believe that even my identity as the Cloak Gang’s leader hasn’t been revealed.” Chen Rui shook his head and his voice showed great confidence, “This is enough to prove my personal ability… If your last sentence is serious, then I feel sorry for you. You just gave up an actual shortcut. At the same time, you added an enemy that was supposed to be your biggest ally.”

“Mr. Aguile has so much confidence in achieving your goal?” Joseph asked with a frown. If Shea isn’t aware of Aguile’s identity, it’s definitely a smart move to lurk beside Shea as the person in charge of the imperial guard’s reserved forces.

“The Fallen Angel Empire now isn’t the Fallen Angel Empire 400 years ago. The biggest enemy of our Beelzebub Family, the Lord of Midnight Sun is no longer here. Remember the King of Beelzebub who fought against Midnight Sun 400 years ago? With the complete God-Eating Mask and his current strength, it’s enough to compete with Raizen of the Bloody Empire!”

“Glorfin Beelzebub?” Joseph was shocked. Glorfin didn’t die in the hands of Lord of Midnight Sun back then. After 400 years of grinding and lurking, to say that he could rival Raizen might not be a lie.

Joseph would never have thought that these were all bluffs. Glorfin had lost his body long ago and now his soul was devoured by Chen Rui. With his soul eliminated, how could he have the strength to rival Raizen.

“With the lesson 400 years ago, our plan before acting will be better. If the artifact isn’t that important, I didn’t have to reveal myself so easily. However, now that the artifact is in my hand, many plans have begun. Even if my identity is exposed, it is worth it… This conversation can only end there as you’ve known enough.” As he spoke, Chen Rui stood up and made a gesture of falling out with Joseph, but his heart was secretly palpitating.

“Wait! If we change our relationship to partners, can we continue this conversation?” Joseph contemplated for a while and stood up.

“Let’s make this simple in a sentence. Red Spirit is yours while I want Dark Moon and Blue Lava. Also, once we start, you must be the first to support openly in the Red Spirit.” Chen Rui glanced at Joseph, “If you agree, then we are allies. I believe you’ve been thinking about it for a long time. I want to know about your decision now.”

Although Chen Rui’s words were a bit overbearing, they were sounded more credible in Joseph’s ears. After all, Aguile had a Demon Overlord behind him. From the words of “Aguile Beelzebub”, the Beelzebub Royal Family had gone through hundreds of years of planning this time. They might not be doing anything now, but when they do, it must be earth-shattering.

Before that, he could use Beelzebub’s power to defeat his younger brother, Kanita and his father, Josh to fulfill his wish. By then, whether he chose to truly cooperate or backstab this ally was completely in his control as the new Red Spirit Lord.

Joseph’s idea was good, but unfortunately, even the name “Aguile Beelzebub” was fake. He had wasted all of his brain cells contemplating about this.

“My friend, Joseph Alvin is willing to be your true friend.” Joseph raised his glass and stated his attitude.

“Very good, Aguile Beelzebub is willing to accept and show my friendship.” Chen Rui also raised his cup symbolically. “As a friend, I have a personal request. Don’t touch Princess Royal for the time being as I want to do it myself. Certainly, I will not interfere with your fetish either.”

“We will all get what we want, my friend.” Joseph smiled ambiguously, “Don’t forget a phrase from our Demon Realm, the more beautiful the flower, the more poisonous it is.”

“However, there’s another phrase saying, the stronger the wine, the more fragrant it is.” Chen Rui replied, and the two laughed at the same time. Perhaps both of them were sneering in their hearts.

Chen Rui successfully achieved his goal by lying, but the most important thing was to take advantage of the situation by making the initial disadvantageous situation (such as Shea’s misunderstanding and being hunted) into an advantage to gain Joseph’s trust. However, to further gain Joseph’s trust, he needed some appropriate benefits.

At that moment, Royce had dealt with the corpse and bowed toward Joseph, “The imperial guard leader, Kaguron came to ask about the suspect. I was afraid to disturb sir’s affairs, so I sent him away without permission.”

Joseph nodded, “You did the right thing. Now, we are truly allies.”

“In order to show my sincerity, I will give you a precious gift, my friend.” Chen Rui took out one thing, “Yet, sincerity is mutual, so I also need something in return.”

Joseph was slightly surprised. As Joseph watched Chen Rui’s palm opened slowly, his facial expression suddenly changed. He could no longer maintain his calmness. His eyes became heated instantly, “Devil fruit!”

Royce and Vasasha were both surprised. Vasasha was surprised by the devil fruit; whereas Royce was surprised by the identity of the masked man. Now, he had confirmed that the “Beelzebub Royal Family” that Princess Shea ordered to hunt down across the city was his own master!

Joseph took a deep breath and gradually regained his composure, but his heart was agitated. One of the fundamental reasons why Kanita was more valued by his father was his talent and strength. Kanita was very talented. He had already approached the level of Great Demon King. However, Joseph was still staying in the middle stage of Demon King. If he could get the devil fruit, the hope of breaking through the bottleneck and the chances of becoming a Great Demon King would greatly increase. In any case, the strength that belonged to oneself was the most important and the most realistic!

Joseph suppressed his excitement and asked, “This gift is really precious. My friend, what kind of sincerity do I need to give to satisfy you?”

“Obsidian Heart and requiem fruit.” Although it was a pity for Joseph to get devil fruit, for Chen Rui, nothing was more important than the Obsidian Heart. Even if Joseph broke through to the peak of Demon King or even Great Demon King, he had complete confidence to surpass this enemy.

Joseph spoke calmly, “Both of them are extremely rare treasures. I do have one Obsidian Heart, but it’s stored at the Red Spirit Estate. I will go there in person tomorrow; I will return by 3 days at least. However, requiem fruit… I really don’t have it. Can it be replaced with something else? For example, magic materials or equipment?”

When Chen Rui heard the Obisidan Heart’s whereabouts, his heart was excited. Fortunately, with “God-Eating Mask” on his face, no one could notice his excitement. On the other hand, Joseph’s eagerness that couldn’t be concealed fell into Chen Rui’s eyes, so he sneered, “I remember that you said at the beginning that one of the conditions for our cooperation is that I can use your resources to lift my seal. Therefore, aren’t the magic materials and equipment an exclusive privilege that I initially have?”

Joseph secretly scolded this guy for being insatiable, but he must acquire the devil fruit. Since he couldn’t express his dissatisfaction at the moment, he immediately agreed, “No problem! It is Royce who is responsible for the magic store. The magic store has been rebuilt. You can go to him for anything! As for requiem fruit, I can ask someone to scout for it…

Chen Rui knew that Joseph indeed didn’t have the requiem fruit. He sighed, “Since it is a symbol of friendship, I don’t want to make it difficult for you. We’ll just change into something else. Then, I want Obsidian Heart and…” Chen Rui’s eyes glanced past Royce and fell on Vasasha’s body. He pointed at the cool-looking female Great Demon, “I want this woman!”

Talk about sincerity? Everything Joseph knew was a lie except the God-Eating Mask. I guess only Chen Rui could win the negotiation with Joseph.

chapters.title: Chapter 176 - Vasasha! The “Sincere” Bargaining Chip
chapters.body:
Chapter 176 - Vasasha! The “Sincere” Bargaining Chip

Chapter 176: Vasasha! The “Sincere” Bargaining Chip

“This woman’s value is far from comparable to the requiem fruit, but her temperament barely matches my taste,” Chen Rui said lightly. “Just a few days ago, I killed my maid. I need a new one. As for the requiem fruit, you can help me find out the information.”

Vasasha looked stunned. A stern look appeared in her eyes. She suddenly appeared in front of Chen Rui. There was a machete in her hand, slashed frenziedly with all her might. Chen Rui didn’t move. He just sneered and disappeared instantly. Vasasha missed the slash. She suddenly felt a strong impact and was knocked to the ground by a strong slap. Blood flowed from the corners of her mouth.

The one who slapped turned out to be Joseph.

Chen Rui’s figure returned to his original position instantly. He looked at Joseph lightly.

Double teleportation! Joseph himself was also of the Great Demon Family. He was shocked. This Aguile is unfathomable. He hasn’t used the bloodline talents and artifacts of the Beelzebub Family, but he is already so strong. Fortunately, he didn’t suddenly fall out with me.

“Hand out the contract!” Joseph glanced past Royce and yelled at Vasasha, “Now!”

Vassar expressed disbelief. Royce clenched his fists tightly, seemingly very emotional. This reaction was expected by Joseph.

It was just that Joseph never thought that Royce was emotional about another thing, a promise. Who would have thought the master would use such a method to take back Vasasha!

Seeing Joseph’s cold and murderous face, Vasasha’s eyes turned red. Her body trembled slightly, and gradually, her beautiful red pupil became a grayish color. She finally came before Chen Rui and he knelt down on one knee. She offered the master-servant contract with a numb look.

Chen Rui tested the contract. He could still accept it; he immediately chose to accept it. At present, Joseph’s three scythes had become his servants. Adding Tim, Dodo and the imp Slee, there were six. With the poison dragon’s symbiotic contract, it was a total of seven. Chen Rui had a faint feeling that there was definitely a limit on the maximum number of contracts, but as of now, he didn’t know how many. As for Snowden, the “extra quota” that belonged to the “God-Eating Mask” was unrelated to the contract.

“Having a sense of resistance is better. This woman makes me want to tame her.” Chen Rui laughed evilly, “My favorite is hard liquor (a metaphor for overbearing woman), otherwise I would have used the power of artifacts to turn her into a puppet already… My friend, thank you for the gift. I can’t wait to find a place to enjoy it. After two days, when you return from Red Spirit Estate, let’s meet at the Blue Lake.”

“The Blue Lake is too far away, and the poison dragon is still asleep. Let’s go to the Black Mountain in the northern suburbs instead.”

The Blue Lake suggestion was Chen Rui’s impromptu idea. He didn’t expect Joseph to be so cautious. He had an idea and agreed.

Joseph called his servant to take Chen Rui and Vasasha away.

After Chen Rui and Vasasha left, Joseph looked at Royce with excitement. He suddenly asked, “Want to follow?”

Royce hesitated a little and nodded. Joseph shook his head and sighed, “Do you think I want to give him Vasasha? Did you see the double teleport just now? This Aguile is actually the heir of the Beelzebub Family. Even without completely undoing the seal, he already has the same powers as me, and this does not include the strength of the artifact ‘God-Eating Mask’. Previously, he broke into my forbidden area without triggering any magic circle. If he didn’t intentionally alarm me, I wouldn’t even have noticed it. If he wanted to forcibly take away Vasasha, no one would be able to stop him, including me.”

Royce clenched his fists. His body was trembling slightly, but he was sneering in his mind: Beelzebub Royal Family? He’s clearly human! As for the “God-Eating Mask”… it can only be interpreted as an incredibly fascinating power! Including his powers that was enchanced rapidly in just one month, that master’s powers have already reached the point where he can compete with Joseph!

What excited him most was the promise he made when he signed the master-servant contract at the Blue Lake, it finally came true!

“Royce!” Joseph suddenly yelled, “You should wake up! See what you have done in the last 100 years? Arux surrendered to me for power and battles, but you? You did it for a woman who changed her mind! Have you ever thought about your deprived honor in these years? Have you ever thought of your family that was glorious once? You don’t even have children; the Kunda Family bloodline is about to die in your hands!”

Royce lowered his head and felt ashamed: I have to say that Joseph’s provocative words are quite true. However, for Royce now, these words could only make him feel ashamed. Joseph only looked at value. Just like Vasasha, Joseph would abandon her if he wanted to.

“It is undeniable that I worked with Aguile today for my own benefit because he can help me to take the position of Lord Red Spirit.

There are two ways before you now. First, follow the woman who is destined to become Aguile’s plaything and never return to me. I will not stop a useless person from leaving. Second, abandon those ridiculous former attachments behind, pledge loyalty to me and put your extraordinary talents to good use. The day I become the Red Spirit Lord is the day the Kunda Family restores their surname and glory!”

Royce looked moved. He thought for a long time and seemed to have finally made up his mind. He knelt and saluted Joseph and said loudly, “I, Royce, swear on the name of Demon God, that I will make every effort in this life to restore the glory of the Kunda Family!”

Joseph had been observing Royce’s expression. Seeing Royce resolutely swore in the name of Demon God, he finally nodded. If Royce really chose the first path, he would not have let Royce leave alive. In the end, Royce chose the second path as he expected.

However, Joseph did not notice that that vow did not mention the name of his future lord. In his opinion, Royce’s family was destroyed by his father, Kunda, and Kanita would not accept it either. If he just wanted to restore his family, his best choice would be to pledge to Joseph who had obtained the support of Beelzebub Royal Family.

The poor “future lord” didn’t realize that he was just putting up an act in front of him. The object of this oath was a different true master.

“Does sir require me to offer a contract? In the past, as a precaution for sir, I once accepted a servant. If sir needs this proof of allegiance, I will kill him immediately, then offer sir a master-servant contract.”

Accepting a servant to prevent being “contracted” was a commonly used method in the Demon Realm, but with the contract in place, one couldn’t accept another servant that they really wanted. Actually Royce had no servants. After acknowledging Chen Rui as his master, he could no longer offer a master-servant contract. He deliberately asked this question in order to gain Joseph’s complete trust.

In fact, Royce had long since discovered that his half-brother from a different mother, Ledo, was the greatest enemy responsible for his family’s destruction. He had signed a master-servant contract with Joseph early on. Joseph was not Chen Rui. He couldn’t sign more than one spiritual contract, hence Royce only dared to be so bold.

Joseph saw that he even brought up the previous precautionary measures, so he was so sure that he had no doubt. “There is no need! I admire your wisdom and determination. I will rush to Red Spirit Estate tomorrow morning to get the Obsidian Heart. If I can obtain the devil fruit, I will leave Dark Moon for a period of time to aim for advancing to another powerful level. You will be in charge of this place. You can even approach Vasasha appropriately to ask for some news. If that Aguile asks you for resources, you can deal with it accordingly. I think you understand what I mean.”

“I won’t let sir down!” Royce nodded strongly and left.

Joseph smiled with satisfaction. He turned and left the room.

Chen Rui took Vasasha and advanced carefully the whole way. They finally avoided all the investigations and guards and arrived at the lobby of the arena.

Arux was startled when he saw Vasasha walking with him. He stood up and said, “Master.”

If it was usual, Vasasha would be shocked to hear Arux’s address, but now she was blank, as if nothing could cause her emotions to fluctuate.

Chen Rui said, “Arux, I’m being hunted all over the city. Arrange two safe rooms for me now.”

Arux was even more surprised to hear about the whole city’s search. Without asking further, he immediately led Chen Rui and Vasasha to the front of the fireplace in the lobby. He pressed a switch and an entrance appeared behind the fireplace. They went down to a place similar to the basement. There were several rooms equipped with all the basic items.

Chen Rui looked at these rooms and showed satisfaction. He gave Arux a few orders, and Arux nodded and left.

Vasasha looked at the room indifferently. Her gaze was still dim and unclear, just like a puppet that lost its soul just waiting for any command from its master. Chen Rui glanced at her and some kind of desire surged in his heart. He quickly said, “I will wake you tomorrow at 9 am. Go to sleep first.”

Vasasha didn’t nod or shake her head. She only turned around mechanically to the room.

Chen Rui suppressed his strange desire and entered the room to rest. He was extremely tired today. Although he only fought briefly with Shea, he exhausted a lot of power. If not for the newly acquired skill, he would have been killed. As for Joseph, he lost more mind power there. From the mistake with teleportation to the unexpectedly successful alliance, it couldn’t be denied that luck played a part, but the key still laid in wisdom and adaptability.

The two sides of this alliance actually had sinister motives, and they may stab each other in the back at any time. Of course, in the early stage, it was still relatively stable in the case of using each other. Not to mention, Chen Rui was not a part of the Beelzebub Royal Family at all. Joseph just fell for a big trick.

What pleased Chen Rui the most was that the mistaken teleportation actually solved the biggest problem of the Obsidian Heart! For Athena, she was worth not one but even six devil fruits.

There was one more thing worthy of vigilance. On the surface, Joseph who was only pursuing Princess Royal Shea on the surface was actually coveting the little princess Alice!

Chen Rui thought about the mischievous loli who “robbed” his first kiss. He hadn’t seen her in a while. His heart grew warm. I must protect Alice no matter what. I can’t let that wolf in sheep’s clothing with strange fetishes lay his hands on her!

He didn’t seem to realize his protective tendencies also had the suspicion of strange fetish. He thought about the whole plan in his mind for a while, then closed his eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 177 - Vasasha And Royce! The Furthest Distance In The World
chapters.body:
Chapter 177 - Vasasha And Royce! The Furthest Distance In The World

Chapter 177: Vasasha and Royce! The Furthest Distance in the World

The next morning.

Chen Rui opened his eyes. Last night, he had a weird dream. He couldn’t remember most of it, but the part that left the greatest impression was the magic tent in the dream. The woman in the tent was Christina one moment and Athena the next moment, then changed into sisters, Shea and Alice another moment. At one time, it changed into “everyone together”; the content was very unsuitable for children.

Why have my dreams become so sinister lately? Chen Rui scratched his head. However, the situation of <Deep Analysis> was a little strange yesterday. The analysis of “God-Eating Mask” failed. There was one more light screen in front of the throne. There was a progress meter showing that the progress of <Deep Analysis> was 0%.

There was also a prompt at the side, “The number of <Deep Analysis> can be set automatically according to mental strength. Currently, it is recommended to only use it once a day.”

After Chen Rui confirmed the prompt, another prompt appeared in his consciousness, “A large amount of unknown energy remains in the Star Eater mode. There is a danger of overflow. Activate Star Conversion mode?”

Chen Rui was startled. Sure enough, the Star Eater mode was not limitless. He absorbed Glorfin’s mental power last time and swallowed the power of the “God-Eating Mask” last night. If it “overflowed”, his consciousness would definitely suffer some kind of terrible backfire or even losing his mind. Then, what is Star Conversion mode? No matter what, the big problem of Star Eater must be solved as soon as possible.

Star Conversion mode: Decompose and absorb the energy obtained from the Star Eater to gradually strengthen the master. The process is irreversible and cannot be interrupted after activation. Conditions: costs 10,000 auras a day.

Chen Rui was overjoyed! Converting others energy to enhance myself! Isn’t this the same as the Huagong Dafa or Beiming Shengong [1] in martial arts novels? No, it’s even better than these martial arts. He could intelligently strengthen himself gradually without having to rely on “training” only.

He could not use <Deep Analysis> frequently. Although the mask on his face was a bit troublesome, even being intimate with Athena had become a problem, the most important thing was to solve the big problem of the Star Eater first.

The system prompted that the estimated time to activate Star Conversion mode was 100 days, and one million auras needed to be deducted in advance. The power that was decomposed would be automatically absorbed by the body.

Such a good thing is worth even 10 million auras! Chen Rui confirmed the activation and his one million auras were deducted. The light screen that displayed <Deep Analysis> showed another progress bar, which was the Star Conversion mode. It was currently also at 0%.

However, in a hundred days, the tremendous power obtained by the Star Eater could be fully converted for personal use. When that time came, he might be able to rely on these forces to become a great Demon King!

Chen Rui thought of the power shown by Shea and his heart grew hot involuntarily. He calculated the time; it was already afternoon. He immediately walked out of the basement room and arrived at the lobby.

Arux was in the lobby. When he saw Chen Rui, he immediately reported the last night’s situation. It turned out that the city had set a curfew. The city was thoroughly investigating all those who were wearing masks. Shea focused on Cloak Gang, not because she doubted “Aguile”, but because of the popularity of Cloak Gang, there were too many people in the city who dressed similarly.

As the reserve forces of the imperial guards, the Cloak Gang naturally cooperated with this operation. After a thorough investigation of the gang, they began to assist the imperial guards in carrying out a thorough search across the city. Naturally, the search yielded no results.

Soon, Arux quickly left after receiving a certain order. Chen Rui thought for a while and called Vasasha from the basement room. As he expected, she still looked expressionless like she was waiting to be slaughtered.

“Sit.” Chen Rui completely released Demon King vibes. He seemed to be intentionally threatening.

Vasasha was unaware of this, as if anything around her could not affect her emotion. She sat down like a puppet.

“You seem to be in a bad mood?”

“…”

“I order you to answer.”

“Yes.”

“Is following me not better than following Joseph?”

“…”

“I order you to answer!”

“Yes.”

……

…

Except numbly answering “Yes”, Vasasha did not answer anything else.

Her attitude made Chen Rui feel like he was wasting his energy; he felt very depressed. He asked a few more questions, but she still behaved the same. He was unable to achieve his desired purpose.

Chen Rui’s eyes moved slightly. He looked at the next room, and then he suddenly turned around and said, “There is something that I didn’t want to tell you at first, but seeing your bored look, I should let you feel a little happy. This was what Arux heard this morning. When I took you away yesterday, Royce wanted to follow us. Thus, he was killed by Joseph.”

“Yes.” Vasasha still answered one word, but Chen Rui could clearly feel that her voice was shaking.

Chen Rui added, “I heard that he was calling your name before he died.”

Two streams of tears finally flowed uncontrollably from the corners of Vasasha’s eyes. Her whole body trembled slightly.

Chen Rui knew what to do. He said, “I learned about your past from Arux. It’s strange; now that you don’t have any feelings for Royce, even if you are unhappy now, you should be gloating. Why are you crying over his death?”

Vasasha’s body stopped trembling. She shed tears quietly without answering. Her gaze became darker, like a body that had completely lost its soul. Every part of its vitality had vanished.

“Interesting. I’m getting more interested in you now.” Chen Rui cupped his chin. “You should be able to tell that Joseph and I are just using each other. When the conditions are ripe, I can totally kill him to avenge Royce, but only if you give everything to me without reservation. Are you willing?”

Vasasha’s eyes flashed. They recovered a little color. She focused her gaze on Chen Rui’s face and nodded silently.

“So first of all, you have to tell me what happened with you and Joseph… back then.”

Vasasha hesitated for a moment. She looked confident after looking at the mask, and she finally spoke up.

Back then, the Red Spirit Estate’s Kunda Family patriarch was killed by Red Spirit Lord Josh because he refused to give up a certain treasure he received. The Kunda Family was deprived of their surname and all members were turned into slaves. As Royce’s fiancee, Vasasha naturally was not spared. However, because of someone, Vasasha’s fate changed. She accidentally became Joseph’s maid.

That someone was the illegitimate son of Royce’s father, Ledo, but this act was not of good intentions, but a sinister idea of his. Ledo hated his father for passing on the family business to Royce. He secretly surrendered to Joseph, the lord’s son, and confided in Lord Josh through Joseph, which led to the extinction of the entire Kunda Family.

Joseph took Ledo’s suggestion and lied to Vasasha that Royce was under his control. He threatened Royce’s life and gave Vasasha a strange order. The order was to force Vasasha to fall in love with him wholeheartedly. If he found out that she still had any affection for Royce, he would immediately kill Royce.

Vasasha was introverted; she was not good at expressing her feelings, but she always loved Royce with all her heart, just as Royce loved her. She didn’t know that Royce had fled. In order to protect her fiance’s life, she could only force herself to obey Joseph’s possession. Later, when Royce and Arux came to find her, she thought it was a test from Joseph. It wasn’t until they were defeated by Joseph that Vasasha knew that she was cheated by Joseph. However, Royce fell into Joseph’s hands for real this time. She had no other choice but to continue to “love” Joseph wholeheartedly.

That was how both Vasasha and Royce became Joseph’s subordinates. For a hundred years, even though Royce was close by, she could not express any emotions. She could only reject Royce indifferently, or in other words, protect Royce.

Joseph had promised Vasasha that once he became the Red Spirit Lord, he would give her and Royce freedom. This became her only hope of survival.

Who knew that this dream would be completely broken yesterday. Joseph broke his promise and transferred her to another person like cargo, forcing her to sign the master-servant contract. She completely lost any hope of freedom.

She completely understood the meaning in Joseph’s fierce look yesterday. If she didn’t sign the master-servant contract, he would immediately kill Royce! However, she only learned this morning that Royce was still killed!

With her power, it was impossible to even resist her current master, and it was even more impossible to kill the mighty Joseph. The only thing she could do was to use herself as a bargaining chip to try to get revenge.

Chen Rui just realized that he was completely wrong, and Royce was also completely wrong. Although Vasasha had always seemed dedicated to Joseph and she had always been indifferent to Royce, this woman’s heart had never changed from beginning to end.

Chen Rui remembered the words he left in Shea’s longing wind chime: the farthest distance in the world is not the distance between life and death; it is when I am standing in front of you, but you don’t know that I love you.

To Vasasha, the farthest distance in the world was not only standing in front of him while he doesn’t know that she loves her, but she could only act like a stranger to him even though she loves him.

Compared with Royce’s dedication, Vasasha’s dedication was more intense. Behind her indifferent face, she did not hesitate to burn her own passion. After 100 years, it never changed.

“As long as you kill Joseph, I will dedicate my whole body and heart to you, and I will never betray you in this life.” Vasasha’s somewhat hoarse voice sounded decisive.

“You are wrong. Even if I kill Joseph and take possession of your body, your heart will not be here.” Chen Rui shook his head. “The same way Joseph forced you to fall in love with him. No matter how I twist and force it, love still can’t be changed. If love can be changed like this, you can’t call it as love anymore, even if we sign a master-slave contract. You female Great Demons are so bent on one thing.”

Speaking of the words “bent on one thing”, Chen Rui thought of another Great Demon who truly belonged to him, and tenderness rose in his heart.

Vasasha bowed her head sadly. She suddenly felt that the threatening Demon King vibe on Chen Rui’s body disappeared.

“Joseph must die because I never intended to let him live! As for you…” Chen Rui suddenly smiled and scolded her, “The bastard next door, get out of there right now! If you don’t come out now, I’ll give Vasasha to someone else!”

Just now there was a Demon King-level vibe, plus Vasasha was numb, hence she didn’t feel anyone nearby. Now that the vibe was gone, she suddenly felt that there were two people in the next room, but she didn’t know when they came.

Before waiting for Vasasha to react from the shock, a familiar figure rushed out.

When Vasasha saw this person, despite being indifferent usually, she couldn’t help exclaiming at this moment. She could hardly believe her eyes. Her dim gaze suddenly recovered their color. Royce heard everything from next door, so he was already in tears. He and Vasasha looked at each other for a while. Without caring that Chen Rui and Arux were around, he took two steps forward and hugged Vasasha tightly.

Vasasha then realized that this was not a dream. The icy shell she maintained for a hundred years melted in this fiery hug. She also held Royce tightly.

Arux stood behind them, rejoicing at the reunion of his friend and Vasasha. Suddenly a figure appeared beside him and a low voice sounded, “Arux, walk outside with me. Don’t you think this room is a bit crowded?”

“You’re right, my master.” Arux’s voice filled with an unprecedented respect.

[1] Both were martial arts that appeared in the Condor Trilogy. Both had the effect of draining and dissipating the internal energy of another martial artist.

Would Shea find out that Chen Rui was the one with the mask?

chapters.title: Chapter 178 - Scorching Dragon Kill
chapters.body:
Chapter 178 - Scorching Dragon Kill

Chapter 178: Scorching Dragon Kill

Because Joseph had already traveled to Red Spirit Estate to obtain the Obsidian Heart, Royce could enjoy a true reunion with Vasasha after 100 years of separation.

After this incident, the trio’s loyalty, including Arux’s, to Chen Rui reached a new high. Especially Royce and Vasasha, even without the master-slave contract, they were dead set on following Chen Rui.

Chen Rui learned from Vasasha that Joseph’s possession of her was only to control her. He had two real inclinations: the first was girls about twelve or thirteen years old, and he coveted on Alice also because of this; the other was the “broken sleeve tendency”. Joseph and Ledo did not only have a master-slave relationship, they also had a deeper…

Chen Rui had chills when he heard it. Bisexual + strange uncle + Brokeback Mountain! This nasty nice guy is seriously perverted!

Regardless, I have to protect Alice!

At night, Chen Rui sneaked away from the guard and found the wyvern in the suburbs. He rode the wyvern to Blue Lake.

Upon arriving at his destination, Chen Rui settled wyvern properly and went straight up the hill by the Blue Lake.

Sure enough, he saw the crazy dragon there.

“Finally willing to come and see your friend?” The poison dragon had long noticed his arrival. He held a piece of grass in his mouth and laid on the ground. He acted to be very arrogant, but he was very happy in his heart.

“Three bottles of Dark Shadow Empire specialty Miao Fruit Wine, two barrels of Dark Moon wine, fifty skewers of grilled meat, ten braised bones…” Chen Rui listed the names of a bunch of food. He saw Paglio’s shining eyes. He deliberately waved the space bracelet in his hand and sighed, “It’s unfortunate that even after delivering them to the doorstep, no one needs them. Forget it, I’ll take it back.” “Hmph! Trying to impress a great dragon with just food?” The dragon expressed disdain, but his actions were not respectable at all. He bounced up like lightning and grabbed the bracelet. When he opened it, there was only a note in it: Silly dragon, you are fooled!

As Paglio was about to scold him, he realized that Chen Rui, who was opposite him, opened his five fingers aiming at him. His body was exuding an intense vibe. This level of vibe was definitely not what a Higher Demon could have!

Paglio was surprised. He grinned, “You lucky bastard; you actually broke through again.”

As soon as the words came to an end, a white light ball whistled, flying toward him. Paglio did not avoid it. As <Aurora Shot> approached his body, his suddenly yelled. Chen Rui felt the surrounding space twisted strangely under his shout, and <Aurora Shot> was torn apart by this twist and instantly dissipated.

He actually broke up <Aurora Shot> with just its voice! Is this the true power of the poison dragon after being sealed?

Chen Rui was stunned. He opened <Analytical Eyes>, Paglio’s powers showed B, the middle stage of Great Demon King! Although the poison dragon only used the power of a middle stage Great Demon King, Chen Rui felt that he was more powerful than Shea.

After hesitating for a moment, the poison dragon appeared in front of him. Its claw-shaped hands scratched toward his head with terrifying power.
