Chen Rui moved his mind and suddenly appeared behind the poison dragon. His palms formed a sword shape, emitting a faint light. He chopped with all his strength. The poison dragon’s body also disappeared in an instant. This slash was missed. The sword qi left a very deep mark on the ground through the air. Chen Rui sensed a danger from behind him and teleported again, putting distance between them.

“Double teleportation, very good!” The poison dragon’s eyes shone, and he reappeared in front of Chen Rui in an instant. He clenched his claws into fists and hit toward his chest. This was not a teleport skill but a real speed. At this time, the poison dragon’s powers had been reduced to C in <Analytical Eyes>. It seemed that Paglio could freely control its combat power at all levels. He was really proficient in controlling his strength.

Although the poison dragon reduced his power to the middle stage of Demon King, he was much stronger than Joseph. Chen Rui stretched out his arm to block it. His arm felt numb and he was forced a few steps backward. He moved his mind again and equipped Stridebug on his feet. His speed suddenly increased and avoided Paglio’s attack.

Paglio sneered as he felt his speed increased. His combat ability in <Analytical Eyes> increased to the later stage of of Demon King. Chen Rui felt strenous. He secretly scolded the guy for cheating. A protective shield appeared around his body.

Thunk! The shield completely blocked Paglio’s attack. The poison dragon’s eyes became brighter. He changed his attack method and concentrated his attack on one point. However, the shield was different from the regular magic shield. Its special characteristic was that it absorbed a certain amount of attack, so it was not susceptible to this kind of concentrated attack.

However, since the protective shield had an upper limit of absorption, Paglio’s consecutive attacks finally disintegrated the power of the protective shield.

“Wait!” Chen Rui said suddenly. The fist that broke the protective shield suddenly stopped in front of his forehead, but it only reached out with a finger to flick his forehead.

“Ouch!” Chen Rui covered his forehead. “I already said stop! Paglio, you asshole!” “Hmph, just because you’re Demon King level, you dare to hit me?” The poison dragon’s next words revealed his true reason for revenge. “Give me all the food!”

“I have one more trick, but I have never tried this one. It is very powerful. I may not be able to control it. Furthermore, after using it, there is a 24-hour fatigue period. Want to try it?”

The poison dragon suddenly became interested. He temporarily put aside the matters about food. “The inheritance of the grand master is really strong. Just now you used three new skills, double teleportation, sprint and protection. There’s a big improvement in strength compared to the previous <Aurora Shot> and <Aura Blade>. It turns out there is an even stronger one. Quickly, give it a try!” Paglio had a keen eye. It could tell at a glance that Chen Rui’s speed was buffed by some kind of “skill”. Chen Rui didn’t explain the Stridebug. He now wanted to try the ultimate skill <Scorching Dragon Kill> that had never been used.

“Come on! I am only using Demon King-level power; I can reflect your ultimate skill with just one hand.” Paglio beckoned with a grin. <Analytical Eyes> showed C+.

Why not use the lower level of Demon King? Cunning Dragon! Chen Rui murmured in his heart. He slowly distanced himself from Paglio and channeled his power. He screamed, igniting a black flame.

As soon as this flame came out, Paglio was suddenly surprised, “The power of Nirvana! Could the grand master be Asmodeus…” As he spoke halfway, the poison dragon vehemently denied his guess because he knew that Chen Rui and the lady of Asmodeus had a one night stand. He also received the precious blood of Nirvana. It most likely a mutation caused by the power of the grand master.

I have to say that Paglio’s thinking is really agile. He almost guess it right.

Chen Rui remembered the prompt of <Fire of Nirvana>: It can be combined with <Scorching Dragon Kill> to form <Scorching Dragon Possession> which couldenchance one’s combat power. Now that he had Paglio to spar with, he should test it out.

“<Scorching Dragon Kill>.” Chen Rui murmured in his mind, but this skill did not cast immediately. His body’s Star Power condensed at a high speed, and the fuzzy planet in the status bar star chart began to emit a faint light. Under the influence of this power, the surrounding air became uneasy, faintly radiating heat.

Sure enough, it’s an ultimate skill that needs to be charged!

Paglio initially did not worry too much, but when he saw this kind of power, he could not help but be slightly moved. His expression became serious. He stomped his foot and slowly floated into the air. Red light spots appeared on the black flame on Chen Rui’s body. There was a violent and manic vibe in the red light spots, even the vitality of the black flame was assimilated by this vibe.

Chen Rui felt his strength soared to a terrifying high. If he did not release it, he himself would burst. He immediately pushed his hands toward Paglio in the air and shouted loudly, “<Scorching Dragon Kill>!”

Red light radiated from both hands. The surrounding ground gradually shook. A red dragon about two meters wide was covered in fire. It soared out of the red light. It did not take the shape of the dragons of this world, but the shape of the Chinese Dragon from Chen Rui’s original world!

The red dragon soared all the way and whistled towardtoward Paglio ferociously. A dragon roar could be faintly heard. Although <Scorching Dragon Kill>’s target was in the air, its great power caused a large area of fissures to appear on the trembling ground, and numerous hard rocks shattered apart.

When the red dragon flew out, Paglio was shocked. It looked like a long snake. The “dragon” seemed to have some kind of natural power of restraint; even a mighty dragon like Paglio felt afraid. In the blink of an eye, the fearful high temperature and the destructive vibe approached him. The Scorching Dragon was formed by condensed energy. Although its image was not particularly delicate, it still opened its large mouth and rushed forward fiercely.

After all, the poison dragon was a Demon Overlord-level powerhouse. Although his power had been sealed, his will was still very powerful. He immediately suppressed the uneasiness in his heart. He went forward with both its hands emitting a faint green light. When the two came into contact, Chen Rui felt the Scorching Dragon tremble; Paglio’s body also trembled. He actually withstood the Scorching Dragon forcefully so that its terrifying power could not be released.

This process was not easy at all. Paglio had no leverage in the air. He began to be pushed back by the Scorching Dragon involuntarily. The Scorching Dragon continued to extend, and it became stronger the longer the time. Paglio felt more and more strained. This “grand master’s” inheritance was far beyond its imagination. He instinctively felt that once he couldn’t hold it back anymore and let this “weird dragon” burst, even he would suffer.

Paglio, known by Chen Rui as “Dead Duck Dragon” always had a good reputation. Previously, he boasted that he could reflect <Scorching Dragon Kill> with one hand. Now, even using both hands, he was still being so passive. His prideful nature was triggered. Green light shot out of his hands. Even his pupils became dark green which looked a bit like a snake’s vertical pupils.

The later stage of Demon King power burst out with full force. The poison dragon suddenly stepped back in the air and suddenly stopped. In the midst of the roar, his two hands released the power. The fiercely surging Scorching Dragon was reversed by this oppressive force and pushed in Chen Rui’s direction.

“Oh shit!” Paglio released his true power to reflect the <Scorching Dragon Kill>. He suddenly became aware of what he had done. He was startled and yelled, “Quickly use <Teleportation> to escape!” Paglio didn’t know that Chen Rui could only use <Teleportation> twice an hour, and there was still a few minutes before his next use. He was unable to escape now.

Even Paglio was surprised by Chen Rui’s strength. Could Chen Rui survive from this move?

chapters.title: Chapter 179 - The Dangers Of And Star Conversion
chapters.body:
Chapter 179 - The Dangers Of And Star Conversion

Chapter 179: The Dangers of and Star Conversion

Faced with the horrific ultimate skill that was being returned, Chen Rui, who could not teleport, did not have enough time to react.

The poison dragon regretted it to death. He clearly knew the horrific power of this skill. Even though it was cast by Chen Rui, casting it was one thing, and whether he was able to take his own attack was another thing.

With Chen Rui’s current early stage Demon King power, it was definitely impossible to take this big move. Even worse, he might even have life danger. The poison dragon’s life was linked to Chen Rui’s. It would be too frustrating if they both died together like this.

Paglio released all its powers and flew down desperately. However, the power he exerted at this time was of Demon King level at most; it was too late to catch up.

Chen Rui’s eyes were reflecting the color red from the Scorching Dragon that was being reflected, but he could not feel the terrifying power of the Scorching Dragon in front of him. Instead, he felt faintly excited, as if the Scorching Dragon and him were calling for each other. Chen Rui’s mind flashed. Without trying to avoid it, the <Fire of Nirvana> on his body blazed.

These were just momentary reactions. The poison dragon that rushed down saw the Scorching Dragon hitting Chen Rui’s body and swallowing him up instantly. With Chen Rui as the center, a huge hole appeared on the ground, as if it was crashed by a large meteorite. The intense air waves even slowed down Paglio’s figure.

However, the thing Paglio was most worried about did not happen. With his eyesight, he saw that the figure in the red light did not seem to be hurt at all. He was just knocked into the air due to the huge impact.

Paglio knew something was different, so he stopped moving. The huge red dragon was completely immersed in the figure in the middle. Its red energy was distorting strangely and violently. The surrounding ground became deformed and broken due to the distortion.

The twisting stopped after a moment. With a “whoosh” sound, the flames burned, enveloping Chen Rui’s unscathed body.

The original black from the <Fire of Nirvana> entered Chen Rui’s sclera. His black pupils turned red, just like when he suddenly broke through Alioth stage during the battle with Glorfin.

Paglio’s heart moved. He decreased his strength to Demon King level. He saw Chen Rui stomp his foot, then Chen Rui appeared in front of his eyes. He punched Paglio in the chest. His speed and strength suddenly became several times stronger. Paglio was surprised and grabbed his wrist. The destructive force from Chen Rui’s body shook off the poison dragon’s hand, then he quickly grasped the poison dragon’s fist. Both parties immediately launched rapid offense and defense.

In this kind of battle, the destruction of the surrounding environment was increasing. The entire hilltop showed faint signs of collapse.

Although the Scorching Dragon’s vibe had a certain natural deterrent to Paglio, Paglio exerted true later stage Demon King-level power. The fact that Chen Rui could match him equally was a miracle.

The power that Chen Rui exerted at this time was still on the previous <Scorching Dragon Kill>. He felt that his body was full of violent and terrifying power. He felt like he had to get it out. He finally understood that <Scorching Dragon Possession> was originally used in this way. <Scorching Dragon Kill> was a fearful offensive skill for the enemy, but for him who had <Fire of Nirvana>, it was equivalent to a powerful booster.

The things that worth noticing were not only that. The star evolution level of the Super System only roughly corresponded to a demon’s level of power. Alkaid state corresponded to Intermediate Demon, and Alioth state corresponded to Higher Demon, just like the difference in power between demons. Not to mention a great difference between level, even if it was just a small distance between the middle stage and later stage, there was basically no chance of winning.

The emergence of <Scorching Dragon Kill> made the impossible challenge possible. Now Chen Rui just realized Alioth state, which was about equivalent to earlier level Demon King, after <Scorching Dragon Possession>, he could already compete with the later stage Demon King Paglio.

However, this “counterbalance” was not unlimited. After an intense battle, a warning sound came from Chen Rui’s mind, “The <Scorching Dragon Possession> state was about to end in three minutes. Will enter a 24-hour fatigue period. Can’t use any skills.”

Cannot use any skill for twenty-four hours? That is a bit awful. Chen Rui attacked for a while. Seeing that the time was up, he hurriedly punched Paglio back and shouted, “Stop!”

Paglio did not continue to attack. He chuckled, “This skill is quite powerful. It can even compete with peak of Demon King level. However, it’s no fun because I was distracted by having to suppress my power. When you become Great Demon King, use this trick again, we’ll have fun.”

“Have fun your ass! This is an impressive skill, but its shortcomings are obvious. I’m about to lose my strength now.” As soon as Chen Rui finished his sentence, the power of <Scorching Dragon Possession> faded quickly. The flames converged into his body and his pupils returned to normal.

Then, his whole person seemed to collapse. He softly sat on the ground. He really couldn’t exert any strength. Entering the Super System, he saw that the skill trees had become gray that represented unable to use. Fortunately, buildings like the storage warehouse could still be used.

“Paglio, give me the space bracelet.”

Chen Rui took the space bracelet that Paglio threw over and threw it back after a while. Paglio opened the bracelet and saw a lot of food. He immediately smiled and took out a bottle of wine. He couldn’t wait to take a few sips, looking pleased. Because the vicinity was too badly damaged, Chen Rui took out two more cushions and the two sat down.

“You must have gained a lot in Mountain Xilang this time.” Since he was eating other people’s food, he had to be nice. The poison dragon did not jealously express indignation at Chen Rui’s promotion to Demon King. “Oh right, take that junk off your face first. It’s uncomfortable to look at.”

“This junk can’t be removed for the time being. Right, it has a big name. It’s called ‘God-Eating Mask.’”

The poisonous dragon almost choked on wine. He thought he had misheard. He took another sip and asked, “What’s its name? Say it again!”

“‘God-Eating Mask’, one of the seven artifacts of Demon Realm.” Chen Rui enjoyed Paglio’s surprise. “I didn’t actually do much in Mountain Xilang this time, I just saved a Demon Overlord and killed another Demon Overlord.”

This time, Paglio spat out a mouthful of wine with a “pfft”. His eyes grew round, “Hurry up, tell me what happened!”

Chen Rui told his experience in Mountain Xilang in detail. Paglio listened as he ate. He couldn’t help gulping the wine at the thrilling parts. Soon, there were several empty bottles.

“You really weren’t bragging…” Paglio shook his head, fiercely biting a mouthful of the barbecue in his hand. Last time this guy met a Demon Emperor in Silent Night Wetland, and now he encountered a Demon Overlord at Mountain Xilang mine. He actually rescued the Earth Elemental King and barely killed Glorfin, a Beelzebub family powerhouse. Next time, will this guy encounter a demi-god?

“Athena is still asleep.” Chen Rui sighed. “Fortunately, I already know the whereabouts of the Obsidian Heart. If all goes well, I can get it in two days. I must rescue her.”

“I said before that this Athena was your type.” Paglio nodded, looking like he could foresee the future.

“Yes, I know you are great.” Chen Rui regretted teaching the poison dragon some of the “terms” of another world. “It’s just that I can’t remove this damn mask. It’s a bit troublesome.”

“I’m afraid it’s just not a bit troublesome.” Paglio frowned. “I want to figure out one thing. Was Glorfin’s consciousness devoured by the grand master’s special skill, or was it sealed by the grand master’s thoughts?”

The grand master’s thoughts were fake since the beginning. As compared to telling about the “Star Eater” mode, Chen Rui chose the former.

The poison dragon frowned even harder. It asked, “Think carefully, have you noticed any special changes about yourself recently?”

“Changes? I don’t think anything changed…” Chen Rui thought for a while. He thought of his behavior in the alley last night. “It is just uncomfortable at night, and occasionally being a little bit radical.”

“Radical?” Paglio seemed to care about this. “Speak specifically. This is important!”

Chen Rui told him what happened in the alley last night. Paglio appeared suspicious, “Occasionally, there is a desire to see blood? And an uncontrollable sense of possessiveness over women?”

The last sentence made Chen Rui feel a little embarrassed. If he didn’t see the poison dragon’s serious expression, he never wanted to mention the feeling he had toward women. Just before coming here, when he saw a relatively beautiful succubus on the road, he had a strange desire.

“After that, you used this skill again to completely devour the power of the ‘God-Eating Mask’?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui vaguely guessed that Paglio was worried that he could not suppress the power he devoured. Indeed, the Super System also prompted that there was a danger of “overflow”, but now the Star Conversion mode had been activated, there was no need to worry. “However, today the grand master’s thoughts automatically cast a strange ability, which will gradually break down and digest these forces. All of which can gradually be converted into my own strength. It will take about 100 days, and my strength may improve by a huge leap.”

“100 days? The grand master’s thoughts are really fascinating.” The poison dragon nodded, “I hope that my concern is unnecessary.”

Chen Rui saw Paglio’s very serious look and asked, “Paglio, what are you worried about? Just tell me.”

“I was initially afraid that the grand master’s thoughts cannot control the power of a Demon Overlord-level soul and the power of the artifact. After listening to you, I think I was just overthinking.” Paglio groaned. “However, now I am worried about something else. A Demon Overlord’s mental power is very powerful. Even if you erase its sentient soul, it is not what your current soul power can bear, not to mention the power of artifact. Although you have the grand master’s thoughts to break it down and digest it, your power will become stronger, but those instinctual desires will also become stronger. Once it exceeds the range your will can take, then it is likely that your original mind will be obliterated. You either die or become unconscious and become a monster completely controlled by instinct.”

Chen Rui was shocked. He didn’t expect such serious consequences!

The recent anomalies were actually influenced by the power he devoured. After activating the Star Conversion mode, although his powers were enhanced, these strange desires would also increase! This was like what some novels mentioned. The practitioner’s strength and the realm of mind must be coherent. If the power far exceeded the realm of mind, it couldn’t be applied freely. However, the situation Chen Rui was facing now was hundreds of times more dangerous.

The most important thing was that the Star Conversion mode was irreversible. If I don’t solve this problem, I will either die or become an unconscious monster after 100 days!

Don’t simply consume anything or else you will end up like Chen Rui

chapters.title: Chapter 180 - Refined Mind! The Only Way To Live
chapters.body:
Chapter 180 - Refined Mind! The Only Way To Live

Chapter 180: Refined Mind! The Only Way to Live

Chen Rui was anxious and asked, “Paglio! What should I do?”

“Soul power can affect the will. In turn, the soul is also controlled by the will. Even if it’s a Demon Overlord-level soul, as long as you possess an extraordinary will, it overrides the instinctual desires and completely controls the soul. Then, these digested powers will truly be yours and really improve by leaps. It is not impossible to achieve this, but the test you face is too risky. The chance of success is almost zero.”

“Quickly tell me what to do…” Chen Rui asked quickly when he heard that there was hope.

“There is only one way, that is, the training of the mind. You have good qualifications. If you have enough time, you may be able to create miracles, but you have only a hundred days…” The poison dragon sighed and did not continue.

Training of the mind? Chen Rui suddenly thought of the essence of Alioth state, which was <Refined Mind>… His eyes brightened, but how could he train his mind?

Paglio told him that there were generally only two methods, one was to train the mind from “quiet”; the other was to use pressure to cultivate the mind. Each person’s mind was different, so the difficulties encountered in training were also different. It couldn’t be described specifically in words.

In any case, he had to pass this <Refined Mind> challenge. Thinking of Athena who was still asleep, Chen Rui’s conviction had become stronger.

After seeing Chen Rui’s determination, Paglio stopped talking nonsense. He pointed out that his <Fire of Nirvana> had a great effect on the soul aspect, and he should take advantage of it. In addition, if he could truly control the “God-Eating Mask” on his face, he could also greatly increase the success rate of passing the test.

Chen Rui pondered. The Star Eater mode initially prompted an overflow warning, so using Star Conversion mode was a last resort. Although the consequences of using Star Conversion mode in this situation were serious, regretting now was useless. The key was to see if he could pass this challenge. This test was more risky than in the past. According to Paglio’s analysis, the only method was only two steps. First, using <Deep Analysis> to decode the “God-Eating Mask” as much as possible. If he could truly control the artifact, Paglio believed that it would help him overcome this difficulty. Second, start the training of the mind. One hundred days was a very short period of time. The training ground could extend this period many times. It was just that he lost a million auras after activating the Star Conversion mode, and he only had more than 300,000 auras left. Although the storage warehouse still had a lot of aura fruit, if he really wanted to activate training grounds frequently, then these auras were not enough.

Unfortunately, after Glorfin’s death, the crystals covering the minerals had disappeared. They could no longer be used as aura transformation material; there were no more waste ores.

Auras became the most important issue once again.

Chen Rui remembered that Joseph had promised to “use all resources”. He had an idea. It was Royce who was responsible for this. In Joseph’s view, Royce was completely loyal to him, and Vasasha was “Aguile’s” possession. Royce would never let go of his resources easily, but he would never have thought that Royce’s true allegiance was with “Aguile”.

Since Chen Rui could not use any skills because of the <Scorching Dragon Kill>. Dark Moon City was now fully hunting him. It was the safest to stay here until the twenty-four hour recovery period passed.

Chen Rui took out his tent and said, “Paglio, I will rest here first. I will be asleep all day, so protect me.”

Poison dragon didn’t make a joke this time. “Relax. Just in case, I will put Dragon Inscriptions around to cover up the traces of our battle.” Chen Rui nodded and entered the tent. He didn’t sleep, but entered the Super System. On the progress bar on the light screen, the progress of Star Conversion was 1% and <Deep Analysis> was still at 0%. If it was before he came to Blue Lake, he would be proud to see this 1%. Now, this progress bar seemed to be signaling the number of days he could live. According to the Star Conversion’s prompt, the later it was, the more it absorbed, and the “side effects” would become stronger. If he didn’t train his will enough, his soul would be destroyed sooner or later.

Although he could not use any skills at present, the training ground could still be used. At present, he had 320 thousand auras.Chen Rui did not hesitate and spent 100,000 auras. He directly chose the 100 fold time rule. Because his body was in fatigue, he did not select any other environment rules. He intended to try training his mind in the most common environment.

The “Alioth” state he was at currently was <Refined Mind>, but this was only a general direction. There was no specific training method such as the internal martial arts technique. He could not just become stronger by just thinking “I want to get stronger; I want to get stronger”.

In the past, he saw many training methods on the internet. There were a bunch of nouns such as Dantian, Niwan, and Qihai, but even if his memory was far better than before, he couldn’t think of a specific <Refined Mind>> method. Moreover, it was difficult to say whether these mind training methods were real of fake. It would be bad if he went crazy due to the wrong method.

However, according to Paglio, “quiet” was the most basic mind training method. The “movement” method that applied pressure to the external world was actually using external forces to further cultivate mind. Initially, the rumors of Qigong and cultivation from that world generally were based on meditation, so his first step should be to calm down.

He remembered some methods such as five minds facing the sky [1] and eyes looking at the nose, nose looking at the heart, which should not be difficult.

It was the first time Chen Rui tried a pure retreat. He soon found out that he couldn’t “calm down” at all. He previously held onto some kind of faith and goal, fighting against pressure such as gravity or waves. Now it was the opposite; there was no external pressure. Now he was at a loss, he couldn’t “calm down” even if he wanted to.

Chen Rui only knew that the words “having no distractions” were easy to say, but too difficult to accomplish. Both the palms of his hands and feet, the center of his head and the top of his head facing the sky was not just a ridiculous sitting position, but the most awkward position was eyes looking at the nose, nose looking at the heart. He stared at the tip of his nose with his eyes for a long time until he became dizzy, but still couldn’t “see” his “heart”.

I just don’t believe it! Chen Rui tried again and again, but failed again and again. He couldn’t fall asleep in the training ground. Chen Rui simply gave up on the five minds to the sky and lay on the floor, looking at the vast space above his head. He felt powerless and weak. Be “quiet” here for more than three months in this place? I rather go to the N-fold gravity room!

Of course, as the master, Chen Rui could leave the training grounds and waste one day and 100,000 auras at most, but he was unwilling to give up like this. Not to mention, for him, when one day passed, he had one day less.

Counting the start time in the morning, after today, he only had 99 days left. This time was even more terrifying than the previous War Contract. If he couldn’t fulfill the War Contract, he could still seek asylum from Paglio. However, now he could only rely on himself. Besides, he had power, but it was useless in mind cultivation. Chen Rui sighed. Past scenes emerged in his mind. He was just an insignificant otaku from Earth. After being reborn in this world, he changed a lot. Not only his power, but even though he was initially bad at speaking, he had now become a fluent speaker. It was the survival of the fittest; this was life.

The biggest gain was meeting Athena. Chen Rui remembered all his memories with Athena. His face was happy and sad, then he finally regained calmness.

At that moment, in the human body on the status bar, the star chart began to faintly emit light. Chen Rui immediately sensed something. He thought of something, then the light disappeared again.

Chen Rui tried to think about missing Athena again, but this time there was no response. It seemed that Athena was not the cause, but the peaceful state of mind at the end of missing her.

State of mind, mind; this is the true reason for quiet. No wonder it is called “<Refined Mind>.”

Chen Rui seemed to realize that he did not need to intentionally follow some pose or to think about the state he had to reach in a hundred days. He only slowly felt his breathing and relaxed his body. Gradually, he did not even try to feel his breathing. He felt as if he entered a state of tranquility.

Sure enough, the star chart really started to shine, but Chen Rui already stopped paying attention to it. He was just immersed in this kind of watertight tranquility.

He didn’t know how many days had passed. Chen Rui was already able to better grasp this meditation method. This state was not pure silence. In this state of meditation, he meditated about battle training. Then, when he directly carried it out at the training grounds, it felt like it was twice as effective with half the effort. Slowly, he grew accustomed to this quiet state. He would plan time to sit with his eyes closed every day.

Initially, his cultivation was more focused on “training”, but from now on, he actually had the true feeling of “cultivating.”

Of course, calming down was just the beginning of realizing his “mind”.”. He could only slowly explore how to “cultivate”.

After truly meditating, 100 days passed in a blink of an eye. Chen Rui opened his eyes. At this time, it was the night of the next day. He felt that his strength got a little stronger. He looked at the progress of the Star Conversion, it was already at 2%. Getting stronger also meant the “side effects” was getting stronger. If it was Chen Rui before he understood “quiet”, he would surely be very anxious, but now he just frowned slightly. He ate some food from the storage space and fell asleep.

At dawn, Chen Rui woke up and said goodbye to Paglio. He secretly went back to Dark Moon City and arrived at the Arena.

Soon, Royce, Arux, and Vasasha gathered in the room below the arena. “Royce, I urgently need some high-quality magic materials. Does the magic store still have some stocks?”.”

Royce replied respectfully, “Actually, the magic store only contains a small part of Joseph’s resources at hand. Due to the exclusion and struggle in the Red Spirit Estate, Joseph transferred most of his resources to Dark Moon except for a few secret storages. When I was pledging my loyalty to him the night before, he gave me a part of his resources in the magic store. I will get the materials Master needs as soon as possible.”

“You did a good job. Get me some samples first, then I will give you a specific list. However, in order to gain Joseph’s trust, you can report to him by magic messaging and appropriately exaggerate my forceful attitude. Before obtaining the devil fruit, I believe that Joseph will not be stingy…”

Royce nodded. He hesitated a little and stuttered, “There is one more thing I have to report to Master. I have gotten the secret clue that was sealed by my father using a secret bloodline technique inside Vasasha’s body…”

“Oh…” Chen Rui froze, and then showed a teasing smile. He looked at Vasasha. Vasasha, who had always been cold, looked uncharacteristically embarrassed and lowered her head.

[1] It was a meditation pose for cultivating internal martial arts. 心 represents heart, mind and center. Therefore, the five minds here are two palms, two feet (sitting with leg crossed) and forehead facing the sky.

A secret in Vashasha’s body? Could it be the most sacred place of woman?

chapters.title: Chapter 181 - Secret Treasure
chapters.body:
Chapter 181 - Secret Treasure

Chapter 181: Secret Treasure

The reason why Royce’s father, Khan, was killed by the Red Spirit Lord, Josh back then was because of this secret treasure. As the illegitimate son, Ledo exposed the secret, Josh wanted to take the item but failed. Therefore, he killed Khan and destroyed the Kunda Family. The whereabouts of the secret treasure also disappeared along the way with no traces left.

In fact, the secret treasure’s clue was sealed into his son’s fiancée, Vasasha’s body by Khan with a secret bloodline technique. The condition for learning the clue was to “combine” Royce and Vasasha. Other than Royce, other men couldn’t find out even if they had sex with Vasasha. This secret was only known by Royce, not even Vasasha herself.

Now that Royce said that the clues of the secret treasure were acquired, it meant that Royce and Vasasha had completed a certain life event. That was why Chen Rui deliberately gave a mocking smile.

“This secret treasure is buried somewhere in the Red Spirit Estate, but the trouble is that I need to open it with my bloodline secret technique. I can’t leave for now. After Joseph obtains the devil fruit, he will leave for a while and concentrate on training to breakthrough the bottleneck. During that time, I will rush to Red Spirit Estate to get the secret treasure for Master.”

The three of them were all Chen Rui’s servants. Moreover, when Royce signed the master-slave contract, he said that he would offer the secret treasure. Thus, Chen Rui didn’t reject in a hypocritical manner, but asked, “What is this secret treasure? Why was your father unwilling to surrender?”

“This secret treasure is a necklace called the Evil Blue Tear. It was the top secret treasure of the Breeze Shadow Empire’s Belphegor Royal Family beside the Breeze Shadow Boots. Thousands of years ago, after the Breeze Shadow Empire was destroyed by the Illusive Demon Empire, the Evil Blue Tear was lost. After a few twists and turns, it fell into my father, Khan’s hands by accident.”

The Evil Blue Tear turned out to be the top secret treasure under the Belphegor Royal Family after the artifact, Breeze Shadow Boots! In other words, it was the lost treasure of Roman’s Sloth Royal Family. Chen Rui thought of Roman and asked curiously, “What’s with the Illusive Demon Empire?”

“The Illusive Demon Empire was an empire established by the Leviathan Royal Family, named after the artifact, Illusive Demon Shield. The original 7 empires in the Demon Realm are named after artifacts, just like our Fallen Angel Empire used “Sword of Fallen Angel” as our name. About 9,000 years ago, the Leviathan Royal Family conquered the Breeze Shadow Empire and the Belphegor Royal Family disappeared subsequently. However, after 3000 years, the Illusive Demon Empire of the Leviathan Royal Family was again conquered by the Bloody Empire. After so many years, the 7 empires established by the ancestors of the 7 royal families have only 3 left.”

It turned out that there were such grudges between the Leviathan Royal Family and Belphegor Royal Family. Chen Rui suddenly thought of Delia and Roman. They were born in rival royal families, and they actually became lovers. However, the grudges of the two empires were thousands of years ago. Everything was gone now, so there wasn’t the need to bother.

Chen Rui was also curious about the artifacts of the 7 royal families. The artifacts that he knew now were the Sword of Fallen Angel of the Lucifer Royal Family, the Dark Shadow Cape of the Asmodeus Royal Family, the Illusive Demon Shield of the Leviathan Royal Family, the God-Eating Mask of the Beelzebub Royal Family and Breeze Shadow Boots of the Belphegor Royal Family. The five pieces of equipment were different. Together with the other two artifacts of the royal families, it seemed that they could be combined into a complete set of equipment.

Chen Rui was about to ask questions regarding the artifacts of the other two royal families when he heard Royce continued to talk about the secret treasure, “This secret treasure is very magical as it can greatly enhance spirit in a short time. It can even hide the breath on the body so that others cannot see through your true strength. Yet, these are just its normal functions.”

If it can be activated by Belphegor Royal Family’s blood, then it can exert its truly strong ability! It was said that after activation, the bloodline talent, <The Eye of Evil> of the Belphegor Royal Family could be greatly enhanced. They could also rely on the <The Eye of Evil> to encourage the mutation of ordinary demons. Yet, this mutation had a huge side effect that greatly reduces the recipient’s lifespan and the effect was far inferior from the devil fruit. It is mainly for the benefit of the next generation. Nevertheless, this secret treasure that can change the bloodline strength still has a fatal temptation to demons that aren’t part of the royal family…”

Chen Rui nodded, “So the Evil Blue Tear has such function. However, speaking of this… what about your devil fruit? Why is your strength still not growing?”

Royce froze. Chen Rui recalled that he had given the fruit to Arux back then. Then, he glanced at Vasasha, who was a little nervous and smiled, “I guess you gave it to her.”

“Sorry, I didn’t get your permission.” As soon as Royce had finished speaking, he saw another devil fruit in Chen Rui’s hands.

“Take this and you must eat it yourself. Don’t give it to other people!” Chen Rui laughed, “Unfortunately, that single horn on Paglio’s head is about to become bald. He can’t squeeze any Jade Pearl out anymore. Otherwise, I would’ve given it to you guys.”

Royce was excited: This isn’t a wild fruit but a treasure rare enough to wage wars! Although master may have devil fruits with him, everyone knows the yield and mature time of the fruit. Even if master has some, they are few in number. Master once exchange the devil fruit with Joseph for the Obsidian Heart and Vasasha. Yet, he still gives me another one unconditionally. In fact, this is the second one!

Not only that, more importantly, Chen Rui brought Vasasha’s body and heart back to him. Other than following faithfully and giving his full-hearted efforts, Royce couldn’t think of other ways to repay Chen Rui’s kindness.

Arux and Vasasha felt the same way.

Chen Rui saw Royce’s excited look and said, “That’s it. Stop daydreaming. Bring me the magic materials’ samples quickly as I need them urgently. Also, for the Evil Blue Tear, you should head to the Red Spirit Estate as soon as Joseph left. That item might have a great function for me.”

The greatest function of the Evil Blue Tear was to enhance <The Eye of Evil>, which requires the blood of the Belphegor Royal Family to activate. Chen Rui obviously had no use of that function as he had <Camouflage>, and the function of hiding breath was useless too; what he needed was the ability to greatly improve his spirit because <Deep Analysis> needed spirit the most. With the Evil Blue Tear, he believed that the progress of decoding the “God-Eating Mask” would greatly increase.

When Royce heard that, he left immediately and soon brought a space bracelet with samples of magic materials back. These materials were really high grade. Many could be converted into aura. Chen Rui made a list, added some irrelevant materials and then asked him to contact Joseph.

Unsurprisingly, Joseph was surprised when he saw the quantities of materials that “Aguile” was asking for. However, the devil fruit was too important for him. Now that he was asking for help, he had to submit, so he asked Royce to follow suit.

Royce deliberately said that he managed to “reduce” a considerable portion of the materials. Joseph indeed didn’t suspect and complemented Royce instead. However, Joseph didn’t know that those were just materials that couldn’t be converted.

As the security was quite tight, Chen Rui had been training in a secret room at the arena’s basement usually. Vasasha would take care of his diet while Arux maintained the normal operation of the arena to avoid suspicions.

Another 2 days had passed. Vasasha reported the news from Royce that Joseph had finally returned. He asked to meet with “Aguile” at the agreed venue.

Chen Rui thought for a moment before he left Vasasha at the arena and went to the northern suburbs for his appointment. As Vasasha and Royce got back together, her spiritual level had changed a lot. Also, after consuming the devil fruit, her strength was greatly improved. With Joseph’s intelligence, he would likely see through. For this reason, Royce was cautious that he hadn’t consumed the devil fruit for the time being.

In the northern part of Black Mountain, Joseph brought someone and were both waiting for “Aguile’s” arrival.

This man was old; he had white hair and beard; he had a slender build; he was holding a cane in his hand. He looked like an old man in his late years. However, in the Red Spirit Estate, no one except the Red Spirit Lord and a few people dared to disrespect this old man called Flandy.

Flandy was Joseph’s strongest supporter, an elder of the Red Spirit Estate and a powerhouse at the peak of Demon King. He also had an unusual identity: Leviathan Royal Family. Flandy Leviathan!

The Illusive Demon Empire had been destroyed for many years. Leviathan Royal Family had since scattered around. 300 ago, Flandy was rescued by Red Spirit Lord, Josh when he was dying. In return, Flandy volunteered to assist Josh. Generally speaking, the royal families had their own dignity and pride. Even if the royal family was in dire situation, they would still choose to follow other royal families. Therefore, situations where they follow ordinary demons were rare.

Josh gave Flandy a great deal of respect, so he was granted the title of elder in the Red Spirit Estate and enjoyed the treatment of as an honored guest. When Flandy came to Red Spirit Estate, Joseph was only around 10, but he had already started scheming. He began to please Flandy deliberately and got his favor. Later, when Kanita grew up and fought against Joseph for the successor’s place, Flandy stood on Joseph’s side without hesitation. He became the most solid backing.

The devil fruit was very important to Joseph, so he invited Flandy to come along this time when he went back to the Red Spirit. One of the reasons was to avoid changes and the other was to further confirm the identity of this Beelzebub heir. The collaboration with “Aguile” was very important, so Joseph didn’t want to take any risk.

They waited for a while, but they still didn’t see Aguile around. When Joseph was frowning, Flandy suddenly looked up to the sky alertly. He saw a small black spot gradually getting bigger in the sky.

Joseph also saw it. It was a wyvern. The wyvern found the two, hissed and flew toward them quickly.

There was someone standing on the wyvern’s back, wearing a cloak and a mask. It was “Aguile”.

The wyvern landed very quickly. This wyvern had no saddles, so “Aguile’s” beast-taming skills must be exceptional. Yet, what surprised Joseph and Flandy most was the strength of the wyvern.

The peak of Demon King!

The strongest Demon King-level wyvern! Putting him into any wyvern’s lair, this mutated wyvern would probably become the ruler. Unexpectedly, it was actually just “Aguile’s” mount!

The strength of demonic beasts was stronger than ordinary demons at the same level. Even if Flandy was a royal family member, he didn’t have much confidence in defeating this wyvern.

“Aguile’s” personal strength definitely hadn’t reached the peak of Demon King. For him to mount such a powerful demonic beast, it wouldn’t be possible no matter how good his beast taming skill was. This wyvern must be tamed by other Belphegor Royal Family’s another powerhouse before giving it to “Aguile”.

Chen Rui jumped down from the wyvern and pointed to the back. The wyvern nodded and stepped back obediently. That action startled Joseph again as such beast-taming skill was at least 10 times better than him!

Would the meeting turn out to be a fight?

chapters.title: Chapter 182 - Obsidian Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 182 - Obsidian Heart

Chen Rui made an intimidating appearance. His eyes glanced over Flandy that was next to Joseph and a husky laugh came behind the mask, “My friend, we meet again.”

Joseph soon recovered from the shock brought by the wyvern and laughed, “Glad to see you again, my friend.”

“Are you not going to introduce the later stage Demon King beside you… Leviathan Royal Family?” Chen Rui glanced at Flandy.

Race: Leviathan. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C+.

Joseph and Flandy’s eyes looked shocked at the same time. Flandy was surprised that his strength was easily seen through; while Joseph was surprised at the level of intelligence control of “Aguile” on the Red Spirit Estate. There were very few people who knew that Flandy was a Leviathan Royal Family even among the entire upper level of Red Spirit.

No one would have thought that “Aguile” was just bluffing with what was shown by the <Analytical Eyes>.

Joseph felt that “Aguile” was even more unfathomable and smiled slightly, “It seems that nothing can be hidden from you, my friend. This is Sir Flandy Leviathan, one of the three elders of Red Spirit Estate. If it weren’t for sir’s support and help all this while, I’ll probably be defeated by Kanita already.”

Chen Rui nodded slightly toward Flandy to express his respect. Flandy’s eyes were fixed on Aguile’s mask while he spoke with a slight arrogance in his tone, “Excuse me for my poor eyesight, is the mask that Mr. Aguile wearing the “God-Eating Mask”, 1 of the 7 artifacts?

“To be precise, it’s the completely restored God-Eating Mask, but unfortunately, I still can’t use it freely.” Chen Rui replied.

“Really? I’m actually really curious about the legendary artifact.” As Flandy said, Chen Rui felt that his right eye looked different as the blue iris gradually became black.

It wasn’t Chen Rui’s first time encountering such change. It was Leviathan Royal Family’s bloodline talent, <The Eye of Incubus>!

Precisely, Flandy’s strength might be greater than Delia, but the strength of bloodline talent relied more on personal talent. His <The Eye of Incubus> was inferior to Delia; it was totally incomparable to Broc’s level.

Now, Chen Rui was no longer the “Higher Demon” who could only passively rely on the Super System after being invaded by <The Eye of Incubus>. Although passively using the Super System’s conversion could increase aura, Flandy’s objective shouldn’t be to have an fall out but to test. Chen Rui thought and let his eyes faced <The Eye of Incubus> while secretly activated the Star Devouring mode.

Flandy’s <The Eye of Incubus> entered the consciousness of “Aguile” without any obstruction. He felt strange because even the weakest opponent had certain mental resistance. However, as soon as he entered the opponent’s consciousness, he felt a terrible devouring force coming toward him. The power of <The Eye of Incubus> couldn’t rival at all. It was devoured madly like it was facing a tide.

After Flandy was shocked, he couldn’t bother about the rebound and withdrawn <The Eye of Incubus> at full force. Previously, Glorfin had the intention of “walk-in”. His soul completely entered Chen Rui’s consciousness, so he couldn’t escape. Flandy only exerted some spiritual attack, so he finally got rid of that horrifying devouring force after using all his strength. However, the rebound against himself wasn’t small. He almost couldn’t withstand it.

From Joseph’s perspective, the “confrontation” between the two was just a few blinks of an eye. Then, he saw Flandy snorted and covered his eyes while a stream of blood flowed between his fingers. Joseph was taken aback. He didn’t expect Flandy, who was at the peak of Demon King would lose so quickly, and he even suffered a huge loss. It seemed that Aguile’s true strength was beyond imagination. If they really had a fall out that night, he might not stay alive.

The wyvern seemed to feel that “Aguile” was threatened, so it hissed furiously. As it wanted to attack, “Aguile” gestured it instead, it calmed down obediently without any resistance. Joseph was shocked again. He felt that this cloaked man before him became more and more inscrutable. However, he didn’t know that these actions were all instructed by Chen Rui telepathically toward the wyvern.

Originally, if there was only Joseph alone, making him a puppet with the “God-Eating Mask” after subduing him was the best solution. Yet, Joseph was also very cautious and brought Flandy along.

Although Flandy’s <The Eye of Incubus> was greatly damaged, his personal strength remained. Even if Chen Rui partnered with the wyvern, he wasn’t 100% sure to subdue these two individuals. Besides, he had now successfully started the first step of being a spy. If this plan was successful, not only the Dark Moon Estate but even Red Spirit Estate might face huge changes. At present, it was inappropriate to alarm anyone for the time being.

Chen Rui said calmly, “I’m sorry, Sir Flandy. I said that I can’t completely control the artifact’s power yet, so I hurt you by mistake.”

Flandy panted slightly, but he had already calmed down. He sighed, “It’s my fault, I hope you can forgive me. The Beelzebub’s devouring power is really worthy of its name. I think you must’ve reserved some strength. If the “God-Eating Mask” was activated fully, I’m afraid my old bones will be buried here.”

Flandy’s tone had completely lost his previous Tyrant tone. It was a world where strength dominated. Those who had strength would be respected. Chen Rui’s tone became even more cold, “Mr. Joseph, it seems to me that you’re still having doubts over my identity and sincerity. Do I need to perform my earth magic and demonic flies power for you to see?”

Joseph heard that Chen Rui emphasized the word “performance” and he knew that Aguile was very dissatisfied, so he quickly said, “You are over worrying, my friend. Our cooperation has begun a few days ago. There’s no need to prove anything. Sir Flandy was excited when he saw the treasure, so he wanted to witness the power of artifacts. You can think of this as a harmless joke between allies. By the way, is Vasasha satisfying you? What about those magical materials?”

Chen Rui knew that Joseph was deliberately pleasing him, so he said, “Vasasha isn’t bad. After being trained by me, she has become a very obedient servant. She will live well before I get bored. However, that Royce is too stingy as the materials that you promised me were reduced for various reasons. I hope this is the last time.”

Joseph knew this all along. He praised Royce for doing a good job. He replied, “Royce is the person-in-charge of the magic store, so he’s quite stubborn. Please forgive me. In the future, I will let him try to meet your requirements. I have brought the Obsidian Heart that you need and I’ve also sent people to scout for the requiem fruit’s whereabouts. Now… I hope to see your sincerity.”

Chen Rui opened his palm and a lychee-sized fruit appeared. Joseph’s eyes suddenly brightened. Chen Rui waved his hand and a force wrapped around the devil fruit. It then slowly flew toward Joseph and landed on his hand.

Seeing that Aguile gave the fruit to him directly, Joseph was startled. His eyes looked odd involuntarily. However, his attention was attracted by the devil fruit immediately. He couldn’t restrain the excitement in his heart because this fruit would be his key to step into Demon King level or even higher levels.

Although the devil fruit wasn’t effective for the royal family, it was no less precious than some royal treasures, so Flandy also looked surprised. Joseph recovered from his startled, carefully kept the devil fruit and took out a palm-sized gem from his space ring.

That gem looked exquisite. It exuded waves of powerful fire power. Even at Chen Rui’s distance, he could feel the heat. Judging from the appearance and the fire power, it should be the Obsidian Heart. Joseph didn’t break his promise and gave Chen Rui the Obsidian Heart. Although he didn’t want to give the Obsidian Heart away, compared with the huge benefits obtained through cooperation between them, losing an Obsidian Heart was really nothing.

Chen Rui was also very excited to acquire the Obsidian Heart. He immediately kept it into his storage. He looked indifferent and said, “If you have any information about the requiem fruit, please remember to inform me. Our cooperation has started well. I believe in the future, it’ll bring more surprises to both of us.”

Joseph smiled, “Yes, my friend. Now… shall we find a place to celebrate?”

“No thanks.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Now, I’m wanted by the entire Dark Moon Estate. I believe this matter will soon reach the capital. However, this is all expected by my Beelzebub Royal Family and it’s good for the plan. As an ally, I can reveal a message to you which is that the king of my people, Glorfin is training his great territory power somewhere in the Fallen Angel Empire. It’s almost complete. As the heir to the royal family recognized by the artifact, I was asked to gain complete control of the “God-Eating Mask” as soon as possible. Therefore, I’ll leave Dark Moon and find a safe place to train secretly for a while. Similarly, you should use and digest the power of devil fruit as soon as possible.”

Joseph and Flandy were both surprised. Glorfin himself was training secretly in the Fallen Angel Empire!

Chen Rui didn’t waste any time. He mounted on the wyvern and flew away, but he left some words before leaving.

“My friend, when my next seal is lifted, I hope you will continue to be qualified to have an equal conversation with me.”

After he watched “Aguile” leave, Flandy frowned and said, “This person’s strength is extraordinary. Even his consciousness contains horrifying devouring force, together with the “God-Eating Mask”, his identity as the Beelzebub Royal Family is beyond doubt. If what he said is true, then sooner or later, the Fallen Angel Empire will change dramatically. Our cooperation with the Beelzebub Royal Family in advance is a very wise decision.”

Joseph nodded. Thinking of the word “Aguile” said before leaving, Joseph’s eyes lit up and he said, “Since this is the case, I’ll immediately arrange the affairs in the Dark Moon and rush back to the Red Spirit Estate. I’ll find a place to eat the devil fruit and train secretly to strive to break through the bottleneck as soon as possible.”

After Joseph quickly returned to the city to arrange his affairs and set off for Red Spirit, Chen Rui also took away a batch of aura materials from Royce and left his 3 servants a few orders. Then, he said goodbye to the poison dragon in a hurry before riding the wyvern toward Mountain Xilang.

I’ve obtained the Obsidian Heart. Athena should be able to wake up soon!

chapters.title: Chapter 183 - Elemental Heart! The King’S Last Entrustment
chapters.body:
Chapter 183 - Elemental Heart! The King’S Last Entrustment

Chapter 183: Elemental Heart! The King’s Last Entrustment

Chen Rui flew day and night at high speed, and finally rushed to Mountain Xilang. At that time, the progress of Star Conversion had become 6%. He had no time to enter the training ground on the road. When there was moonlight every night, the uncomfortable feeling would become more obvious. Yet, all these became insignificant compared to his heart to return.

Chen Rui asked the wyvern to search and reunite with his comrades in the mountains while he avoided the bandits to go into the main pit. With the help of the magic compass, he quickly found the entrance to the lower floor. Then, passing through the enchantment destroyed by the Earth Elemental King, he came to the familiar underground world.

The Earth Palace in the Tauren’s Lair had been moved back to the original place by the earth elementals. In the King’s Chamber, the Earth Elemental King was sitting on the ground with his eyes closed. He used his earth power to continuously support Athena on the platform.

At that moment, Tag entered the King’s Chamber and reported, “My great king, our human friend, Chen Rui has arrived at the Earth Realm. He is currently outside of the Earth Palace, requesting to meet Your Highness.”

The Earth Elemental King’s eyes opened, “Quickly invite him in.”

Chen Rui walked into the Earth Palace and bowed toward the Earth Elemental King with his arms crossed, “Respected King, sorry for disturbing.”

On the platform, Athena was asleep quietly. Seeing that peaceful and beautiful face, Chen Rui felt that his heart became much more peaceful too.

“Chen Rui, no need to be so polite. A friend’s visit can’t be regarded as interruption at any time.” The Earth Elemental King saw his eyes staring at Athena and laughed, “Relax, Athena’s condition is very good. For you to come back this time, do you already know the whereabouts of the Obsidian Heart?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui took the Obsidian Heart out from his storage, “I got the Obsidian Heart from an enemy with a scheme in a coincidental chance. Unfortunately, he didn’t have any news about the requiem fruit. Your Royal Highness, please rest assured that I will fulfill my promise to find the requiem fruit as soon as possible and completely repair the elemental heart.”

“The earth elementals never doubts friends. Not to mention that with the refined magic dust and magical fruits that you provided, I can live for at least ten more years.” The Earth Elemental King took over the Obsidian Heart. The Obsidian Heart glowed a blinding light in his hands. The outer crystal shell melted and turned into a warm, non-scorching flame that went toward Athena on the stone platform.

Athena’s entire body was wrapped in flames, but she was unharmed. Instead, she seemed to be absorbing the flames’ power. Gradually, the flames were all absorbed into her body and the surface of her body began to glow in red.

The Earth Elemental withdrew his earth power and said, “The Obsidian Heart is quite effective. She doesn’t need my support now. After 10 days, she’ll complete the transformation and wake up safely.”

I can see Athena in 10 days! Chen Rui was overjoyed and thanked the king quickly. There was a faint white light in Earth Elemental King’s eyes that seemed to be scanning the mask on Chen Rui’s face that had fully restored, “My friend, Athena has not much of a problem now, but your problem… I wonder if you’ve noticed it?”

Chen Rui was stunned. He recalled that after he devoured Glorfin’s soul, the Earth Elemental King once warned him that the Demon Overlord’s consciousness wasn’t that simple. At that time, he was worried about Athena, so he didn’t keep that in mind. Now that he heard the Earth Elemental King mentioned it again, he suddenly realized it.

“Dear King, I was about to ask you something. When I went back to the Dark Moon City this time, the “God-Eating Mask” was restored in a coincidence, and it also released extremely powerful force. When consciousness was about to collapse, I could only exert the devouring ability again to devour the power of artifact.”

The Earth Elemental King’s voice was full of surprises, “You even devoured the power of artifact!”

Chen Rui knew that the Earth Elemental King had a vast inheritance knowledge, so he immediately elaborated on the details of the “Star Conversion” ability. He also told him the suggestion of the poison dragon, Paglio.

“It turned out that you still have a powerful dragon companion who is sealed. I guess you already know your dangerous situation.” Earth Elemental King was slightly surprised, “Previously, Glorfin’s soul was greatly damaged as I sacrificed my elemental heart and his mask was forcefully knocked off by Athena, so his soul was weakened; it wasn’t a Demon Overlord’s consciousness at full strength. If you can manage to control the mask on your face, it is not impossible to truly defeat the Glorfin’s soul that has lost its sense of self.”

“Controlling the “God-Eating Mask” requires a lot of mind power. My mind power isn’t enough to use it smoothly. I have a friend who has gone to get a secret treasure. If I can get it, it will help to a certain degree. It’s just that now…”

Chen Rui tried <Deep Analysis> in the past few days。 He had improved the decoding progress of the “God-Eating Mask” to 3%. However, due to his limited mind power, he couldn’t continuously perform <Deep Analysis>. It could only be used once a day to avoid side effects of exhaustion. His only hope now was the Evil Blue Tear that Royce was looking for at the Red Spirit Estate. Otherwise, the progress of decoding the God-Eating Mask would be slower than the progress of Star Conversion. It would still be game over that way.

The Earth Elemental King was silent for a long time. Then, he issued a summon order and asked Chen Rui a strange question, “Can I trust you completely? My friend.”

“Of course, it’s like how I trust the earth elementals without reservation.” Chen Rui was very grateful for the guidance of the Earth Elemental King and bowed. The earth elementals had a clear personality. They hated the enemy, but were nice toward friends, so they were a race that was worth being friends with. He had gotten Obsidian Heart, and Athena was about to wake up. The next thing was to find requiem fruit and return the king’s help.

The Earth Elemental King nodded and continued, “We, the elementals are actually will of life condensed by using the power of nature and our challenge is exactly the power of the mind. Although Glorfin’s soul was far better than mine, if there was no artifact, he couldn’t occupy my consciousness even if he had the <Earth Mastery> talent.”

Chen Rui nodded secretly. Due to his birth time, the strength of the Earth Elemental King was weaker than that Glorfin. However, after Glorfin relied on the power of the artifact, coupled with his territory that spread across the underground world and the strange power that absorbed the fountain of life, he still couldn’t fully control the Earth Elemental King. The tug-of-war between them continued for a full 400 years. In the end, the Earth Elemental King could still sacrifice his elemental heart, so his willpower was truly extraordinary.

The Earth Elemental King went on to talk about some key points of mind training. At that time, two elite earth elementals, Tag and Sog appeared with a bunch of earth elementals at the Earth Palace.

“My friend, I will entrust you with my elemental heart.” The Earth Elemental King solemnly stated a decision Chen Rui didn’t expect, “Only the elemental kings have the elemental heart, so it’ll bring you unexpected benefits. Yet, for you, the 2 most important effects now are first, it greatly enhance your spirits to help you control the “God-Eating Mask”; second, it can help your mind training. It’ll be easier for you to obtain an enlightenment of the mind. You have to remember a sentence. The power of the mind is infinite. As long as you have persistence, you can override everything.”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “What will happen if Your Royal Highness lost your elemental heart?”

“I will fall into a coma and I must be immersed in the fountain of life. Also, the earth elemental heart can only live for a year after leaving the body. I hope you will find the requiem fruit after this challenge. Pour the juice on the elemental heart will fix my heart. I do this to help you but at the same time, it is also to help myself. As long as you are alive, you can help me obtain the requiem fruit that can fix the elemental heart.”

As the Earth Elemental King spoke, a fluorescent light appeared in his hand and a bead wrapped with white light appeared in his hand. The bead was covered with cracks, but it didn’t break apart as if it was being stuck by “glue”. Yet, it was only sticking, not repairing the cracks.

“Within one year, as long as you give me the complete earth elemental heart, I will be resurrected. If it’s longer than a year, whether it is repaired, I will truly die with the elemental heart. However, you don’t have to worry. Elements are part of nature. Our life and death are nothing more than a transformation of the existing form. In any case, it’s nice to know you, my friend. Remember, my name is Moore.”

As soon as the Earth Elemental King Moore finished speaking, the white bead slowly flew toward Chen Rui’s hands. Subsequently, Moore’s body began to freeze and soon became a cold statue. The surrounding earth elementals looked sad. They had all knelt down.

Chen Rui looked at the Earth Elemental King that lost his life and fell on one knee too. Moore said very clearly that it was done for the repair of earth elemental heart. However, the unreserved trust was by no means the word interest could represent.

In the face of such trust, words were useless. Only actions were the best proof.

The earth elementals were highly obedience toward their king. They weren’t dissatisfied with Chen Rui because of the elemental king’s death. Instead, they respected this friend who had the friendship and trust of the king.

The earth elemental heart that Chen Rui obtained had a miraculous effect. Just holding it in his hand made him felt especially calm. He believed that with the improvement of his mind training, it would play a more significant role.

As Moore said, his mind had also been greatly enhanced. At this level, it was more than enough for him to use <Deep Analysis> twice a day. If combined with the effect of the Evil Blue Tear brought by Royce, it might increase by one more.

The wonders of the earth elemental heart were far more than that. According to the two elite earth elementals, Tag and Sog, Chen Rui’s earth magic defense had already reached a high level. Moreover, he could cast a certain amount of earth magic without any assistance.

Chen Rui gave it a try. He really was able to cast the supportive skill, <Stone Skin>. Besides, he didn’t even have to chant a spell. Now that he had the “God-Eating Mask”, together with <Earth Mastery>, he really seemed a bit like one of the Beelzebub Royal Family.

Thinking of the fountain of life and Earth Source, Chen Rui suddenly had an idea and tried to transplant the earth elemental heart to the Star Garden, and he was actually able to plant itsuccessfully. Prompt: “Unknown species, it will cost aura 100,000.” Although aura was limited now, he didn’t hesitate to confirm.

The moment the earth elemental heart entered the galaxy garden, the pivotal fairy immediately sensed it. She sent out a thick mist and kept the earth elemental heart into the small tree below her. The small tree suddenly had a “fruit” that emitted a faint white light. The power of the white light spread across the entire Star Garden. There were bits of flashing light in the mist now, as if it was a beautiful and ethereal galaxy.

A bigger surprise was at the back, the system prompted: “Under the influence of unknown source, the output of all plants in the Star Garden triples and the quality increases by one level.”

It seems that the Earth Elemental King, Moore gave an amazing gift!

Another powerful item obtained. Could Chen Rui have the time to resurrect Earth Elemental King and focus on Star Conversion?

chapters.title: Chapter 184 - Deep Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 184 - Deep Sea

Chapter 184: Deep Sea

Chen Rui was overjoyed: The output of the galaxy garden increases by three-folds! It also increases quality! This is indeed the heart of the elemental king that possesses the Earth Power!

What’s even more amazing was that, just like aura gathering flower planted in the garden, the earth elemental heart could also manifest corresponding functions when it’s in the galaxy garden, such as increasing willpower, assisting mind training, <Earth Mastery> and so on.

When Chen Rui’s eyes fell onto the fruit-like earth elemental heart on the small tree, a prompt appeared again, “Damaged unknown source; unknown repair conditions.” It seemed that it was still necessary to find the requiem fruit to repair.

The effect of the earth elemental heart is truly amazing. Unfortunately, I can only use it for a year. It’ll be nice if I can find a way to extend that. Then, I can take it for myself instead of returning it to the Earth Elemental King.

After Chen Rui had a selfish desire, he suddenly reflected: Moore has been exhausting his strength to protect Athena. He even entrusted me with his elemental heart with so much faith. How can I have such a mean idea of being ungrateful?

That’s right. It must be the negative impact of the Star Conversion. This effect is becoming more and more obvious. It seems that I have to hurry to train my mind.

The Earth Elemental King, Moore’s statue had been moved into the fountain of life by the earth elementals. There was still 10 days before Athena woke up. Thus, Chen Rui sat on the ground in the Earth Palace and entered the Super System.

During the few days in the Dark Moon City, Chen Rui was able to calm down in the training ground and even calm his mind to meditate. The Earth Elemental King said that the calm mind was only the most basic step. Next, he must further refine this state of mind in a harsh environment.

Chen Rui thought for a while and decided to choose a setting that he hadn’t tried before: deep sea.

After confirming on 100-folds time and the deep sea scene, Chen Rui was already immersed in the seawater. He was suddenly breathless. He was taken aback. He originally thought that he would start from the surface and dive in, but unexpectedly, it began in the deep sea. At that moment, Chen Rui felt that his body had undergone some changes, mainly at his cheeks, as if he could breathe and swim like fish. The feeling was wonderful.

However, the wonderful feeling lasted only for a moment. Chen Rui felt that the water pressure around him was very heavy, especially on his eyes and the internal organs. It was very uncomfortable. This feeling was completely different from the gravity rule as it was the pressure from all directions, leaving him no room to escape. Compared with the monstrous dynamics of the surfy sea, the deep sea was as calm as a mirror, but it was more dangerous than ever.

Water pressure was quite a terrifying weapon. For example, in the sea abyss 10,000 meters deep, small fishes and shrimps that were a few centimeters in length bore the pressure of nearly 1 ton. If it was a tank, it would be flattened already.

The reason that deep-sea fish could withstand the pressure was that their physiology had evolved adaptively where their bones become very thin and easily bent; their muscle tissue became particularly flexible and the fibrous tissue became surprisingly dense. What’s more interesting was that the fish skin tissue became a very thin layer of membrane, which could fill the fish body with water to maintain the balance of the internal and external pressure.

Once the internal and external pressure was out of balance, the internal organs would be destroyed. When Chen Rui entered the training mode, only the function of underwater breathing was changed. There was no evolutionary adaptation similar to the deep-sea creatures. Otherwise, it wouldn’t be training but a tour in the deep-sea.

It was precisely because there was no such transformation that Chen Rui’s internal organs felt a strong pressure. He moved upward for a while and he surely felt the pressure around him became weaker. The higher he went, the weaker the pressure and vice versa, so there was freedom to adjust. Chen Rui chose a depth that he could tolerate and put himself in a sitting position in the water before trying to enter a “quiet” state of mind.

In the several previous trainings and the peaceful environment in the water, he soon entered a very comfortable “quiet” mood. However, this pressure was obviously not enough, so Chen Rui controlled his body to gradually sink. He felt that the surrounding pressure gradually increased. At first, it was okay. After that, he had to circulate his Star Power to resist the pressure while maintaining a quiet mind.

Chen Rui had now faintly understood that the Galaxy Divinity Temple and the solar system should be a separate spiritual space. If he died in the training ground, the result was likely to directly feedback into the actual brain, causing the nerves of the brain to stop all activities and cause an actual death. Therefore, he shouldn’t risk it.

Due to the heavy pressure around him, most of his attention was focused on resisting it. It was difficult for him to truly calm down for a while.

I remember a famous saying in Jin Yong’s wuxia novel [1], “Let the pressure and the wind be strong while one just controls his breathing [1]”. This phrase seems very true, but it’s very hard to practice. If I let it be “strong”, my internal organs will collapse. How do I still control my breath?

Chen Rui couldn’t help but be a little agitated. He could only try to use the old method. Past memories flashed in his mind, including Athena who he missed to try to return to the calm state. As the past reappeared in front of his eyes, just like how many people recalled their past, as a bystander, he felt that the protagonist in the “movie” was stupid. People always complained that there was no second chance. However, would things actually change when we had a second chance? If he could do it again, would he still risk his life to teleport with Broc at the Silent Night Wetland? Would he still go to kill Ross again in Town Leia? Would Athena still burn her life for him?

The answer is certain. Regardless of how it changes, even if I’m reborn to another world, even if it relive again, some things will never change. I am still me.

Chen Rui seemed to realize something and the pressure around him seemed to have weakened a lot. His mind began to relax. He seemed to have grasped the faint feeling of “not moved by any foreign matter”. Gradually, he entered a familiar state of meditation again.

The bits of white light emitted by the earth elemental heart within the mist of the galaxy garden became brighter. At the same time, the star chart in the body of the status bar at the Galaxy Divinity Temple also emitted a corresponding light. The planets’ details that were initially ambiguous had become clear.

In the underground world, one couldn’t see the two moons outside. He could only judge the time based on the change of color of some special types of rocks.

Tag and Sog were at the entrance of Earth Palace, looking at Chen Rui sitting motionlessly at a distance.

“Sog, do you feel a change in Earth Power?”

Sog nodded, “Of course. I never thought Chen Rui’s breath was enough to spur the Earth Power. It should be the effect of the king’s elemental heart.”

Tag hesitated for a moment and said, “Although he is only a Demon King, somehow, I always feel a little disturbed, especially when he is masked and motionless.”

“Perhaps it’s an illusion, but I often notice the breath from him is kind of similar to when the king was occupied by Glorfin…”

Sog asked, “You’re worried that he’ll become the second Glorfin?”

“Yes.” Tag’s eyes are full of seriousness. “Chen Rui’s power is really magical. If he reaches the Demon Overlord level, he may be more terrifying than Glorfin. If he truly becomes a slave of the mask, then even if the king is resurrected, he won’t be able to rival.”

Sog stared at Tag’s eyes and said, “So, do you want to fix this scourge in advance now?”

“The elemental heart is still with him. Also, he is the only hope for the resurrection of the king. How can we hurt him?”

Sog shook his head, “I know you are loyal to the king, but your idea is even more disrespectful to the king as you’re questioning the king’s decision. During the final battle at the Tauren’s Lair, it was Chen Rui’s first time putting on the “God-Eating Mask”. To avoid any bad changes, I once wanted to kill him too; it was the king who stopped me. Chen Rui is a friend we acknowledge and a benefactor of us, the earth elementals and the entire underground world. We should trust our friend just as the king trusts him.”

Tag thought for a moment and nodded, “You’re right, I should trust the king’s insight; I should trust my friend even more. I will sincerely apologize to him.”

“It’s fine. I don’t think he will mind. Let’s go. We should guard the Earth Realm and not let anyone disturb his training.”

Chen Rui didn’t know that the 2 elite earth elementals were discussing him. Even if he could hear, he couldn’t think about it as he was in a strange realm at that time. His body instinctively adjusted the Star Power to adapt to the water pressure. His heart couldn’t feel anything other than the little clarity of consciousness that remained.

Chen Rui closed his eyes, letting his body sink and float in the water with the flow. No matter how the pressure changed, he always kept that point in his heart – a “quiet” state.

It wasn’t easy to reach this step as this was already his third time entering the deep sea. He went through countless attempts previously, including taking a lot of detours. It was just like smithing, an ore was tempered bit by bit to remove the impurities, leaving the true essence. The star chart in the status bar had become very clear. Although the light was soft, it always shone evenly. It was completely different from the previous times where the light shone intermittently.

Although the spirit realm could override the body, it couldn’t completely offset the pressure on the body. The pressure on Chen Rui’s current strength had reached its limit. If he went any deeper, his body would be unable to bear and collapse.

However, Chen Rui had mastered all the tricks of <Refined Mind>. After finishing this training, he didn’t enter the deep sea again, but chose other environments, such as glacier and volcano. It was just like some monks that train their minds in various harsh environments. The experience was dangerous and crazy, but the effect was getting more and more obvious.

Chen Rui’s training was in line with the requirements of <Refined Mind>. In fact, he didn’t know that Alioth state required him not only to refine the mind but also to accumulate and consume humongous soul power while constantly strengthen himself in the training.

By coincidence, Chen Rui devoured the Glorfin’s Demon Overlord-level soul and saved him from the accumulation of soul power. He actually already took a shortcut. However, this shortcut was a coexistence of opportunity and risk. If it was the soul power that he accumulated by himself, he clearly wouldn’t have the danger of losing his consciousness; yet, the soul power that he accumulated himself would be far inferior to the Demon Overlord and it would take longer time.

As long as Chen Rui could survive this last challenge, he could completely digest the soul of the Demon Overlord. Then, not only would he be able to breakthrough the Alioth state in the shortest time, but his strength would also be much higher than expected.

There was another thing that surprised Chen Rui. The support for mind provided by the earth elemental heart was stronger than expected. Not only were the “quantity” and “quality” greatly enhanced but the progress and success rate of <Deep Analysis> had also greatly increased. After completing this round, the progress had reached as much as 50%.
