After reaching 50%, in the Super System’s solar system, the mask that was suspended in the air gradually changed. The mask, which had only eyes initially, started to have clear features. It was actually Chen Rui’s face!

chapters.title: Chapter 185 - Wake Up! My Lover
chapters.body:
Chapter 185 - Wake Up! My Lover

Chapter 185: Wake Up! My Lover

Chen Rui was taken aback to see the “God-Eating Mask” in the Super System became his face. What does it mean? Am I going to be a slave of the “God-Eating Mask”?

He touched his face subconsciously and was surprised to find that the mask on his face was gone!

Is the mask absorbed by the Super System? Will it return to my face? With that thought, the God-Eating Mask appeared on his face again.

Chen Rui had a sudden realization that he could finally control the visibility of the mask! This should be the result when <Deep Analysis> reaches 50%! If it is completely decoded, does it mean that I can completely control this artifact that can only be used by the Beelzebub Royal Family?

If it’s certain that if I can succeed, then the Demon Realm’s seven artifacts might all be… Chen Rui was excited. Without looking too far, the Fallen Angel Empire has the Sword of Fallen Angel. This artifact hasn’t acknowledged the Regent Obsidian yet. If…

Chen Rui withdrew his thoughts. It’s meaningless to think about that now. I’ll go through this most dangerous challenge first.

Yet, after counting, it was the 10th day today, so Chen Rui’s eyes fell onto the platform aside. On the platform, the red light on Athena had become very thin. It might disappear completely at any time.

Every time after Chen Rui finished training, he would check on her condition. He knew that Athena’s body was automatically absorbing the power of the Obsidian Heart. When the red light disappeared, it meant that the Obsidian Heart was fully absorbed, which was also the time Athena would wake up.

Chen Rui watched Athena motionlessly, waiting for the moment when the red light finally disappeared.

After some time, the red light finally fully absorbed into Athena’s body. Athena, who was sleeping like a baby, moved slightly and slowly opened her beautiful eyes.

The outline of a familiar face came into view. The outline became clearer gradually and that face was showing joy and excitement.

It was the man who was engraved in her soul.

Didn’t my soul disappear after burning my life?

Is this a hallucination?

“Athena!” A familiar voice sounded.

She pinched her fingers so hard and she felt pain. This isn’t a hallucination!

It’s truly him!

Athena recalled before she lost consciousness, she seemed to be… That’s right! I was fighting Glorfin at that time!

“Chen Rui.” Athena leaped off the stone platform at once. “Where is Glorfin? Are we all dead? Is this the hell that you mentioned?”

“This is the Earth Elemental’s Earth Palace. None of us die. The one who died was Glorfin.”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I know you have a lot of questions to ask. I will answer you one by one. Yet, before that, there’s something that we must settle first!”

“Settle what?” Athena looked at his smile and her heart flustered for no reason as if her heartbeat accelerated again.

“Transform for me now!”

“What?”

“I want to see your look after transformation!” Chen Rui walked forward step by step while Athena stepped back not knowing what to do.

“Poom!” There was a stone pillar behind her and she couldn’t back up anymore.

“Hurry!”

Chen Rui’s urge made Athena more tensed and “whoosh!”, a fire ignited on her body. A pair of curved horns extended from her head; her purple hair had become red; her skin also became red, faintly revealing a mysterious light pattern; her red eyes were burning in flame, which was exactly the transformation she had when she faced against Glorfin.

This transformation was no longer the normal Great Demon combat form but a mutated Demon King-level transformation. The power she radiated was stronger than the level when she burnt her life when facing Glorfin. However, her lost expression on her face was like a weak girl without resistance.

Chen Rui’s aggressive eyes looked at each part of her body with impunity. When he saw her head down as she was afraid to look into his eyes, he shouted, “Athena, look into my eyes!”

Athena looked at Chen Rui’s eyes anxiously. When their eyes met, it was like they were stuck and could no longer be separated.

“Athena, you look very beautiful in this look now.” Chen Rui looked into her eyes and said, “Actually, no matter what you look like, you’ll always be my most beloved, Athena.”

Athena shuddered slightly. Her eyes glowed with flames. Instantly, her heart was filled with an unprecedented happiness. At that moment, all the previous doubts and inferiority were thrown away. The eyes filled with fire and tears looking at Chen Rui’s face got closer. She didn’t dodge it. Instead, she offered her lips while trembling.

The two figures were intertwined. A strong fiery sensation came from their touching lips which spread to their hearts. Athena didn’t turn into her humanoid form anymore. Instead, she reciprocated his passionate kiss as if she wanted to release all the emotions contained in her heart.

In fact, Athena’s figure was a bit taller after transformation which made Chen Rui had to tiptoe to maintain the kiss. Damn Arthur, can’t you grow taller?

If I can’t stand, then let’s just lie down. I can’t be using <Camouflage> to increase my height every time we kiss right?

This reason is very good.

Unknowingly, both of them entered a tent with comfortable cushions below. Although the earth elementals knew that Chen Rui was training, so they wouldn’t enter the Earth Palace, the floor was too cold and too uncomfortable to lay on. Speaking of which the storage was the most convenient. As they kissed passionately, Athena felt that Chen Rui’s hands started to move. His hands were only at her back when they were standing. They actually moved to her boobs when they laid down now. Wait! When did this guy remove my armor and bra?

“What are you doing?” She seemed to already know the answer when she asked.

“Well, you doubted my feelings for you before, so I’m going to punish you on behalf of love and justice…”

“Asshole, giving me such a bad excuse again!”

“You can’t do that…” Athena was about to resist when a hand had already climbed to the peak of the mountains on her chest. A numb feeling that she had never experienced immediately came to her brain, and she lost her remaining pitiful strength instantly.

Soon, another hand was added. The pair towering towers constantly changed their shape in the abominable caresses. The nipples at the top had already erected under the strong stimulation. Waves of increasingly strange feelings rushed toward Athena’s mind, but her lips were blocked tightly, so she could only occasionally whisper sofly. Her entire body was soft. It had lost all resistance. She could only let him do as he liked.

When a man’s hand reached into a hidden area under the abdomen, Athena, who was infatuated finally woke up. She clamped her legs and grabbed the hand while trembling.

“Don’t…”

Chen Rui felt the strength of her hand which didn’t seem like she was playing hard to get. The eagerness in his eyes faded a lot. He slowly withdrew his hands. His body who was pressing on her also turned to the side.

The atmosphere in the tent was awkward.

Chen Rui blamed himself for being too impatient. Athena wasn’t mentally ready for this step, so he couldn’t force her selfishly for his own desire.

“I’m sorry.” Both of their voices sounded again at the same time.

“I’m a bit out of control.” Chen Rui spoke first.

“No.” Athena blushed, “Listen to me first.”

“Okay…”

“Actually, just now I…” Athena was having difficulty to speak, she mustered up her courage to say it, “I really want to give you my body now, but can we push it forward for half a year?”

“Half a year?”

“It’s like this. My family bloodline has a special mutation power which will happen by the age of 20. This mutation is very magical. It can make my initial strength promote to a higher level. If I’m at the peak, I can even break through the current realm. However, there is a limitation that is I cannot… cannot do that… before 20 years old.”

Chen Rui realized that it wasn’t because Athena wasn’t mentally prepared to accept the last step, but that there was such a special reason. Athena was afraid he was unhappy and said apologetically, “I’ll be 20 years old in 5 months. Can we wait until then? My current strength is only a little short of the later stage of Demon King…”

Chen Rui activated <Analytical Eyes>. Athena’s current strength is c, which is the middle stage of Demon King. According to her, promoting into the later stage of Demon King is only a step away. As long as she breaks through to later stage in half a year, then she can immediately leap into Great Demon King at the age of 20! This bloodline mutation is too powerful!

Thinking of that, Chen Rui stunned for a while. He experienced the multiple challenges at the brink of life and death, and he could finally reach the level of Demon King. After this, he still had to face the greatest challenge of Demon Overlord’s consciousness, then he might be promoted to Great Demon King. When Athena came out of the Dark Moon City, she was just early Higher Demon. Along the way, she consumed the devil fruit and black potion, then broke through at the last moment. Subsequently, she absorbed the Earth Power and Obsidian Heart. When she woke up, she was already a powerhouse close to the later stage of Demon King. As long as she reached the latter stage of Demon King, she would be “promoted” to the Great Demon King without any risk after 6 months!

Suddenly, Chen Rui had a feeling. Could it be that Athena is the actual protagonist that cross-overed? Why is her protagonist’s halo stronger than mine?

In Athena’s eyes, Chen Rui saw the thirst for power. He knew very well that this thirst wasn’t for herself but for him. It was just like the weapon named Guardian’s Sword that she wanted to protect him by his side always.

“Chen Rui, I’m sorry. I truly want to be your woman. Wait until my birthday…”

“You’re such a fool.” The desire in Chen Rui’s heart had completely faded away, leaving only a warm affection. He hugged Athena and put her head on his shoulder while gently brush her long red hair. He kissed her forehead and said, “You’re already my woman. No one can replace you.”

Athena smiled happily and turned back into a humanoid form. Suddenly, she added quietly, “What about Princess Royal?”

She has just “consolidated” her place yet she is starting to overthink again? So, this is woman?

“I was about to settle this with you! You’re such an overbearing little fool!” Chen Rui pretended to be annoyed and took the chance to pinch her hips, “There is nothing between me and Princess Royal!”

Athena was taken advantage of by him and blushed, “Then, what you said the last time…”

“You guessed it yourself before you even finished listening!” Chen Rui pinched her face lightly. “I’ll tell you that now, everything.”

Being shorter than one’s lover. I know the pain

chapters.title: Chapter 186 - The “Petty” Athena
chapters.body:
Chapter 186 - The “Petty” Athena

Chapter 186: The “Petty” Athena

“You ran into Delia?” (The voice sounded startled.)

“She… is Christina?” (The voice actually sounded a little uncharacteristically bitter.)

“Asmodeus Royal Family’s daughter? At least Demon Emperor level?” (She bit her lips and asked.)

“You guys did it in Silent Night Wetlands…” (The envy contained in the voice turned out to be greater than the expected dissatisfaction.)

“She gave you the Blood of Nirvana?” (After surprise was silence.)

“…”

“Athena,” Chen Rui saw that she was silent and thoughtful. He quickly added, “Although she and I were an accident… but I…”

“You want to find her?”

“Let’s discuss that in the future…” Chen Rui smiled bitterly. Athena was not a woman who was good at hiding her feelings. He could see that she was in a complicated mood.

No matter which woman, she would definitely not be happy knowing that her man had an affair. Although his relationship with Athena was not yet clear at the time, the two’s relationship now had indeed reached the level of sharing everything already.

Athena was silent for a while. After a long time, she asked, “Is she… beautiful?”

Christina’s beauty was beyond Dark Moon’s number 1 beauty, Shea. No matter how stupid Chen Rui was, he knew that he could never praise another woman’s looks in front of a woman. He said vaguely, “The both of you are about the same, but you are slightly more beautiful.”

“Don’t try to make me happy.” Athena shook her head decisively. “The royal family, regardless of their gender, have the best appearances in the Demon Realm. The Queen of Asmodeus Catherine is also called the number 1 beauty of the Demon Realm.”

Chen Rui was very depressed. Why are women always so sensitive in certain aspects?

“I just want to make you happy; I like seeing your bright smile,” Chen Rui stroked Athena’s smooth face. “Remember this, no one can replace your place in my heart.”

“Hmph! Sweet-talking guy!” Athena said this, but her heart was actually comforted by it. She just felt sweet. Lying on his chest, listening to her man’s powerful heartbeat, and asked after a while, “What about Princess Royal?”

This girl, why did she come back to this after talking for a long time?

The secret room under the pool suddenly appeared in Chen Rui’s mind. Also, the dancing girl in the mirror and the talking wind chime. He sighed quietly.

“You also know that Princess Royal’s personality is as cold as icebergs and reserved. How dare I have improper thoughts about her? If she heard what you said, your man will not have a good life in the future.”

When Athena heard the words “your man”, she was embarrassed yet happy. She pouted and said, “I sent Dark Will to Dark Moon myself. If Princess Royal didn’t have you in her heart, how could she be willing to give you this secret treasure?”

“You always like to think wildly…” Chen Rui thought of the voice that the wind chime called his name for the last time and shook his head. “As for Christina, it was purely an accident. In my heart, having you with me for the rest of my life is enough.”

“Hmph! Don’t think I don’t know anything. Christina is your first woman; you won’t forget her,” Athena said indignantly. The point of her dissatisfaction was not another woman in Chen Rui’s heart, but that his “first time” was “taken” by the other party. His first woman should have been her, Athena Wales.

“Forget Christina.” Chen Rui secretly sighed when he heard this sentence. Fortunately, he passed the test, but the words Athena said afterwards stunned him. “As for Princess Royal and the little princess, I can accept it. I can even accept Kia, whom Princess Royal wanted to give you, but if there are other women, you must ask the sword in my hand first!”

Chen Rui thought he misheard. Although every otaku dreamed of a harem, a fantasy was just a fantasy. It was not easy to have girls in both his arms. If he didn’t do it right, there would be troubles in the harem.

I initially just wanted to confess the Christina matter, who knew that the total number of the harem would increase to 5?

Wait! The misunderstanding that Shea because of “Dark Will” was one thing, but as for Kia, I have almost forgotten the Princess Royal’s special reward. She herself is not willing, so this person can be excluded. The strangest case is Alice. How does this little loli somehow get involved? Could the little loli have told Athena about the surprise stolen kiss?

“Athena …”

“Do you think I’m a petty, jealous woman?” Athena rolled her eyes at Chen Rui and interrupted what he wanted to say first.

Chen Rui felt ashamed. This is being petty? She is simply too generous! It’s surprisingly generous.

“Not satisfied?”

Chen Rui nodded quickly. “I’m satisfied! I’m satisfied! It’s just…”

Athena saw Chen Rui’s surprised look and secretly wondered if she was too harsh. Before Chen Rui could explain the situation with Alice and Kia, she added softly, “Actually, I’m not that type… When you really meet a woman who you are interested in the future, don’t hide it from me, I… I won’t make it difficult for you.”

In fact, the Demon Realm had far more women than men, especially the succubus family which was purely consisted of “female”. Strong male demons generally had many wives, and even powerful female demons had many “toy boys”. Not only because of sexual desire, but also because of inheritance. Perhaps it was due to the relationship between bloodlines and eugenics. The stronger the demon, the lower the fertility rate.

For the Great Demon family, the stronger the mutated bloodline, the fewer the offspring. Athena’s father, the Empire’s First General George Wells had twelve wives, which was very rare among the imperial noble, but he only had one precious daughter, Athena. Athena had excellent qualifications; at the age of nineteen, she broke through the Higher Demon bottleneck. If her powers that were close to that of the Demon King were made known to the public, it would definitely cause a sensation.

Joseph’s father, Lord Josh, had nearly a hundred wives and concubines and countless other women who had no identity. However, there were far fewer offspring than women. Of the few countable descendants, only his two sons Joseph and Kanita were noteworthy.

Of course, the mutation of bloodlines was not only based on heredity, otherwise there would be fewer and fewer powerhouses in the Demon Realm. Breaking the bottleneck by oneself was also a way to induce mutation. For example, if Arux broke through the limit of Higher Demon now, a mutation was likely to happen. Even if he himself did not mutate, there was a considerable chance that his future generations would have a mutated bloodline.

Chen Rui shook his head and kissed her forehead. “Don’t overthink. I am content with being able to have you.”

“That’s enough. Don’t think I’m a silly girl.” Athena was still very happy. At least her position in Chen Rui’s heart was irreplaceable, even if it was Christina or Princess Royal.

Chen Rui could only smile bitterly. The more I explain, the worse the situation seems. I’m speaking my mind, but she just refuses to believe me. Isn’t this being a silly girl?

Athena didn’t worry about this issue anymore. She asked, “That’s right, what’s going on with Glorfin?”

Chen Rui told her about what happened that day. He also told her about the matters in Dark Moon City. He only hid the secrets about how he unintentionally peeped into Shea showing in the bath pool and the underground secret chamber.

Athena was taken aback. “A hundred days? Then your consciousness could be wiped out?”

“My current training is to deal with this crisis. As for the artifacts, I can control half of it. Otherwise, I can’t kiss you today while wearing a mask.” Chen Rui tried to understate as much as possible to prevent Athena from worrying.

With Athena’s insights, she naturally understood how powerful a Demon Overlord’s soul power was. Even without the threat of artifacts, it was still extremely dangerous. As she was extremely anxious, she suddenly whispered, “Chen Rui… we… you should just push me down right now.”

Chen Rui was stunned for a while, then he understood. He hugged Athena tightly. “Silly girl, you have to trust me and you have to trust yourself. You are the deepest mark carved on my soul. Even if my soul is completely broken, this mark definitely cannot be erased. I can surely get through this just with my dedication to you.”

Athena held him tightly without saying a word.

The most important thing in the underground world had been resolved. Chen Rui bade farewell to the earth elementals and arrived at the Tauren’s Den. With his current strength and the help of Stridebug, the journey was greatly shortened.

Athena’s current strength was still above Chen Rui’s. When fighting Glorfin, she awakened the power of space. Since the bloodline power of the Wales Family was <Upgrade>, this type of ability that could attack across space must have originated from the devil fruit’s unique power. This time, she also got the buff of the Demon Overlord level Earth Power and the power of Obsidian Heart, thus her powers improved to another level. She was already quite close to the later stage of Demon King. This kind of adventure with the protagonist’s buff, even Chen Rui could only acknowledge defeat.

The taurens were very pleased with the appearance of Chen Rui and the revival of Athena, especially the Chief Tauren Delong and the priest, Torre. The devil fruit that Delong ate had begun to work; he felt as if his powers had improved, but there was still some distance from breaking through the bottleneck. Once he could advance to Demon Emperor, he could become the third powerhouse in Tauren history to become Demon King.

Chen Rui only stayed in the Tauren’s Den for a short while and quickly went to Medusa’s Lair.

The entire Medusa tribe underground had completely surrendered to Chen Rui. Seeing his arrival, they bowed one after another. Tim walked over with joy, bringing Lysa along to greet their master. Both Chen Rui and Athena saw a small baby in Lysa’s arms. This baby had a humanoid appearance, sleeping soundly. Lysa’s face was full of the aura of motherhood.

It turned out that Lysa gave birth to a child just a few days ago. Sure enough, the babu was a Great Demon, and he also had a mutated bloodline. A mutated Great Demon was very rare; Tim’s joy was imaginable.

Dodo was still asleep. The spirit-devouring demonic fly that he devoured at that time was equivalent to Glorfin’s power territory, which was much stronger than expected. It was likely that he was in the middle of digesting this power. All they could do was wait.

“Congratulations, Tim.” Chen Rui hesitated slightly and said, “You should stay with Lysa at this time, but I really need your strength. After a while, our plan will be implemented.”

When Tim surrendered to Chen Rui last time, he already knew the outline of the plan. He nodded and said, “Master, rest assured, Lysa will understand. However… if I were appear on the front stage again, then I must drink the spring of life every three days, otherwise I will not survive.”

Tim’s life was exhausted at the time, so he had to rely on the fountain of life to maintain his life. This was the biggest limitation.

“I can provide the fountain of life at any time,” Chen Rui said. “I don’t have enough materials now. If I can get the materials together, I will give you a bottle of longevity potion to completely eliminate your worries.”

Tim’s eyes brightened up. He knew that this master had the highest grade of black potion, but even a grand master could not easily get a bottle of the highest grade potion. If this bottle of potion was spread to the Demon Realm, it would definitely cause a sensation in the three empires.

“Thank you, master! As for the materials, if I can contact my family, I will get it together and give it to master as soon as possible.”

A bottle of the highest grade black potion required an exchange of 1 million auras. Chen Rui was currently in urgent need of aura training, so he could not exchange the potion for Tim. However, with the heritage of the Saiful Family, making up 1 million aura should not be a problem. When the time came, he could also earn some extra auras that he needed.

“No problem. During this time, accompany Lysa.”

Lysa could basically understand the Demon Realm’s lingua franca and bowed respectfully to Chen Rui.

After leaving Medusa’s Lair, Chen Rui and Athena went toward the exit of the main pit. Athena looked at the dazzling moon in the sky and recalled the situation of falling into the main pit at the beginning. There was a feeling of seeing light again. The happiest thing was that when they exited, they could still be together.

Chen Rui sensed Athena’s mood and gently squeezed her waist. He smiled and said. “Let’s go. We should go back to Dark Moon to have a look.”

In the evening.

Dark Moon City Palace Council Hall.

The leader of the royal palace imperial guards, Kaguron was pleading guilty to Shea. On the side was Old Gauss. For half a month, with the cooperation of Cloak Gang, the entire city was searching for the Beelzebub Royal Family, but they could not find their whereabouts.

Shea listened quietly. The initial rage on her icy face was gone, but the coldness in her eyes became worse.

“I have reported to the Imperial City, and the special envoy who came to assist in the investigation has set out from the Imperial City. This time, no matter what the price to pay is, the Beelzebub Royal Family must be nipped in the bud!”

Kaguron bowed his head in shame. As a confidant of the Princess Royal, he naturally knew that the messenger of the Imperial City would definitely make the situation in Dark Moon even more unfavorable. If it were not for his incompetence, he was not even able to detect the enemy, how could he end up forcing Princess Royal to take this step.

Old Gauss frowned. This matter was too important. Although Princess Royal knew the disturbance of the messenger of the Imperial City, she never intended to seal the message from the beginning. Anyway, she was also of the royal bloodline of the Fallen Angel Empire. She would not give up the interests of the entire empire because of internal fighting.

“Kaguron, Gauss, you go down. I need to be quiet for a while. Don’t let anyone bother me if there is nothing special.”

“Yes!” The two bowed and left.

After walking out of the council hall, Kaguron saw a guard rushing toward the council hall, holding something in his hand. He immediately stopped the guard.

“Sutta! Where are you going?”

“Sir Kaguron, a man in a cloak asked to see Princess Royal and asked me to give this package to Princess Royal. He said Princess Royal will see him in person.”

“What is it? Is it dangerous? Show me.”

Sutta handed over the small bag in his hand and replied, “I’ve checked it already; it’s just some unknown powder.”

Kaguron opened the small bag. Sure enough, it turned out to be some strange powder, but there was no toxin or energy wave.

“Show me.” Old Gauss came over and looked at those powders. His turbid old eyes looked shocked. He said to Sutta, “I’ll report to Princess Royal immediately! Kaguron, immediately bring the two people to the council hall!”

Whether she is overbearing or tender, woman is still a woman. Chen Rui might have more headaches in the future.

chapters.title: Chapter 187 - The Mining Officer That Returned Secretly
chapters.body:
Chapter 187 - The Mining Officer That Returned Secretly

Chapter 187: The Mining Officer that Returned Secretly

Although Kaguron did not know what the powder was, from the attitude of Old Gauss, this person’s identity was definitely not ordinary. He didn’t ask further and nodded decisively.

Soon, a man in a cape whose face couldn’t be seen followed Kaguron to the council hall.

“Kaguron, you personally guard the gate of the inner courtyard; no one is allowed to enter.” Shea’s expression remained cold, but the fluctuations in her voice uncharacteristically reflected the abnormal fluctuations in her heart. Kaguron was secretly surprised by the messenger’s identity. He bowed and left.

“Princess Royal, I still have some things to do. I will also withdraw.” Old Gauss bowed and took the initiative to withdraw.

Shea seemed to want to ask Old Gauss to stay, but she didn’t say anything in the end. Only she and the cloaked man remained in the council room.

After Old Gauss left, the man took off the cloak covering his head and smiled, “Long time no see, Princess Royal.”

The moment Shea saw that smile, she spaced out a little, then recovered instantly. However, the slight emotional fluctuations could not be concealed from Chen Rui, who had reached the Demon King level. Because of the <Camouflage> skill, he was now only the powerless Human.

Shea gazed at Chen Rui for a moment and nodded, “You came back just in time this time. There is a major matter to discuss with you.”

Chen Rui hesitated. Not counting Aguile’s identity and peeping, he and Shea hadn’t seen each other for two months. He even came back from such a dangerous place, but she went straight to the point without even asking about his situation.

It could be seen from the Wind Chime of Memory that Shea had a delicate feeling about him now; it was just friends but slightly closer. Now, after meeting again after a long time, she at least should say “You’re finally back”, “You’ve returned safely” or maybe ask the reason he came back.

Chen Rui secretly sighed: The Princess Royal can cry and laugh loudly in front of the wind chimes in the secret room or even call my name deeply, but in the council hall she is the reserved iceberg princess .

Hidden attributes were hidden attributes after all. They couldn’t be activated unless in specific conditions.

However, Chen Rui did not consider this point. Even in situations like this, Shea would at least say something courteous even to ordinary subordinates. It was because he was “special”, therefore she was being “abnormal”.

Shea told him about the Beelzebub Royal Family stealing artifact fragment and the people coming to assist the investigation in the Imperial City. She saw that Chen Rui was not paying full attention, and she frowned, “What do you think of this matter?”

Chen Rui deliberately pretended to be thinking. He said, “The Beelzebub Royal Family reappeared after 400 years, they must have come prepared. Now they have obtained the complete ‘God-Eating Mask’, it is indeed a big problem. I am thinking that Beelzebub’s goal is definitely not just the fallen Dark Moon, but the entire Fallen Angel Empire. Maybe we can use some means to turn Beelzebub’s power into our own, to counter…”

“No!” Shea interrupted Chen Rui decisively. A strong killing intent radiated from her body. She gritted her teeth and said, “No matter how great the value is, the Beelzebub Family, especially that guy from that night, must die!”

“Princess Royal, now is not 400 years ago. Maybe that person…”

Shea’s murderousness became even more intense. Although it was not directed at Chen Rui, he still felt a deep chill. She was not bluffing. It seemed that the hatred she had toward a certain guy had reached the extreme. “Don’t say anymore! Even without the ‘God-Eating Mask’, that person must also die! This is beyond doubt!”

“…”

Chen Rui was just trying to test Shea’s attitude. Who knew Shea’s response would be so fierce. It seemed that he had no say. Even if his identity was not the Beelzebub Royal Family or without the ‘God-Eating Mask’, just that secret room rubbed Shea the wrong way.

Chen Rui had no doubt that if he now showed his identity, Shea would kill him immediately. He could not afford this risk.

From the sounds of Wind Chime of Memory, Shea, the lord of Dark Moon, was a cool woman who devoted her life and death to the estate. There was nothing more important than the “big picture” that she identified. Before attaining powers that could match hers or being able to leave Dark Moon without hesitation, it was better to not disclose the ‘God-Eating Mask’ matter for the time being.

After all, Shea was not Athena. Chen Rui was currently just a vague shadow in Shea’s heart. The most obvious impression was that she had a talented subordinate. Unless her closeness toward him could reach the level of Athena, otherwise he definitely could not reveal the real identity..

Everything was for the sake of survival. Now, Chen Rui had not reached the point of having to gamble, and he was no longer alone. He had a lover, friends and followers. He must be cautious.

When he thought about this, Chen Rui changed his words immediately, “I understand the Princess Royal’s meaning. I don’t want to cooperate with the Beelzebub Royal Family, but to use the Imperial City’s power to deplete the Beelzebub Royal Family’s forces. Then, when the opponent is at their weakest, we will take the opportunity to launch an attack to destroy the Beelzebub Royal Family in one fell swoop.”

Shea paused slightly and nodded. “It’s just that it is too difficult to implement this plan. I have sent people to hunt for half a month. There has been no whereabouts of the Beelzebub Royal Family. It is likely that they have already left Dark Moon or that they are hiding somewhere we cannot find.”

“Then you can take this matter easy for a while and let the Imperial City messenger to worry about. Princess Royal is the lord of the estate. You need to set your sights broader. Don’t keep focusing on this point. There is a more important thing now.” Chen Rui looked at Shea’s expectant gaze and smiled, “Why didn’t Princess Royal Royal Highness ask me why I came back from Mountain Xilang?”

When Shea saw the competent smile, she felt her recent anxieties calm down. She calmly said, “As the lord, I am waiting for my mining officer to report.”

“That is my miscalculation. It is very impolite to let a beautiful lady take the initiative to ask.” Chen Rui skillfully put an equal sign between the lord and beautiful lady, placing himself in a more equal position. Sure enough, Shea’s murderousness retracted and her eyes looked slightly soft. She seemed to have a sense of immersion.

“Last time I entrusted Aguile to bring back minerals, did Princess Royal receive them?”

Speaking of this, Shea’s purple eyes flashed with color. “I have received all of them. I don’t know how you solved the waste ores problem. These fine-quality iron ore can be used to make excellent weapons and equipment.”

“What I asked him to bring was only a small fraction. This time I brought back some more. Actually, these are waste ores from the past years. I used a ‘special’ method inherited from the grand master to handle all of it. Now, the mines no longer have waste ores. All of them are high-quality minerals. It’s just that we can’t go underground. At present, the ‘waste ores’ accumulated over thousands of years are enough for us to use.”

It was easy to say, but in fact, he killed a Demon Overlord, which was indeed a “special” method.

Shea was overjoyed. “You have done so much! I want to reward you properly.”

“I haven’t finished saying my credits. Princess Royal, don’t rush,” Chen Rui said while laughing. “Royal Highness, remember the ex-mining officer, Tim who disappeared two years ago?”

Shea nodded. Chen Rui’s next words surprised her, “Tim isn’t dead…”

According to Chen Rui, Tim was framed two years ago and met the terrible demonic beasts, the medusas in the underground. He was imprisoned by the medusas. If he had not married a medusa by chance, he would have died. These few years he kept trying to think of a way to escape, but unfortunately could not.

When Chen Rui and Athena rescued the miners who fell to the bottom of the main pit, they coincidentally encountered the battle between the medusas and taurens. Tim escaped with the help of his medusa wife. As he was escaping in the midst of the chaos, he coincidentally found the two of them. They escaped the underground world together, but Tim’s medusa wife was of Demon King level, so she could not pass through the seal. Currently, Tim had been hiding somewhere in Mountain Xilang.

Chen Rui also explained the situation of the bandits in Mountain Xilang. The initial bandits bosses either killed each other or were poisoned; all of them were dead. Only Snowden, the head of the bandits, was left. Chen Rui wanted to poison him, but this Snowden was a Demon King-level powerhouse. He was vigilant by nature, and he actually discovered Chen Rui’s intention. If it weren’t for Aguile’s help, Chen Rui, Tim, and Athena would all have died in Snowden’s hands. However, Aguile was also seriously injured. He was currently hiding in Town Leia of the Dark Shadow Empire to treat his injuries.

“That Aguile,” Shea was skeptical, “Are you sure he was with you these days?”

Chen Rui nodded affirmatively. “After his last duel with Arux, he handed over to Princess Royal what I entrusted to him, then returned to Mountain Xilang. Although he doesn’t like to be disturbed and often trains alone, he will still appear in time when needed.”

Shea inquired carefully about the times when Aguile appeared, and sure enough, they really conflicted with the times when the Beelzebub Royal Family appeared. They should not be the same person. Her expression became slightly clouded. Chen Rui knew that Shea had a lot of suspicions about “Aguile”. Fortunately, he was well prepared, and he handled the situation perfectly.

Chen Rui didn’t mention Athena’s true powers to avoid unnecessary trouble. Athena was now resting in the basement of the arena. According to Vasasha, Royce had been circling Red Spirit Estate several times and had successfully obtained the Evil Blue Tears. He was rushing back to Dark Moon and could arrive as soon as tonight.

Chen Rui’s <Deep Analysis> of “God-Eating Mask” started to slow down. One <Deep Analysis> used to be able to analyze 1% to 2%, but now it was only possible to analyze 1% after two analyses. With Blue Evil Tears, not only could the number of times of analysis be increased, but the special effect of concealing one’s own power level was just right for Athena.

“Remember the letter I sent from Cloak Gang? I asked Princess Royal to suspend the plan to dispatch troops to Mountain Xilang because the conditions were not mature enough at the time. According to the information I obtained, Snowden was a mutated Great Demon, and his power was at the early stage Demon King. He was proficient at wind magic. If Princess Royal has a reliable candidate to defeat Snowden, then this plan can be launched.”

Shea groaned for a moment and nodded. “Hmph, this candidate, in fact, you also know him. It is Kaguron.”

Chen Rui was slightly surprised. Kaguron’s powers in <Analytical Eyes> was only Higher Demon, and he was not of a mutated bloodline. Can he actually deal with Snowden?

But as Shea’s most important captain of the imperial guard, he must have something special.

“Kaguron and his sister both had a special mutated ability, which is just the opposite of the ordinary Great Demon. They usually kept their battle form to store their power, and they could transform into ordinary form and exert incredible power during battle. Kaguron and Kaguli’s powers were both Demon King Level, but they wouldn’t reveal it easily usually. Kaguron’s role is to guard the palace; Kaguli’s is to protect Alice, but when they truly had to launch an attack, they need to disguise properly and try not to let Snowden see any clues.”

It was the first time Chen Rui heard about this Great Demon mutated talent with the opposite state. Presumably, they could freely control their combat power, but Shea’s last sentence was obviously superfluous because Snowden was already in Chen Rui’s control.

“Thank you for your Royal Highness’ trust.” Chen Rui understood that Shea telling him a secret of this level meant that he had become a confidant almost like Kaguron and Old Gauss. To return the favour, he immediately said, “In that case, I have to congratulate Princess Royal in advance. It’s time to take back the sheriff position.”

As soon as he said that sentence, a strange light revealed up in Shea’s eyes.

Kaguron actually had the reverse battle form?

chapters.title: Chapter 188 - Skye’S Magic Leather
chapters.body:
Chapter 188 - Skye’S Magic Leather

Chapter 188: Skye’s Magic Leather

When Chen Rui left the council hall, it was already night. He did not go to the Aldas laboratory in the outer courtyard, but walked toward the arena.

The moonlight tonight was very bright, and it was a bit colder than before, but the cold purple glow that spilled on Chen Rui made him feel a hot anxiety. This symptom seemed to have gotten a little worse compared to the previous few days.

Chen Rui recited the calm mind formula. His heart felt a little calmer and a lot better. He discovered this so-called calm mind formula himself. It was a mental application technique that could quickly locate the feeling of meditation. Although he didn’t need to recite phrases such as “Mind as clear as ice, not scared even the sky falls”, its effect was considered not bad. It was the result of his hard work in the training ground the past few years.

The progress of Star Conversion was now 12%. In fact, more than 12 days had passed. Chen Rui discovered that Star Conversion did not progress uniformly. It would speed up or slow down according to certain fluctuations. As of now, more than half of the “God-Eating Mask” was in his control, and with the effect of <Refined Mind>, Star Conversion’s progress seemed to have slowed down.

However, Chen Rui knew that this slowness was relative. The total time of Star Conversion would be 100 days. The current slowness meant acceleration in the future. Meanwhile, it represented an increase in the danger and difficulty to resist. However, for now, he had to do it because it also took time to further improve <Refined Mind> and to crack the “God-Eating Mask”. It was impossible to give up <Refined Mind> or analyzing the artifact now. If that was the case, he would lose his consciousness in less than 100 days.

Chen Rui wore a cloaked and walked into the arena. He could have directly exerted his powers and rushed to the arena as soon as possible, but now he knew that moonlight aggravated some sort of negative influence. He wanted to use this opportunity to further train his mind, so he was not in a hurry. He walked at a normal speed, constantly fighting the discomfort of moonlight with the calm mind formula.

Although nightlife in the Demon Realm was not lively, there were many people who liked to go out at night. At places such as lively bars and on the streets, there were imps selling various strange items, and dark goblins and lichs setting up night stalls… Especially the succubus on the roadside seducing people, making people lose control. Of course, behind the attractiveness may be a terrifying trap. Whether it was a romantic encounter or a nightmare, depended on whether that person had corresponding strength.

Dark Moon City was very large. The distribution of these people was very scattered. Some areas were empty and spooky; other areas were very lively. This made Chen Rui think of the concept of establishing a night market.

He saw a few people surrounded the two girls, waving knives in their hands. They were intimidating them loudly. Chen Rui glanced at the two girls; both of them were dark elves with veils on their faces. They seemed to be sisters who were about sixteen or seventeen years old. The taller older sister was protecting her younger sister. They looked very frightened. There was an old dark elf lying on the ground not far away who had passed out.

This kind of thing happened almost every day in Dark Moon Estate. The guys waving the knives seemed to have a background. There were initially some demons nearby, but when they saw this situation, they all hid away lest they invited trouble.

Chen Rui only felt that the the two dark elf girls’ dressing seemed somewhat familiar. He suddenly remembered. Aren’t these the two daughters of the mysterious dark elf, Skye in the Cloak Gang, Eve and Alian? The dark elf lying on the ground… is Skye!

Among the demons that surround the two girls, the strongest one is an early stage Higher Demon. Skye’s powers are at least Great Demon King level. Why can’t he defeat these weak enemies, leaving the two daughters in danger?

Chen Rui thought of Skye’s injury and seemed to have realized something. At that moment, an ugly minotaur reached out and grabbed Eve’s veil. Eve screamed in fear. The veil was ripped off, revealing her appearance. Her facial features were beautiful , but there were a lot of ugly markings on her face which looked very ugly.

A few guys froze, then immediately began to swear. Eve covered her face. One guy took the opportunity to grab Alian. Chen Rui could no longer stand by idly. He put on the mask and instantly appeared in front of the two girls. He kicked away the lich who caught Alian.

“Where did this guy come from? How dare he meddle in our business?”

Although Chen Rui was already releasing the vibe of a Higher Demon, the Higher Demon who was the leader did not retreat. Instead, he seemed very arrogant.

“Eve, what’s going on?”

Eve didn”t expect this person to know her. As she was in shock, Alian’s eyes brightened. She had clearly recognized Chen Rui. She said, “Sir, my father took us out for a walk and we met these people who try to extort us. My father’s illness was coincidentally triggered…”

“Don’t talk so much!” The Higher Demon finally began to dread the power Chen Rui demonstrated. He sneered. “These two girls ate two pieces of puree cakes sold by Chacha, so they must pay two black crystal coins. You injured my brother just now, and must compensate at least eight black crystal coins. It’s a total of ten black crystal coins. We, however, belong to the Gorefiend Gang. Even the guards dare not meddle in our business. If you are sensible, then pay up!”

Alian’s voice sounded, “You clearly said that we could try it for free just now. You even took the initiative to offer it to me. You also said that I only need to pay one white crystal coin…”

The goblin called Chacha jumped out and shouted, “I clearly said a black crystal coin! Who said you could taste it for free?”

Chen Rui understood the situation. Skye brought his two daughters out and encountered an extortion. Skye did not take these people’s powers into consideration at all, but his old injury just had to occur at the critical moment. It could be said that he was out of his element.

Chen Rui also thought of something that he had personally experienced on Earth before. When he was in college, he and a roommate met a Xinjiang man who pushed a tricycle selling walnut cakes on the street. The guy initially said it was 5 yuan for half a kilogram, so he wanted to buy half a kilogram. In the end, the guy cut a piece and weighed 2.5 kilogram, but the price suddenly became 5 yuan per 50 grams, 50 yuan for 500 grams, and 2.5 kilograms cost 250 yuan.

Of course, Chen Rui and his roommate refused to pay 250 yuan. As a result, the Xinjiang man called several comrades over, all holding knives and forced them to buy it. The other party was strong in numbers, so Chen Rui and his roommate had no choice but to acknowledge their misfortune. The two did not have so much money; the 100 yuan they had was taken.

What was even more annoying was that when they went to the police station to report it, the police asked about the occurrence in detail and did a routine write-up, then they immediately sent the two away. There was never a follow-up. A few days later, Chen Rui saw the Xinjiang people on the street again.

An informed person told him that due to many reasons, the police really had no choice. It was legal for these people to carry a knife. When they entered the police station, they pretended not to understand Mandarin. In the end, they were released easily. The only way was to stay away from them. In fact, Chen Rui had Xinjiang people as classmates. They were warm, hospitable and easy to get along with, but in recent years, more and more Uyghurs had been extorting, pickpocketing and robbing in various places, ruining the reputation of Xinjiang people.

Thinking of his previous experience, coupled with Gorefiend Gang being Cloak Gang’s nemesis, an intense murderous intent grew in Chen Rui’s mind. His body flickered. The leader Great Demon grew dizzy, then it was quickly followed by a slap. This slap in the face was so powerful that he flew away, then it was quickly followed by a few slapping sounds. Except for the goblin Chacha, none of them could stand up.

The worst among them all was the Higher Demon leader. He lay on the ground, and his neck was already bent impossibly. It had clearly been broken by that one slap.

The goblin， Chacha’s body shivered. He opened his mouth， but he couldn’t say a word. His pants had already been soaked with hot and stinky liquid.

He was actually scared of him, so much that he lost control of his bladder.

“My name is Aguile. Tell your boss Wick that in a few days, I will personally visit the Gorefiend Gang.”

Aguile! Goblin then knew that the cloaked man in front of him turned out to be the Gorefiend Gang’s worst enemy. His legs grew weak and he collapsed on the ground.

Finally, the calm mind formula played its part. Except for the Higher Demon, none of the others died. Chen Rui withdrew his murderous spirit. Alian felt a sigh of relief and cheered, “Sir is so amazing!”

Chen Rui touched Alian’s head, then picked up the veil and handed it to Eve. He saw Skye, who was on the ground, had already opened his eyes. He immediately stepped forward to help him get up.

Skye already saw the situation just now. He smiled bitterly and said, “Thank you, Sir Leader. If it were not for sir, the consequences would be unthinkable.”

Chen Rui shook his head, showing that it was not a problem. “This is not the place to talk. Let’s go.”

Eve put on her veil again. Together with Alian, she helped Skye slowly leave the alley.

Chen Rui temporarily changed his mind and escorted the father and daughters trio back to the Cloak Gang.

The old goblin, Didi was naturally excited to see the master. Chen Rui did not give the old goblin too much time to boast about his work and followed Skye and his daughters to the small courtyard where he lived.

After sending away the old goblin, Skye was already almost completely recovered. He thanked Chen Rui again.

In Chen Rui’s <Analytical Eyes>, Skye’s strength was no longer unable to determine, but B. As expected, he really was a Great Demon King powerhouse.

“Sir Skye is very polite. You now belong to the Cloak Gang, so there is no need to say such unnecessary things.” Chen Rui paused a little. “Excuse me for asking, is there any way to completely cure your injury? It seems that Eve and Alian’s illness is getting more and more difficult to control, otherwise you guys would not be been taken advantage of by that kind of guy.”

With that said, he took out six bottles of potions, of which were two bottles of healing medicine, and four bottles of antidote. They were Master-level potions made by Aldas. However, only these 6 bottles of these two types of potions were left. The others could only be obtained from the exchange center, but that kind of grand master level potions could not be revealed easily.

“The six bottles of Master-level potions may not cure your pain, but please accept them. I hope you will continue to contribute to Cloak Gang.”

“Thank you.” Skye didn’t accept the potions. He was silent for a while, then sighed, “I’m old and ill-ridden; I cannot help much.”

“Then you can help as much as you can. Jesse still has to rely on your guidance.” Chen Rui could not reveal the other party’s powers. At present, at least this mysterious strongman was still on the Cloak Gang’s side.

“Jesse is my disciple, I should be guiding him in the first place.” Skye frowned. “Today you saved us father and daughters again. I don’t like owing favors. If sir can double the amount of these two potions, I will give sir a set of magical leather armor that I collected in my early years in exchange.”

With that said, Skye took out a set of leather armor. It was tough in texture, delicate in sewing, and vaguely fluctuating magic waves.

“This set of leather is made of mutated tri-horned rhino skin, which can enhance physical defense and reduce magic damage.”

Enhance physical defense and improve magic defense? Two enchanting attributes! Chen Rui was secretly surprised. Even the dark star iron weapons enchanted by Torre had only one bloodthirsty attribute.

When Chen Rui was in the underground, he had seen taurens making leather armor. However, the taurens were not good at armor making. The leather armor in front of him, whether it was craftsmanship, enchantment or the feeling it gave, was far superior to the taurens’ craftsmanship. As if it was not just a piece of leather, it was a work of art, and it was by no means ordinary goods!

What was the secret behind Skye? Why would someone curse him and his daughters?

chapters.title: Chapter 189 - Mechanic Master
chapters.body:
Chapter 189 - Mechanic Master

Chapter 189: Mechanic Master

Chen Rui lamented, “Sir Skye, I have to say that even if I provide twice the amount of potions, it is still not worth the value of this high grade magic equipment.”

On the side, Alian interrupted, “Such poor taste. What high grade equipment, this is obviously an excellent grade!”

Skye glanced at Alian with a stern expression. Alian seemed to stick out her tongue behind the veil and did not say any more.

Excellent grade!

Chen Rui was taken aback. When he learned forging from the taurens in the underground world, he already understood the divisions of equipment grades in this world. Ordinary whiteboard equipment was considered low grade; equipment with good quality and a certain enchanting effect was considered intermediate grade; those with better quality and good magic properties were considered high grade.

On top of these three conventional equipment grades, there were even better equipment, which were excellent grade, legendary grade, and epic grade.

These three grades of equipment were not only excellent in quality, but it was combined with a perfect enchanting effect. The higher the grade, the more powerful. For example, the seven artifacts belonged to epic grade. The Evil Blue Tear brought back by Royce was the first secret treasure of the Belphegor Royal Family other than the Breeze Shadow Boots. It should belong to a legendary grade. The “Dark Will” in Chen Rui’s hands was likely to be legendary grade.

Athena’s Guardian’s Sword, which had the attribute of being particularly sharp and was enchanted with bloodthirsty effect, seemed to have reached excellent grade. However, strictly speaking, this weapon could only be regarded as a high grade equipment because the special sharpness was a property of dark star iron itself. The double enchantment effect was only 40% of the effect, and the user’s defense was reduced by 20%. This was because the tauren priest, Torre enchantment skill was not perfect enough.

In fact, due to the taurens being naturally lacking in magic sensing, it became the most unfortunate flaw in the taurens’ forging process. If it was a mechanic master who was proficient in enchantment carries out an enchantment with the taurens’ brilliant forging skills as the basis, the effect would be much more perfect. It could even reach legendary grade.

A mechanic that could produce excellent grade equipment already belonged to grand master level. Only when the mechanic master was at peak condition or when he was occasionally inspired, he could create legendary grade equipment, but it was relatively difficult. This was the greatest achievement so far. Besides, only mechanics who reached the grand master level could easily create legendary grade equipment or even epic grade artifacts.

Skye’s leather armor that was used to exchange with potions turned out to be excellent grade equipment that could only be created by the mechanic master. Chen Rui’s eyes suddenly lit up. Although the potions he provided were also master level, the potions were only consumables. It was far from being comparable to the equipment. Of course, black potions were another matter.

Chen Rui thought for a while and shook his head, “Unfortunately, I don’t have any more master level potions at hand, but it seems that the master-level potion cannot completely eliminate the secret disease. If I can, I hope to help you or Eve and Alian to completely eradicate the secret disease as an equivalent exchange. However, in that case, I am afraid that this piece of leather armor is not enough.”

Alian seemed to be very impressed with Chen Rui’s help in the alley just now and interrupted again, “Then let’s have father make one more…”

“Shut up!” Skye shouted angrily. Alian’s body trembled, as if she was stimulated. She shook like she was about to fall.

“Alian!” Eve exclaimed, holding her hurriedly.

Chen Rui felt dizzy for a while, and there was one less bottle of antidote in his hands. Almost at the same time, Skye grabbed Alian and fed her the bottle of antidote. After Alian drank the antidote, her body no longer trembled. She was just wheezing. Her condition seemed very weak.

Chen Rui was deeply shocked. The Demon King-level power was one thing because he had already obtained the corresponding information from <Analytical Eyes>, but he was shocked by what Alian said “make one more”!

This excellent grade magic leather armor was actually made by Skye himself! Only mechanic master could make excellent grade equipment. In this case, isn’t Skye…

After Alian’s condition improved slightly, Skye said to Eve, “Eve, help your sister to rest in the room.”

Eve helped Alian walk into the house. Skye looked at Chen Rui’s calm look, who didn’t seem to be surprised by Alian’s words or the power he showed in a panic. He frowned slightly and said, “Sir Leader, that was rude of me.”

“Everyone has their own secrets; so do I.” Chen Rui had recovered from his surprise. He pointed at the mask on his face calmly.

Skye nodded slowly. Chen Rui didn’t give him much time to think and said, “Sir Skye, or should I say, Master Skye, I know what you are worried about. You now have three options. First, immediately take your daughters away from the Cloak Gang or even Dark Moon. Nobody should be able to stop you. Second, kill me to silence my mouth, but I’m afraid that this will be difficult to achieve, even if your strength is the middle stage of Great Demon King. The Cloak Gang is now the imperial guards reserve forces. This will alarm the Dark Moon Lord. When that time comes, not only your two daughters, it would even be hard for you to escape. The third is what I call the equivalent exchange. I will try to completely heal you and your two daughters, you will come up with the corresponding exchange chips.”

Skye’s gaze changed uncertainly. His murderous intent burst especially when Chen Rui talked about his true powers, then he frowned. Chen Rui saw the opportunity and added another sentence, “If you pick the third option, I will keep all your secrets. After completely recovering, you can stay here or leave. In fact, my teacher is also a mechanic master. Perhaps, his ability is above yours.”

When Skye heard the last sentence, he couldn’t help raising a brow. Chen Rui took out something. “Sir Skye, look at this first.”

Skye took a look and his gaze was instantly attracted. Chen Rui took out a piece of fist size metal that was glowing fluorescent light faintly.

“Can you show me?” Skye’s voice sounded a little strange.

Chen Rui threw the metal over. Skye caught it, but it felt heavier than he expected. He looked at it carefully and was stunned. He said, “This dark star iron… has been refined to the legendary grade!”

Legendary grade materials were a necessary condition for creating legendary grade equipment. Skye’s surprise was not without reason. Not just its legendary grade quality, just the refinement ability of making this dark star iron without impurities was far above him. However, Skye is not dispirited because his specialization was not the same as Aguile’s “teacher”.

“This is your teacher’s…”

Chen Rui nodded and took out two pieces of dark star iron that was refined in the refining room. “There are two more pieces here, which are my teacher’s works.”

If one piece could be accidental, what about three pieces? Skye sighed, “Turns out you have such an amazing teacher. In that case, I can’t think of any bargaining chips that can attract you.”

“I won’t hide from Sir that I was kicked out by the teacher to practice. These three pieces of legendary grade dark star irons are a test for me. When I can forge them, I can meet one of the conditions to return to the teacher to continue learning.” Chen Rui sighed. “I won’t tell you what the specific conditions are. This is my biggest secret. Consider it as an exchange to know your secret.”

The inspiration for this “secret exchange” was derived from his negotiation with Joseph. As expected, Skye’s brow relaxed a lot. After all, Aguile’s teacher was a master of the same field with far better ability than him, so some of his previous concerns could be put down.

As for those few pieces of second-class refined dark star iron, Chief Tauren Delong also said that Chen Rui’s current forging level was not enough to forge them. Delong could forge it himself, but because the taurens were lacking in enchantment. As a true forging master, Delong could not bear to waste these precious materials.

“Sir Skye is an expert, please rate a piece of my poor work from a while ago.” Chen Rui said and brought out a long sword of his own creation. This was the work after creating Guardian’s Sword and the short dagger. With the help of <Deep Analysis>, his technique had improved a lot, but there was no enchantment.

Skye took the sword and looked at it. He expressed his appreciation, “If you just look at the forging ability, it is already very brilliant. Even I can’t give you too many useful suggestions. It’s just that a true mechanic master does not only use the hand but also the ‘heart’ when creating a piece of work. In other words, they are not only your work but your child, a living being.”

Chen Rui nodded and said, “When I was learning forging, my teacher also said that you are not only casting a weapon but also building a life. Every force application point and degree of force are a realization of life… I still have a long way to go.”

These words were actually the Chief Tauren’s original words. There was a sentence that followed, “If you can truly understand this feeling, then you are the top tauren blacksmith.” When Skye heard it, he expressed approval. “It seems your teacher is a true top master. I am ashamed of my inferiority. If I have the opportunity, I hope you can recommend me on my behalf.”

After this conversation, he looked at the weapons Chen Rui forged again. The relationship between the two became much closer. Chen Rui said, “In fact, everything I’m doing now is to pass my teacher’s test. It was not just my forging skill, but my own strength too. If Sir Skye trusts me, I am willing to help you get rid of the secret disease in your body. If it is successful, I hope that you can help me make three legendary grade equipment, and… I hope to be by your side during the whole process to watch and learn.”

Skye silenced for a moment and said, “Even if a mechanic master has legendary grade materials, there is no 100% certainty that he can forge legendary grade equipment. Your teacher should have said that there are three mechanic master specialties, which are metal forging, leather goods making and jewelry making. My specialty is not metal but leather goods. I can’t forge these three pieces of legendary dark Star iron. I can’t help you with your studies.”

Chen Rui’s teacher was of course fictitious, but his brain turned quickly. He said, “My teacher once said that once you learn one thing, you learn all. I still hope to observe and learn the process of your craftsmanship. As for the materials… how about this?”

“Learn one thing, learn all? It makes a lot of sense… Hold on, this is… hydra skin!” Skye was so moved when he saw what Chen Rui took out. He threw the dark star iron back to Chen Rui and stepped forward in one quick stride. He stroked the hydra skin with his eyes shining. “Very perfect material. Although it is not of the mutated Demon Emperor level, it is still the Great Demon King level. It’s also very fresh with no tanning. With special methods, its enchantment effect will be quite impressive…”

If the previous dark star iron was not within Skye’s mastery, then the current hydra skin was truly his “type”.

After a while, Skye realized that he had forgotten himself. He stood up with a bitter smile. “Hydra skin alone is not enough; I still need other materials. However, I believe that with your ability, it should not be a problem. Now I am a bit convinced that you really can help me.”

Using the same excuse twice, that was really convenient. However, Chen Rui really knew how to use his practical knowledge in forging.

chapters.title: Chapter 190 - Tim! The Sudden Appearance Of The Former Mining Officer
chapters.body:
Chapter 190 - Tim! The Sudden Appearance Of The Former Mining Officer

Chapter 190: Tim! The Sudden Appearance of the Former Mining Officer

“There are not only injuries on my body but curses! Eve and Alian have poison and curse in their bodies, which definitely cannot be cured by normal potions. Don’t ask me why or how, just know the three ways to lift the curse.” Skye sighed. “These three things are very rare, namely the fountain of life, fountain of vitality and the flower of mist. “

When Chen Rui heard the fountain of life, his heart moved, but he never heard of the other two. He immediately asked cautiously, “Do these three antidotes have to be used together or can they work separately?”

The fountain of life can lift Eve and Alian’s poison curse, and the fountain of vitality and the flower of the mist shadow are the keys to dispel the curse on my body. However, my vitality has been consumed by some secret technique. As long as you can find the fountain of life and free my two daughters from pain, I can help you make two pieces of equipment first.”

Chen Rui thought about it and decided to confirm it. He said, “I heard the teacher talk about the fountain of life. I think it loses effectiveness within half an hour after leaving its source. I don’t know if this is it…”

Skye was shocked and seemed very emotional. He said quickly, “This is the kind of fountain of life I require! I have a magic bottle here, which can contain the fountain of life for three months.”

“Give me the magic bottle.” Chen Rui knew what it was, but he could not expose the power of the galaxy garden in front of Skye. He said, “I will immediately seek out my teacher to ask about the whereabouts of the fountain of life. I’m sure I won’t be kicked out for just asking only.”

Skye said nothing and threw the bottle to Chen Rui. Chen Rui took out a piece of hydra skin. “There are two pieces of hydra skin in total, which can be considered my mortgage. And these few bottles of medicine, consider it as a gift to Eve and Alian. Sir, please don’t reject it. After all, Alian’s poison curse was just triggered again. Please don’t blame her for her words; she’s just a child.”

Skye expressed gratitude and nodded without pretentiousness.

Chen Rui left the Cloak Gang and rushed toward the arena.

Skye’s mechanica master identity was an unexpected gain. The reason why the father and daughters were cursed was certainly not simple, but for now, it was not the time to investigate. He could give Skye the fountain of life at any time, but the key to this deal was watching the creation process. At present, the most important role of <Deep Analysis> was to crack the “God-Eating Mask”. He had to wait until at least after the mask was completely cracked to release extra mental power to “imprint” the leather armor making skill.

Back in the arena, he saw Athena and the others waiting for him. It turned out that Royce had rushed back overnight.

This time Royce went to the Red Spirit Estate secretly. After many setbacks, he finally found the place where the treasure was buried. With his bloodline power as the key, he obtained the secret treasure as expected.

Royce took out a box and handed it over respectfully. Chen Rui opened it to see. It was a silver necklace with a blue gem in the center. The necklace was also dotted with blue light. It looked simple and elegant, but it was the secret treasure of the Sloth Royal Family, “Evil Blue Tear”.

“Evil Blue Tear” looked better than “Dark Will”, but it was just a more quaint necklace. It did not have the power fluctuations. It was seriously inconsistent with the title of “The Sloth Royal Family’s greatest treasure below the artifact”.

Chen Rui initially wanted to try its effect, but no matter how he looked at it, the necklace was for females. He couldn’t lower his dignity to put it on in front of Athena and a few maids, so he had to find an excuse to slip into underground to try it. Athena’s laughter came behind him.

After reaching the room on the basement floor, Chen Rui put on the necklace without hesitation. The moment he put on the necklace, he had a wonderful feeling. It felt like some kind of heat flow was spreading out in all directions, circulating around the body, and finally retracted into the blue gem in the center.

Chen Rui had an idea. He felt his mental power began to focus quickly, and the focusing speed and quality were better than usual. He tried to combine it with the power of the elemental heart and activated <Deep Analysis>. Sure enough, he felt more proficient than usual. In the automatic analysis prompt, it was recommended that the number of times per day had changed from “two” to “three”. After completing <Deep Analysis> three times, there was no sign of mental exhaustion. However, after about an hour he felt particularly fatigued. It seemed that the enhancement of the Evil Blue Tear had a certain limit, which was not as good as the elemental heart’s wonder. However, for Chen Rui who urgently needed mental energy to increase the number of times of analysis, it was completely acceptable.

After three consecutive analyses, the analysis progress of the mask increased by 2%. The effect was not bad. Following this progress, the “God-Eating Mask” could be completely cracked in less than one month.

As for the fountain of vitality and the flower of mist, he left it to Royce to use Joseph’s intelligence network to investigate. There was no rush anyway.

A few days passed. After the appearance of the Beelzebub Royal Family, another piece of shocking news came from Dark Moon.

Princess Royal Shea suddenly dispatched imperial guards which was led personally by Commander Kaguron. Using the routine schedule to collect minerals as a cover, they launched a surprise attack on the bandits in Mountain Xilang.

Although the bandits were caught by surprise, under the leadership of the bandit leader, they still did not panic and began to fight back with tenacity. At this time, another key figure that surprised everyone in Mountain Xilang. It was the former mining officer Tim Saiful who had been missing for two years.

Tim rescued the miners imprisoned by the bandits at Mountain Walan, and cooperated with Kaguron to successfully poison the bandit leader. They eventually defeatedp the bandits, and the bandit leader left in defeat.

Currently, Tim had returned to Dark Moon City along with the current mining officer, Chen Rui. Compared to the wit and bravery of the previous mining officer, the human mining officer could only be described by the word lucky.

The story went like this. Chen Rui, who was initially sent to Mountain Xilang, barely escaped from death. After arriving, he avoided getting hunted by the bandits. If it were not for Miss Athena’s protection, the first female swordsman of the Dark Moon, he would have died. However, the human were extremely lucky. As he was on the verge of getting caught, he happened to meet Tim who had been in the underground world below the mine for two years and successfully escaped.

Tim entrusted the human to rush back to the Dark Moon to report it. Hence, Princess Royal Shea made an immediate decision and sent troops to Mountain Xilang. Sure enough, they succeeded in one go.

The good news of Mountain Xilang’s victory greatly excited the Dark Moon military and civilians. The initial fear of the Beelzebub Royal Family had been greatly reduced. For the Saiful Family, it was a big surprise. When they learned that their only child who had been missing for two years and was confirmed to be dead, was suddenly “resurrected”, the family elder, Old Ford cried. When the father and son met, it was a touching scene.

After this battle, Tim became renowned. The whole city was preaching his heroic deeds. Even the “legendary stories” of conquering various demonic beasts in the underground world were spoken vividly, as if they witnessed it with their own eyes.

On the other hand, using Royce’s magic messenger, Chen Rui contacted Joseph “urgently”.

Joseph was initially in “closed cultivation”, using the power of devil fruit to force through the bottleneck. Because this matter was not trivial, he had to interrupt his cultivation.

“My friend, do you feel like the changes cannot keep up with our plans? Dark Moon is about to hold an emergency meeting. I believe that Princess Royal has sent someone to inform you,” Chen Rui said calmly.

“Yes, I’ve received the meeting notification from Royce.” Joseph’s face was a little grim. “I never expected that Tim to be alive. I might be in trouble this time.”

“I know some of your troubles, but the one with the biggest headache in the Red Spirit Estate is still Kanita. Has his subordinate Snowden escaped back to Red Spirit Estate?”

Joseph shook his head. “Not yet, but I have heard rumors that Snowden is in Town Leia. Tim’s sudden appearance is really unexpected. Due to Town Leia’s hostility to Red Spirit estate and this time’s failure, it will be difficult to regain control of the Dark Moon’s west side.”

“With Dark Moon’s current situation, even if the trades with the Shadow Empire is restored, the fundamental problem still cannot be solved. The commercial road cannot be opened in a day or two. Furthermore, what fool would come to such a place?” Chen Rui let out indifferent laughter. “As for how to control, just let your father worry about it. This time, the responsibility happened to be pushed to Kanita. Who asked Snowden to be his subordinate?”

Joseph smiled. “You’re right, my friend, but there is one more thing right now. Hearing Royce’s report, the Saiful Family wants to take this opportunity to suppress me and put Tim in the finance officer position. However, this is obviously impossible to do. Their true target is the sheriff position.”

“I have also heard the news, and I would like to remind you that even under the same forces, the conflicts and fights between the new and old forces are still unavoidable, just like… you and Kanita. I heard that you have an interesting wager with the current mining officer?”

Joseph was tacful. He understood the “intention” of this reminder. His eyes flashed, and he asked, “You mean…”

“It seems that you have already understood it, for example… the Cloak Gang, the imperial guard reserve forces, is also one of the emerging forces. And there is still a small purposely-fostered friendship between me and that human.”

“My friend, you’re really too cunning.” Joseph paused for a moment and revealed a knowing smile. “With your support, I believe the internal conflicts on the Princess Royal’s side will become even more chaotic.”

Chen Rui laughed together. His tone suddenly changed. “Oh right, there is one more thing I want to tell you first. The Gorefiend Gang of the Mellon Family seems to be quite dissatisfied with the Cloak Gang. I plan to completely eliminate them and take control of Dark Moon’s potential forces at one go.”

Joseph hesitated a little and said, “The Mellon Family is just an unreliable fence-sitter. It may lean to the stronger side at any time. The main target is currently my father. If this is a part of your plan, then I don’t have any opinion.”

“Very well. This is indeed a part of the plan. Soon, you will see the true effect of control.” Chen Rui nodded. “Okay, communication time is almost up. You will be returning to Dark Moon soon anyway. If there is a chance, we will meet up to talk. Although it is a pity that you interrupted your training, I believe that it is only a matter of time before you break through the bottleneck.”

Joseph smiled slightly. The image of magical messaging faded gradually.

Chen Rui came to the lobby and issued an order.

“Vasasha, immediately notify Jesse to gather some forces in the Cloak Gang to go all out tonight and eliminate the Gorefiend Gang! Arux, I leave the leader of Gorefiend Gang, Wick to you.”

Arux was gently wiping the dark star iron scythe in his hand with a silk cloth. After hearing that, a bloodthirsty gaze appeared in his red eyes.

Tonight was destined to be a night of massacre.

Joseph really thought their plan was going well, but he didn’t know the forces in the Dark Moon were slowly controlled by Chen Rui.

chapters.title: Chapter 191 - Inner Demon
chapters.body:
Chapter 191 - Inner Demon

Chapter 191: Inner Demon

Early in the morning, the Dark Moon city was discussing a major event again. The Cloak Gang attacked Gorefiend Gang’s nest at night. Arux, who was defeated by Aguile at the arena and had become Aguile’s subordinate, personally killed Gorefiend Gang’s leader, Wick. The Gorefiend Gang was almost annihilated. Only a few negligible thugs escaped. Since then, the Cloak Gang became the largest force in the Dark Moon City.

Certainly, the Cloak Gang also had the title of imperial guard’s reserve forces. This title represented Princess Royal, the highest ruler of Dark Moon. Therefore, although the Melon Family, also a supporter of Gorefiend Gang, hated the Cloak Gang, they dared not to avenge on the surface.

At the same time, another news spread, diluting the bloody event from the previous night. That was, the temporary meeting 3 later would decide the new finance officer and sheriff. Recently, Tim had the greatest support. The momentum was clearly created intentionally.

Compared with these news, the human mining officer who returned pitifully to the Dark Moon became a joke for the people after meals. Other than the major decision-makers like Shea nad Gauss, few people were happy with Chen Rui’s “return”.

Aldas had been immersed in researching the black potions and refused to see anyone. After learning that Chen Rui had returned, he interrupted his research to meet up with Chen Rui. Chen Rui gave him another set of True series black potions, saying it was a reward for the grand master’s trial, but he must be sure to keep it confidential.

Judging from Aldas’s gloomy eyes, he obviously didn’t hear any other words. His eyes was almost like a pervert, who hadn’t touched a woman for 100 years, seeing a stunning naked girl seducing him. Before Chen Rui could finish speaking, Aldas had already “robbed” away the precious potions with superman-like speed and rushed into his underground secret laboratory. He never came out again and this “dive” would probably take a very long time.

Chen Rui’s current identity wasn’t suitable to go to the arena, so he had been living in the lab. Athena also moved into the laboratory in the name of protection. The imp, Slee was very happy to reunite with his master after so long. Some time ago, Slee was controlled by Princess Royal, so the only thing he could do to pass the time was to read books. The books on the basic knowledge of pharmacy that Chen Rui gave him were all finished reading by the imp. He had great interest over pharmacy. He turned out to be a far more “competent” apprentice than Chen Rui.

Chen Rui didn’t actually go to Mountain Xilang. The reason Tim was able to leave the mine was not because he took a longevity potion, but because of the effect of the magic bottle that Chen Rui got from Skye.
