At this time, footsteps sounded outside. It was Athena who had just returned from the barracks.

Athena was dressed in armor. As she walked into the laboratory hall, she saw Kia and was slightly stunned. She nodded at her. Chen Rui hurried forward and hospitably handed her a towel and poured her some water. He even wiped Athena’s sweat affectionately.

Athena looked a little shy with an outsider beside her, but she didn’t resist. Kia was secretly surprised. Based on this situation, the relationship between the two is already quite close. Athena is a “Higher Demon”. Unexpectedly, she is fooled by a weak human like Chen Rui!

“By the way, Athena, I passed by the shop today. I saw a nice dress, so I bought it for you. I don’t know if it fits well.” Chen Rui took out a wrapped gift box and handed it to Athena.

Athena’s red eyes brightened, and she took it over. Naturally, she couldn’t change here, so she went straight to her room.

When Athena walked into the room, Chen Rui said to Kia, “You should have noticed that Athena and I are already in a relationship, so you should rest assured that I won’t have any inappropriate thoughts about you.”

Kia’s eyes flashed and she shook her head. “This is not necessarily true. Men are all like this. While eating what’s in their bowl, they still look at what’s in the pot…”

Who was the predecessor who passed through and left the final famous quote? Chen Rui was embarrassed and quickly added, “You can rest assured that I will never mess around. Athena is very jealous. If she finds out, would she not slice me into two with her sword?”

At this time, the jealous Athena had changed her clothes and walked out of the room.

The initial leather armor that she usually wore was replaced by a white short dress. This short dress had a strange design. The upper body looked like a short-sleeved shirt with a simple and generous pattern printed on it. The design of the shoulders was slightly puffy which looked somewhat like a dress. The lower half of the dress reached the knee. It was slightly puffy and fitting. In the middle was a black, tight wide belt, which set off her figure.

“Does it look good?” Athena blushed. This was the first dress that Chen Rui gave her. The whole process from receiving the gift to changing into it made her feel happy.

“I think I can only use the word perfect to describe you!” Chen Rui meant what he said. Athena was very beautiful in this dress. When Athena heard his praise, her eyes flashed. The sweetness in her heart couldn’t increased furthermore.

“Oh, I almost forgot. I bought these shoes too.” Chen Rui glanced at the boots on Athena’s feet and smacked his head. He took out a pair of small leather shoes like performing a magic show.

With the clothes and the small leather boots, one couldn’t tell that she was a female swordsman. She was totally a generous girl next door. She looked very touching.

Since Athena walked out of the room, Kia’s eyes had never left her clothes. She walked forward in amazement. She looked at the new dress carefully and praised it, “This dress is so beautiful! Chen Rui, where did you buy it? Why have I never seen this style of clothes before!”

Sure enough, the lethality of beautiful clothes on women was huge, regardless of the subject. Kia even forgot to say the word “master” that she pretentiously said just now.

“Actually, I found a clothes making store and asked them to make it according to my requirements. I also added some small inspirations to the middle. It looks pretty good now.”

“So… you designed it yourself?” Kia was even more surprised: It seemed that this human knew how to make a woman happy. He even designed the clothes himself. Athena was probably deceived by this type of trick. Hmph! Despicable means, but… this dress is a bit charming…

Of course, Chen Rui couldn’t say that this dress was slightly modified based on the style from the other world. He just nodded vaguely. In fact, when he opened his online store that year, he ordered a lot of women’s clothing. He still remembered a lot of styles, but he couldn’t copy them completely. He had to conform a little to the unique features in the Demon Realm.

Kia seemed very sensitive to the clothes. She even arranged some folds carefully according to the texture. Athena noticed the envy that involuntary flashed in her eyes.

“Thank you, Kia.” Athena looked at Kia who helped her fix her belt and smiled. “Since you’re already here, you don’t need to be nervous. Serve Chen Rui well; we are still friends. As for the clothes… he will also gift them to you next time.”

This is the “jealous” Athena that the guy mentioned?

Kia looked at Chen Rui suspiciously. She blinked her flirtatious eyes, then showed a charming smile. “Kia understands.”

Chen Rui lamented in his heart that this time, he had shot himself in the foot. With this succubus around, it seems that the teeter-tottering mind game still has to go on for a long time.

Who was Kia? Was she really a spy?

chapters.title: Chapter 198 - Visitors From The Imperial City
chapters.body:
Chapter 198 - Visitors From The Imperial City

Chapter 198: Visitors from the Imperial City

Although Kia was a bit of a trouble, life still had to go on. Every day Kia still went to the Princess Retail Store to help. As for her accommodation, there were still a lot of rooms in the laboratory. However, since there was a third wheel there, whether it was training or daily life, especially being intimate with Athena, Chen Rui felt troublesome. He regretted accepting this task a little.

However, Chen Rui discovered one of Kia’s specialties, that was clothing design and production. Not only was her craftsmanship very delicate, but she was also creative. She modified several styles provided by Chen Rui and made them more beautiful. Chen Rui had a clever idea. He added a women’s clothing counter in the Princess Retail Store. The clothes would be using superior materials and elegant packaging. It was mainly targeted at the upper class aristocratic women.

The Princess Retail Store had successfully embarked on a path that symbolized nobility and taste. Today, the launch of this women’s clothing counter had gotten more sales than expected. Especially the limited edition ones which had caused the noble women to fight over it. The little loli was so happy that she couldn’t stop smiling.

When Chen Rui was ready to go to Silent Night Wetlands, the special agent sent by the Imperial City to assist in the investigation of Beelzebub finally reached the Dark Moon.

There were four main people who came to Dark Moon this time. From Chen Rui’s memory, two people had already come to the Dark Moon for the second time. The knight wearing a silver armor was called Sergey, the genius Great Demon of the Rus Family and the upstart of the Imperial City military. At first, Sergey accompanied Sandro to the Dark Moon to challenge Aldas. In the end, Sandro was poisoned to death by a “fart”, thus Sergey and others returned dejectedly.

The second lich was also an old acquaintance that the master challenged last time, Master Kemp. This master once used 50 purple crystal coins to win over Chen Rui in an attempt to use him to steal Aldas’ poison formula. At that time, 50 purple crystal coins were already a lot of money to Chen Rui. Now it seemed like Kemp was bullying this bumpkin apprentice who did not understand the market. If Aldas’ formula was real, even fifty black crystal coins could not buy it.

Among the other two, one was the dark goblin. Generally speaking, the dark goblin was the lowest class in the Demon Realm, even lower than the imp’s status. However, from the respectful attitude of the accompanying person, this dark goblin must be a master level character of certain aspect.

Among the visitors from the Imperial City, the most noticeable one was a stunningly beautiful woman.

The woman looked like she was in her early thirties. She had curly blond hair, and she wore a delicate silver crown on her head. Her indigo eyebrows were a little dark, and her green eyes sparkled with the light of autumn. Her sexy, slightly purplish lips showed a mature, beautiful and moving charm.

In terms of beauty, this woman was on par with Shea, but she had the opposite vibe. She was wearing a low-cut long dress with blue lace seams, and a seductive gully squeezed out between her two full hills. Her bare shoulders were covered with a translucent black veil; the indistinct appearance contained endless temptation, but this seduction was wrapped up in an inviolable nobility and grace, which tempted people even more.

Chen Rui, who was behind Shea, secretly gave the woman a high rating of 9 points. As for 8 points, that was Christina.

The woman’s gaze glanced past everyone’s stunned expression. Once she met eyes with Shea, it was as if the goddess of spring had met the goddess of ice and snow. A bunch of invisible electric sparks exploded in the collision of gazes.

Shea’s eyes were colder, but her actions were not rude. “Lady Isabella, Master Tata, Master Kemp, General Sergey, welcome to Dark Moon.”

Isabella seemed to be the head of the Imperial City visitors. She bowed as her lips forming a graceful smile. Her charming voice sounded. “It’s a great honor to see you again, Princess Royal Highness. Your Royal Highness has become more beautiful. Time flies so fast; the ignorant little girl from ten years ago has become the lord of an estate.”

Shea bowed her head slightly in return, saying, “Yes, time flies very fast. I remember that my lady was still the wife of General Takuman back then, but now she has become the wife of Bogans. The only thing that hasn’t changed is your unsurpassed beauty like a devil’s snare (also known as mandala flower that is beautiful but poisonous).”

Chen Rui secretly muttered. These two beauties don’t seem right. They haven’t seen each other for ten years, but they are provoking each other upon their first meeting.

“This must be Royal Highness Alice.” Isabella saw Alice beside Shea. “She truly is a cute little princess.”

Alice’s eyes fell on Isabella’s amazingly plump breasts, then an envious look appeared on her innocent face. “Sister… You are so beautiful there.”

When she called her sister at first, Isabella smiled very happily. After the second half of the sentence, the smile suddenly froze. As soon as that sentence came out, everyone’s eyes “took the chance” to focus on that “pretty” part in response to the little princess’ summon.

Shea frowned. “Alice! You are so rude. Apologize to the lady quickly!”

“It’s very beautiful.” Alice pursed her mouth grievously, and tears seemed to be flashing in her big eyes. “I love that necklace…”

Everyone suddenly realized that she was talking about the necklace! Out of agreement with the little princess, they all used “appreciative” eyes to look at the necklace a few more times. Of course, most of them focused on the part below the necklace.

Chen Rui knew that Alice did it on purpose. He saw this trick the first time he met this blackhearted loli. The icy royal sister and the blackhearted loli VS the sexy, mature woman; the home team won the first round.

Isabella recovered in an instant. She paid no mind to the eyes around her and said generously, “Thank you for your compliment, Royal Highness. Sister will gift you a beautiful necklace later.”

Alice immediately stopped crying and smiled. “Thank you, sister!”

After this episode, the group came to the council hall of the Dark Moon Palace. After a simple welcoming ceremony, Shea introduced them one by one.

Chen Rui already learned about these people from Shea yesterday.

Isabella was the most famous beauty of the Fallen Angel Emperor Imperial City, known as the Imperial City’s Flower, also known as Lady Devil’s Snare. The Demon Realm’s devil’s snare was a well-known poisonous flower. Its appearance was very beautiful, but it contained terrible toxins. After being made into some kind of potion, it could make people addicted and willing to abandon oneself step by step under its toxicity.

This Lady Devil’s Snare remarried several times, but her husbands did not live long. The most recent marriage was to the son of Prime Minister Elton, Bogans, but she soon became a widow again. Although she was a woman, she had an extensive network, superior means, and the obsidian prince’s deepest trust. Her current status was financial advisor, assisting the Finance Minister Legu to manage the economy and finances of the entire empire. It was said that the Finance Minister Legu was just an imaginary figure; the one truly in charge was this beautiful devil’s snare. There were also rumors that Isabella was actually the mistress of Regent Obsidian. In any case, she was one of the empire’s authoritative figures.

The dark goblin, Tata was a well-known master of the Mechanic Association. He was proficient in manufacturing magic tools. He was stateless person. Although he had no nationality, all three empires treated him as an honored guest. One reason was to respect Tata’s superb skills, and the other was to give face to the Mechanic Association. The Mechanic Association and the Potioneer Association was collectively referred to as the Alchemist Association, but because the two branches of alchemy, manufacturing and potion making, had very different technical scopes, they were two completely independent alliances. Manufacturing was more difficult. The number of mechanic masters was less than that of potioneer masters, and they were more valued to a certain extent.

This time, it seemed that Master Tata just followed Isabella to the Dark Moon as he was just on the way to the Dark Moon. He had nothing to do with investigating the Beelzebub Royal Family. Master Kemp was one of the special agents. As a potioneer master, his real motive was worth pondering. Sergey’s father, Doren Rus, was one of the three Empire Generals, second only to Athena’s father, George Wells. He was the earliest Empire General to defect to the Obsidian Prince. Both father and son were deeply regarded by the Regent. Master Kemp quickly recognized Chen Rui, who was next to Shea, as the human apprentice who took 50 purple crystal coins without reporting back. When he heard Shea said that this guy was actually the new sheriff in Dark Moon City, he was immediately taken aback. He put away the thought of “accusing”. Even Isabella couldn’t help but take one more look at Chen Rui. The only one who didn’t respond was Master Tata. To be precise, the dark goblin master focused his attention on the crystal in his hand since the beginning, playing with it as if nobody was around. Whether it was Princess Shea, Lady Isabella, or the human sheriff, they were not as attractive as this inconspicuous crystal. Sergey openly mocked him, “Is there really no one else available in Dark Moon? The sheriff is actually a powerless human!”

Chen Rui looked ashamed. He lowered his head and secretly activated <Analytical Eyes>, displaying Sergey’s information. Race: Great Demon (mutated). Comprehensive strength: D-.

This Sergey was naturally arrogant and looked down on everyone. He was horribly defeated by Athena in the Emperor Swordsmanship Competition five years ago. When he followed Sandro and his party to the Dark Moon, he was challenged by Athena and almost ruined Sandro’s “important matter” to challenge Aldas. As someone of the same age as Athena, being able to reach Higher Demon level made him live up to the word genius.

When he first came to Dark Moon, Sergey must not have been a Higher Demon. It was likely that he broke through recently. However, Athena was now quickly approaching the later stage Demon King. She could even become Great Demon King in half a year, while the latter was not comparable at all.

The dark goblin’s race also prompted mutated. The comprehensive strength was E+ which was the later stage Intermediate Demon. Master Kemp was a middle stage Intermediate Demon.

Isabella. Race: Sloth Royal Family. Comprehensive strength: B+.

Isabella and Roman were both of the Belphegor Royal Family!

Chen Rui was taken aback. According to Shea, Isabella was an important member of the Lucifer Royal Family. Why does it appear as Sloth Royal Family in <Analytical Eyes>?

<Analytical Eyes> should not make mistakes. Is there a problem with Shea’s intelligence? Or there is a problem with Isabella? Chen Rui bowed his head silently with doubts.

Alice saw Sergey publicly humiliating Chen Rui and her impression of this Imperial City General immediately dropped to the lowest point. As she was about to speak, she heard Shea’s cold voice. “General Sergey, in any case, Sheriff Chen Rui represents our Dark Moon, please watch your words.”

In the face of Shea, Sergey didn’t dare to be too impudent. He sneered, but didn’t mock him anymore. However, the condescending look in his eyes did not retract in the slightest.

Isabella spoke, “As far as I know, this Chen Rui’s journey to get the sheriff position was dramatic, but Sir Chen Rui is the only disciple of Master Aldas. He must excel in some way. Well, before we discuss how to deal with the Beelzebub Royal Family, let’s hear Master Tata’s motive for the visit this time. Master Tata? Master?”

In doing so, Isabella expressed her respect for Master Tata. However, she shouted several times, but the dark goblin was still playing with the crystal in his hands, as if he had not heard anything. Many people felt irritated simultaneously, as if it was a sin for Master Tata to ignore a beauty like Isabella.

Only a certain loli gloated with a smile. Hmph, what is so great about having big breasts?

Would this investigation team find out Chen Rui’s identity?

chapters.title: Chapter 199 - Punishment And Ball
chapters.body:
Chapter 199 - Punishment And Ball

Chapter 199: Punishment and Ball

When Master Kemp on the side gently touched Master Tata, the focused dark goblin master suddenly woke up. He then noticed Isabella’s calls and said to Shea, “I need a superb moonlight stone. If you can find it for me, I am willing to help you make three magic items no less than excellent grade.” Although the superb moonlight stone was a very rare material, Master Tata’s magic accessories were the best grade in the Demon Realm. Furthermore, the promised magic items were guaranteed to be at least excellent grade; it was definitely worth it.

Accessories were different from weapons or armors. Due to its flexibility in volume, its magical properties could be made good use of. Chen Rui had seen many of Christina’s magical tools. All of which were quite amazing.

Shea frowned. “According to the ancient records, the moonlight stone appeared several times in Dark Moon hundreds of years ago, and there was a superb one among them. However, there has been no news over the years. How about this, can the master stay in Dark Moon for while? I will immediately send someone to look for relevant news.” “Up to seven days.” Tata thought for a while. After speaking this sentence, he continued to play with the crystal and did not pay attention to anyone.

Superb moonlight stone? Chen Rui thought of Glorfin’s infiltration into the underground world was to absorb the power of moonlight stone to ease the backlash of the “God-Eating Mask”. The earth elemental Doug, who was sacrificed, once said that the underground below Mountain Xilang was a huge treasure chest. In addition to the main veins of high-quality iron ore, there were also rare mineral deposits such as moonlight stone, dark star iron, and bloodline silver. The location of the moonlight stone deposit was in the Earth Realm area.

If they wanted to get three magic items made by Master Tata, it seemed that they must take a trip to Earth Realm. However, it seemed that Isabella’s group was preparing to stay in Dark Moon. As the most important sheriff, he most probably could not leave. Moreover, including travel time in the underground world and mining time, seven days was likely to be insufficient.

Isabella said calmly, “Well, Princess Royal Highness, we can start to discuss the main topic. The Royal King attaches great importance to the emergence of the Beelzebub Royal Family. The fragment of the “God-Eating Mask” was lost in the hands of Princess Royal Highness, you cannot absolve yourself of the blame. As you know, I have to deal with a lot of matters in the Imperial City and I can’t stay in the Dark Moon for too long. Let’s just follow Master Tata’s time of seven days. Within seven days, I hope Princess Royal Highness can give me a satisfactory answer that I can tell the Regent King.” Coldness gleamed in Shea’s eyes. She said coldly, “Lady Isabella, are you here to assist in the investigation? Or are you going to accuse me? If you are here to assist in the investigation, I am very willing to cooperate with you. If you are here to condemn me, as the financial advisor, you are not qualified.” Isabella didn’t care about the contempt in Shea’s questioning and shook her head. “Your Royal Highness is not only the lord but also part of a royal family. You should know what does the recovery of the “God-Eating Mask” mean, and what the surname Beelzebub means to the Dark Moon and the Fallen Angel Empire. Your Royal Highness not only lost the fragment of the “God-Eating Mask”, but you also could not find the whereabouts of the Beelzebub Royal Family. Don’t you deserve to be punished? Due to unforeseen circumstances and Princess Shea being a member of the royal family, it’s just a symbolic punishment… If Royal Highness cannot give me a satisfactory answer within seven days, then from the next quarter of the year, Red Spirit Estate’s food funding for Dark Moon will be halved.”

As soon as this sentence came out, the face of everyone present in the Dark Moon changed. They began to whisper. Dark Moon’s land was barren, and it was difficult to grow food. For thousands of years, food shortage had been an unsolvable disease. Even in the Dark Moon’s most prosperous times, its food source still relied on “import”.

Red Spirit Estate was aware of this, so in the name of “funding”, they firmly held the lifeline of Dark Moon. Now Prince Obsidian cut off half of the food support with just one sentence, then Dark Moon’s nerve-wracking food problem would become more prominent, and it was likely that there would be a large-scale famine. This cruel sanction was also called a “symbolic” punishment?

Shea stood up slowly. Anger was burning in her cold eyes. Even the arrogant Sergey felt the terrible cold from Shea and did not dare to move.

Just as the atmosphere was deadlocked, an inopportune voice sounded. “Lady… just asking, if Princess Royal Highness can give a satisfactory answer in seven days, food funding will not be decreased?” The one speaking was Chen Rui who stood up. When Shea heard Chen Rui’s voice, the chill she was releasing immediately stopped. Isabella’s eyes moved slightly. She looked at the weak human sheriff with interest. “Sheriff, please listen to my suggestion in good faith. You should go back and learn some etiquette. Your current wording and speech are very presumptuous to a beautiful lady. However, I can answer your question; yes.”

“I’m sorry for my rudeness. I just took office, and I don’t know anything.” Chen Rui continued to scratch his head without any manners. “Then according to Lady’s words, if Princess Royal Highness accepts the punishment, we don’t have to care about the Beezelbub matter?”

“Hold on!” The Old Ford of the Saiful Family stood up and said coldly, “Chen Rui, you’re an outsider. You don’t even understand the importance of food to the Dark Moon! If a big famine happens to the people, can you take this responsibility?” Chen Rui didn’t speak in a good tone to Old Ford either. “Sir Ford is old now. You seems to have become more forgetful. Didn’t Joseph say this at the meeting? After he is re-appointed as the finance officer, he will increase food aid by 30%, so there is 80%. And with the food purchased from the Dark Shadow Empire, it is almost enough!” “Shut up!” Shea glanced back at Chen Rui, seemingly reprimanding him for revealing important news, but her gaze became steadfast. “Since this is the case, the full authority of the Beelzebub matter will be given these few Imperial City special agents. I trust the Royal Highness Regent King’s decision. You will certainly eliminate the greatest hidden danger of the empire. As you can see, Dark Moon’s affairs are very busy; I can’t host you for too long. Then seven days later, I will wait for your answer, Lady Isabella. If you can’t give me a satisfactory answer, then I have the right to demand the withdrawal of the so-called symbolic punishment!” Every Dark Moon citizen calmed down, all showing a “so that’s how it is” expression. Only the Old Ford who had “quarrelled” with Chen Rui expressed dissatisfaction, but he actually admired the quick wit of the sheriff who had saved his son’s life. Even if Joseph took out 30% more, the total amount of food was actually less than 80%. As for buying food from the Dark Shadow Empire, it was completely fake.

However, the Saiful Family had achieved great success in meat cultivation over the years. As for Shea’s food plan… Old Ford knew part of it. Dark Moon’s current food should be unprecedentedly abundant, so they were not afraid of such a sanction of the Imperial City. However, these were “secret weapons” that couldn’t be revealed for the time being.

Chen Rui’s reckless intervention not only calmed the hearts of the people, but he also enabled Princess Royal to take the initiative instead.

Isabella’s emerald eyes glanced over Chen Rui, who was hiding behind Shea. She was secretly surprised. She had effectively attacked Dark Moon’s morale, dropping a heavy burden on Shea, but who knew this sheriff who understood nothing would tell such a gag shamelessly. Shea seized the opportunity to give her a dose of her own medicine and smashed the burden back.

“Then, I want to forgo my manners and ‘question’ Princess Royal.” Isabella stood up. When everyone thought she was about to deliver an offensive speech, a charming smile suddenly appeared. “I’ve heard of the Dark Moon hospitality. Why is it that we’ve been here for so long, but the welcome ball hasn’t been prepared yet?”

This sentence eased the atmosphere at once. Everyone smiled. Chen Rui secretly said that this woman was clever. She could use one joke to change the topic and start another round without anyone knowing.

Shea also seemed to have forgotten the tit-for-tat just now. She politely discussed the dinner and ball.

After the dinner, it was a routine welcome ball. Athena seemed to have further insights on her powers in the past two days, so she locked herself off in the lower level of the arena. The guards were handed to Arux to train, so she did not attend the ball tonight.

Unlike the last Master’s Challenge, although Chen Rui was still a powerless human, he was no longer the invisible person in the corner. Several women invited him to dance, the reason was of course due to his sheriff’s identity. Unfortunately, Chen Rui was uninterested in this kind of activity, so he politely declined.

A Demon Realm ball had much fewer rules than a human ball; it was very casual. Chen Rui slowly moved to an inconspicuous corner and picked up a glass of red fruit wine, waiting for this tedious activity to end earlier. The most popular one at the ball was Isabella. She had changed into a black evening dress. Her elegant temperament exuded an attractive charm. After dancing with Sergey, her butterfly-like dancing posture attracted the attention of most people. People kept inviting her for a dance.

Shea was the complete opposite. It could be said that no one paid attention to her. In fact, Shea’s beauty was not inferior to Isabella, but everyone knew that she never accepted anyone’s invitation, so no one wanted to get rebuffed.

“Hmph! Coquettish woman!” Alice’s dissatisfied voice sounded beside Chen Rui. It turned out that the little loli had been paying attention to Chen Rui. She finally got away from her sister and came to Chen Rui’s side as she wished. There was also a glass of wine in her hand that she had taken secretly.

“Alice.” Chen Rui snatched the glass from the little loli. “You can’t drink alcohol.”

Alice glared at him. “Hmph…”

This loli suddenly thought of something. Her expression changed as if she was looking at a dumbass, and her bright eyes were gleaming with shining light. She said nicely, “Brother, I will listen to what you say, can you dance with me?”

Chen Rui quickly shook his head. “I’ve never danced before; I really don’t know how to dance.”

His previous life didn’t count. He really never danced after rebirth, and this court dance was very complicated. He really didn’t know how to.

“Never danced before?” The little loli’s eyes brightened. She got closer and whispered, “Then, give brother’s first time to Alice!”

“Pfft.” Chen Rui spurted out a mouthful of wine. This vocabulary is too ambiguous!

Alice screamed, looking at the red wine splashed on her dress. She felt so aggrieved that she was about to cry. “This is my favorite evening dress!”

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui put the glass down in a hurry. As expected, Alice’s yellow dress had a large red spot on it, which couldn’t be wiped off no matter how he wiped.

Ten minutes later, the little loli who pretended to cry won. Chen Rui knew he was wrong and surrendered, forcing himself to appear on the dance floor.

Demon Realm’s court dance was similar to the 15th century European court dance in pairs. There were no cuddling moves, but it was cumbersome. It had a lot of rules. Chen Rui exchanged positions several times, feeling flustered. At this time, Isabella and Sergey were on their second dance already.

Sergey was obviously proficient in this, skillfully changing movements and dance steps. His graceful posture and handsome appearance attracted the attention of many surrounding demon women. Of course, the most attractive one was still the glamorous Isabella. Together, they were a perfect match; they were definitely the focus of the whole ball.

In contrast, Chen Rui and Alice on the side became the contrast. Initially, Alice danced well, but because she had to cooperate and guide Chen Rui, so she looked awkward. However, the little loli was not angry. She kept teaching him patiently.

Chen Rui accidentally bumped the person behind him while changing positions and quickly apologized. He could not keep up with the subsequent movements. Sergey noticed it and deliberately pulled Isabella closer to him, laughing scornfully. “Bumpkin, move aside. The dance floor is not the place for scum like you.”

Before Chen Rui could speak, Alice had already said angrily, “Nuisance! It’s none of your business!”

“The princess of the Dark Moon is no better than him. She can’t even dance properly.” Sergey looked at Alice dismissively and suddenly added maliciously, “It’s due to a lack of discipline from an early age right.”

Alice’s father, Crown Prince Grimm died early. This touched the little loli’s injury. Her eyes suddenly turned red, and she tightly squeezed the hand holding Chen Rui’s.

Isabella raised her indigo eyebrows slightly and looked at Sergey lightly without being obvious. Seeing the little loli’s sad look, Chen Rui was angry at Sergey’s despicableness. He immediately answered back sarcastically, “No wonder the Rus family has always been inferior to the Wales Family. Turns out they only know how to bully girls.”

“What did you say!” Sergey’s father, Doren Rus, had always been ranked below Athena’s father, General George. He was known as the second general. Sergey was most particular about others saying this. He suddenly became furious. His eyes were gleaming with murderous intent.

“Now you want to start attacking me as a powerless human?” Chen Rui was not scared at all. “Don’t forget, this is a dance floor. Please leave if you don’t want to dance.”

“A bumpkin like you deserves to say the word ‘dance’?” Sergey showed a ruthless look. He had an idea and stopped dancing. He let out his strength and said loudly, “Everyone, please pause!”

The crowd stopped immediately and the sound of the orchestra also stopped.

“The Honorable Sheriff said just now that he would like to show me a true court dance in pairs. I am looking forward to it,” Sergey said, pointing to Chen Rui. “Let’s all watch the beautiful dance of the Honorable Sheriff and the Royal Highness little princess of the Dark Moon.”

There was an uproar in the crowd. Everyone had seen Chen Rui’s level before, so they presumed that Sergey did so intentionally. Isabella maintained her smile, neither stopping nor encouraging. Sergey’s method was a bit despicable, but it was also good to use this opportunity to humiliate the Dark Moon.

How would Chen Rui counter this humiliation this time?

chapters.title: Chapter 200 - Waltz! Dancing With Shea For The First Time
chapters.body:
Chapter 200 - Waltz! Dancing With Shea For The First Time

Chapter 200: Waltz! Dancing with Shea for the First Time

Alice didn’t expect Sergey to be so despicable, actually wanting Chen Rui, a novice, to embarrass himself in public. She hated him so much, and her little fist was tightly clenched.

Seeing the little loli’s worried look, he thought of her image of patient teaching and protecting him without hesitation just now, Chen Rui’s eyes showed steadfastness, and he he held the little loli’s hand. As he was about to speak, he heard a light voice sounded.

“Alice is not feeling well these days. If you want to see a true court dance, let me do it.”

This icy voice contained a touch of strength, overshadowing Sergey’s arrogant laughter. It turned out to be Shea’s. The Dark Moon crowd was taken aback. They never expected that Princess Royal Highness who never accepted dance invitations, intending to personally come forward.

If it was only Chen Rui, Shea might not have made such a public appearance. However, they even involved her sister, Alice. As the older sister, Shea could not keep silent.

Isabella was next to Sergey, and this was a ball, she naturally had no fear. He said, “It’s just that a moment ago, Sir Sheriff said…”

“Since it’s a couple dance, naturally the sheriff and I will dance together.” Shea looked at the the smile on Isabella’s face that was anticipating a “good show” and her eyes became colder. Old Gauss, Old Ford, and others looked worried. This matter included the little princess, which was already related to the face of Dark Moon. Now that Princess Royal intended to come forward in person. If she failed again, it was really equal to being beaten by these Imperial City people.

Chen Rui never thought that there would be a day he could dance with Shea in front of everyone. He looked at the slowly approaching iceberg beauty in shock. He felt anxious. Suddenly, Shea’s soft voice sounded in his ear. “Relax your mind for a while; don’t resist my power.”

Chen Rui was stunned. It turned out that Shea planned to use Demon King level power to control his body to complete the dance. However, this way, the movement would unavoidably be stiff, but it was still better than embarrassing himself. This may be a coping solution, but it could not effectively counterattack the guy with the wicked words.

In fact, when Alice was being mocked by Sergey just now, he already had another plan in mind.

Chen Rui thought for a moment and suddenly exclaimed, “Everyone, let me say this in an uncourteous way. The current ballroom dance is complicated and restrained. For example, General Sergey’s movements just now were too contrived, which was actually equal to insult the beautiful woman beside him.”

This disguised compliment made Isabella smile even more charmingly, but she was secretly alert. This sheriff is not simple. It seems that the previous intervention in the council hall was no accident.

It’s just that his dance skills are really bad. What methods will he use to muddle through this obstacle?

“The true ballroom dance is not only solemn and elegant, but it should also be gorgeous and full of vitality.” Chen Rui glanced at the Sergey who was sneering. “Just now I made an agreement with General Sergey that if I can show a true court dance that he hasn’t seen before, then he will show us the bold style of the Imperial City and walk out of here without clothes.”

As soon as this sentence came out, there were many whispers in the surroundings. Many women focused on Sergei’s fit body, and they could not wait to see the scene immediately.

“If General Sergei is unwilling to acknowledge this bet, then I regret that I can only hide my strength.”

“You want to use this trick to escape?” Sergey was furious, and he yelled, “Okay! As long as you can really do it, I’ll take off my clothes and walk out of here!”

Chen Rui whispered to Alice. The little loli hesitated for a moment, then she came to the orchestra under his encouraging gaze, waiting for his signal to start.

Chen Rui walked up to Shea and reached out to make an inviting gesture. Shea looked him deeply and gently put her hand on top. At the moment of contact, the hearts of the two trembled in unison. Although they were only connected by their fingertips, the strange feeling of electric current flowed into each other’s hearts.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and whispered, “Princess Royal, can you trust me?”

Shea’s gaze looked hazy. She seemed to have returned to the time when she appointed this man as secretary, and her heart became hazy as well. “En.”

As soon as this sentence came to an end, Chen Rui initially only touched Shea’s fingers, but he changed suddenly, holding her hand completely. He felt that her palms were as warm as jade, not as cold as he imagined.

The crowd on the sidelines were startled. The new sheriff has no other talent, but his courage, or his lust is absolutely first-class, he even dares to hold the hand of Princess Royal Highness like this!

It was the first time Shea’s palm was held by a man like this. She instinctively trembled, then she restrained it. Her annoyance was mixed with a bit of a strange feeling. It seemed that her heartbeat was speeding up involuntarily.

What happened afterward stunned the crowds. Besides this guy holding the Princess Royal with his left hand, he even pressed closer and stretched out his right hand to hug the Princess Royal’s shoulder! He was too overpower!

Driven by lust, he doesn’t want to live anymore! This adjective rose in the minds of the Dark Moon people at the same time, even the former sheriff, Alan who was drunk in the corner was no exception. There was a moment of silence in the area.

It seemed that the rumors were indeed true. This overconfident Chen Rui was obsessed with the Princess Royal’s beauty. For this reason, he went to that awful place Mountain Xilang and finally came back alive with much difficulty and fortunately became a sheriff. Now he was actually…

When he held her hand at first, Shea could still bear with it. However, his inordinate actions later made her eyes gleaming with chillness. He actually did so in front of so many people…

Just when she was about to get raged, she heard Chen Rui’s low voice. “Stand straight with your feet close to one another. Puff out your chest and straighten your waist, suck in your abdomen and lift your hips, relax your hips naturally… hold your right hand in my left hand, put your left hand on my right shoulder lightly, and hold it gently between your fingers…”

Shea used to like dancing very much as a young girl. She knew upon listening that it must be a dance pose. She remembered what he said before, and repressed the embarrassment in her heart and listened to Chen Rui to explain the essentials of the moves.

Someone was betting whether Chen Rui could live past ten seconds, but the thing that shocked everyone happened again. Shea actually put her hands on Chen Rui’s shoulders in cooperation, even pressing her body close. The current position of the two was… very… intimate.

When did Princess Royal, an iceberg beauty that no one has ever been able to get close to, become like this? Could she have been drugged by this damn man!

Hallucination. It must be a hallucination!

Even Alice’s eyes widened. At last, she could see Chen Rui’s gaze and ordered the orchestra to start playing.

“Dance of the Night Demon”.

This dance song was very long, and its rhythm was slower. Its moves were more demanding. It was a very difficult dance song. The two “intimate” people on the dance floor began to move. It really was a dance; a couple’s dance that had never been seen before.

The cooperation between the two was previously jerky, but soon became proficient. Shea had strong basics. Under the guidance of Chen Rui’s hands and body, she quickly grasped the essence of the new dance. Her moves were mainly about the pace, while the turns were mainly led by Chen Rui.

In the dance, Shea’s mind became more and more relaxed. She was completely absorbed in this long-lost feeling, and her movements became more natural and beautiful.

Chen Rui was a frequent visitor to dance training classes at university. At that time, the goal was to get close to “her”, who also loved to dance. Although she ended up dying of an illness, she was the only relationship he had in that world. This scene seemed to have returned to the past, except the dancer in his arms had been replaced by another more beautiful woman. Thinking of the intangible feelings with this woman, Chen Rui couldn’t help but feel his heart beat faster.

The two showed beautiful poses with their gentle and deft tilting, swaying, turning, and rotating moves. Most of the attendees came from aristocratic backgrounds who received relevant etiquette and dance training from an early age who could be called experts. They were gradually attracted by the charm of this novel couple’s dance. Alice blinked her eyes, looking excited and envious. Only Sergey’s face looked increasingly ugly. The song ended. Almost everyone stood up and applauded warmly. There was a feeling of wanting more.

In fact, Chen Rui also wanted to revisit the wonderful feeling just now, but Shea had already let go of his hand and distanced herself. She resumed the icy appearance of keeping people thousands of miles away, so he had to give up on that idea.

“Sir Chen Rui, the performance just now was really wonderful.” Isabella came over and sincerely gasped in admiration. “Can you tell me the name of this dance?”

It was the first time Chen Rui interacted with Isabella in such a close distance. He felt a slight heat from the floral scent exuding from her body, and he could not help but be swayed. This mature beauty’s limbs did not move inappropriately, but just the faint blinking of her eyes in those deep emerald eyes gave people the impulse to tear her grace and nobility apart.

It seemed that he had to add a special trick to the 9-point evaluation: inner charm. Compared to this ripe peach, Kia was just an unripe green apple.

Of course, this peach was not good for nibbling. If he really became infatuated, the top Great Demon King powers was one thing, but the name Lady Devil’s Snare was not for nothing.

“Lady should know that I am a human,” Chen Rui smiled politely. “This is a dance from our human world, called a waltz.”

The waltz was originally considered to be a bold dance. In fact, it took a long and difficult process to become a court dance. However, this was the Demon Realm. It was not too restrictive, so it was easily accepted by everyone.

“Waltz, a very nice name. Since Sir Chen Rui is proficient in this dance, he must also be an aristocrat in the human world. He actually pretended not to understand etiquette previously,” Isabella added a hint of coquettishness, “No more of that. I really want to learn this new dance. I wonder if you would like to teach me?”

“It’s an honor, but before that, I want to admire General Sergey’s fit figure,” Chen Rui smiled slightly, but did not look at her again. Instead, he set his eyes on Sergey, who looked pale. “General Sergey, as you wish, I have shown this new dance, and even Lady Isabella is willing to learn from me. I think… it is time for Sir General to show your boldness.”

When Isabella saw that Chen Rui was not attracted by her beauty, but instead, he used her flirting as “evidence” to persecute Sergey there. Then, her eyes flashed even more.

The eyes of many women in the area all focused on Sergey, especially some noble ladies whose needs were not being satisfied. Under the hungry gaze, even Sergey felt creeped out.

If gaze could kill, Chen Rui was already a honeycomb briquet. Unfortunately, Sergei did not have the royal family’s Eye of The Incubus or The Eye of Evil. He could only glare at this damn sheriff with fierce eyes, wishing he could tear him to shreds.

“Could that rumor… about Rus Family tradition in being dishonest be true?” Chen Rui acted as if he hadn’t seen Sergey’s murderous eyes. He purposely pretended to be shocked and added loudly, “No, that’s not true! I believe in Sir Sergey’s character!”

These words were actually insinuating the unscrupulous act of the Rus Family betraying Crown Prince Grimm and defectubg to Prince Obsidian’s side. The “believe” in the last sentence forced Sergey into a dead end.

Sergey’s teeth were about to be gritted until they broke. Finally, he conceded defeat. The new formal wear on his body slowly burst apart. Under everyone’s gaze, it was quickly ripped clean.

Shea already came to Alice’s side and covered her eyes.

Sister is so meddlesome. I don’t even want to see that nuisance. Unless, the one undressing is… the daring little loli suddenly blushed.

Sergey tore off his clothes very quickly. People with insufficient powers only saw his figure flickering, then he teleported to the door. It seemed that being powerful had its benefits; even streaking could be accelerated.

The nasty voice from the back rang again. “General! Why did you even take off your pants? Our agreement was just the shirt!”

Sergey, who was already angry and embarrassed, felt furious. There was a sickly sweet smell in his throat. Finally, he couldn’t help spitting out blood, then he disappeared.

“He’s bold alright; he is indeed a visitor from the capital.” Chen Rui said with emotion, then asked Isabella, “Excuse me, Lady Isabella, where were we?”

Isabella’s emerald eyes flickered. She was not displeased by this forgetful ignorance. Her elegant smile still remained. “Sir Chen Rui said just now that you are willing to teach me the waltz.”

Chen Rui nodded. “Naturally. However, today’s ball is about to end soon. Next time I have the chance, I will satisfy the lady’s wishes.”

“Although it’s a little regrettable, it’s… alright.” The smile on Isabella’s mouth was even more charming. “Well then, I’m looking forward to the next visit. I will visit sir if there’s a chance.”

After the ball ended, Alice dragged Chen Rui happily and asked a lot. The little loli knew in her heart that Chen Rui humiliated Sergey to avenge her. Her red face was full of excitement.

“Alice!”

Shea’s voice sounded. The little loli reluctantly glanced at Chen Rui. “Promise me, you have to teach me the waltz when you have time!”

Chen Rui glanced at Shea, coincidentally meeting Shea’s gaze. He felt something unclear in her icy gaze. Suddenly, a “tacit comprehension” that they had while dancing formed in their hearts at the same time.

Shea quickly returned to normal and walked out with Alice.

Strangely, even though she didn’t look at Chen Rui again, she knew that Chen Rui was watching her, just as Chen Rui knew that she knew.

Such a beautiful tacit understanding, but their hearts were unlikely to be connected.
